String.Source: The Vampire Lord uses melee attacks when he is walking and magic attacks when he is floating. Use the sneak button to switch from one to the other.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼领主在行走时使用近战攻击，飘浮状态下使用魔法攻击。使用潜行按钮可以进行切换。

String.Source: Thaer

<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> Lynoit,
We've received word of an increase in Vampire activity in western Skyrim. In the coming weeks, we plan to dispatch several more agents to the region, and need to establish a network of wilderness supply drops to support them.
You are to plant caches in the following locations: - On the small island south of Solitude Sawmill. - Due east of the entrance to the ruin Volskygge. - On the east side of Karthwasten Bridge.
If these reports are to be believed, the situation may be far more dangerous than you realize. Be cautious. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> 利诺特：
我们接到消息，西天际的吸血鬼活动有所增加。接下来几周，我们计划加派特工到该地区，并建立一个野外补给网络来支持他们。
你要在以下地点设立隐秘点： -独孤城伐木场南边的小岛上。 -沃尔斯盖吉遗迹入口正东。 -卡斯威斯腾桥东侧。
如果报告属实，那么情况可能比你想象的还要危险。多加小心。 </font>

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> Saliah,
In the past several weeks, all of the couriers sent to replenish our supply caches in the northern reaches have gone missing. These drops must be made within the week to ensure our operatives have the provisions they need.
You are to restock the following caches: - In Morthal, on the islet due east of the mill. - Outside Nightgate Inn, at the foot of the pier. - Near Winterhold, under the great arch.
Take care. Too many of our agents have been lost on this task already. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='17'> 莎莉亚：
过去几周，派往北部地区送货的人都失踪了。这批货物是我们的人需要的补给，必须在一周内送到他们手里。
你需要去补充以下隐秘点： -莫萨尔城，在伐木场正东的小岛上。 -夜扉旅店外的码头下。 -冬堡附近的大拱门下。
务必当心，我们已经因此牺牲太多人了。 </font>

String.Source: Durnehviir! Hear my Voice and come forth from the Soul Cairn. I summon you in my time of need.
String.Dest: 杜耐维尔！听从我的吼声从灵魂石冢出来，听我召唤，此刻正需要你。

String.Source: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> By order of the Dawnguard, the <Alias.Race=Player> <Alias=Player> is hereby condemned to death for the crime of Vampirism. By our authority, and with the Jarl's implicit consent, the bearer of this writ is hereby commissioned to exact justice upon the condemned wheresoever <Alias.Pronoun=Player> may run. </font>
String.Dest: <font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='20'> 根据黎明守卫的命令，<Alias.Race=Player> <Alias=Player>系吸血鬼，当判死罪。根据我们的授权，并经由领主的默许，此令状持有者特此受命，无论被定罪者<Alias.Pronoun=Player>逃往何处，均应施行正义的审判。 </font>

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> Novice Hakar,
Your repeated failures are an embarrassment to our entire order. Are you truly so inept you cannot even complete a simple courier mission?
You have one last chance to redeem yourself. We recently established a number of wilderness caches to supply our agents in the field. You are to restock the chests listed below, then report back for further orders.
Our caches in Whiterun Hold are located: - In Rorikstead, in the pasture behind Frostfruit Inn. - Near Stendarr's Shrine in the center of the tundra. - South of Whiterun's Western Watchtower.
You have one week. Return successful, or not at all. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont' size='16'> 新手哈卡尔： 你一再的失败让全教团都为之尴尬。你真的笨到连个简单的送信任务都完成不了了吗？
最后给你一次挽回失败的机会。我们最近新建立了一批野外隐秘点，为我们的外出人员提供物资补给。你需要去补充下列箱子，再回来报告领取进一步的任务。
我们在白漫领的隐秘点位于：
-洛利克镇霜果旅店后面的田场。 -苔原中心地区斯丹达尔祭坛附近。 -白漫城西部哨塔南部。
你有一周时间。要是不成功，就别回来了。 </font>

String.Source: Also known as "Altmer" in their homeland of Summerset Isle, the high elves are the most strongly gifted in the arcane arts of all the races. They can call upon their Highborn power to regenerate Magicka quickly.
String.Dest: 高精灵在自己的家乡夏暮岛也称“傲特莫”，是所有种族中奥术天赋最高的存在。他们可以召唤自己的“高贵血统”来迅速恢复魔力。

String.Source: Blood Magic: Can pull a creature to you from a distance, and do choking damage once it's close.
String.Dest: 血魔法：将一个生物从远处拉至身边，靠近时对目标造成窒息伤害。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
Dear <Alias=Friend>.
I don't know how to repay your kindness, except perhaps to keep my distance so that I may not bring unwanted attention or harm to your doorstep.
Should you need to get in touch with me, come to <Alias=Dungeon>.
-- your friend
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
亲爱的<Alias=Friend>：
我不知道如何报答你的好意，我只能与你保持距离，以免给你家带来不必要的关注或伤害。
如果你需要联系我，请到<Alias=Dungeon>来。
——你的朋友

String.Source: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead vampires and Imperial guards. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
String.Dest: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

String.Source: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. We've set out to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll, and the trail has led us to Dragon Bridge.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。我们要找一个能读懂瑟拉娜上古卷轴的蛾祭司，线索把我们引到龙桥镇。

String.Source: Choose your Night Power (power button)
String.Dest: 选择你的暗夜之力（力量按键）

String.Source: After bringing the Elder Scrolls to Dexion, a disturbing development has arisen. When reading the first scroll in front of Harkon's court, he wasn't able to fully prepare himself and he's become blind. It's now up to me to bring all three Elder Scrolls to the Ancestor Glade where I can supposedly unearth an ancient method of reading them myself.
String.Dest: 将上古卷轴带给戴希翁的时候，不安的进展出现了。他首次在哈孔的宫廷前阅读时，没有做好充分准备，因而失明了。现在我得把这三卷上古卷轴带到先祖林地，自己发掘阅读它们的古老方法。

String.Source: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead Imperial guards and vampires. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
String.Dest: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

String.Source: Sends out a quick pulse that detects any creature.
String.Dest: 发出一道快速音波探测一切生物。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Night Power while in Vampire Lord Form will be Bats.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，在吸血鬼领主状态之下的暗夜之力变为蝙蝠位移。

String.Source: I rescued the Moth Priest from his vampire captors and asked him to meet me at Fort Dawnguard. I must return to Isran and tell him of our success.
String.Dest: 我从吸血鬼手中救出了蛾祭司，邀请他到黎明守卫堡垒见面。我必须回去找伊士冉，告诉他我们成功的消息。

String.Source: In combat you are surrounded by a cloud of bats that feed on enemies within melee range.
String.Dest: 战斗中，一团蝙蝠将围绕于你身边，并啃食近战范围内的敌人。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I am to destroy the <Alias=Vampire> before it turns its allies into vampires.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Dungeon>消灭<Alias=Vampire>，阻止它把盟友转化成吸血鬼。

String.Source: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I accepted the gift and joined his court.
String.Dest: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我接受了这份礼物，并加入了他的宫廷。

String.Source: The power of the grave gives you <50> extra health.
String.Dest: 坟墓之力给予你<50>点额外生命。

String.Source: 27th Last Seed Harkon's shortsightedness is becoming a serious problem. I've warned him time and time again that his foolish prophecy would cast far too much light on our people and yet he refuses to so much as listen to a word I say. I've become less a wife and more of an annoyance in his eyes. Devoting attention to my work is the only solace I can find while enduring his ridiculous crusade. 28th Last Seed I've had a breakthrough today. I was able to attune the portal vessel to the Soul Cairn properly by using a small sample of ingredients. Although the portal opened only for a few seconds, I'm confident that with the proper formula, it can be sustained indefinitely. I feel like I'm missing a key ingredient, something of sufficient potency that can resist the forces trying to prevent my intrusion. Communing with the Ideal Masters has proved worthless. They speak in riddles and offer no assistance whether I ensure them a steady supply of souls or not. If I'm to escape Harkon's clutches, I need to keep the portal open long enough to carry me away from here... forever if need be. 3rd Hearthfire I've done it! After wasting thousands of gold coins on components, I've discovered how to sustain the portal. I'm listing the components below without the proper amounts for my own protection. As a secondary precaution, I am combining my own blood into the formula which should prevent anyone from being able to duplicate it and following me into the Soul Cairn. The formula consists of: Finely ground bone meal Purified void salt Soul gem shards Using the proper measurements, place the above in the silver-lined portal vessel and add blood as a reactive agent. I will make my way into the Soul Cairn tomorrow after I gather my things and prepare for a potentially lengthy exile. More importantly, I must enact my plans with Serana, and get her to Dimhollow Crypt as soon as possible.
String.Dest: 末种月27日 哈孔的短视正在变成一个严重的问题。我一次又一次警告他，他那愚蠢的预言会给我们的族人引起太多注意，但我说的话他一句都不听。在他眼里，我不再是妻子，而是一个麻烦鬼。埋头于工作是我在忍受他那愚蠢的行动时唯一的慰藉了。 末种月28日 我今天有了个突破。我能使用少量材料，把传送通道正确地与灵魂石冢相协调。尽管传送门只打开了几秒钟，但我相信只要配方正确，它就可以无限期维持下去。我想我少了一种关键成分，一种有足够效力的物质来抵制那股试图阻止我侵入的力量。事实证明，与理想之主交流毫无价值。无论是否保证供应充足的灵魂，他们都在当谜语人，也不提供帮助。如果我想逃离哈孔的魔掌，我得让传送门开得足够久，好带我离开这里... ...如果有必要的话，是永远离开这里。 炉火月3日 成功了！在浪费成千上万金币买的原料后，我找到了维持传送门的方法。为了自保，以下列出的成分没有标明正确的数量。作为第二道保险，我要把自己的血液加入配方，这样就没有人能复制它，跟着我进灵魂石冢了。 配方包括： 精研骨粉 纯净虚无盐 灵魂石碎片 称取适量，将上述物质置于镶银边的传送门管道，加入血液作为活性剂。 明天我就准备，收拾出漫长流放之旅所需的东西后，进入灵魂石冢。更重要的是，我必须执行我跟瑟拉娜的计划，尽快带她去幽空地穴。

String.Source: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. I returned to Isran and told him what happened.
String.Dest: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。我回去找到了伊士冉，将具体情况告诉了他。

String.Source: When I returned to Castle Volkihar, I was informed that Lord Harkon was waiting to speak to me.
String.Dest: 我回到了沃基哈尔城堡，得知哈孔大人正在等我。

String.Source: You lack the proper item
Turn someone into a vampire.
Werewolf Totem of the Hunt howl has extended range, and shows whether the targets are not in combat, searching, or actively in combat.
String.Dest: 狼人的狩猎图腾嚎叫范围扩大，并且显示目标的状态是战斗中、搜索还是积极战斗。

String.Source: While exploring Dimhollow Crypt, I freed a young woman from an ancient sarcophagus. She asked me to guide her home, to a castle off the northern coast of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 在探索幽空地穴时，我从一个古老石棺中救出了一个年轻女子。她让我带她回到位于天际北部海岸某座城堡的家里。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. With her help, I solved the Tonal Lock that protected its ruined treasury and claimed the Aetherium Shard within.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。在她的帮助下，我解开了保护宝藏的音调锁，获得了里面的神光水晶碎片。

String.Source: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead vampires and Imperial guards. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
String.Dest: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Capital> to warn <Alias=Jarl> of a vampire masquerading as a visiting advisor to <Alias.PronounPosObj=Jarl> court. I am to destroy the beast. If I fail to secure <Alias=Jarl>'s permission first, the guards will consider it a murder.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我到<Alias=Capital>去警告<Alias=Jarl>，有一个吸血鬼伪装成<Alias.PronounPosObj=Jarl>宫廷中来访问的顾问。如果我不先获取<Alias=Jarl>的首肯，贸然行动会被卫兵当成谋杀。

String.Source: In order to locate Auriel's Bow, the Moth Priest, Dexion, indicated that two other Elder Scrolls would be required. The first scroll foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. The second foreshadows the defiance of the gods with the blood of mortals.
String.Dest: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，蛾祭司戴希翁表示还需要两卷上古卷轴。第一卷预言了龙与奈恩历史的互动。第二卷预言了凡人之血对众神的违抗。

String.Source: <Cool graphic>

After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to read two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

String.Source: 50 point bonus to health, magicka and stamina as Vampire Lord.
String.Dest: 变为吸血鬼领主时，提高生命、魔力、耐力50点。

String.Source: Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll. I followed the trail to Dragon Bridge and learned that a Moth Priest had just passed through town. He was last seen heading south along the road.
String.Dest: 哈孔命令宫廷去找一个能读懂瑟拉娜的上古卷轴的蛾祭司。我沿路走到龙桥镇。得知有个蛾祭司刚刚经过镇上。最后一次是被看到沿着大路向南去了。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Habitation> where I am to learn the current whereabouts of the <Alias=Vampire>. I will learn this through interrogation of his last known contact <Alias=Friend>, or searching for evidence. Once its location is obtained, I am to destroy the beast in its lair.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我前往<Alias=Habitation>寻找<Alias=Vampire>的下落。我要审讯他最后联系过的<Alias=Friend>或者寻找其他证据。等确定了位置，就去把这野兽消灭于巢穴。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that made up the key to the Forge, then defeated its ancient guardians.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片，然后击败了守护锻炉的远古守卫。

String.Source: Following Harkon's command to locate a Moth Priest, I followed the trail to Dragon Bridge. There, I learned that a rival band of vampires abducted the Moth Priest I've been tracking and took him to a place called Forebears' Holdout.
String.Dest: 遵照哈孔的命令，我找到了一个蛾祭司的下落，循线索来到龙桥。然后得知一群敌对的吸血鬼绑架了我一直追踪的蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。

String.Source: <Cool graphic>

In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that made up the key to the Forge, and combined them to reveal the entrance to a long-sealed ruin.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片，将之组合在一起，揭示了一个长期封印的遗迹入口。

String.Source: Feeding heals twice as much health.
String.Dest: 进食可以获得两倍的生命。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to retrieve the <Alias=Item> from <Alias=Dungeon>. <Alias.PronounCap=QuestGiver> will be able to use it to master new technology to provide to the Dawnguard members.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Dungeon>取回<Alias=Item>。<Alias.PronounCap=QuestGiver>能够用它来掌握新的技术提供给黎明守卫成员们。

String.Source: Bloodlust extended

I've met Isran, the leader of a group of vampire hunters known as the Dawnguard. The vampires that attacked the Hall of the Vigilants may have been after something in a place called Dimhollow Crypt. Isran has asked me to find out what the vampires are looking for.
String.Dest: 我见到了吸血鬼猎人组织“黎明守卫”的首领，伊士冉。袭击斯丹达尔警戒者之厅的吸血鬼可能是冲着一个叫幽空地穴的地方去的。伊士冉让我去找出吸血鬼站在找什么。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Notes on Dimhollow Crypt x Vol. 3 As written by Adalvald

[pagebreak]

Divines be praised! Here at last is the breakthrough I have been seeking. All the dangers I have escaped, the traps I have eluded and the foul draugr I have avoided have brought me at last to this. In my previous volume of notes and observations regarding Dimhollow Crypt's possible connections to the ancient vampire clans of Skyrim's history, I wrote of a great chamber, far larger than anything else I've yet seen here in the crypt. Alas, a few wandering draugr forced me to retreat to the earlier passages of the crypt, thus depriving me of an opportunity to study this huge cavern. Well, praise be to Stendarr, for as I write this, I have just spent nearly a full day exploring that very cavern. It was a risk that proved more than worth it, because what I found in that chamber nearly defies description. Central to this huge cavern is an island of stone in a subterranean lake. Upon this island is something I can only describe as an elaborate ceremonial construction surrounded by stone columns linked by arches. There is no mistaking the stark contrast in architecture here; no ancient Nords made this stonework. Here, too, were more of the gargoyle statues that I first glimpsed in earlier passageways. There is no draugr burial site in Skyrim that contains these statues, save Dimhollow Crypt. Indeed, I am now certain that the strange construct in this main chamber was built long after the crypt, and by wholly different masters. These must be the same builders who placed the gargoyles through the crypt, perhaps to frighten away the curious. All signs seem to indicate that the masons who crafted these strange arches were servants of some ancient master who favored necromancy or vampirism. The style and craftsmanship in the stonework are not only distinct in terms of design, seeming to speak of an entirely different culture than that of the old Nord peoples, but also in skill with which they were fashioned. The cutting and shaping of the stone, for example, suggests more sophisticated tools than the crypt's original architects would have possessed. Although I feel a sense of exhilaration that my theories have at last been confirmed beyond any shadow of a doubt, I am also disappointed at the lack of answers. How long ago were these new features added to the crypt? And by whom? And for what purpose? On one point, I have no doubts. I must return to the Hall of the Vigilant and share these findings with my brothers and sisters. When they see what I've discovered with their own eyes, they will no longer scoff at my theories or mock my endeavors. And when that is done, I will return to my work. For now, Dimhollow Crypt might be a mystery, but by Stendarr I will see that mystery solved.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

幽空地穴的笔记 第三卷 阿达瓦尔德 著

[pagebreak]

多谢圣灵保佑！这就是我一直在找的重大突破。我所躲过的危险，绕开的陷阱，避开的肮脏尸鬼，终于让我走到了这一步。 上一卷中，我说幽空地穴可能与天际历史上的古老吸血鬼氏族存在联系，还提及了一座大厅，比我在地穴中看到的任何东西都要大得多。 哎，几个游荡的尸鬼逼得我退回到地穴前面的通道里去了，这样我就没机会研究这座巨大的墓穴了。 嗯，赞美斯丹达尔，当我写下这些的时候，我已经探索这座地穴足足快一天了。 事实证明，这次冒险是值得的，因为我在这大厅里发现的东西几乎无法用言语描述。 这座巨大地穴的中央是地下湖中的一座石头岛。这岛上的东西，我只能将其描述为一座精心设计的仪式用建筑，周遭是由拱门连接的石柱。 毫无疑问，此地的建筑与古诺德人的石雕形成了鲜明的对比，绝非出自诺德人之手。这里也有更多的石像鬼雕像，我之前也在通道里瞥见过。 除了幽空地穴，天际没有哪一处埋葬尸鬼的地方有这些雕像。 实际上，我现在肯定这主室里的奇怪建筑是墓穴修建后很久才由完全不同的主人所建造的。这些人肯定就是把石像鬼放置在墓穴里的建造者，也许是为了吓跑好奇的人。 所有迹象都表明，那些雕刻这些怪异拱门的石匠似乎侍奉某个喜欢死灵法术或者吸血鬼的古老主人。 石雕的风格和工艺不仅在设计上与众不同，似乎也来自与古诺德人完全不同的文化，这些差异也体现在了它们的制作工艺上。 例如，从石头的切割和形状来看，它所使用的工具比地下室最初的建造者们所使用的工具更加复杂。 尽管我为终于能确凿证明自己的理论而感到兴奋，但我也对答案的缺失而感到失望。这些新特征是多久以前加进地穴的呢？是谁加的？又是为了何种目的？ 但有一点，我毫不怀疑。我必须回警戒者大厅，与兄弟姐妹们分享这些发现。当他们亲眼见到我的发现时，他们就不会再嘲笑我的理论或者努力了。 这事办完之后，我就得回去工作了。就目前来看，幽空地穴可能还是一团谜，不过斯丹达尔在上，我会解开谜题的。

String.Source: Your Thu'um cuts through flesh and shatters soul, commanding the will of the fallen.
String.Dest: 你的吐'目刺穿肉体，粉碎灵魂，指挥亡者的意志。

String.Source: It won't budge.
Harkon's vampire agents have captured the Moth Priest and taken him to a place called Forebears' Holdout. I must rescue him before the vampires can break his will.
String.Dest: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。我必须在吸血鬼摧毁他的意志前将他救出来。

String.Source: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest.
String.Dest: 为了解开瑟拉娜手中上古卷轴里隐藏的古老预言，哈孔命令他的宫廷去找蛾祭司。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Aetherium Wars by Taron Dreth Dedicated to Katria, my Friend and Colleague

[pagebreak]

he end, when it came, was swift. In the span of three short years, the great dwarven cities of Skyrim, from Markarth to the Velothi Mountains, fell before the armies of the High King. Cities that had held fast against the Nords for over a hundred years crumbled abruptly and without warning. For centuries, scholars have marveled at the sudden collapse of the Dwemer city-states. Even the Nords seem to have been taken by surprise, though their chroniclers were quick to ascribe their success to King Gellir's inspired tactics and the blessings of Shor. My research suggests a much different cause, however. In the decades preceding their fall, the dwarven cities of Skyrim had been decimated by internal disputes and infighting over a most surprising cause: Aetherium. Modern scholars know Aetherium as a rare, luminescent blue crystal found in some Dwemer ruins. Most consider it little more than a curiosity, as it has proven all but impossible to work with: while it has a strong magical aura, it is alchemically inert, and no known process can enchant, smelt, mold, bind, or break it. [pagebreak] To the dwarves, of course, such problems were merely a challenge. In the years following King Harald's reign, the Dwemer discovered a considerable source of Aetherium in their deepest delvings. An alliance of four cities, led by Arkngthamz, the great research center in the southern Reach, was formed to oversee its extraction, processing, and study, and a new 'Aetherium Forge' constructed to smelt it under precisely controlled conditions. If the inscriptions I discovered are to be believed, the results were nothing short of spectacular: the items produced by the Forge were artifacts of immense power, imbued from the moment of their creation with powerful enchantments. The dwarven alliance shattered almost immediately, as the four city-states and their rivals attempted to claim the Forge. [pagebreak] We can only speculate that none were successful. Decades of conflict merely weakened them all, allowing for King Gellir's subsequent conquests. And though the Dwemer reclaimed most of their lands a century later, there is no evidence that they ever resumed their research on Aetherium. Perhaps the costs had just been too great. [pagebreak] But nothing like the Aetherium Forge described in the inscriptions has ever been found within the borders of Skyrim. It may have been destroyed long ago, by the Nord invaders or the Dwemer themselves. Or perhaps it, like the secrets of Aetherium itself, still remains to be discovered.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

神光水晶之战 泰荣·德莱瑟 著 感谢我的朋友和同事， 卡提雅

[pagebreak]

结局说来就来。在短短三年时间里，从马卡斯到维洛锡山脉，天际广大的矮人城市在至高王的军队面前沦陷了。抵抗诺德一百多年的一众城邦，在毫无征兆的情况下迅速消亡。 几百年来，学者们一直对锻莫城邦的突然陷落感到惊讶。即便是诺德人似乎也很是吃惊，不过他们的记录者们很快就将他们的成功归功于格利尔王突发奇想的战术以及舒尔的祝福。 我的研究则表明了一个截然不同的原因。在陷落前的几十年里，天际的矮人城市因一个令人惊讶的原因——神光水晶——而发生了内部纠纷和内讧。 现代学者们知道神光水晶是一种发现于锻莫遗迹中稀有的发光蓝色晶体。大部分人觉得它就是个奇珍异玩而已，因为事实证明，尽管它拥有强大的魔法气息，却几乎不能加以利用。加之在炼金上的惰性，任何已知的工艺都无法令其附魔、冶炼、浇铸、凝结或破碎。 [pagebreak] 不过对于矮人而言，这些问题仅仅只是个挑战罢了。在哈拉尔德王统治下的几年里，锻莫在他们最深入的挖掘工程中发现了数量可观的神光水晶。由阿肯撒兹领导四座城市组成的联盟，负责监督其开采、加工、研究并建造了一座能够在精确可控的条件下将其冶炼的“神光水晶锻炉”。 如果我发现的铭文是可信的，那结果无疑非常惊人：锻炉生产的物品从诞生的那一刻起就充满魔力，是充满巨大力量的神器。由于四座城邦和它们的对手都想抢走熔炉，矮人联盟几乎立刻就瓦解了。 [pagebreak] 我们只能推测没有人成功。几十年来的冲突只是削弱了他们所有人，从而导致格利尔随后占领了这些地区。尽管一百年后锻莫重新夺回了大部分的土地，但没有证据表明他们重启了对神光水晶的研究。也许是因为代价实在太大了。 [pagebreak] 不过天际境内从没发现过类似铭文中描述的神光水晶锻炉的东西。它一定很久之前就被诺德入侵者或者锻莫自己给毁了。或者锻炉就像神光水晶本身的秘密一样，仍有待发掘。

String.Source: With Auriel's Bow in my possession, it's time to confront Harkon and reshape the prophecy as I see fit.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔之弓已在我手中，是时候面对哈孔，然后按我觉得合适的方式重塑预言了。

String.Source: Able to move and attack faster for <15> seconds.
String.Dest: 移动与攻击速度加快，持续<15>秒。

String.Source: I've destroyed the vampire in <Alias=Capital> masquerading as a visiting advisor to <Alias=Jarl>'s court.
String.Dest: 我消灭了<Alias=Capital><Alias=Jarl>的宫廷中伪装成访问顾问的吸血鬼。

String.Source: Night Power: Everything slows down while you move faster.
String.Dest: 暗夜之力：你移动速度加快的同时，周围一切变慢。

String.Source: All of the ingredients have been placed in the vessel
String.Dest: 所有材料已经放入容器

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Habitation> where I have learned from <Alias=Friend> the whereabouts of the <Alias=Vampire>. I then journeyed to <Alias=Dungeon> and destroyed the beast.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我前往<Alias=Habitation>，从<Alias=Friend>那里得知了<Alias=Vampire>的下落。随后我前往<Alias=Dungeon>摧毁了那头野兽。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to destroy the <Alias=Boss> at <Alias=Dungeon>.
With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。

String.Source: I have retrieved the Amulets of Night Power.
String.Dest: 我取回了暗夜之力护符

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to retrieve the Rings of Blood Magic.
<Alias=QuestGiver> learned that a <Alias=Vampire> kidnapped <Alias=Prisoner>. I rescued <Alias.PronounObj=Prisoner> from in <Alias=Dungeon>.
As Valerica was leading us to the Elder Scroll, an ancient dragon named Durnehviir swooped into the ruins and attacked. It proved to be a challenging battle, but we've emerged unscathed.
String.Dest: 就在瓦蕾莉卡带我们去找上古卷轴的时候，一头名为杜耐维尔的古代巨龙冲入遗迹并发动攻击。虽然这场战斗充满挑战，但也有惊无险。

String.Source: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the moth priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold.
String.Dest: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。

String.Source: I've told Isran what I learned at the vampire castle. Isran has asked me to find Sorine Jurard and Gunmar, and bring them to him.
String.Dest: 我把在吸血鬼城堡的见闻告知了伊士冉。伊士冉让我去找索琳·菊拉德和甘马尔，带他们去见他。

String.Source: With Auriel's Bow in my possession, I need to rally the forces of the Dawnguard before I attempt to confront Harkon and put a stop to the prophecy.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔之弓已在我手中，我需要集结黎明守卫的力量，然后去对抗哈孔，阻止预言的发生。

String.Source: Isran, the leader of a group of vampire hunters known as the Dawnguard, asked me to find out what the vampires were seeking in a place called Dimhollow Crypt. Deep in the crypt, I freed a mysterious young woman named Serana from an ancient sarcophagus.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼猎人组织“黎明守卫”的首领，伊士冉让我前往一个叫幽空地穴的地方查找吸血鬼们的目标。在地穴深处，我从一个古老石棺中救出了一个名叫瑟拉娜的神秘年轻女子。

String.Source: After bringing the Elder Scrolls to Dexion, a disturbing development has arisen. When reading the first scroll in front of the Dawnguard, he wasn't able to fully prepare himself and he's become blind. It's now up to me to bring all three Elder Scrolls to the Ancestor Glade where I can supposedly unearth an ancient method of reading them myself.
String.Dest: 将上古卷轴带给戴希翁的时候，不安的进展出现了。他首次在黎明守卫面前阅读时，没有做好充分准备，因而失明了。现在我得把这三卷上古卷轴带到先祖林地，自己发掘阅读它们的古老方法。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to retrieve the Amulets of Night Power.
With the Moth Priest safely back at Castle Volkihar, the time has come to hear the prophecies contained within the Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司已经安全抵达沃基哈尔城堡，是时候听取上古卷轴的预言了。

String.Source: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> Sister, I know that you'll come find me, but it will be too late. If you find this letter, get out of this forsaken cave as soon as possible. We were fools to think we could live so close to such creatures and live peacefully. I should've headed back to camp with you after we placed the torches down here. I thought these trolls would be different, that they would somehow understand that we didn't want to hurt them. I am now cornered and it's only a matter of time before one of the trolls decides to finish me off. I hope it is a quick death. Farewell, my dear sister. </font>
String.Dest: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 妹妹，我知道你会来找我的，不过已经太迟了。如果你找到了这封信，就赶紧离开这座荒废的洞穴。我们以为能跟这些生物和睦相处做邻居的想法简直蠢透了。 我把火把放这里以后，应该跟你一起回营地的。我本以为这些巨魔会有所不同，它们能明白我们不想伤害它们。 我现在已经无路可退，被巨魔干掉只是时间问题了。我希望能死得痛快点。 永别了，亲爱的妹妹。 </font>

String.Source: I've secured both of the Elder Scrolls needed to fully decipher the Tyranny of the Sun and pinpoint Auriel's Bow. I need to return to Castle Volkihar where Dexion is imprisoned so he can begin his reading.
String.Dest: 我已经拿到了其他两本上古卷轴，可以完全破解太阳暴政，精确定位奥瑞艾尔之弓了。我得回沃基哈尔堡找戴希翁进行阅读了。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to retrieve the <Alias=Item> from <Alias=Dungeon>. <Alias.PronounCap=QuestGiver> will be able to use it to master new technology to provide to the Dawnguard members.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Dungeon>取回<Alias=Item>。<Alias.PronounCap=QuestGiver>能够用它来掌握新的技术提供给黎明守卫成员们。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I destroyed the <Alias=Vampire> before it could turn its allies into vampires.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Dungeon>消灭了<Alias=Vampire>，阻止了它把盟友转化成吸血鬼。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that made up the key to the Forge, defeated its ancient guardians, and forged a powerful artifact.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片，然后击败了守护锻炉的远古守卫，锻造出一件强大神器。

String.Source: Blood Magic: Target is paralyzed.
Serana and I heard a rumor that a Moth Priest recently visited Solitude. He was thought to have stayed at the Winking Skeever.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜听说，最近有个蛾祭司去过独孤城。人们说他住在眨眼恶鼠旅店。

String.Source: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, Isran told me that he needed to speak to me, and he asked me to follow him.
String.Dest: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，伊士冉要和我谈谈，告诉我跟他走。

String.Source: Able to feed off most dead creatures. Feeding off creatures instead of people only provides half the extended time.
String.Dest: 能够啃食大多数死掉的生物。以人类以外的生物为食，只能获得一半的延长效果。

String.Source: When attempting to step through the portal to the Soul Cairn, a hidden force that seems to be draining my life energy is preventing me from entering. I have two choices if I wish to enter the Soul Cairn. I can allow Serana to change me into a vampire, thereby "killing" me in effect. Alternatively, I can allow her to partially soul trap me which could potentially weaken me while I roam the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 当我试图穿过通往灵魂石冢的入口时，一股隐藏的力量似乎在消耗我的生命能量，阻止我前进。如果想进灵魂石冢，我有两个选择。一是让瑟拉娜把我转化成吸血鬼，从而“杀死”我。二是让她在我漫游灵魂石冢的时候把我的部分灵魂困住，但这可能削弱我的力量。

String.Source: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. Now I should return to Isran and tell him what happened.
String.Dest: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。现在我必须回去找伊士冉，告知他具体情况。

String.Source: Werewolf Totem of Brotherhood howl calls werewolves.
String.Dest: 狼人的血亲图腾嚎叫将召唤狼人。

String.Source: I have retrieved the Rings of Blood Magic.
<Alias=QuestGiver> has learned that a <Alias=Vampire> has kidnapped <Alias=Prisoner> and is keeping <Alias.PronounObj=Prisoner> prisoner in <Alias=Dungeon>.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>得知一个<Alias=Vampire>绑架了<Alias=Prisoner>，并把<Alias.PronounObj=Prisoner>囚禁在<Alias=Dungeon>。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that make up the key to the Forge, and met her outside its long-sealed entrance.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片，并在封印许久的入口外见到了她。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver>, concerned that additional vampires in the area will cause problems for the Court, has sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I am to destroy the <Alias=Vampire> before it turns its allies into vampires.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>担心<Alias=Dungeon>的其他吸血鬼会给宫廷带来麻烦，所以让我去消灭<Alias=Vampire>，阻止其把盟友转化成吸血鬼。

String.Source: With the Moth Priest safely back at Fort Dawnguard, he can now read Serana's Elder Scroll and learn more about the prophecy that Harkon is hoping to use to gain power over the sun.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司安全抵达黎明守卫堡垒，他现在可以开始阅读瑟拉娜的上古卷轴了，这样才能了解更多关于哈孔希望用来凌驾太阳力量的预言。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont">
I have new orders for you.
Prepare an ambush just south of the Dragon Bridge. Take the Moth Priest to Forebears' Holdout for safekeeping until I can break his will.
- Malkus </font>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont">
我有新的命令给你们。
到龙桥南边埋伏。把蛾祭司带到先祖据点妥善看管，直到我摧毁他的意志。
-马库斯 </font>

String.Source: You awaken feeling a surge of Vampiric power.
String.Dest: 你醒来时感受到了吸血鬼之力奔涌。

String.Source: Moths have already been gathered from this tree
String.Dest: 这棵树上已经有飞蛾了

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. With her help, I solved the Tonal Lock that protected its ruined treasury.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。在她的帮助下，我解开了保护宝藏的音调锁。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. With her help, I solved the Tonal Lock that protected its ruined treasury and found a strange glowing crystal shard within.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。在她的帮助下，我解开了保护宝藏的音调锁，在里面发现了一块奇怪的发光水晶碎片。

String.Source: Nothing you have will fit into the mechanism.
String.Dest: 你没有能放进装置的东西。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I destroyed the <Alias=Boss>.
<Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Habitation>. I am to find and kill the Dawnguard member masquerading as a <Alias=Target>. I am to do so discreetly.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我前往<Alias=Habitation>。 我要找到并杀死那个假扮的<Alias=Target>。我需要谨慎行事。

String.Source: 100 point bonus to health and stamina in beast form.
String.Dest: 野兽形态下生命与耐力提高100点。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that make up the key to the Forge, and now seek the entrance to the Forge itself.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片。现在我需要去找锻炉入口了。

String.Source: When I returned to Castle Volkihar, Lord Harkon told me of a prophecy hidden in the Elder Scrolls that, if fulfilled, would end the tyranny of the sun over vampires. Now he has asked me to join him as he makes a proclamation to the court.
String.Dest: 我回到了沃基哈尔城堡，哈孔大人告诉我，上古卷轴中藏着一个预言，如果实现，将终结太阳对吸血鬼的暴政。现在他要我和他一起去向宫廷宣布一项声明。

String.Source: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

String.Source: Night Powers and Blood Magic cost 33% less.
String.Dest: 暗夜之力与血魔法的消耗降低33%。

String.Source: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. With her help, I found the four Aetherium Shards that made up the key to the Forge, then confronted its ancient guardians.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。在她的帮助下，我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片，然后与守护锻炉的远古守卫对峙。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Habitation> where I have learned from <Alias=Friend> the whereabouts of the <Alias=Vampire>. I am now to journey to <Alias=Dungeon> and destroy the beast.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我前往<Alias=Habitation>，我从<Alias=Friend>那里得知了<Alias=Vampire>的下落。现在我要去<Alias=Dungeon>清理野兽了。

String.Source: When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me.
String.Dest: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. She offered to join me in my fight to the summit, and I accepted her help.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。她提出要和我一起战斗到顶部去，我接受了她的帮助。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
Hands off the dwarven haul until we know who wants this stuff. Word's gone out to find a buyer. Until then, anyone caught snooping around in here will get his hands cut off.
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
在我们知道谁想要这些矮人货物前，离它们远点。把消息放出去找个买家。在那之前，谁敢在这边翻来翻去，就把谁的手给剁了。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Habitation> where I am to find <Alias=Candidate> and bestow the Gift of Blood upon <Alias.PronounObj=Candidate>. I should first render <Alias.PronounObj=Candidate> pliant through the use of Vampire's Seduction then embrace and bite <Alias.PronounObj=Candidate> on the neck. If I currently lack the power, I should forego feeding for a day as I will gain the ability. I should then return to <Alias=QuestGiver> while <Alias=Candidate> undergoes the change.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我到<Alias=Habitation>找到<Alias=Candidate>并把血之恩赐送给<Alias.PronounObj=Candidate>。我应该先用吸血鬼的诱惑让<Alias.PronounObj=Candidate>变得顺从，再拥抱并咬<Alias.PronounObj=Candidate>的脖子。如果我现在没有能力，就需要放弃进食血液一天。等<Alias=Candidate>被转化后，再回去找<Alias=QuestGiver>。

String.Source: I've found the people Isran said we'd need to fight Harkon and his vampires. Now I should return to Isran and help him formulate a plan of attack.
String.Dest: 我找到了伊士冉口中我们需要找来对付哈孔和吸血鬼的人。现在我要回去找伊士冉，和他制定进攻计划。

String.Source: Coax both magical and mortal energies from your hapless opponent.
String.Dest: 从你不幸的对手那里吸取魔力与生命能量。

String.Source: Night Power: Detect all creatures, even dwarven automatons.
String.Dest: 暗夜之力：探查包括矮人机械在内的一切生物。

String.Source: You are pushed back from the portal by an unseen force and unable to enter.
String.Dest: 一股看不见的力量把你从传送门中推了回来，无法进入。

String.Source: About to change back...

"Blessed be the voice of the Ancestors, for they bestow Sight Unseen. Blessed be the embrace of the Ancestors, for they grant Harmony Unheard. Blessed be the word of the Ancestors, for they bequeath Fate Unchosen."
String.Dest: “称颂先祖之声，他们赐予我们未见之景象。称颂先祖之拥抱，因为他们赐予我们未闻之和谐。称颂先祖之语，他们赐予我们未择之命运。”

String.Source: Choose your Blood Magic (left hand attack)
Mysterious Woman
You need a shovel to use this.
You already have that ingredient
You do not have the proper crest.
New perks become available after feeding on enough corpses. Each new perk requires a few more feedings.
String.Dest: 额外能力依靠进食尸体获得。每个额外能力升级都需要比上一个获得时吃更多尸体。

String.Source: Kill enemies with the Drain Life or bite power attack to earn perks. Each new perk requires a few more feedings.
String.Dest: 额外能力通过使用吸血术或者近战撕咬击杀敌人获得。每个额外能力都要求比前一个额外能力更多的进食。

String.Source: Killing a person with a power attack bite restores all your health.
String.Dest: 以重击咬杀敌人会恢复你全部生命值。

String.Source: Night Power: Transform into an invulnerable mist, while health, magicka and stamina regenerate.
String.Dest: 暗夜之力：变成无法被攻击的雾体，同时恢复生命、魔力和耐力。

String.Source: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest. I now have reason to suspect that there's a Moth Priest in Solitude.
String.Dest: 为了解开瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中隐藏的古老预言之秘，哈孔命令他的宫廷寻找蛾祭司。我现在有理由怀疑独孤城有一位蛾祭司。

String.Source: Do 25% more damage as a werewolf.
Werewolf Howl of Terror affects even higher level creatures.
String.Dest: 狼人的恐怖嚎叫能够影响更高等级的生物。

String.Source: Werewolf Totem of Brotherhood howl calls Ice Wolves.
String.Dest: 狼人的血亲图腾嚎叫将召唤冰狼。

String.Source: Do 50% more damage as a werewolf.
If you sleep in a coffin, you will gain additional power.
String.Dest: 如果你睡在棺材里，可以获得额外力量加成。

String.Source: Once a day, heals 250 points automatically if you fall below 10% health.
String.Dest: 一天一次，当生命低于10%时自动恢复250点。

String.Source: Melee attacks do 20 points of poison damage.
String.Dest: 近战攻击造成20点毒素伤害。

String.Source: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest.
String.Dest: 为了解开瑟拉娜手中上古卷轴里隐藏的古老预言，哈孔命令他的宫廷去找蛾祭司。

String.Source: Serana and I have stepped from Valerica's laboratory on Tamriel to a plane of Oblivion known as the "Soul Cairn" in order to find her mother Valerica. Serana strongly believes if we can find her, she will be able to tell us the location of one of the Elder Scrolls we need to decipher the Tyranny of the Sun prophecy.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜从瓦蕾莉卡的实验室，由泰姆瑞尔来到了湮灭位面灵魂石冢，寻找她母亲。瑟拉娜坚信只要找到她，就能得知破译太阳暴政预言所需的上古卷轴的位置。

String.Source: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. In Valercia's laboratory, we've recreated an experiment she performed and opened a portal to the Soul Cairn, a plane of Oblivion. Serana believes strongly that her mother is inside this strange place and has indicated we should step through.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们重现了她的实验，打开了前往湮灭位面灵魂石冢的入口。瑟拉娜相信她母亲就在这诡异之地，暗示我们应该进去。

String.Source: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our search has taken us to Valerica's laboratory hidden within the ruined tower at Castle Volkihar. According to Valerica's notes found there, she has likely fled Tamriel and entered the Soul Cairn, a dimensional plane of Oblivion. In order to pursue her into the Soul Cairn, Serana and I need to recreate the experiment that opens the portal to this strange place.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们找到了瓦蕾莉卡隐藏在沃基哈尔废墟塔楼里的实验室。根据在那里发现的笔记，她可能逃离了泰姆瑞尔，进入了湮灭位面灵魂石冢。为了追她进入灵魂石冢，瑟拉娜和我需要重现那个打开通往未知之地大门的实验。

String.Source: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our journey has taken us beyond the courtyard of Castle Volkihar where we've discovered a hidden entrance underneath Valerica's old moondial. After exploring the ruined tower beyond, we've stumbled across an old alchemy laboratory. Serana is convinced her mother has hidden some notes that may yield a clue as to her whereabouts.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们来到沃基哈尔城堡的庭院，在瓦蕾莉卡的古老月晷下发现了一个隐藏入口。在探索了遗迹塔楼之后，我们偶然发现了一个古老的炼金实验室。瑟拉娜确信她母亲藏了一些能够提供下落线索的纸条。

String.Source: Serana has indicated her desire to locate her estranged mother, Valerica, who had fled Castle Volkihar with one of the Elder Scrolls. She believes that Valerica may have left a clue to her whereabouts somewhere in the courtyard of the castle. In order to avoid detection by the castle's vampires, we've decided to utilize a hidden entrance on the back side of the island.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，当年她带着一卷上古卷轴逃离了沃基哈尔城堡。她相信瓦蕾莉卡可能在城堡庭院的某处留下了关于行踪的线索。为了避免被城堡里的吸血鬼发现，我们决定使用在岛后面的隐藏入口。

String.Source: Serana has indicated her desire to locate her estranged mother, Valerica, who had fled Castle Volkihar with one of the Elder Scrolls. She believes that Valerica may have left a clue to her whereabouts somewhere in the courtyard of the castle. In order to avoid detection by Harkon, we've decided to utilize a hidden entrance on the back side of the island.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，当年她带着一卷上古卷轴逃离了沃基哈尔城堡。她相信瓦蕾莉卡可能在城堡庭院的某处留下了关于行踪的线索。为了避免被哈孔发现，我们决定使用在岛后面的隐藏入口。

String.Source: We've exited the Soul Cairn with the Elder Scroll in hand. Serana's mother, Valerica, is unwilling to return with us to Tamriel until we've dealt with her husband and completed the Tyranny of the Sun using our own methods.
String.Dest: 我们带着上古卷轴离开了灵魂石冢。瑟拉娜的母亲瓦蕾莉卡不愿和我们一起返回泰姆瑞尔，除非我们解决了她的丈夫并用我们自己的方法完成太阳暴政。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> wishes to sow confusion and anger amongst the people of <Alias=City>. I am to kill a citizen out in the streets while impersonating a member of the Dawnguard. Then I am to place an incriminating letter on the corpse. The higher the profile of my victim the better.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>希望我在<Alias=City>的人民之间散播混乱与愤怒。我要假扮黎明守卫在街上杀死一个市民。然后在尸体上放一封定罪信。我的受害者越引人注目越好。

String.Source: We've exited the Soul Cairn with the Elder Scroll in hand. Serana's mother, Valerica, is unwilling to return with us to Tamriel until we've dealt with her husband and thwarted the Tyranny of the Sun.
String.Dest: 我们带着上古卷轴离开了灵魂石冢。瑟拉娜的母亲瓦蕾莉卡不愿和我们一起返回泰姆瑞尔，除非我们解决了她的丈夫并挫败太阳的暴政。

String.Source: Serana and I have entered the Soul Cairn in pursuit of her estranged mother, Valerica, and the Elder Scroll she took when she fled Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜进入了灵魂石冢寻找她久未谋面的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，还有她逃离沃基哈尔城堡时带走的上古卷轴。

String.Source: Serana and I have located Valerica imprisoned within a massive ruin. When confronted by us, Valerica revealed that Serana's blood is an integral part of the Tyranny of the Sun. After the reconciliation between the two of them, Valerica confessed to having the Elder Scroll hidden in her ramshackle living space. In order to free her from the prison, Serana and I will have to locate and slay the Keepers who maintain the barrier around the ruins.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜发现瓦蕾莉卡被囚禁在一个巨大的遗迹里。与我们见面后，瓦蕾莉卡透露瑟拉娜的血是太阳暴政不可分割的一部分。在两人和解后，瓦蕾莉卡承认在她那摇摇欲坠的住所中确实有一卷上古卷轴。为了解救她，我和瑟拉娜必须找到并杀死遗迹周围维持屏障的看守者。

String.Source: I learned that the mysterious woman I freed from Dimhollow Crypt is named Serana. Her father Harkon is a powerful vampire lord, and in gratitude for bringing his daughter home, he offered me the gift of his blood. Now I must choose whether to accept the gift.
String.Dest: 我从幽空地穴解救出一个名叫瑟拉娜的神秘女子。她的父亲哈孔是个强大的吸血鬼领主，为了感谢我把他女儿带回家，他要把自己的血作为赠礼送给我。我现在必须选择是否接受这份礼物。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Habitation> where I found the Dawnguard masquerading as a <Alias=Target> and killed him.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我前往<Alias=Habitation>。 在那里，我找到并杀死了那个假扮成<Alias=Target>的黎明守卫。

String.Source: After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to find two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

String.Source: Eager to hear the contents of Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon commanded the court to find a Moth Priest. I have now captured one and made him my thrall, commanding him to return to Castle Volkihar. I must report this success to Harkon.
String.Dest: 哈孔渴望听到瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中的内容，命宫廷去找蛾祭司。我抓获了一名，并将其成为我的奴隶，命令他回到沃基哈尔城堡。我得向哈孔报告此次成功。

String.Source: Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest who can read Serana's Elder Scroll. I now have reason to believe that a Moth Priest has recently visited Dragon Bridge.
String.Dest: 哈孔命令宫廷去找一个能读懂瑟拉娜的上古卷轴的蛾祭司。我现在有理由相信有个蛾祭司最近去过龙桥镇。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, a ghost searching for the mythical Aetherium Forge. Together, we found one of the four Aetherium Shards that make up the key to the Forge. She left to search for the other shards and the Forge itself, and urged me to do the same.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了寻找神秘的神光锻炉卡提雅的鬼魂。我们一起找到了组成锻炉钥匙的四块神光水晶碎片之一。她离开去寻找其他碎片与锻炉，并敦促我也一起找。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I destroyed the <Alias=Boss>.

The Book of Life and Service

[pagebreak]

The Ranks of the Blessed Blessed are the Bonemen, for they serve without self in spirit forever. Blessed are the Mistmen, for they blend in the glory of the transcendent spirit. Blessed are the Wrathmen, for they render their rage unto the ages. Blessed are the Masters, for they bridge the past and span the future. The Litany of Service The Boneman's Oath We die. We pray. To live. We serve. The Master's Voice You swore. To Serve. Your Lord.
String.Dest:
生命与侍奉之书

[pagebreak]

有福之列 骸骨仆从是有福的，他们毫无自我，永世侍奉。 迷雾仆从是有福的，他们融入了超凡精魂的荣光之中。 愤怒仆从是有福的，他们将暴躁狂怒传承万世。 理想之主是有福的，他们衔接过去，跨向未来。 [pagebreak] 侍奉的祷文 骸骨仆从的誓言 我们死亡。 我们祈祷。 为求生存。 我们侍奉。 [pagebreak] 理想之主之声 汝等立誓， 从此侍奉， 你们的主。

String.Source: Serana and I have slain all three of the Keepers and the barrier around Valerica's prison has faded. We rejoined Valerica, who has agreed to take us to the location where the Elder Scroll is hidden.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜杀死了三个看守者，瓦蕾莉卡的监狱周围屏障也消失了。我们和瓦蕾莉卡会合，她同意带我们去藏上古卷轴的地方。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to destroy the <Alias=Boss> at <Alias=Dungeon>.

In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. We made our way through the ruins and reached the summit together. There, she warned me that the Treasury of Arkngthamz was sealed by a dangerous Tonal Lock and protected by deadly traps.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。我们穿过遗迹抵达顶部。在那里，她警告我阿肯撒兹的宝库被一个危险的音调锁封印，还有致命陷阱加以保护。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, your Blood Magic while in Vampire Lord Form will be Conjure Gargoyle.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，吸血鬼领主形态下的血魔法变为召唤石像鬼。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
Sojourn awhile in <Alias=Capital>. Infiltrate the court of <Alias=Jarl>. If you can, gently guide the Jarl toward our best interests. If that proves impossible, invite <Alias.PronounObj=Jarl> or a member of <Alias.PronounPosObj=Jarl> court into the family. It's far easier to direct those sharing the blood thirst towards our shared interests.
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
先在<Alias=Capital>逗留一阵子。渗透<Alias=Jarl>的宫廷。如果可以的话，慢慢引导领主为我们争取最大利益。如果可能的话，邀请<Alias.PronounObj=Jarl>或者<Alias.PronounPosObj=Jarl>宫廷的一位成员加入我们。引导那些同样渴望鲜血的人为我们谋取共同利益要容易得多。

String.Source: Enemies struck by this shield become ethereal for <15> seconds, making them unable to attack or be attacked.
String.Dest: 被盾击的敌人进入空灵状态，持续<15>秒，使其无法攻击或被攻击。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source: In Arkngthamz, I met Katria, the ghost of an adventurer who perished there. She warned me that the Treasury of Arkngthamz was sealed by a dangerous Tonal Lock and protected by deadly traps.
String.Dest: 在阿肯撒兹，我遇到了死在此地的冒险家卡提雅之魂。她警告我阿肯撒兹的宝库被一个危险的音调锁封印，还有致命陷阱加以保护。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
Citizens of <Alias=City>. The slain personage before you is a suspected creature of the night. Thus the Dawnguard have slain him.
Let this be a lesson to all men and women demonstrating unholy powers and those who would protect them.
We are watching!
--The Dawnguard
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="18">
<Alias=City>的公民们。死在你们面前的人疑似是暗夜生物。因此黎明守卫必须将他诛杀。
让这件事给那些展露邪恶力量的人们以及包庇者们一个教训。
我们会一直盯着的！
——黎明守卫

String.Source: While wearing this ring, your Blood Magic while in Vampire Lord Form will be Reanimate Corpse.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，吸血鬼领主状态下的血魔法变为复活尸体。

String.Source:
Day 14
I knew I should have volunteered for the excavation earlier. For months, Moric had been going on to the Vigilants about detecting mystical energies deep in the east mountains. Said he'd found some old tomes about the ruins of "Ruunvald," or something the like, a Nordic chamber thousands of years old. I remember thinking "Yeah, if it's so old, how come no one's found it yet? There's plenty of adventurers wandering around these parts."
Seemed like most of the other Vigilants agreed, we had more important things to do. But Moric took a team and went digging, and when he started turning up a long buried temple, well, didn't I feel like a troll in a dung heap.
Soon enough, he was sending back letters to the Hall, begging for as many men as we could send. I didn't volunteer at first, still seemed like a myth to me. But when word came back that they'd hit the main chamber, I packed up and headed this way to help. Always did want to be a part of history, and better late than never, they say.
Well, "they" didn't mention that the late comers would be stuck with guard duty. I just sit up here all day, watching for bandits and wolves, neither of which I've seen. Mostly I just see diggers coming up for supplies. Gotta say, I been seeing them a lot less regular, now that I think about it... Day 19
All right, it's been 3 days since anyone's come up. The last one to emerge was Apa, and he just walked around a bit with a weird vacant look in his eyes. Told Florentius and me to come down as soon as we had the chance, then trudged back in.
Something ain't right, and I aims to find out what...
- Volk
String.Dest:
14日
我就知道我该早点报名参加挖掘的。几个月以来，墨里克一直跟警戒者们询问该如何探测东部山脉深处的神秘能量。他说发现了一些古书，里面记载了关于“鲁恩瓦德”遗迹或类似有几千年历史的诺德墓穴。我记得我当时想：“是啊，如果有这么古老的话，怎么会没人发现它呢？这一带可到处都是冒险者呀。”
其他大部分警戒者似乎也觉得我们有更重要的事情要做。不过墨里克带了一支队伍去挖掘了，当他挖掘出来一座掩埋已久的神殿时，嗯，我会不会觉得自己像粪堆里的巨魔呢？
很快，他就把信送回大厅，求我们能派多少人就派多少人。我一开始没有报名，这事对我来说太虚无缥缈了。不过当听说他们挖到主厅时，我收拾好了行李就去帮忙了。我总是想留名青史，而且人们常说嘛，迟到总比不到强。
呃，“人们”可没说迟到的话会被困在守卫的岗位上啊。我整天整天坐在这儿，要防备强盗或者狼，不过我啥也没看见。大部分时候我只能看见挖掘的人来取补给。不得不说，我才想起来，他们来的次数少了很多…… 19日
好吧，3天过去了还没人出现。最后出现的人是阿帕，他只是逛了一会儿，眼睛里带着一种怪异的茫然。他让佛伦提乌斯还有我一有机会就下去，然后就拖着步子回去了。
有点不对劲，我应该找出……
——沃克

String.Source: Harkon's agents captured the Moth Priest and enthralled him, but I was able to break their hold on his mind.
String.Dest: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，并将他迷惑，我打破了他们对他的思想控制。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver>, concerned that additional vampires in the area would cause problems for the Court, sent me to <Alias=Dungeon> where I destroyed the <Alias=Vampire> before it turned its allies into vampires.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>担心<Alias=Dungeon>的其他吸血鬼会给宫廷带来麻烦，所以我去消灭了<Alias=Vampire>，阻止其把盟友转化成吸血鬼。

String.Source: I've secured both of the Elder Scrolls needed to fully decipher the Tyranny of the Sun and pinpoint Auriel's Bow. I need to return to Fort Dawnguard where Dexion has been waiting to begin his reading.
String.Dest: 我已经拿到了其他两本上古卷轴，可以完全破解太阳暴政，精确定位奥瑞艾尔之弓了。我得回黎明守卫堡垒找戴希翁进行阅读了。

String.Source: <Cool graphic>
You do not have the correct ingredients
Retains the last Standing Stone ability you held, granting you its effects in addition to those of your current Stone.
String.Dest: 在激活新的立石时，保留原有的立石能力。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Night Power while in Vampire Lord Form will be Empath.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，吸血鬼形态下的暗夜之力变为读心术

String.Source: You become invulnerable, but unable to attack, while health, magicka and Stamina regen quickly.
String.Dest: 你将免受一切伤害，生命、魔力、耐力恢复速度加快，但不能攻击。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to <Alias=Habitation>. I am to find and kill the vampire masquerading as a <Alias=Target>. I am to do so discreetly as the law is unaware of the threat and will assume I have murdered a citizen.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Habitation>。我要找到并杀死伪装成<Alias=Target>的吸血鬼。我需要谨慎行事，因为法律并不知道这一威胁，所以当地人会认为我在谋杀一位公民。

String.Source: I learned that a Moth Priest recently visited Solitude. He was thought to have stayed at the Winking Skeever.
String.Dest: 我听说最近有个蛾祭司造访了独孤城。人们说他住在眨眼恶鼠旅店。

String.Source: Serana and I are one step behind the Moth Priest. We journeyed to Dragon Bridge and learned that he had passed through the town, heading south across the bridge.
String.Dest: 我和瑟拉娜晚到一步。等到龙桥镇时，得知祭司已经穿过小镇向南往桥上去了。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Night Power while in Vampire Lord Form will be Mistform.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，吸血鬼形态下的暗夜之力变为迷雾形态。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to retrieve the <Alias=Remains> from <Alias=Dungeon>. After infusing the magical essence lingering in the remains into the Bloodstone Chalice, the power granted to us from drinking it will last longer.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我从<Alias=Dungeon>取回了<Alias=Remains>。将残留在遗骸中的魔法精华注入血石圣杯之后，我们从中获取的力量持续时间就会更长。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, your Blood Magic while in Vampire Lord Form will be Vampiric Grip.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，吸血鬼领主状态下的血魔法变为吸血鬼之握。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, your Blood Magic while in Vampire Lord Form will be Rigor Mortis.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，吸血鬼领主形态下的血魔法变为尸僵术。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Night Power while in Vampire Lord Form will be Supernatural Reflexes.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，吸血鬼领主形态下的暗夜之力变为超常反应。

String.Source: Fires <30>% faster than a standard bow.
Feeding extends beast form for longer.
String.Dest: 啃食所延长的野兽形态时间加长。

String.Source: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. If we could read the prophecy, we might be able to stop him. Serana had one of the scrolls, but we'd need a Moth Priest in order to read it.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读。

String.Source: Serana told me that her father was trying to gain power over the sun by fulfilling a prophecy found in the Elder Scrolls. Only a Moth Priest can read an Elder Scroll, so we've set out to find one.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜告诉我，她的父亲打算实现上古卷轴里的一个预言，从而获得控制太阳的力量。如果我们能读到预言，也许就能阻止他了。瑟拉娜有那卷上古卷轴，但我们需要一个蛾祭司才能阅读，所以我们要去找一位过来。

String.Source: ~ 28th of Sun's Dusk, 4E 200 I've found an interesting book of short stories on the pawnshop's shelves today. I don't think the owner will mind if I take it. I really should spend more time around the docks, these Altmer are too thin blooded for my taste. Anyway, one of the tales in the book is an account of the "Bloodspring of Lengeir's Feast," a fabled source of power for vampires. It is a story I've read several renditions of before but this version suggests that it may be located in Skyrim, in a ruin buried by quaking of the earth during the 2nd Era. Considering that my business here with Inquisitor Amolmaire is, shall we say, at an end, it might be a good time to leave Summerset for a worthwhile diversion for the next twenty to thirty years. Perhaps I shall investigate this fabled Bloodspring. [pagebreak] ~ 2nd of Morning Star, 4E 201 I was able to obtain passage from Alinor to Solitude by way of ship. No mean feat with this Nord insurrection going on, I assure you. I ran across one of my own in the local tavern and feared at first that it might cause problems for me, but it turns out that she is well-positioned here in the city and has been happy to help if I keep a civil manner. We spoke much on my research into the Bloodspring and while she made sure to point out she thinks it a "soft headed pursuit" she did say that what she's heard would point to The Rift. [pagebreak] ~ 5th of First Seed, 4E 201 After months of searching I finally may have found a lead. While looking for a bit of dinner in the Vilemyr Inn, I overheard an old hermit by the name of Jokull, talking about strange red water he found bubbling out of the ground. Once I dispose of this soldier, I'll follow to see if I can find the location. [pagebreak] ~ 13th of First Seed, 4E 201 I can't believe I didn't realize sooner. Jokull has been taking buckets of rock and dirt out of his house all week. When I realized that he's digging a basement I snuck in to check if he had uncovered the Bloodspring. He's hit a cave system that must be where Bloodspring has sunken into over the years. It was hard to see in the dim light, even with my eyes, but I would swear the water I saw pooled on the ground was red. [pagebreak] Unfortunately he woke up while I was exploring the basement and he dropped his torch on a pelt as I killed him. More setbacks. [pagebreak] ~ 4th of Rain's Hand, 4E 201 The runnels I initially found had passed through too much rock and dirt but I've "befriended" some of the locals and we've managed to find the source of the Bloodspring. We've kept a low profile so as not to draw too much attention and thus far I've managed to keep them to only attacking hunters and other dregs, but we'll need to set up a ready food source that won't draw too much attention if we are to remain here. The Bloodspring is not everything that I'd hoped it would be. Though it is blood and gives great strength it provides no sustenance. And the power it grants lasts only for a short while and carries a weakening of the body and mind with it. I've had to lock the door to the chamber to keep the others from becoming completely dependent upon it. When I've tested it on mortals, it is worse for them, for it carries only disease and addiction with no benefits at all. Addiction. I may have just found a solution for our food problem.
String.Dest: ~4E200年，日暮月28日 我在当铺的书架上找到了本挺有意思的短篇故事集。我觉得老板应该不会介意我把它拿走。我真应该多花点时间在码头转转，这些傲特莫的血液对我来说味道太淡了。 不管怎样，书中的一篇故事描述了“伦盖尔盛宴的血泉”——传说中吸血鬼力量的源泉。这个故事我之前看过几个版本，不过这个版本表明它可能位于天际，在一座第二纪元因地震而被掩埋的废墟里。 鉴于我在这里跟阿墨梅尔仲裁官的事务可以说是完事了，是时候离开夏暮岛，给之后的二三十年找点有意义的消遣了。也许我该去调查调查这座传说中的血泉。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，晨星月2日 我能走水路从艾琳诺去独孤城。我敢说，在诺德的叛乱仍在持续的当口，这么干可不容易。我在当地酒馆碰见了一位同胞，一开始我还担心这会给我惹上麻烦，不过事实证明她在这城里地位挺高，如果我讲礼貌的话，她也乐意帮忙。我们就对血泉的调查聊了很多，尽管她明确表明她觉得这是个“蠢爱好”，但她还是说了她听说的消息都指向了裂痕领。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，初种月5日 经过几个月的寻找，我终于发现了一条可能的线索。我当时正要在烂醉如泥旅店找点晚餐，无意中听见一位叫约库的老隐士在谈论地上冒出的怪异红水。 等我解决掉这个士兵，我就跟上去看看能不能找到那地方。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，初种月13日 难以置信，我竟然没早点意识到。 整个星期，约库都在把一桶桶的石头跟泥土从屋里搬出来。当我意识到他在挖地下室时，我偷偷溜了进去，看看他是不是发现了血泉。他碰上了一个洞穴系统，那一定是多年来埋藏血泉的地方。即便以我的眼力，在昏暗的光线下也很难看清东西，不过我保证我看见地上的积水是红色的。 [pagebreak] 倒霉的是，他在我探索地下室的时候醒了，就在我杀了他时，他把火把掉在了毛皮上。麻烦事更多了。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，雨手月4日 我最开始发现的隧道被太多的岩石泥沙堵住了，不过我跟一些本地人“交了朋友”，我们设法找到了血泉的源头。我们一直低调行事，以免引起太多注意。到目前为止，我只让他们攻击猎人跟其他混混，但要想留在这里，必须建立一个稳定的食物来源，才能不引起过多注意。 血泉并不完全符合我的预期。虽然它流出来的是血，而且能赋予人强大的力量，不过却不能满足饥渴。它所赋予的力量只能维持一小段时间，伴随而来的是身体和精神的虚弱。我只得锁上房门，以免其他人完全依赖血泉。当我用血泉在凡人身上做测试时，效果更糟，除了生病和成瘾之外，没有一丁点好处。 成瘾。 我刚刚可能找到解决食物问题的办法了。

String.Source: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> minutes, but I finally managed to do it. As my eyes adjusted to the dim light of my new surroundings, I realized that I was standing before Lord Vivec himself. He was simply staring at me... floating above his throne and staring at me with his piercing eyes. When I began to prostrate myself as a sign of respect, he held up one of his hands as if to say it wasn't necessary. Was I dead? Was Lord Vivec pleased with me? Was he
String.Dest: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 痛苦难熬，不过最终我做到了。当我的眼睛适应新环境的昏暗光线时，我发现我就站在维威克大君本尊面前。他只是盯着我……悬浮在他的王座上，用他那锐利的目光盯着我。当我下拜以示尊重时，他抬了抬手，似乎在说不必多礼。我死了吗？维威克大君对我满意吗？他会不会

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> about to strike me down in anger for my somewhat sordid past?
Suddenly I understood everything. Suddenly I realized that I was brought here for a reason. I should have died in those ash wastes, but Lord Vivec must have seen something inside me that he hadn't seen in millennia and decided to spare me from my fate.
Thus began my ascent to Sainthood. Thus began the rise of Jiub!
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 因为我略显卑鄙的过去而愤然将我毁灭呢？
突然之间，我明白了一切。突然之间，我明白我并非无缘无故被带到此处。我本该死在那灰烬中，不过维威克大君一定看到了我内心中某些他千年未曾得见的东西，并且决定让我摆脱命运。
就这样，我的升圣之路开始了。就这样，鸠步的崛起开始了！

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> Strange why the cursed have set up so many traps near this stone barrier.
Going to rest for a bit, not take any chances. They set up those traps for a reason and I'm not about to go rushing in to find out why.
Just going to sit here, regain my strength and possibly try and use the traps to my advantage. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 那帮该死的家伙会在这石头屏障附近设置这么多陷阱，真是奇怪。
得先休息一下，不能冒险。他们设置这些陷阱是有原因的，我可不想匆匆忙忙地就去搞清楚缘由。
我打算坐在这里，恢复体力，尽可能试着利用陷阱取得优势。 </font>

String.Source: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> quickly stifled by the sound of over a hundred wings. Rising from the foyada was an entire colony of cliff racers and they were out for blood. The blasted thing had led me right to their nest and sacrificed itself with the intent of feeding me to its brood. It was a trap. The damned things had become much too clever. Knowing this was likely the end, I jumped down from the silt strider and hit the back of its leg with the
String.Dest: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 很快被无数翅膀拍打的声响压了过去。佛亚达中飞出了一大群峭壁行者，它们一心渴求杀戮。那个混球把我引向它们的巢穴，然后自我牺牲，把我去喂它的崽子。这是个陷阱。这些天杀的东西太狡猾了。知道自己可能大限将至，我从泥沙漫步者上跳下来，用玻璃剑的

String.Source: Targets in mid swing drop their weapons.
String.Dest: 区域中间的目标丢下他们的兵器。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> I made it farther than I thought, but I'm afraid I can't go on. I choose not to.
I am content to die here, in this quiet little room, alone with my thoughts. The creatures won't follow me here. No more danger. The silence is welcoming. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 我比预期走得更远，不过恐怕我不能继续了。我选择就此停下了。
在这间安静的小房间里，与自己的思维做伴，死在这里我挺满意的。那些生物不会跟我到这里来。再也没有危险了。寂静真是让人舒服呀。 </font>

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> strider was tiring, but I couldn't give up... I had sworn to eliminate the foul beasts to the last and I wasn't about to let it go. If I was going to stop the thing, I'd have to do it fast.
I pulled my longbow from my back and nocked my last arrow. I took a deep breath and pulled, trying to keep the cliff racer in my sights. It was literally a longshot with the beast gaining distance
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 漫步者开始累了，但是我不能放弃……我曾发誓要彻底消灭这些肮脏的畜生，我不想就此罢休。如果我想阻止它，就得快点动手。
我从背上取下弓，搭上最后一支箭矢。我深吸一口气，拉弓，努力让峭壁行者保持在视野之内。这可真是一次高难度远射，那畜生不断向远方跑去

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> remember. In the end, seventy-six cliff racers were slaughtered. I was knee-deep in their corpses and my body on the verge of collapse. But I had survived. I smiled to the heavens and all went black.
When I awoke, all I felt was my back on a cold stone floor. Every muscle in my body was on fire, and my vision was blurred. Slowly, I tried to climb to my feet. It took several agonizing
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 多少次了。最终，我杀死了七十六只峭壁行者。我站在齐膝深的尸骸中，身体濒临崩溃。不过我活了下来。我向天空微笑，一切就陷入了黑暗。
当我醒过来时，我感觉我躺在冰冷的石头地板上。我身上每一寸肌肉都在燃烧，我的视力也模糊了。我试着慢慢爬起来。这几分钟

String.Source: ~ 19th of Second Seed, 4E 201 Thanks to the more sordid past of some of my underlings, we found a way to add the waters of the Bloodspring into the process for turning moonsugar to skooma. It is far more potent and highly addictive. We've turned the basement into a Den and sent out some of the locals with "samples" to lure people back, turning the disappointment of the spring into a ready supply of blood. We're calling it Redwater Skooma, in case any of the patrons happen to notice "water" in any of the corners. I've found many ruined books in the chambers connected to the spring and will continue to study them for a way to drink the waters without the side effects. Mortals appear to become infected with all manner of disease, while Vampires gain power but only for a short while. [pagebreak] ~ 9th of Mid Year, 4E 201 Many of the books I've found are but tattered shreds, ruined by the ages and moisture, but I've pieced together the origin of the Spring, if little else. It used to be a spring sacred to Arkay in the 1st Era, headed by the priest, Lengeir. I'm glossing over much that isn't of interest to my search, but it would seem that the woman he was in love with was bitten and turned into a vampire and subsequently turned him as well. They went on a rampage through the Spring and killed the other priests as they cowered in the pool, praying for Arkay's protection. "...and as we tore the spine... ...last priestess... ...took the viscera into the Bloodstone Chalice... ...waters ran red forever more..." Perhaps this "Bloodstone Chalice" is the answer. [pagebreak] ~ 18th of Sun's Height, 4E 201 Weeks of research and still nothing to show for it. It would seem that the Bloodstone Chalice is most likely the key to harnessing the power of the Spring, but it is also clear that at some point it was removed from the ruins. I've found an illustration of it which I have endeavored to sketch here, but nothing else regarding where it may have ended up. [pagebreak]
String.Dest: ~4E201年，次种月19日 多亏几位下属不甚光彩的过往，我们找到了方法，在将月亮糖变为斯库玛的步骤中添加进了血泉水。它药效更强，成瘾性更大。我们把地下室变成了个窝点，然后派出一些本地人，带着“样品”去哄人们过来。本来令人失望的血泉反而创造了稳定的血液来源。 我们管它叫“红水斯库玛“，以防客人们碰巧注意到角落里有“水”。 我在与泉水相连的房间找到了很多破损书籍，我会继续研究它们，找到饮用血泉又不产生副作用的方法。凡人喝了泉水似乎会感染各种各样的疾病，而吸血鬼则会获得力量，不过只能持续很短的时间。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，年中月9日 我找到的很多书籍都被时间跟湿气给毁了，变成了破破烂烂的碎片，不过我已经拼凑出了血泉的起源了，聊胜于无吧。 在第一纪元时，它曾经是阿尔凯的圣泉，由祭司伦盖尔所主持。我略过了许多与研究无关的内容，不过似乎他所深爱的女人被咬了，转化成了吸血鬼，之后也转化了他。他们在圣泉里大开杀戒，杀死了其他瑟缩在池水中祈求阿尔凯保佑的祭司们。 “... ...当我们撕裂……最后一位女祭司……脊柱……把内脏放进血石圣杯……泉水永远变成了红色……” 也许这个“血石圣杯”就是答案了。 [pagebreak] ~4E201年，日高月18日 研究了几周依旧一无所获。血石圣杯似乎最可能是利用血泉力量的关键，不过很明显，在某个时间点它被从废墟中移走了。 我找到了关于它的插图，我已经尽力在这里画出来了，但关于它的去向，就没有别的线索了。 [pagebreak]

String.Source: Backwards power attack has a 25% chance to paralyze the target.
String.Dest: 后退重击有25%几率使目标瘫痪。

String.Source: You are already under the effects of Tainted Blood of the Ancients.
String.Dest: 受污染的远古之血已生效。

String.Source: I've now fully learned Durnehviir's shout by summoning him to Tamriel. Our agreement appears to be mutually beneficial, and therefore I'll continue to summon him as I deem necessary.
String.Dest: 在召唤杜耐维尔来泰姆瑞尔后，我已经完全学会了他的龙吼。我们的契约对彼此都有利，所以如有必要，我会继续召唤他。

String.Source: Nothing happened
When I returned to Fort Dawnguard, I was surprised to learn that Serana had come to the base searching for me. She claimed to have something urgent she needed to tell me.
String.Dest: 我回到了黎明守卫堡垒，惊讶地发现瑟拉娜已经在等我。她说有急事告诉我。

String.Source: I have retrieved the <Alias=Item> from <Alias=Dungeon>.

After discovering that Dexion has become blind, I've had to secure alternate means to decipher the Elder Scrolls and locate Auriel's Bow. It's been suggested that I might be able to read the Elder Scrolls myself if I use an ancient technique performed by the original Moth Priests. I'm now on my way to a place known as the Ancestor Glade to discover the origin of the mysterious ritual.
String.Dest: 在发现戴希翁失明后，我不得不找其他办法来破解上古卷轴并找到奥瑞艾尔之弓。如果我能使用最初的蛾祭司们所使用的古老技术，也许就能自行阅读上古卷轴了。现在我要去一个叫先祖林地的地方寻找这个神秘仪式的起源。

String.Source: You can't use this while in combat.
String.Dest: 你不能在战斗中使用这个。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> and the silt strider bouncing me around at full gallop. Finally, with a silent prayer, I released the string. The arrow sang through the air like a howling demon as it sliced its way towards its target. Finally, just as it crested the lip of a foyada, the arrow struck it in the midsection. It let out a horrible cry and fell out of sight.
My cries of triumph were
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 泥沙漫步者全速飞奔把我颠来颠去。最终，随着无声的祷告，我放开弓弦。箭矢从空中呼啸而过，如同一只嚎叫的恶魔，飞向它的目标。最后，当逗留者抵达佛亚达的边缘时，箭射中了它的腹部。它发出骇人的叫声，消失在了视线之外。
我那胜利的叫喊声

String.Source: Health does not recover

It's been revealed to me that the Tyranny of the Sun was created by Arch-Curate Vyrthur as his revenge upon Auriel for rebuking him when he was turned into a vampire. He possessed Auriel's Bow, but still needed the blood of a pure vampire to complete his ritual. This placed Serana in mortal danger, and I had no choice but to destroy him. I now possess the final piece of the Tyranny of the Sun, Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 我了解到，教士长维苏尔为了报复奥瑞艾尔在他变成吸血鬼时发出的斥责，创造了太阳暴政。他已经拥有了奥瑞艾尔之弓，但还需要一个纯正吸血鬼的血来完成仪式。瑟拉娜因此遭遇致命危机，我别无选择，只能将维苏尔击杀。现在我拥有了太阳暴政的最后一块拼图，奥瑞艾尔之弓。

String.Source: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I accepted the gift and joined his court.
String.Dest: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我接受了这份礼物，并加入了他的宫廷。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has "suggested" I bestow the Gift of Harkon's Blood upon my spouse, <Alias=Spouse>. I should first render <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> pliant through the use of Vampire's Seduction then embrace and bite <Alias.PronounObj=Spouse> on the neck. If I currently lack the power, I should forego feeding for a day as I will gain the ability. I should then return to <Alias=QuestGiver> while <Alias=Spouse> undergoes the change.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>“建议”我将哈孔之血赠予我的配偶<Alias=Spouse>。我应该先用吸血鬼的诱惑让<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>变得顺从，再拥抱并咬<Alias.PronounObj=Spouse>的脖子。如果我现在没有能力，就需要放弃进食血液一天。等<Alias=Spouse>被转化后，再回去找<Alias=QuestGiver>。

String.Source: Serana and I are trying to locate her mother, Valerica, who may have one of the Elder Scrolls. Our journey has taken us to the courtyard of Castle Volkihar where we've discovered a hidden entrance underneath Valerica's old moondial.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜想找到她疏远已久的母亲瓦蕾莉卡，她可能携带了一卷上古卷轴。我们来到沃基哈尔城堡的庭院，在瓦蕾莉卡的古老月晷下发现了一个隐藏入口。

String.Source: Life Blood absorbed, vampire perk progress increased
String.Dest: 吸收生命之血，吸血鬼额外能力有所提高

String.Source: Heart consumed, werewolf perk progress increased
String.Dest: 吞食心脏后，狼人额外能力有所提高

String.Source: You are already under the effects of Blood of the Ancients.
String.Dest: 你已经受到远古之血的影响了。

String.Source: The valve won't turn.
Vampire Lord perk available
String.Dest: 吸血鬼领主额外能力可用

String.Source: Werewolf perk available
Your Armored Troll leaves your service.
String.Dest: 你的武装巨魔不再为你服务了。

String.Source: After entering the column of light in the Ancestor Glade, I was able to read the Elder Scrolls. I had an incredible vision that pinpointed a cave entrance far away on the western edge of Skyrim. This appears to be the location of Auriel's Bow. If I'm to complete the Tyranny of the Sun before Harkon, I should hasten there immediately.
String.Dest: 进入先祖林地的光柱后，我能够阅读上古卷轴了。我看到了一个难以置信的景象，在遥远的天际西陲有一个洞穴入口，似乎就是奥瑞艾尔之弓的所在。如果我想要赶在哈孔之前完成太阳暴政预言，就得立刻动身。

String.Source: After entering the column of light in the Ancestor Glade, I was able to read the Elder Scrolls. I had an incredible vision that pinpointed a cave entrance far away on the western edge of Skyrim. This appears to be the location of Auriel's Bow. If I'm to stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun, I should hasten there immediately.
String.Dest: 进入先祖林地的光柱后，我能够阅读上古卷轴了。我看到了一个难以置信的景象，在遥远的天际西陲有一个洞穴入口，似乎就是奥瑞艾尔之弓的所在。如果我想要阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政预言，就得立刻动身。

String.Source: I've completely filled the Initiate's Ewer given to me by Knight-Paladin Gelebor. All that remains is gaining access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum where both Arch-Curate Vyrthur and Auriel's Bow are located.
String.Dest: 我已经盛满了圣骑士盖勒布交给我的新人之壶。接下来就是进入神殿内殿，去找教士长维苏尔和奥瑞艾尔之弓了。

String.Source: The vision provided by the Elder Scrolls seems to indicate that Auriel's Bow may be located in a place known as Darkfall Cave. I should proceed there as soon as I'm prepared if I wish to recover the bow and stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun.
String.Dest: 上古卷轴提供的幻象似乎指示，奥瑞艾尔之弓位于一个叫做暗瀑洞穴的地方。等我准备好，就去那里把弓找回来，阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to retrieve the <Alias=Remains> from <Alias=Dungeon>. After infusing the magical essence lingering in the remains into the Bloodstone Chalice, the power granted to us from drinking it will last longer.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我从<Alias=Dungeon>取回<Alias=Remains>。将残留在遗骸中的魔法精华注入血石圣杯之后，我们从中获取的力量持续时间就会更长。

String.Source: I have bestowed the Gift of Harkon's Blood upon my spouse, <Alias=Spouse>, at <Alias=QuestGiver>'s "suggestion."
String.Dest: 在<Alias=QuestGiver>的“建议”下，我将哈孔之血的礼物赠予了我的配偶<Alias=Spouse>。

String.Source: I found and killed the vampire masquerading as a <Alias=Target> in <Alias=Habitation>.
String.Dest: 我在<Alias=Habitation>找到并杀死了伪装成<Alias=Target>的吸血鬼。

String.Source: Eager to unlock the secrets of an ancient prophecy thought to be hidden within Serana's Elder Scroll, Harkon has ordered his court to find a Moth Priest. I now have reason to suspect that there's a Moth Priest in Solitude.
String.Dest: 为了解开瑟拉娜的上古卷轴中隐藏的古老预言之秘，哈孔命令他的宫廷寻找蛾祭司。我现在有理由怀疑独孤城有一位蛾祭司。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> has sent me to retrieve the <Alias=Item> from <Alias=Dungeon>.

<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> I am a hunter. I am a redeemer. I am Jiub.
The tale of my rise to glory begins in the ash wastes of Morrowind. I rode alone, weapon at my side and the burning wind stinging my face. My quest was arduous, but necessary to ensure the survival of the Dunmer people. A pestilence was creeping across the ashlands,
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 我乃猎手。我乃救世主。我即是鸠步。
我走向荣耀的传说始于晨风的灰烬荒地。我独乘一骑，身负武器，燃烧的风刺痛了脸颊。我的任务艰巨，然而必须要保障丹莫人民的生存安全。一场瘟疫正在灰地蔓延，

String.Source: Causes sunburst attacks to nearby targets if shot at the sun with Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 使用奥瑞艾尔之弓向太阳射击，将对附近目标造成阳光爆裂伤害。

String.Source:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="17">
Not good enough to live in their stupid keep, am I? Stupid sods don't realize I've moved into the undercroft and started taking control of their own death hounds. I'll get my revenge.
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont" size="17">
我不配住进他们那蠢城堡，是吧？那帮蠢货还没意识到我已经搬进地下室，开始控制起他们的死亡猎犬了。我会报仇雪恨的。

String.Source: The vision provided by the Elder Scrolls seems to indicate that Auriel's Bow may be located in a place known as Darkfall Cave. I should proceed there as soon as I'm prepared if I wish to recover the bow and stop Harkon from completing the Tyranny of the Sun.
String.Dest: 上古卷轴提供的幻象似乎指示，奥瑞艾尔之弓位于一个叫做暗瀑洞穴的地方。等我准备好，就去那里把弓找回来，阻止哈孔完成太阳暴政。

String.Source: Blood Magic: Can conjure a gargoyle to fight for you.
String.Dest: 血魔法：召唤一只石像鬼为你战斗。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> a menace with an insatiable hunger that plagued innocent travelers simply trying to get home. It was my self-sworn task to hunt them down one-by-one and drive them from the skies. Their fury knew no bounds and their war cry resonated across the land. They were the notorious cliff racers, and they had to be destroyed.
On a particularly hot day during Sun's Height, I was
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 一场无尽贪食的威胁困扰着想要归家的旅人。我暗暗发誓，要把它们一个个从天上击落。它们的怒火永无止境，它们的叫声响彻大陆。它们就是臭名昭著的峭壁行者，它们必须被摧毁殆尽。
在日高月一个特别炎热的日子里，我

String.Source: Fires <30>% faster than a normal bow.
Allows feeding from NPCs when they're asleep.
String.Dest: 你能在NPC睡觉时对他们进行啃食。

String.Source: You can have two atronachs or reanimated zombies.
String.Dest: 你可以同时召唤两个侍灵或复活僵尸。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Confessions Of A Khajiit Fur Trader

[pagebreak]

My execution is tomorrow. The turnkey asks what I'd like for my last meal. Bring me paper, I say. A quill and a candle. Perhaps the Jarl would like a confession. I would rather pass the time. When my father's harem burned down and our family fortune was lost to the ashes, my brother and I set to begging in the gutters of Elsweyr. I will never forget the first time we stole a traveler's purse. It was almost by accident. Just a slip of the claw and the pouch fell into our hands. We ate like kings that night. We slept in a warm bed for the first time in months. Soon after, my brother and I took up the knife. The gang we joined treated us as the dirty orphans we were. We robbed, we scammed, we cut and ran and years of debauchery and hard living took their toll. I lost half my left ear in a knife fight with a blind drunk Argonian. I wanted to give up, but my brother, he dreamed bigger, better. My brother wanted to make it to Cyrodiil and become legit merchants. We had a plan. One final heist of a northbound caravan said to be filled with jewels. Something went wrong. My brother could not stop the horses on time, and I stood helplessly by and watched the wagon plummet over a cliff. But as I picked through the wreckage, my devastation turned to excitement. There were no jewels, but there were plenty of luxurious wolf pelts, horker tusks and mammoth hides, more than enough to buy my way to Cyrodiil. I'd follow in the footsteps of so many of my kind. A traveling merchant, someone with a respectable profession. I had all the furs bundled in my pack when I saw my brother's broken body. His ears were still warm, and I shut his eyes for the last time. This was his dream. And he would want me to go. But what I wanted, well, the caravan guards were coming. I had to go, but I couldn't just leave his body to rot. My brother gave me my first skin. It was to be a memento. But in the darkness of the fence's cabin, the coin hit my hand heavy. Then she looked at my brother's pelt and offered three times the amount of any other fur. Disgust caught in my throat, but did not live very long. I realized the cost of such a forbidden luxury. The value, the demand, the respect. This is what I wanted. It became easier. A dark alley, a gag in one hand and a quick slice across the throat. Gently hold the body as it bleeds. I became faster, my cuts precise and fluid. I peel the skin with one motion and kept the merchandise pristine, in one piece. I became rich. Far richer than anyone in my family had ever been. Yet I was careful. My stronghold was well-hidden, and practically impenetrable. I hired the men that used to employ me. We moved frequently on less traveled roads when we hunted in the wild. We stalked the back alleys we used to sleep in when we hunted in the city. I grew so rich that I no longer needed to dirty my own hands. Patchwork colored furs fetched the best price among the Bosmer. Argonians preferred the pelts completely skinned and tanned. Orcs prized the thick, waterproof leather of the Argonians. Humans most often bought tails and ears. I had to employ an alchemist and a master craftsman for a couple odd requests, but I didn't ask questions when the gold piled up. And now I'm a prisoner.
