Maybe I became careless. Maybe I let too many secrets slip between the sheets. The raid of my fortress was a massacre. They took me alive, barely. That was their mistake. My enemies should have killed me when they had the chance. I have one lockpick. And the northern wall of my cell is weak from disrepair. My head shall not roll tomorrow. I am not finished with the trade. There will always be buyers. Someday, I will sell my own skin for a king's ransom, as my name is legend. And yours shall rot in the gutters with your bones. -The Fur Trader
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

一位卡吉特毛皮商的自白

[pagebreak]

明天我就要掉脑袋了。狱卒问我上路饭要吃啥。 我说：给我纸笔还有蜡烛。 也许领主希望我忏悔。我倒宁愿用来打发时间。 在我父亲的府宅被付之一炬，财产化作灰烬之后，我跟我哥开始在艾斯维尔的贫民窟乞讨。我永远忘不了我们第一次偷走旅人的钱包。那件事就是凑了巧了，爪子那么一滑，钱包就进了我们手里。那晚我们吃得像国王一样丰盛。那晚我们是几个月以来头一次在床上睡觉。 没过多久，我哥和我拿起了刀。我们加的团伙把我们当肮脏的孤儿。我们抢劫、恐吓、砍人、跑路，多年放荡和艰苦的生活也让我们付出了代价。我的左耳在跟一个喝醉的阿尔贡瞎子互砍的时候给削没了一半。 我不想干了，但我那哥哥，他有更大、更好的梦想。 我哥想去希罗帝尔，当个合法商人。我们有一个计划。最后抢一辆北上的大篷车，据说里面装满了珠宝。 不过出了点岔子。我哥没能及时勒住马，我无助地站在一边，眼瞅着马车从悬崖上掉了下去。但当我检查马车残骸时，我的悲伤变成了兴奋。车里没有珠宝，但有许多华丽的狼皮、海象牙和猛犸皮，价值远远超出了我去希罗帝尔的路费。我追随着很多同胞的脚步。变成了行商，这是个受人尊敬的职业。 在我打包好所有毛皮时，我看到了我哥的残躯。我为他合上了眼睛，他的尸体尚有余温。这是他曾经的梦想。他会希望我去的。不过我想要的是什么呢？成吧，大篷车守卫来了。我得溜了，但我不能就这么让他的尸体烂掉。 我从我哥身上得到了第一张毛皮。这是件遗物。我从销赃贩子昏暗的小屋那大赚了一笔。然后她看着我哥的毛皮，出了三倍于其他毛皮的价格。我感到恶心，但这没持续多久。我意识到了这种禁忌奢侈品的价值、需求跟好处。 这就是我想要的。 我越干越上道儿。一条昏暗的小巷，一只堵住嘴的手，一次快速的割喉。轻轻地抱住流血的尸体。我变得更迅速，我的剪裁变得精准流畅。我只要一下子就能剥下整张皮，这样货就能完好无损了。 我有钱了。比我祖上的人还有钱。不过我很谨慎。我的据点很隐蔽，很难察觉。我雇了那些曾经雇佣我的人。我们在野外狩猎时，经常走那些人迹罕至的路。在城里狩猎时，我们在自己过去曾经打盹的后巷里偷偷靠近猎物。我变得特别有钱，我不用再弄脏自己的手。 木精灵喜欢出高价买颜色交织的毛皮。阿尔贡喜欢鞣制的整皮，兽人喜欢买厚实防水的阿尔贡皮。人类最常买耳朵和尾巴。我不得不雇一位炼金师和一位工匠大师来处理那些奇怪的请求，不过只要有赚头，我就从不多问。 而现在呢，我是个囚犯。可能是我变得粗心了。可能我在床上说漏了太多秘密。他们对我堡垒的突袭是场屠杀，他们好不容易才活捉了我。这是他们的失误。我的敌人一有机会就该杀了我。 我有一根开锁器。我牢房北面的墙因为年久失修而摇摇欲坠。明天我才不会掉脑袋呢。 我的买卖还没结束，也从来不缺买主。总有一天，我要把自己的皮也高价卖掉，因为我的名字就是个传奇。而你们的骨头只会在臭水沟里烂掉。 ——毛皮商

String.Source: I have made a pact with the dragon, Durnehviir. I will agree to summon him to Tamriel on occasion, and in return he's agreed to fight by my side and teach me his unique shout.
String.Dest: 我和叫杜耐维尔的龙定下了契约。我同意偶尔在泰姆瑞尔召唤他，作为回报他同意与我并肩作战，并教我他的独特龙吼。

String.Source: Feed on dead NPCs to retain the beast form.
String.Dest: 以死去的NPC为食，维持自身野兽形态。

String.Source: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> tracking what I called a Lingerer... a cliff racer without a nest. He was a particularly feisty one too, leading me on a merry chase across almost three miles of ash dunes. I had managed to take a piece out of one of his wings in an earlier scuffle so he couldn't maintain much of a climb, but he still had quite a bit of stamina left and he was trying to make me tire of the chase. Almost two solid hours passed and my silt
String.Dest: <font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 跟踪着一只没有巢穴的峭壁行者……它名叫逗留者。它也相当活跃，让我高兴地追着他跑过了将近三里的灰丘。在早些的追逐中，我设法把它的翅膀削掉了一块，所以它爬不了多久，不过它仍然有不少耐力，试图让我厌倦追逐。近过去了足足两个小时，我的泥沙

String.Source:
They warned me not to go through that portal. What did I have to be scared of? I been adventuring for years, and I never seen nothing that I couldn't wallop. But this place...
Ain't nothing living here. Just dead things up and about when they should be in the ground. I can hear their bones scratching at the rocks and knocking together when they walk. If I get home, I'll hang up my sword and never go out again...
String.Dest:
他们曾警告我不要进那扇传送门。我怕过啥？我冒险了这么多年，还没见过我打不过的东西。可这个地方……
什么活物都没有。只有那些本应死透了的家伙走来走去。当他们走路的时候，我能听见骨头在岩石上来回刮擦碰撞的声音。如果我能回家的话，我就挂剑归隐，再也不出门冒险了……

String.Source: Shrouds the sun in darkness if shot with Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 使用奥瑞艾尔之弓向太阳射击，将太阳笼罩于黑暗。

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> flat of my glass blade. There was no need for the innocent thing to die here today because of my stupidity. As the ash cloud cleared from being stirred up by its massive legs, the cliff racer brood approached. I held my sword high and prepared for the worst.
The battle lasted two full days. I was beaten, clawed, bitten and knocked down more times than I care to
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'><font size='18'> 剑面打了它的腿背。没必要因为我的愚蠢而让无辜的生命在今天死在这里。当泥沙漫步者结实的腿扬起的灰云散去时，峭壁行者的崽子们接近了。我把剑高高举起，做好了最坏的打算。
战斗持续了足足两天。我已经记不清我被打、被抓、被咬、被击倒

String.Source: Unknown

[pagebreak]

Discovering Ruunvald Vol. II by Moric Sidrey

[pagebreak]

Our luck continues! Not only do we continue to tunnel into caves and shafts that speed our descent, but struck multiple veins of precious ore. Now that the excavation has proven to be a financial success, the Vigilants have sent more supplies, materials, and workers to further the cause. I find myself unable to contain my glee at times, and have become prone to cheerful outbursts in front of the men. One might find this very out of character for me, but the men seem to share my enthusiasm. Never before have I worked with a group so single-minded in their pursuit. To have so many people working towards the same goal with little to no deviation from the task at hand is an uncanny blessing! Stendarr be praised! With so much going well, I hesitate to document what seem like minor troubles in comparison. It must have something to do with the cramped spaces, but I have found myself prone to aches in my head. While these hardly deter me from my leadership role, I have found myself distracted at times. I have had many a conversation with the workers where I drift off, only to have them call me back to reality. Sometimes I lose small amounts of time and can't remember what I've done. I am hoping this is nothing more than excitement of reaching our goal, but I will try to keep note as we dig deeper. Perhaps a half tankard of ale before sleep will help me with these headaches.

M. Sidrey
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

探索鲁恩瓦德 第二卷 墨里克·西德利 著

[pagebreak]

我们的好运仍在继续！我们不但继续挖掘了洞穴和竖井以加快向下的速度，而且还挖到了多条珍贵矿石的矿脉。现在，挖掘工作已经证明是有钱可赚的了，为了推进这一工作，警戒者送来了更多的补给、材料以及工人。我发现有时我无法控制自己的喜悦之情，在人们面前也更容易爆发出高昂的情绪。有人可能觉得这不符合我的个性，不过大家似乎都跟我一样热情。我从来没有和这么一心一意追求目标的团队合作过。有这么多人朝着同一个目标努力，几乎没有偏离手头的任务，这等好事真是难以置信!赞美斯丹达尔! 在这么多事情进展顺利的情况下，我很犹豫是否要记下那些相比起来微不足道的麻烦事。我发现自己很容易头疼，也许与这里空间狭小有关吧。我发现自己有时候会分心，虽然这并没妨碍我担任领导的职责。我曾多次在迷迷糊糊中与工人们交谈，结果是他们把我叫回现实。有时我会有点断片儿，记不清自己做了什么。我希望这只是即将达成目标的兴奋造成的，而我会在深入发掘的过程中试着继续记录。也许睡前喝半杯麦酒能帮我缓解头痛。

M.西德利

String.Source: <Alias=Jarl> is no longer the Jarl of <Alias=Capital> and the vampire no longer poses a threat.
String.Dest: <Alias=Jarl>不再是<Alias=Capital>的领主了，吸血鬼也不是威胁了。

String.Source: <Alias=QuestGiver> sent me to <Alias=Location> where I destroyed the Dawnguard leaders.
String.Dest: <Alias=QuestGiver>让我去<Alias=Location>消灭了黎明守卫的首领们。

String.Source: When I brought Serana back home after freeing her from Dimhollow Crypt, her father, a powerful vampire lord, offered me the gift of his blood. I refused the gift, and was banished. Now I must return to Vigilant Tolan and tell him what happened.
String.Dest: 当我把瑟拉娜从幽空地穴救出来带回家后，她那强大的吸血鬼领主父亲要把血作为礼物给我。我拒绝了这份礼物，随后被驱逐了。现在我必须回去找警戒者托兰，告知他具体情况。

String.Source: Explodes for <10> points of fire damage.

17th of Sun's Height Damn that scheming elf! Damn him! He steals my notes, my discovery, and publishes it under his name! Twenty years of my life spent digging through those ruins, and what do I get? A dedication? 'Friend and Colleague' my arse. He's just mocking me! Well, I'll have the last laugh. Taron may have my theory, but he doesn't have any proof, not yet. If I can find the Forge first, I can show the world this is my discovery. Mine, not his! [pagebreak] 4th of Last Seed I've got a lead. One of the moldy old books in Mzund mentioned the Forge. Ruined through and through, but I was able to copy down a few scraps, including a map of the first-era Dwemer kingdoms. Need to cross-reference it with modern borders when I get back. [pagebreak] Here's the result: 1 - Arkngthamz This one, 'Arkngthamz', was on the inscription, too. Apparently the main Aetherium research center. Seems like the place to start. [pagebreak] 2 - Mentioned as a 'Bthar-zel' ('allied city'?). Not Bthardamz, though. Looks like a smaller site, north or northwest of there, on the river. 3 - The primary source of Aetherium. Extracted from some deeper mine? 4 - A storage site for raw Aetherium, just outside a major city. Apparently, it had to be kept outside because the Aetherium was 'harmonically volatile'. [pagebreak] 5 - No name, no identifying information, but page after page of ruined diagrams. Couldn't make out much, but it looks like - an astrolabe, a gear, some sort of crest in four pieces? Could this be the location of the Forge? Something important, at least. [pagebreak] 22nd of Last Seed Arkngthamz. My map may be rough, but it was enough to get me here. There may be something to this after all. [pagebreak] 23rd of Last Seed Reached the Treasury. There's a Tonal Lock here, still active. Judging from the corpses, it's safe to say the traps are still active, too. Couldn't find any clues, so I'll make a sketch and work through this carefully. Five Resonators. Five tones. Just have to hit them in the right order. Let's see... [pagebreak]
String.Dest: 日高月17日 那个奸诈的精灵真该死！真该死！他偷了我的笔记、我的发现，还以他的名义发表了！二十年来我在这些遗迹里挖啊挖啊，我得到了什么？一段致谢？“朋友和同事”个屁！他就是在耍我！ 好吧，我会笑到最后的。泰荣也许拥有我的理论，可他没有任何证据，现在还没有。我可以先找到锻炉。我可以告诉全世界这是我的发现。是我的，不是他的！ [pagebreak] 末种月4日 我有线索了。姆祖恩德的一本发霉的旧书里提到了锻炉。虽然这书彻底损毁了，不过我能复制一些残页，包括第一纪元锻莫王国的一份地图。等我回去后得拿它跟现代的地区边界做个比对。 [pagebreak] 对比结果如下： 1-阿肯撒兹 碑文上也有这个“阿肯撒兹”。这显然是进行神光水晶研究的主要中心。看来可以从这里着手。 [pagebreak] 2 - 里面提到被称为一座“巴撒-泽尔”（“同盟城市“？）。不过，不是巴塔丹兹。似乎是一较小的地点，在北边或者西北边的河上。 3 - 神光水晶的主要来源？从更深的矿井里开采的？ 4 - 有一个储藏神光水晶原矿的地方，就在主城外面。很显然，神光水晶具有“调和不定性”，因此必须得储存在外面。 [pagebreak] 5 - 没有名字，没有识别信息，只有一页又一页损毁的图表。看不出来什么了，不过它似乎是--一个被分成四块的星盘、齿轮或者徽章？这也许是锻炉的位置？就算不是，也一定很重要。 [pagebreak] 末种月22日 阿肯撒兹。我的地图也许很潦草，不过也足以让我抵达那里了。说不定这里终究有些玄机。 [pagebreak] 末种月23日 抵达宝库了。这里有个仍在奏效的音调锁。从这些尸体判断，陷阱应该也启动着。 找不到任何线索，因此我要画张草图，然后仔细琢磨琢磨这东西。五个调谐器。五个音调盘。必须依照正确的顺序敲击它们。我看看…… [pagebreak]

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

THE BETRAYED ENGWE EMELOTH

[pagebreak]

AND WHEN THE SNOW PRINCE FELL TO GROUND THE ICE ELVES DIVIDED ABOVE AND BELOW NOW VANQUISHED AND BRUTALLY BOUND ONE MOMENT HAD SHATTERED ALL THEY DID KNOW [pagebreak] THE ONCE COOL WIND ON THEIR SKIN NOW REPLACED WITH THE HEAT OF THE FLAME AND A PRIDE ONCE FELT DEEP WITHIN FORGOTTEN ALONG WITH THEIR NAME [pagebreak] TORN FROM THEIR HOME OF ICE AND FROST THROWN INTO THE PITCH BLACK DREAD OF NIGHT LIVING IN FEAR AS THEIR MINDS BECOME LOST AS THEIR EYES BEGIN DIMMING THE LIGHT [pagebreak] CHAINED AND ENSLAVED WHAT ONCE WAS LIGHT TURNED TO BLACKNESS ALONE AND BETRAYED SINKING DEEPER INTO MADNESS

String.Source: Press [Sneak] to switch between melee and magic modes.
String.Dest: 按下[Sneak]在近战与魔法模式之间进行切换。

String.Source: I have ascended to the Circle which leads the Companions, and now share their blood as a werewolf. Aela led me to a Silver Hand stronghold where Skjor fell in battle. She has enlisted me on her quest for revenge.
String.Dest: 我已经晋升入领导战友团的圆环中，现在，作为狼人，我与他们同享血液。艾拉带我前往一处银手要塞，斯科约尔在那里战死了。她邀我一起复仇。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Discovering Ruunvald Vol. I by Moric Sidrey

[pagebreak]

I have decided to document our expedition to find Ruunvald in my journals, with hopes that, should we fail, it will bring illumination to those who follow us. I myself have stood on the shoulders of academic giants to get where we are today, spending endless hours in libraries and private collections. I am certain that there is some artifact of great power to be found in those ruins, one that the Vigilants could find useful in their mission. I do not mean to sound pompous, but I feel as if I am on the precipice of my destiny with this quest. I am certain we are digging in the right place. I can feel it in my bones, and I dream of finding Ruunvald at night. Even in my waking hours, I can almost hear a reassuring voice telling me we are going the right way. The expedition has had a great deal of luck so far. After only a few weeks, the first tunnel broke through into a large shaft, leading downward towards where I suspect to find Ruunvald. With just a few bits of carpentry, we've established our first base camp within the mountains. If we continue to be this fortuitous, we shall reach our goal in record time!

M. Sidrey
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

探索鲁恩瓦德 第一卷 墨里克·西德利 著

[pagebreak]

我决定在日记上记录我们寻找鲁恩瓦德的探险，如果我们失败了，希望它能给后继者带来点启发。我自己也是站在学术巨擘们的肩膀上，在图书馆和私人收藏馆中花费了数不尽的时光，才有如今的成就的。我相信，在这遗迹中能找到某种拥有巨大力量的东西，在警戒者的任务中派上用场。 我不想说的太自负，不过我觉得这次任务中我的命运似乎处在转折点上。我确信我们挖对了地方。我在心底里能感受到，我夜里做梦都梦见找到鲁恩瓦德。即使在我醒着的时候，我也几乎能听到一个令人安心的声音，跟我说我们走对路了。 到目前为止，探险队运气不错。仅仅几周之后，第一条隧道就打通了，形成了一座巨大的竖井，向下通往我觉得能找到鲁恩瓦德的地方。我们做了一点点木匠活，就在山里搭建起了第一座营地。如果我们还能这么幸运的话，我们达成目标的时间会创纪录的！

M.西德利

String.Source: Explodes for <15> points of shock damage to Health and half that to Magicka.
String.Dest: 爆炸对生命与魔力造成<15>点寒霜伤害。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Journal of Mirtil Angoth Translated from Falmer Text by Calcelmo of Markarth

[pagebreak]

4th of Evening Star I used to dream of fighting in battles like my Father. He had begun teaching me to fight the moment I was able to pick up a blade. Mother had argued that I was too young, but he paid her no mind. I can still remember the elation I felt the first time I bested Father in a match and the look of pride on his face. If it were up to him I know he would have allowed me to join him in battle. With me at his side he may have fared better. Now with Father and so many others slain, the Old Ones claim we are left with too few warriors to continue the fight. I was not the only Young One to speak out in protest, but our small voices went unheard. It has been decided that we must flee to seek help and protection. [pagebreak] 8th of Evening Star News has reached us that the great Snow Prince has fallen in battle. The urgency to go into hiding has left many of us scattered and those of us still together unsure of which direction to turn. In the long hours of night we keep huddled together always fearing the worst until the first light of the blessed sun. May Auri-El guide our footsteps. [pagebreak] 13th of Evening Star In the night I overheard the Old Ones whispering secrets of the underground and the Dwemer who dwell there. I thought back on stories Father once told me of these dwarves, heroic tales of honor and glory. The Old Ones must know of these stories for it has been decided that we will change course upon first light. I feel hopeful that the Dwemer will help us to avenge our fallen and reclaim our land.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

米尔蒂尔·安格斯的日记 译自伐莫文献 马卡斯城的卡塞莫 译

[pagebreak]

夜星月4日 我曾梦想像我父亲一样战斗。当我能举得起剑的时候，他就开始教我战斗了。母亲吵着说我太小了，不过他没有理会。我还记得第一次在比试中胜过我父亲的喜悦以及他脸上的骄傲。如果由他决定的话，我知道他会让我加入战斗的。有我在他身旁，他可能会表现得更好。现在我父亲还有其他许多人都被杀了，长老们说我们剩下的战士太少，没法继续战斗了。我不是唯一一个大声抗议的青年，然而我们微弱的声音却没人理会。已经决定了，我们必须逃走，去寻求帮助和庇护。 [pagebreak] 夜星月8日 伟大的雪王子在战斗中牺牲的消息传到了我们这里。紧迫的躲避行动使我们许多人走散了，而我们这些仍然在一起的人不知道该往哪个方向走。在漫漫长夜，我们总是挤成一团，担心最坏的事情发生，直到天亮。愿奥瑞-艾尔指引我们前进。 [pagebreak] 夜星月13日 夜里，我无意间听见长老们小声说着关于地下以及居住在那里的锻莫的秘密。我想起父亲曾经给我讲过关于锻莫的故事，关于荣耀与荣誉的英雄传说。长老们一定知道这些故事，因为他们决定我们天一亮就改变方向。希望锻莫能帮我们复仇，收复我们的土地。

String.Source: Summon undead from the Soul Cairn.
Explodes for <10> points of frost damage to Health and Stamina.
String.Dest: 爆炸对生命与耐力造成<10>点寒霜伤害。

String.Dest: 用战斧攻击造成额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Press [Sneak] to change between magic and melee modes
String.Dest: 按下[Sneak]在魔法与近战模式之间进行切换。

String.Source: Use your Vampire Lord power.
String.Dest: 使用你的吸血鬼领主能力。

String.Source: I've used the unusual knife to collect the bark from the Canticle Trees dotting the Ancestor Glade, which has in turn drawn Ancestor Moths to me. I've felt a surge of energy run through my body and I feel drawn towards the large column of light in the center of the Glade.
String.Dest: 我用一把特殊的刀从点缀在先祖林地的颂歌之树上收集树皮，吸引来了先祖蛾。我感受到一股能量涌入体内，我觉得自己被林地中心的巨大光柱所吸引了。

String.Source: Transform into a Vampire Lord. Use the Revert Form power to change back.
String.Dest: 变成吸血鬼领主。使用“形态恢复”能力重新变回来。

String.Source: Press [Jump] to jump.

I'm now standing in a column of light which appears to stretch into the sky at the center of the Ancestor Glade. According to Dexion, I've completed the Ritual of the Ancestor Moth and can now read the Elder Scrolls. I'll need to begin with the Elder Scroll I obtained from the Soul Cairn in order to decipher the location of Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 我现在站在先祖林地中心一道直冲云霄的光柱中。根据戴希翁的说法，我已经完成了先祖蛾的仪式，现在可以阅读上古卷轴了。我需要从阅读我从灵魂石冢获得的上古卷轴开始，破解奥瑞艾尔之弓的位置。

String.Dest: 用战斧攻击造成大量额外流血伤害。

Attacks with war axes cause more bleeding damage.
String.Dest: 用战斧攻击造成更多额外流血伤害。

String.Source: Ability to have multiple summons

<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> By order of the Patriarch of <Alias=TargetDungeon>, you are to hunt down and slay the Dawnguard agent <Alias=Player>.
<Alias.PronounCap=Player> is believed to be extremely dangerous, even for one of your formidable skill. Strike quickly, sister, then make your escape. </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 奉<Alias=TargetDungeon>族长之命，追杀黎明守卫密探<Alias=Player>。
据信，即便对于你那过人的技艺而言，<Alias.PronounCap=Player>也极其危险。姐妹，你要快速突袭然后撤退。 </font>

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Scripture of Minorne by Moric Sidrey

[pagebreak]

Glory be to Minorne! Glory be to the mistress of all! My life for you, oh beautiful savior! Where once my feeble ramblings seemed so grand, I now realize they are but scratches on parchment, unworthy of you. Oh, that I could properly describe you, I would write a thousand testaments to you! Damn my tiny thoughts, if only I were wiser! Minorne asks that we bring more here for her, more to worship her and do her bidding! I have sent word to the Hall of the Vigilants to come. A simple lie was told, for they would not understand. Not until they saw her, o glorious Minorne! But she is fearful! There are fools in this world that do not heed to her beautiful voice. The guard, Florentius, sent from the Beacon, he still prays to Arkay, an absentee god who pales in comparison to Minorne! I will pray to the goddess I can see! May he rot in his cage! Oh, sweet, sweet, Minorne...
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

蜜诺妮的圣典 墨里克·西德利 著

[pagebreak]

荣耀属于蜜诺妮！荣耀属于万物的女主人！美丽的救世主啊，我将生命献给您！曾经我那无力的胡言乱语是如此苍白，如今我明白它们不过是羊皮纸上的划痕，配不上您！啊，若我能正确地将您描绘出来，我将为您写下千言万语。我的思想太渺小了，我若能再智慧些就好了！ 蜜诺妮让我给她带更多的人，让更多人崇拜她，服从她！我已经给警戒者大厅捎了信让他们过来。一句简简单单的谎言，因为他们在见到她之前是不会理解的，美丽的蜜诺妮啊！ 然而她很害怕！这世上有很多傻瓜不听从她那优美的声音。从烽火台派来的守卫——佛伦提乌斯——仍在向阿尔凯祈祷，与蜜诺妮相比这位看不见的神苍白无比。我要向我所见的女神祈祷。愿佛伦提乌斯烂在笼子里！ 啊，最亲爱的蜜诺妮……

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

TOUCHING THE SKY PARMION SALDOR

[pagebreak]

MANY OF THE MOST DEDICATED SNOW ELVES ONCE COMMITTED THEMSELVES TO A TIRELESS JOURNEY THROUGH THE CHANTRY TO THE TEMPLE THEY CARRIED WITH THEM THE PARAMOUNT DESIRE TO BECOME ONE WITH THEIR GOD AURIEL THOUGH ALL SET OUT WITH THE DETERMINATION TO PROVE THEIR WORTH, FEW WERE PREPARED FOR THE TRIALS THAT LAY AHEAD FOR THE PATH TO AURIEL WAS NOT WITHOUT ITS TRIBULATIONS THE PILGRIMS STRUGGLED NOT ONLY AGAINST THE NATURAL ELEMENTS OF THE TREACHEROUS VALE BUT WITH A MYRIAD OF TESTS UPON THEIR FAITH AND LOYALTY IT IS TOLD THAT MANY SIMPLY COULD NOT CONTINUE ON THE PATH FOR LONG BEFORE TURNING BACK SOME ARGUE THAT THE REBUKE THEY ENDURED UPON THEIR RETURN WAS CRUELER THAN ANY PUNISHMENT THAT MAY HAVE LAY AHEAD OF THEM ALONG THE PATH. IN THEIR FAILED ATTEMPT THEY WERE FORCED TO LIVE IN THE SHADOW OF THOSE WHO DID CONTINUE ON TO ACHIEVE THE GREAT GLORY AND HONOR OF ASCENSION INTO THE LIGHT FOREVER AFTER THEIR FAITH AND LOYALTY IN AURIEL WOULD BE SCRUTINIZED AND THEIR REMAINING DAYS FILLED WITH SHAME AND REGRET TALES OF THOSE WHO REACHED THE INNER SANCTUM ARE NOT WITHOUT THEIR SHARE OF WOES. IT IS SAID UPON THEIR ARRIVAL THAT MANY WERE MERE SHELLS OF THE PERSON THEY HAD ONCE BEEN SOME WERE QUITE MAD FROM SLEEPLESSNESS AND STARVED TO THE POINT OF FRAILTY BY THE END OF THEIR JOURNEY THE MARVEL THAT THEY HAD STRENGTH YET TO CARRY THEIR VESSEL AND ASCEND THE STAIRS OF THE TEMPLE WAS THE LAST TRUE TESTAMENT OF THEIR LOYALTY REGARDLESS OF EACH INDIVIDUALS TALE THE FINAL WORDS REMAIN EERILY SIMILAR IT IS SAID THAT EVERY PILGRIM ASCENDED BATHED IN LIGHT A LOOK OF RELIEF AND CONTENTMENT ON THEIR FACE
String.Dest:

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

Touching the Sky by Parmion Saldor

Translated from Falmer Text by Calcelmo of Markarth [pagebreak]

any of the most dedicated snow elves once committed themselves to a tireless journey through the Chantry to the Inner Sanctum. They carried with them the paramount desire to become one with their god, Auri-El. Though all set out with the determination to prove their worth, few were prepared for the trials that lay ahead. For the path to Auri-El was not without its tribulations. The pilgrims struggled not only against the natural elements of the treacherous vale, but with a myriad of tests upon their faith and loyalty. It is told that many simply could not continue on the path for long before turning back. Some argue that the rebuke they endured upon their return was crueler than any punishment that may have lay ahead of them along the path. In their failed attempt, they were forced to live in the shadow of those who did continue on to achieve the great glory and honor of ascension into the light. Forever after, their faith and loyalty in Auri-El would be scrutinized and their remaining days filled with shame and regret. Tales of those who reached the Inner Sanctum are not without their share of woes. It is said upon their arrival that many were mere shells of the person they had once been. Some were quite mad from sleeplessness and starved to the point of frailty. By the end of their journey, the marvel that they had strength yet to carry their vessel and ascend the stairs of the temple was the last true testament of their loyalty. Regardless of each individual's tale, the final words remain eerily similar. It is said that every pilgrim ascended, bathed in light, a look of relief and contentment on their face.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

触及天空 帕米昂·萨多 著 译自伐莫文献 马卡斯城的卡塞莫 译

[pagebreak]

许多虔诚至极的雪精灵曾将自己献身于从神殿到内殿那不知疲倦的旅程。他们怀着与他们的神——奥瑞-艾尔——融为一体的崇高愿望。尽管所有人都下决心要证明自己的价值，但很少有人为前方的考验做好准备。因为通向奥瑞-艾尔的道路并非一帆风顺。朝圣者们不仅要与险恶山谷的自然环境做斗争，还要经历无数对他们的信仰与虔诚的考验。 据传，很多人在这条路上根本走不了多远就折返了。一些人认为他们返回后所遭受的谴责要比前方道路上可能面临的任何惩罚都要残酷。由于他们的尝试失败了，他们要被迫生活在继续前进，取得了升入光芒的伟大荣光的那些人的阴影中。从此之后，他们对于奥瑞-艾尔的信仰与虔诚会受到审查，而他们的余生会充满愧疚与悔恨。 那些抵达内殿者的故事也不是一点苦难都没有。据说当他们抵达时，许多人已经是一具行尸走肉了。有些人因失眠而发狂，而有些人饿到了虚脱。在他们旅途的最后，仍有力气举着水壶爬上圣殿的台阶，就是对其虔诚的最终考验。不管每个人的故事有什么不同，结尾都非常相似。据说，每一位朝圣者都拾级而上，沐浴在阳光中，面露欣慰与满足之情。

Diary of Faire Agarwen Translated from Falmer Text by Calcelmo of Markarth [pagebreak]

Forward The dates noted in this diary are translated literally. This verbiage matches no known modern measure of time, and is assumed to be a custom form of counting the days and months. Excavations of ancient Falmer slave quarters have turned up brass vessels, very similar to a deep bowl, with twenty markings crudely etched onto the inside. Falmer scholars theorize that this bowl would be placed under a drip of water coming from an overhanging rock and as the bowl filled, the water's level would reach these markings, thus indicating a crude passage of time. Because of this diary, the vessel has been called a "kulniir," a primitive Falmer timekeeping device. [pagebreak]

Third Marking, Tenth Kulniir It feels like years since we were forced into hiding. I dare not write where we stay for fear of endangering the good people of this house should this diary be discovered. We have been shown a kindness by this family once known to the Snow Prince. Even in death his great influence has ensured our safety. We were separated from many of our kin along the road when it became increasingly difficult to travel discreetly in our numbers. We were forced to go our separate ways and travel only at night. I have heard no news of where the others may have gone and fear I never shall. Our lives are forever changed. [pagebreak] Seventh Marking, Tenth Kulniir In the night I find it difficult not to focus on times past. There are moments in my rest when I still hear the laughter of Young Ones at play in the valley. Other times I see the pale flicker of happy moments which were once so common in the land of the Snow Elves. I try not to dwell on these memories too long. Often our surroundings make it impossible to dwell on any happiness. We have been locked together in such close quarters for so long we grow tired of each other's company. Even the strongest of us have faltered with nothing to do but think on what is lost. I wake each day to forlorn faces and am reminded of where we are and all we have left behind. We are all yearning for a day when we can emerge from hiding and walk freely in the light once more. But I fear we are losing all hope that such a day will ever come. [pagebreak] Tenth Marking, Tenth Kulniir I tire of the tears of women and children. My own have run dry. The men have begun to look upon us as if we are all weak yet we have survived the same trials as they. I cannot bring myself to think on the numbers we lost in battle. Yet I cannot force the images of my own losses from my mind. And now in a time when our people should be banding together it feels we are drifting apart. The Nords have truly won. Our once great pride and unity are shattered. If we lose hope now we will never survive. Today many, myself included, have tried to speak out in voices of reason. There can be no hope without talk of our future. We can make no difference if our spirits remain broken. [pagebreak] Eighteenth Marking, Tenth Kulniir We know that we can never again be the Snow Elves and live freely in this world. We will forever be in hiding in one form or another. But there is no reason we cannot live life with the sun and the wind against our skin. There are those here who are friends to us and plan to help us once the threat has ended. We know now to survive we must be born anew. Outside, we will appear as though we belong here. Inside, we will carry our truth and our scars.
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

费尔·阿加文的日记 译自伐莫文献 马卡斯城的卡塞莫 译 [pagebreak]

前言 这本日记中的日期是逐字翻译而成的。这种措辞与现代的时间度量不匹配，我们认为这是一种专门用于计算日期和月份的形式。在对古代伐莫奴隶居住区的发掘工作中，发现了类似深碗的黄铜器皿，其内部粗糙地刻着二十道标记。伐莫学者认为这个碗会被置于来自悬岩的滴水下，依据水面达到这些标记的时间，来表示时间大致的流逝。根据这本日记，该容器被称为“库尼尔”，是一种原始的伐莫计时装置。 [pagebreak]

第十库尼尔，第三标记 自从我们被迫东躲西藏以来，我觉得好像过了好几年。我不敢写我们呆在哪里，因为如果这本日记被发现的话，会波及到这座房子的好心人。雪王子旧识的这家人对我们很好。即便牺牲了，他那巨大的影响力还是在保佑着我们安全。由于我们的人数让我们越来越难以谨慎行进，因此我们一路上与许多同胞走散了。我们被迫分道扬镳，只敢走夜路。我没听到其他人去向的消息，而且恐怕永远也打听不到了。我们的生活永远改变了。 [pagebreak] 第十库尼尔，第七标记 我发现在夜里很难不去回忆过去的时光。当我休息的时候，我仍然能听见年轻人们在山谷里玩耍时的笑声。其他时候，我看见曾经在雪精灵的土地上如此常见的幸福时刻一闪而过。我努力不去沉湎于这些回忆太长时间。我们在这么个小地方一起呆太久了，对彼此都觉得烦了。即便是我们之中最坚强的人，也因为无事可做而踌躇，只想着失落的事物。我每天早上醒过来，都会看见那些绝望的面孔，然后想起来我们身处何处以及我们所留在身后的一切。我们都渴望有朝一日能从藏身之处走出来，再次自由自在地行走在阳光下。不过我担心我们已经完全失去了期盼这一天将会来临的希望了。 [pagebreak] 第十库尼尔，第十标记 我厌倦了女人和孩子的眼泪了。我自己的眼泪已经流尽了。男人们开始觉得我们都是弱者，然而我们同他们一样经过了重重考验。我没法想象我们在战斗中失去了多少人。我也没法忘记我自己失去的东西。而现在正是我们族人应该团结一致的时候，但是我却觉得我们渐渐疏远了起来。诺德人确实赢了。我们曾经伟大的骄傲与团结被击碎了。如果我们现在失去了希望，我们就没法活下去。如今，包括我在内的许多人，都试着发出理性之声。如果我们不谈及未来，就不会有希望。如果我们的精神依然崩溃的话，就会一事无成。 [pagebreak] 第十库尼尔，第十八标记 我们知道我们没法再作为雪精灵，在这个世界自由生活了。我们永远以这样那样的方式躲藏起来。不过我们没有理由不能在阳光和微风下生活。这里有些人是我们的朋友，他们计划在威胁结束后帮助我们。我们现在知道，为了生存我们必须重生。从外表看，我们会表现得仿佛属于这里。在心底里，我们将带着我们的真相与伤疤。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

MIRTIL ANGOTH JOURNAL

[pagebreak]

FOURTH EVENING STAR I USED TO DREAM OF FIGHTING IN BATTLES LIKE MY FATHER HE HAD BEGUN TEACHING ME TO FIGHT THE MOMENT I WAS ABLE TO PICK UP A BLADE MOTHER HAD ARGUED THAT I WAS TOO YOUNG BUT HE PAID HER NO MIND I CAN STILL REMEMBER THE ELATION I FELT THE FIRST TIME I BESTED FATHER IN A MATCH AND THE LOOK OF PRIDE ON HIS FACE IF IT WERE UP TO HIM I KNOW HE WOULD HAVE ALLOWED ME TO JOIN HIM IN BATTLE WITH ME AT HIS SIDE HE MAY HAVE FARED BETTER NOW WITH FATHER AND SO MANY OTHERS SLAIN THE OLD ONES CLAIM WE ARE LEFT WITH TOO FEW WARRIORS TO CONTINUE THE FIGHT I WAS NOT THE ONLY YOUNG ONE TO SPEAK OUT IN PROTEST BUT OUR SMALL VOICES WENT UNHEARD IT HAS BEEN DECIDED THAT WE MUST FLEE TO SEEK HELP AND PROTECTION EIGHTH EVENING STAR NEWS HAS REACHED US THAT THE GREAT SNOW PRINCE HAS FALLEN IN BATTLE THE URGENCY TO GO INTO HIDING HAS LEFT MANY OF US SCATTERED AND THOSE OF US STILL TOGETHER UNSURE OF WHICH DIRECTION TO TURN IN THE LONG HOURS OF NIGHT WE KEEP HUDDLED TOGETHER ALWAYS FEARING THE WORST UNTIL THE FIRST LIGHT OF THE BLESSED SUN MAY AURI EL GUIDE OUR FOOTSTEPS THIRTEENTH EVENING STAR IN THE NIGHT I OVERHEARD THE OLD ONES WHISPERING SECRETS OF THE UNDERGROUND AND THE DWEMER WHO DWELL THERE I THOUGHT BACK ON STORIES FATHER ONCE TOLD ME OF THESE DWARVES HEROIC TALES OF HONOR AND GLORY THE OLD ONES MUST KNOW OF THESE STORIES FOR IT HAS BEEN DECIDED THAT WE WILL CHANGE COURSE UPON FIRST LIGHT I FEEL HOPEFUL THAT THE DWEMER WILL HELP US TO AVENGE OUR FALLEN AND RECLAIM OUR LAND

The Betrayed by Engwe Emeloth Translated from Falmer Text by Calcelmo of Markarth

[pagebreak]

nd when the Snow Prince fell to ground, The Ice Elves divided above and below. Now vanquished and brutally bound, One moment had shattered all they did know. [pagebreak] he once cool wind on their skin, Now replaced with the heat of the flame. And a pride once felt deep within, Forgotten along with their name. [pagebreak] orn from their home of ice and frost, Thrown into the pitch black dread of night. Living in fear as their minds become lost, As their eyes begin dimming the light. [pagebreak] hained and enslaved, What once was light turned to blackness. Alone and betrayed, Sinking deeper into madness.

背离之徒 英格威·伊梅洛斯 著 译自伐莫文献 马卡斯城的卡塞莫 译

[pagebreak]

当雪王子牺牲倒地， 冰雪精灵地上地下分居两地。 如今已被征服，被残忍地束缚， 一瞬间，他们所知的一切都分崩离析。 [pagebreak] 曾经吹拂肌肤的寒风， 如今变为火焰的热量。 深藏于胸中的骄傲， 与他们的名字一同被遗忘。 [pagebreak] 冰与雪的家园被撕碎， 陷入黑夜的恐惧。 当理智开始沦丧， 当双眸的视力开始昏暗， 生活充满了恐惧。 [pagebreak] 奴役与束缚， 颠倒了曾经的白与黑。 背叛与孤独， 深陷于愈演愈烈的疯狂。

Discovering Ruunvald Vol. III by Moric Sidrey

[pagebreak]

The damnable headaches! Minorne be merciful, I just can't seem to shake them. The workers have started to report them as well, but while their focus on conversation and civility may wane because of it, they have not swayed from their task. If anything, they seem to have doubled their efforts. I myself cannot seem to focus on anything other than the dig. I sit here now, studying some unearthed Nordic artifacts, yet I feel a nagging call to see how the dig is progressing. The other day without thinking, I picked up a shovel and started digging myself. Fortunately, no one seemed to find this unusual, which is a blessing. I'd hate for the Vigilants of Minorne to think that I'd lost my senses! As we dig, we uncover more Nordic ruins and architecture, but have yet to hit the main chamber. Everyday I dream we'll finally reach Ruunvald, and I can't help but reflect on what this will mean to my reputation! My family will be so proud, especially my father, Minorne. He and mother have always been interested in my studies, even if my sister Minorne was not. But I'm most excited to reveal my findings to my colleagues, Minorne and Minorne, and perhaps my mentor Minorne. Oh, won't they all be pleased?

M. Sidrey
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

探索鲁恩瓦德 第三卷 墨里克·西德利 著

[pagebreak]

该死的头疼！蜜诺妮行行好，我止不住头疼。就连工人们也开始报告头疼了，尽管他们因此不那么注意交谈与礼节，但却没有偏离任务。要说有什么不同的话，他们似乎加倍努力了起来。我自己似乎没法对挖掘之外的事情集中注意力。我现在坐在这里，研究着一件出土的诺德文物，但我感到一股烦人的冲动，要去看看挖掘进展得如何。前几天，我不假思索地拿起铲子，自己开始挖掘了起来。万幸的是，没有人发现这种异常，这是好事。我不喜欢让警戒者的蜜诺妮觉得我失去了理智！ 在挖掘的过程中，我们发现了更多诺德遗迹与器物，不过还没有挖到主厅。每天我都梦见我们终于抵达了鲁恩瓦德，我忍不住想这对我的名声意味着什么！我的家族会特别骄傲，尤其是我的父亲蜜诺妮。他跟母亲总是对我的研究很感兴趣，尽管我的姐姐蜜诺妮并不是这样。不过最令人兴奋的还是向我的同事——蜜诺妮跟蜜诺妮，也许还有我的导师蜜诺妮透露我的发现。哦，他们难道不会高兴吗？

M.西德利

[pagebreak]

Discovering Ruunvald Vol. IV by Moric Sidrey

[pagebreak]

I have found my muse and her name is Minorne. Reading back over old journals, I realize she has called to me from deep inside Ruunvald. She is the voice I've been hearing, the one who has called me ever downwards into the mountain. The Vigilants, the workers, they hear her too! What joy to learn that I am not alone in her love! Oh, Minorne, how would we have ever found this place without you! As I write this we are digging out the last bit of rock to get to you. Those without tools have started using their hands! I cannot write anymore, I must get back to work. Ruunvald awaits!

M. Sidrey
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

探索鲁恩瓦德 第四卷 墨里克·西德利 著

[pagebreak]

我发现了我冲动的来源，她的名字是蜜诺妮。回顾以前的日记，我发现是她在鲁恩瓦德深处召唤我。她就是我一直听到的那个声音，那个一直呼唤我进入这座山的声音。警戒者还有工人们，他们也听到她的声音了！得知她并非独宠我一人是何等乐事啊！啊，蜜诺妮，如果没有您，我们怎会发现此地！当我写这篇日记的时候，我们正在挖掘最后一块岩石，以便找到您。那些没有工具的人已经开始上手了！我不能再写了，我必须回去工作。鲁恩瓦德正等着呢！

M.西德利

OUR LIVES ARE FOREVER CHANGED SEVENTH MARKING TENTH KULNIIR IN THE NIGHT I FIND IT DIFFICULT NOT TO FOCUS ON TIMES PAST THERE ARE MOMENTS IN MY REST WHEN I STILL HEAR THE LAUGHTER OF YOUNG ONES AT PLAY IN THE VALLEY OTHER TIMES I SEE THE PALE FLICKER OF HAPPY MOMENTS WHICH WERE ONCE SO COMMON IN THE LAND OF THE SNOW ELVES I TRY NOT TO DWELL ON THESE MEMORIES TOO LONG OFTEN OUR SURROUNDINGS MAKE IT IMPOSSIBLE TO DWELL ON ANY HAPPINESS WE HAVE BEEN LOCKED TOGETHER IN SUCH CLOSE QUARTERS FOR SO LONG WE GROW TIRED OF EACH OTHERS COMPANY EVEN THE STRONGEST OF US HAVE FALTERED WITH NOTHING TO DO BUT THINK ON WHAT IS LOST I WAKE EACH DAY TO FORLORN FACES AND AM REMINDED OF WHERE WE ARE AND ALL WE HAVE LEFT BEHIND WE ARE ALL YEARNING FOR A DAY WHEN WE CAN EMERGE FROM HIDING AND WALK FREELY IN THE LIGHT ONCE MORE BUT I FEAR WE ARE LOSING ALL HOPE THAT SUCH A DAY WILL EVER COME TENTH MARKING TENTH KULNIIR I TIRE OF THE TEARS OF WOMEN AND CHILDREN MY OWN HAVE RUN DRY THE MEN HAVE BEGUN TO LOOK UPON US AS IF WE ARE ALL WEAK YET WE HAVE SURVIVED THE SAME TRIALS AS THEY I CANNOT BRING MYSELF TO THINK ON THE NUMBERS WE LOST IN BATTLE YET I CANNOT FORCE THE IMAGES OF MY OWN LOSSES FROM MY MIND AND NOW IN A TIME WHEN OUR PEOPLE SHOULD BE BANDING TOGETHER IT FEELS WE ARE DRIFTING APART THE NORDS HAVE TRULY WON OUR ONCE GREAT PRIDE AND UNITY ARE SHATTERED IF WE LOSE HOPE NOW WE WILL NEVER SURVIVE TODAY MANY MYSELF INCLUDED HAVE TRIED TO SPEAK OUT IN VOICES OF REASON THERE CAN BE NO HOPE WITHOUT TALK OF OUR FUTURE WE CAN MAKE NO DIFFERENCE IF OUR SPIRITS REMAIN BROKEN EIGHTEENTH MARKING TENTH KULNIIR WE KNOW THAT WE CAN NEVER AGAIN BE THE SNOW ELVES AND LIVE FREELY IN THIS WORLD WE WILL FOREVER BE IN HIDING IN ONE FORM OR ANOTHER BUT THERE IS NO REASON WE CANNOT LIVE LIFE WITH THE SUN AND THE WIND AGAINST OUR SKIN THERE ARE THOSE HERE WHO ARE FRIENDS TO US AND PLAN TO HELP US ONCE THE THREAT HAS ENDED WE KNOW NOW TO SURVIVE WE MUST BE BORN ANEW OUTSIDE WE WILL APPEAR WE BELONG HERE INSIDE WE WILL CARRY OUR TRUTH AND OUR SCARS

String.Source: When using enhanced cross bows, ignore 50% armor resistance
String.Dest: 使用强化弩时，忽略50%护甲抗性

String.Source: Sun Fire
25% less damage from Vampire attacks and Drain Life spells while wearing a complete set of Dawnguard armor.
String.Dest: 穿戴全套黎明守卫盔甲时，吸血鬼的攻击与吸血术造成的伤害降低25%。

String.Source: Conjure Mistman
String.Dest: 召唤迷雾仆从

String.Source: It's been suggested that the Dawnguard could use the help of a man named Florentius, a former Priest of Arkay. I need to speak with Isran to find out if he knows where Florentius might be.
String.Dest: 有人建议黎明守卫可以找一个叫佛伦提乌斯的人帮忙，他曾是阿尔凯祭司。我和伊士冉谈谈，看他是否知道佛伦提乌斯的下落。

String.Source: Conjure Boneman
String.Dest: 召唤骸骨仆从

String.Source: Conjure Wrathman
String.Dest: 召唤愤怒仆从

String.Source: Attacks with this crossbow ignore 50% of armor.
String.Dest: 使用此弩攻击忽略50%的护甲值。

String.Source: Does additional damage to Vampires.
String.Dest: 对吸血鬼造成额外伤害。

String.Source: You have no empty soulgems to fill.
String.Dest: 你没有可以填充的空灵魂石。

String.Source: +10 Bash damage against vampires, and sustained blocking creates a minor sun shield doing 10 points of damage while draining the wielder's stamina.
String.Dest: 对吸血鬼的盾击伤害+10，持续格挡将制造一个小型太阳盾，在消耗使用者耐力的同时造成10点伤害。

String.Source: Grand or Greater Soul Gems can be placed atop the apparatus.
String.Dest: 特大或大型灵魂石可以放置在容器上。

String.Source: You lack the required item.
Vampire Lord
+10 Bash damage against vampires.

I've encountered Gelebor, a snow elf Knight-Paladin of the Chantry of Auri-El. He's requesting I kill his brother, Arch-Curate Vyrthur, who's been corrupted by the Falmer. I've been given an Initiate's Ewer which will ultimately provide me access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum where both Arch-Curate Vyrthur and Auriel's Bow are located.
String.Dest: 我遇到了奥瑞-艾尔神殿的雪精灵圣骑士盖勒布。他要求我去杀死他被伐莫腐化的兄弟，教士长维苏尔。我得到了一个新人之壶，能够帮我进入教士长维苏尔和奥瑞艾尔之弓所在的神殿内殿。

String.Source: Isran, the leader of a group of vampire hunters known as the Dawnguard, asked me to find out what the vampires were seeking in a place called Dimhollow Crypt. Deep in the crypt, I freed a mysterious young woman named Serana from an ancient sarcophagus.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼猎人组织“黎明守卫”的首领，伊士冉让我前往一个叫幽空地穴的地方查找吸血鬼们的目标。在地穴深处，我从一个古老石棺中救出了一个名叫瑟拉娜的神秘年轻女子。

String.Source: After a rival vampire faction captured the Moth Priest, I tracked them to Forebears' Holdout. Their leader has enthralled the priest and I will have to confront him in order to assert my own hold over him.
String.Dest: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺了蛾祭司，我追踪他们来到先祖据点。他们的首领迷惑了祭司，我必须先击败他才能重新取回控制权。

String.Source: After a rival vampire faction captured and enthralled the Moth Priest, I fought him and forced him to submit. Now it is my turn to enthrall the Moth Priest by using my newfound powers.
String.Dest: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺并迷惑了蛾祭司，我与之战斗将其击败。现在轮到我用新获得的力量来控制他了。

String.Source: After a rival vampire faction captured the Moth Priest, I tracked them to Forebears' Holdout. Their leader has enthralled the priest and I will have to confront him in order to assert my own hold over him.
String.Dest: 一群敌对的吸血鬼抢夺了蛾祭司，我追踪他们来到先祖据点。他们的首领迷惑了祭司，我必须先击败他才能重新取回控制权。

String.Source: I was asked to fill the Bloodstone Chalice from the spring in Redwater Den. Garan sent me on this task suspecting that I would be followed and attacked by others attempting to overthrow Harkon. By returning the Chalice I have lessened their power and earned Harkon's favor.
String.Dest: 我被派去从红水窝点的泉水里灌满血石圣杯。加兰之所以派我执行这个任务，是因为他怀疑我会被企图推翻哈孔者跟踪偷袭。通过归还圣杯，我削弱了他们的力量，并获得了哈孔的青睐。

String.Source: While attempting to fill the Bloodstone Chalice in Redwater Den, I was ambushed by Stalf and Salonia, two vampires from the castle. I'll need to kill them before they can kill me.
String.Dest: 当我正打算在红水窝点灌满血石圣杯时，我遭遇城堡的两个吸血鬼，史达夫和莎洛妮雅的袭击。我需要在他们干掉我之前先杀掉他们。

String.Source: Harkon has asked me to speak to Garan Marethi, telling him simply "It is time."
String.Dest: 哈孔让我去和加兰·玛瑞锡谈谈，只需要告诉他“是时候了”。

String.Source: I've located all of the notes that Jiub lost when he arrived in the Soul Cairn. I should return them to him when I get the chance.
String.Dest: 我找到了鸠步散落在灵魂石冢的所有笔记。有机会得还给他。

String.Source: While exploring the Soul Cairn, I've come across the soul of a strange Dunmer named Jiub. He claims to be writing the second volume of his life's story but lacks the notes from his first in order to complete it. He's asked for my help in locating the pages which are likely spread across the entire Soul Cairn... quite a daunting task.
String.Dest: 在探索灵魂石冢时，我遇到了一个叫做鸠步的奇怪丹莫鬼魂。他声称正在书写人生传记的第二卷，但却缺少了第一卷的笔记。他让我帮他寻找那些可能散落在灵魂石冢各处的手稿……这可是个相当艰巨的任务。

String.Source: Revert to human form.
Reanimated undead have 100 points more health.
String.Dest: 复活的亡灵生命增加100点。

String.Source: Bashing places a rune on a nearby surface; the rune explodes for 50 points of fire damage when enemies come near.
String.Dest: 重击会将符文放置在附近地面上，当敌人靠近引爆符文，造成50点火焰伤害。

String.Source: I've returned all of Jiub's lost notes to the poor soul. He presented me with an an amulet and a pristine copy of his first volume in appreciation for my efforts.
String.Dest: 我已经把这可怜人的所有遗失笔记还给了他。为了感谢我的努力，他送了我一个护符与他的第一卷作品。

String.Source: Harkon's agents have captured the Moth Priest! I have tracked them to Forebears' Holdout, but the vampires have enthralled the Moth Priest and I will have to confront him in order to break their hold.
String.Dest: 哈孔的吸血鬼密使抓住了蛾祭司，把他带到了叫做“先祖据点”的地方。但吸血鬼已经将蛾祭司迷惑，我必须打败他才能打破他们的控制。

String.Source: I'm one step behind the Moth Priest. After leaving Dragon Bridge, I searched along the road for any sign of his passing. I found an overturned wagon and some dead Imperial guards and vampires. Was this the Moth Priest's wagon?
String.Dest: 我比蛾祭司落后一步。离开龙桥，我沿路寻找他走过的痕迹。我发现一辆翻倒的马车和一些死去的吸血鬼和帝国卫兵。这是蛾祭司的马车么？

String.Source: Soul harvested.
I've been asked to find a man named Florentius in the hopes that he can assist the Dawnguard. I've learned that he was last seen helping the Vigilants of Stendarr in Ruunvald.
String.Dest: 有人建议黎明守卫可以找一个叫佛伦提乌斯的人帮忙。我得知他最后一次被人见到，是在鲁恩瓦德帮助斯丹达尔警戒者。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer by Jiub

[pagebreak]

am a hunter. I am a redeemer. I am Jiub. The tale of my rise to glory begins in the ash wastes of Morrowind. I rode alone, weapon at my side and the burning wind stinging my face. My quest was arduous, but necessary to ensure the survival of the Dunmer people. A pestilence was creeping across the ashlands, a menace with an insatiable hunger that plagued innocent travelers simply trying to get home. It was my self-sworn task to hunt them down one-by-one and drive them from the skies. Their fury knew no bounds and their war cry resonated across the land. They were the notorious cliff racers, and they had to be destroyed. On a particularly hot day during Sun's Height, I was tracking what I called a Lingerer... a cliff racer without a nest. He was a particularly feisty one too, leading me on a merry chase across almost three miles of ash dunes. I had managed to take a piece out of one of his wings in an earlier scuffle so he couldn't maintain much of a climb, but he still had quite a bit of stamina left and he was trying to make me tire of the chase. Almost two solid hours passed and my silt strider was tiring, but I couldn't give up... I had sworn to eliminate the foul beasts to the last and I wasn't about to let it go. If I was going to stop the thing, I'd have to do it fast. I pulled my longbow from my back and nocked my last arrow. I took a deep breath and pulled, trying to keep the cliff racer in my sights. It was literally a longshot with the beast gaining distance and the silt strider bouncing me around at full gallop. Finally, with a silent prayer, I released the string. The arrow sang through the air like a howling demon as it sliced its way towards its target. Finally, just as it crested the lip of a foyada, the arrow struck it in the midsection. It let out a horrible cry and fell out of sight. My cries of triumph were quickly stifled by the sound of over a hundred wings. Rising from the foyada was an entire colony of cliff racers and they were out for blood. The blasted thing had led me right to their nest and sacrificed itself with the intent of feeding me to its brood. It was a trap. The damned things had become much too clever. Knowing this was likely the end, I jumped down from the silt strider and hit the back of its leg with the flat of my glass blade. There was no need for the innocent thing to die here today because of my stupidity. As the ash cloud cleared from being stirred up by its massive legs, the cliff racer brood approached. I held my sword high and prepared for the worst. The battle lasted two full days. I was beaten, clawed, bitten and knocked down more times than I care to remember. In the end, seventy-six cliff racers were slaughtered. I was knee-deep in their corpses and my body on the verge of collapse. But I had survived. I smiled to the heavens and all went black. When I awoke, all I felt was my back on a cold stone floor. Every muscle in my body was on fire, and my vision was blurred. Slowly, I tried to climb to my feet. It took several agonizing minutes, but I finally managed to do it. As my eyes adjusted to the dim light of my new surroundings, I realized that I was standing before Lord Vivec himself. He was simply staring at me... floating above his throne and staring at me with his piercing eyes. When I began to prostrate myself as a sign of respect, he held up one of his hands as if to say it wasn't necessary. Was I dead? Was Lord Vivec pleased with me? Was he about to strike me down in anger for my somewhat sordid past? Suddenly I understood everything. Suddenly I realized that I was brought here for a reason. I should have died in those ash wastes, but Lord Vivec must have seen something inside me that he hadn't seen in millennia and decided to spare me from my fate. Thus began my ascent to Sainthood. Thus began the rise of Jiub!
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

晨风的除害英雄 丹莫的救世主 圣鸠步的崛起与陨落 鸠步 著

[pagebreak]

我乃猎手。我乃救世主。我即是鸠步。 我走向荣耀的传说始于晨风的灰烬荒地。我独乘一骑，身负武器，燃烧的风刺痛了脸颊。我的任务艰巨，然而必须要保障丹莫人民的生存安全。一场瘟疫正在灰地蔓延，一场无尽贪食的威胁困扰着想要归家的旅人。我暗暗发誓，要把它们一个个从天上击落。它们的怒火永无止境，它们的叫声响彻大陆。它们就是臭名昭著的峭壁行者，它们必须被摧毁殆尽。 在日高月一个特别炎热的日子里，我跟踪着一只没有巢穴的峭壁行者……它名叫逗留者。它也相当活跃，让我高兴地追着他跑过了将近三里的灰丘。在早些的追逐中，我设法把它的翅膀削掉了一块，所以它爬不了多久，不过它仍然有不少耐力，试图让我厌倦追逐。近过去了足足两个小时，我的泥沙漫步者开始累了，但是我不能放弃……我曾发誓要彻底消灭这些肮脏的畜生，我不想就此罢休。如果我想阻止它，就得快点动手。 我从背上取下弓，搭上最后一支箭矢。我深吸一口气，拉弓，努力让峭壁行者保持在视野之内。这可真是一次高难度远射，那畜生不断向远方跑去，泥沙漫步者全速飞奔把我颠来颠去。最终，随着无声的祷告，我放开弓弦。箭矢从空中呼啸而过，如同一只嚎叫的恶魔，飞向它的目标。最后，当逗留者抵达佛亚达的边缘时，箭射中了它的腹部。它发出骇人的叫声，消失在了视线之外。 我那胜利的叫喊声很快被无数翅膀拍打的声响压了过去。佛亚达中飞出了一大群峭壁行者，它们一心渴求杀戮。那个混球把我引向它们的巢穴，然后自我牺牲，把我去喂它的崽子。这是个陷阱。这些天杀的东西太狡猾了。知道自己可能大限将至，我从泥沙漫步者上跳下来，用玻璃剑的剑面打了它的腿背。没必要因为我的愚蠢而让无辜的生命在今天死在这里。当泥沙漫步者结实的腿扬起的灰云散去时，峭壁行者的崽子们接近了。我把剑高高举起，做好了最坏的打算。 战斗持续了足足两天。我已经记不清我被打、被抓、被咬、被击倒多少次了。最终，我杀死了七十六只峭壁行者。我站在齐膝深的尸骸中，身体濒临崩溃。不过我活了下来。我向天空微笑，一切就陷入了黑暗。 当我醒过来时，我感觉我躺在冰冷的石头地板上。我身上每一寸肌肉都在燃烧，我的视力也模糊了。我试着慢慢爬起来。这几分钟痛苦难熬，不过最终我做到了。当我的眼睛适应新环境的昏暗光线时，我发现我就站在维威克大君本尊面前。他只是盯着我……悬浮在他的王座上，用他那锐利的目光盯着我。当我下拜以示尊重时，他抬了抬手，似乎在说不必多礼。我死了吗？维威克大君对我满意吗？他会不会因为我略显卑鄙的过去而愤然将我毁灭呢？ 突然之间，我明白了一切。突然之间，我明白我并非无缘无故被带到此处。我本该死在那灰烬中，不过维威克大君一定看到了我内心中某些他千年未曾得见的东西，并且决定让我摆脱命运。 就这样，我的升圣之路开始了。就这样，鸠步的崛起开始了！

String.Source: Does additional damage to Vampires.
String.Dest: 对吸血鬼造成额外伤害。

String.Source: Attacks with this crossbow ignore 50% of armor.
String.Dest: 使用此弩攻击忽略50%的护甲值。

String.Source:
[pagebreak]

The Sultry Argonian Bard Volume 1 By: Ellya Erdain

[pagebreak]

Act VI, Scene II, continued Croon-Tail My lady, I could never perform your request! Ellya Erdain Oh? Is it too fast for you? Croon-Tail I fear that it might damage my instrument. Ellya Erdain Ah. But you seem to handle your instrument so well, my darling. Croon-Tail You flatter me, my lady. Ellya Erdain Yes, well it is such a large and magnificent piece. May I hold it? Croon-Tail Goodness no! The innkeeper would never approve of such a public display. Ellya Erdain Then may I suggest a private performance? Perhaps, away from the noise of the inn where we both may enjoy your tremendous talent. Croon-Tail Surely you don't mean for me to accompany you to your room? Ellya Erdain Indeed I do, my sweet. Indeed I do. END OF ACT VI, SCENE II
String.Dest:
[pagebreak]

性感迷人的阿尔贡诗人 卷一 艾丽娅·厄迪恩 著

[pagebreak]

第六幕，第二场，续 尾巴唱唱： 夫人啊，我永远也没法满足您的要求！ 艾丽娅·厄迪恩： 哦？对你来说太快了吗？ 尾巴唱唱： 我怕伤到我的乐器。 艾丽娅·厄迪恩： 啊。可是亲爱的，你那把乐器似乎演奏得挺不错呢。 尾巴唱唱： 夫人，您过奖了。 艾丽娅·厄迪恩： 没错，这可真是一部雄伟又华美的杰作啊。我能拿着吗？ 尾巴唱唱： 老天，不要！旅店老板可坚决不许做这种公演啊。 艾丽娅·厄迪恩： 那我能办场私人演出吗？也许，找个远离旅店喧嚣的地方，在那儿咱俩都能欣赏你那非凡的天赋了。 尾巴唱唱： 您该不是要我陪您回屋吧？ 艾丽娅·厄迪恩： 我就是，亲爱的。我就是。 第六幕，第二场结束。

String.Source: Vampire's Bane
String.Dest: 吸血鬼克星

String.Source: I've been asked to take a special artifact of Harkon's - the Bloodstone Chalice - and to fill it from the spring in Redwater Den. After that, I need to add the blood of a powerful vampire and deliver the chalice to Garan Marethi.
String.Dest: 我被要求带着哈孔的一件特殊神器——血石圣杯，去红水窝点用泉水装满。然后，我需要添加一个强大吸血鬼的血，再把圣杯交给加兰·玛瑞锡。

String.Source: Stendarr's Aura
String.Dest: 斯丹达尔光环

String.Source: 25% less damage from Vampire attacks and Drain Life spells while wearing a complete set of Dawnguard armor.
String.Dest: 穿戴全套黎明守卫盔甲时，吸血鬼的攻击与吸血术造成的伤害降低25%。

String.Source: I've rescued Florentius Baenius from Ruunvald, where he was being held captive. He's agreed to return to Fort Dawnguard and aid our cause.
String.Dest: 我从鲁恩瓦德救出了被困的佛伦提乌斯·贝尼乌斯。他同意到黎明守卫堡垒帮助我们。

String.Source: I have filled the Bloodstone Chalice from the spring in Redwater Den, and added the blood of a vampire. I now need to return the chalice to Garan at the castle.
String.Dest: 我已经用红水窝点的泉水灌满了血石圣杯，并在其中加入了吸血鬼的血。我现在要回城堡把圣杯交给加兰。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Blood Grip will gradually drain life from the victim.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，你的吸血鬼之握将逐渐从受害者身上吸取生命。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source: Vampire Lord infects target doing 100 damage over 10 seconds. If the target is killed by Blood Plague it will jump to nearby targets.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼领主感染目标，在10秒内造成100点伤害。如果目标被血之瘟疫杀死，效果会跳转到附近的目标上。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, you will receive <100> extra Magicka as well as regenerate Magicka faster.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，获得 <100>点额外魔力，魔力恢复速度加快。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina recover slowly while in Soul Cairn and are reduced by <45> points.
String.Dest: 在灵魂石冢内，生命、魔力和耐力恢复速度减慢，并减少<45>点。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, your Blood Magic while in Vampire Lord Form will be Reanimate Corpse.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，吸血鬼领主状态下的血魔法变为复活尸体。

String.Source: Heal Undead
String.Dest: 治疗亡灵

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, Bats will drain life from any nearby enemies.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，蝙蝠位移将吸取附近一切敌人的生命。

String.Source: Necromantic Healing
String.Dest: 死灵治愈术

String.Source: Dawnguard weapons do extra damage against vampires, and Dawnguard armor protects better vampires.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫武器对吸血鬼有额外伤害，护甲可以更好抵御吸血鬼攻击。

String.Source: I've been given a book of bizarre ramblings about Elder Scrolls, written by Septimus Signus. He claims to have spent time at the Winterhold Arcanaeum.
String.Dest: 我找到一本关于上古卷轴的奇怪漫谈，作者是赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯。他声称自己曾在冬堡学院秘藏馆待过一段时间。

String.Source: While wearing this ring, you will receive <100> extra health and your claw attacks will do an additional <20> damage.
String.Dest: 佩戴此戒指时，获得 <100>点额外生命值，吸血鬼爪击伤害提高<20>点。

String.Source: Portal to Forgotten Vale
Portal to Shrine of Illumination
Portal to Darkfall Passage
Sneak to change between magic and melee modes
String.Dest: 用潜行键在魔法与近战模式之间切换

String.Source: Do 100% more damage as a werewolf.
Bats power is recharging
String.Dest: 蝙蝠位移能力正在恢复

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Summon Gargoyle spell summons an additional Gargoyle for <30> seconds.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，你的召唤石像鬼法术额外召唤一只石像鬼，持续<30>秒。

String.Source: While wearing this amulet, your Drain Life spell will drain a more Magicka.
String.Dest: 佩戴此护符时，你的吸血术将吸取更多魔力。

String.Source: Karliah, Brynjolf and I have slain Mercer Frey, escaped Irkngthand and recovered the Skeleton Key. All that remains is returning the artifact to the Twilight Sepulcher where it belongs; a journey I must undertake alone.
String.Dest: 卡莱亚、布林乔夫和我杀死了墨瑟·弗雷，逃出了厄金坦德，找回了万能钥匙。剩下的就是把神器送回黄昏坟墓，这趟旅程必须由我独自承担。

String.Source: Portal to Shrine of Resolution
Open the game menu to view the perk tree
String.Dest: 打开游戏菜单查看技能树

String.Source: Portal to Shrine of Sight

After the Moth Priest's reading, we have more questions than answers. The old priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but we need to find two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司阅读完毕后，我们的疑问多于答案。老祭司看到了一件叫做奥瑞艾尔之弓的武器，但我们还需要两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

String.Source: Press [Tween Menu] to view the Vampire Lord perk tree
String.Dest: 按下[Tween Menu]查看吸血鬼领主技能树

String.Source: I've learned of a group of vampire hunters known as the Dawnguard. It seems they are looking for new recruits.
String.Dest: 我听说有一群吸血鬼猎人叫做黎明守卫。听说他们正在招募新人。

String.Source: I'm on my way to Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Karliah and Brynjolf are waiting for me within. Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
String.Dest: 我要前往大型矮人遗迹厄金坦德，传说那里存放着“伐莫之眼”。卡莱亚和布林乔夫在里面等我。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

String.Source: Portal to Darkfall Cave
I've rejected Harkon's offer to be turned into a vampire. Now I need to return to Isran and tell him what I've learned.
String.Dest: 我拒绝了哈孔让我变成吸血鬼的提议。现在我要回去把发现告诉伊士冉。

String.Source: A Crossbow and Steel Bolt are needed to arm the trap.
String.Dest: 需要一把弩和钢制弩箭来布置陷阱

String.Source:
When a vampire drains your life, you may become infected with Sanguinare Vampiris. If you do not cure this disease within three days, you will become a vampire.
As a vampire, you will gain several abilities that reflect your undead and supernatural nature. You will also be afflicted with the vampire's weakness to sunlight, and suffer ill effects when traveling outdoors during the daytime. As time passes, both your powers and your weaknesses will grow in strength.
In order to offset these weaknesses, you must "feed" on a humanoid subject. To feed on someone, approach them while they are asleep and activate them. Once you have fed, your powers and weaknesses will be reduced to their lowest level, and the cycle will begin again.
String.Dest:
当吸血鬼吸收你的生命时，你可能会感染血腥吸血热。如果不在三天内治好，就会变成吸血鬼。
作为吸血鬼，你会获得具有亡灵与超自然本质的能力。你也会因吸血鬼的弱性而饱受阳光折磨，白天在外活动将会感到不适。随着时间流逝，你的力量与弱点都会增强。
为了弥补弱点，你必须“进食”人形目标。在他们睡着时接近并吸食他们。吃饱后，你的力量和弱点将被降低回最低水平，循环将再次开始。

String.Source: Select your powers from the Favorites menu
String.Dest: 打开偏好菜单选择你的能力

String.Source: Blessing of Auriel added
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔的祝福已添加

String.Source: Bats power is ready
Portal to Shrine of Learning
Portal to Shrine of Radiance
Portal to Temple Balcony

Dexion's reading of the Elder Scroll has given rise to more questions than answers. The Moth Priest saw a vision of a weapon called Auriel's Bow, but Serana and I need to locate two more Elder Scrolls in order to unravel the rest of the prophecy.
String.Dest: 戴希翁对上古卷轴的阅读带来的问题多于答案。蛾祭司看到了一种叫做“奥瑞艾尔之弓”的武器，但我和瑟拉娜需要找到另外两卷上古卷轴才能解开剩下的预言。

String.Source: After rejecting Harkon's offer to become a vampire, I returned to Isran and informed him of what I've learned. I helped him recruit several people into the Dawnguard who can help us fight the vampires.
String.Dest: 在拒绝了哈孔让我变成吸血鬼的提议后，我回到了伊士冉处，把发现告诉了他。我帮他招募了几个人加入黎明守卫，和我们一起对抗吸血鬼。

String.Source: Mercer Frey, betrayer of the Thieves Guild and Gallus's murderer is finally dead. Upon his death, a wave of magic issued from his body and has caused the already crumbling chamber to collapse and fill with water.
String.Dest: 盗贼公会的叛徒，杀害加卢斯的凶手，墨瑟·弗雷死了。他死后，一股魔法浪潮从尸体中释放出来，导致已经濒临崩溃的房间坍塌并充水。

String.Source: Do 75% more damage as a werewolf.

<font face="$HandwrittenFont"> The prophesied time has come. I have reclaimed one my lost Elder Scrolls, and now I must have a Moth Priest to read it. For the one who brings me a Moth Priest, I promise a high place in my court and the gift of my potent blood.
Go forth and find me a Moth Priest. This is my command.
Lord Harkon </font>
String.Dest:
<font face="$HandwrittenFont"> 预言中的时刻即将来临。我已经找到了一卷丢失的上古卷轴，现在我必须得找到一名能够解读它的蛾祭司。带来蛾祭司的人，我将提拔其在我宫廷中的地位并且赐下我那强大血液的天赋。
听我号令，出动，给我把蛾祭司找来。
哈孔领主 </font>

String.Source:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> Frenzy poison:
~Blisterwort
~Falmer Ear </font>
String.Dest:
<font face='$HandwrittenFont'> 狂乱毒药：
~气泡草
~伐莫耳 </font>

String.Source: Absorbs <15> points of Health, Magicka, and Stamina if wielded by a vampire.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼使用时，吸收<15>点生命、魔力与耐力。

String.Source: Portal to Darkfall Grotto
Portal to Forgotten Vale Overlook
You cannot use this while in combat.
Portal to Forgotten Vale Forest
Portal to Inner Sanctum
I've gained access to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum. I should find and confront Arch-Curate Vyrthur in order to secure Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 我进入神殿的内殿。我必须找到教士长维苏尔并与之战斗，才能拿到奥瑞艾尔之弓。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <60> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<60>点。

String.Source: Portal to Paragon Platform
Auriel's Chapel
Portal to Glacial Crevice
I've successfully made contact with Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold regarding the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn.
String.Dest: 我已经成功联系上冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布，询问了预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。

String.Source: I've successfully made contact with a strange old man named Septimus Signus who appears to have information regarding the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn.
String.Dest: 我成功联系上了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的怪老头，他似乎有关于龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴的消息。

String.Source: I've successfully purchased the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn from Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold.
String.Dest: 我已经成功从冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布那里买回了预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。

String.Source: In order to discover the location of Auriel's Bow, I need to acquire the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. Having sold that particular scroll to Urag gro-Shub at the College of Winterhold, I'll need to return there to see if he's willing to sell it back.
String.Dest: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要获得预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。我已经把那卷轴卖给了冬堡学院的乌拉格·格洛-舒布，我得看看他是否愿意重新出售。

String.Source: In order to discover the location of Auriel's Bow, I need to acquire the Elder Scroll that foretells the interactions of the dragons with the history of Nirn. In order to begin my search, I've been told to ask at the College of Winterhold.
String.Dest: 为了找到奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要获得预言龙与奈恩历史互动的上古卷轴。为了搜寻，我需要去冬堡学院询问一番。

String.Source: Use your Revert Form power to transform back
String.Dest: 使用形态恢复能力变回来

String.Source: Mist Form power is ready
Mist Form power is recharging
String.Dest: 迷雾形态能力正在恢复

String.Source: I'm on my way to meet Mercer Frey at the ruins of Snow Veil Sanctum, Karliah's last known location. Together, Mercer and I intend to hunt her down and make her pay for Gallus's murder.
String.Dest: 我要去雪幔圣所遗迹和墨瑟·弗雷会面，那是卡莱亚最后出没的地方。墨瑟和我打算一起找到她，让她为杀害加卢斯付出代价。

String.Source: Supernatural Reflexes power is recharging
String.Dest: 超常反应能力正在恢复

String.Source: Supernatural Reflexes power is ready
I have ascended to the Circle which leads the Companions, and now share their blood as a werewolf. To celebrate my new status, Skjor and Aela have invited me to attack a Silver Hand camp nearby.
String.Dest: 我已经晋升入领导战友团的圆环中，现在，作为狼人，我与他们同享血液。为了庆贺我的新身份，斯科约尔和艾拉邀请我去附近的银手营地。

String.Source: Aela and Skjor want to speak to me about some kind of special mission for the Companions.
String.Dest: 艾拉和斯科约尔想和我谈谈关于战友团的某个特殊任务。

String.Source: After awakening from the Dreamstride, I was able to remove the barrier to the inner sanctum. I must now follow Erandur to the Skull of Corruption so it can be rendered inert.
String.Dest: 从梦中漫步醒来后，我解除了通往内部密室的屏障。我现在必须跟着依兰杜尔找到堕落头骨并摧毁它。

String.Source: From a tome obtained in the temple's library, Erandur has discovered a way to breach the inner sanctum. By obtaining a special liquid, we'll be able to perform a Dreamstride... travel a distance using another subject's dreams.
String.Dest: 从神殿图书馆的典籍中，依兰杜尔发现了攻破密室的方法。我们需要一种特殊的液体来实现梦中漫步……利用其它对象的梦境进行远距离旅行。

String.Source: Erandur has revealed that Nightcaller Temple contains the legendary Skull of Corruption, an artifact of great power. In order to end the nightmares, we must breach the inner sanctum and allow Erandur to perform a ritual on the Skull which will render it inert.
String.Dest: 依兰杜尔透露，唤夜神殿中藏着传说中的堕落头骨，那是一件强大的神器。为了结束噩梦，我们必须进入内部密室，并让依兰杜尔对着头骨举行仪式令其失效。

String.Source: Erandur has assured me he can end the nightmares, the source of which seems to be within Nightcaller Temple, a place of worship for Vaermina. I have agreed to assist him in this endeavor and we are now on our way.
String.Dest: 依兰杜尔向我保证自己能够结束噩梦，噩梦的源头似乎在唤夜神殿，那里是祭拜瓦尔迷纳的地方。我同意帮他，我们现在上路了。

String.Source: Skjor and Aela say they have some sort of special assignment for me. I'm supposed to meet them underneath the Skyforge tonight.
String.Dest: 斯科约尔和艾拉说给我安排了一项特殊任务。我今晚要和他们在天空锻炉下方会合。

String.Source: Mercer Frey is dead and I've recovered the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal from his corpse. I need to escape Irkngthand before the place collapses around me.
String.Dest: 墨瑟·弗雷死了，我从他尸体上拿回了诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙。我要在这里完全坍塌前逃离厄金坦德。

String.Source: <Cool graphic>
<Cool graphic>
Falion in Morthal is rumored to have studied vampires. He might be able to cure the condition.
String.Dest: 据说莫萨尔的法利昂研究过吸血鬼。也许他能治好我的病。

String.Source: Greater duration for reanimated undead.
String.Dest: 复活的亡灵持续时间更长。

String.Source: Can create Dragon armor and Dragonbone weapons at forges, and improve them twice as much.
String.Dest: 可以在锻炉制造龙骨护甲和武器，强化效果加倍。

String.Source: The most naturally talented warriors in Tamriel, the Redguards of Hammerfell have a hardy constitution and a natural resistance to poison. They can call upon an Adrenaline Rush in combat.
String.Dest: 落锤的红卫人是泰姆瑞尔最具天赋的战士，体质强健且对毒素有天然的抗性。他们可以在战斗中激发自己的肾上腺素。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus and brought him a dwarven lexicon containing the distilled knowledge of an Elder Scroll. With it, he believes he can open the lockbox he's been studying by creating a mixture of blood that will resemble dwarven. I need to collect blood from several different races if I want to help him.
String.Dest: 我遇到了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，帮他在方典中刻录了上古卷轴的知识精华。他相信，有了它，就能通过制造一种类似矮人血的血液混合物，打开自己一直在研究的箱子。想帮他的话，需要采集几个不同种族的血液。

String.Source: I've overheard two citizens of Dawnstar complaining about horrible nightmares. They seem to be relying on a priest of Mara named Erandur for assistance.
String.Dest: 我听到晨星的市民抱怨可怕的噩梦。他们似乎需要一位名叫依兰杜尔的玛拉祭司帮助。

String.Source: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. I need to meet him at the Black Marsh at dawn for him to perform the ritual. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
String.Dest: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。我要等到黎明时分在黑色沼泽里和他见面以便他举行仪式。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

String.Source: Hailing from the province of Elsweyr, they are intelligent, quick, and agile. They make excellent thieves due to their natural stealthiness. All Khajiit can see in the dark and have deadly claw attacks.
String.Dest: 卡吉特来自艾斯维尔省，聪明、敏捷、灵活。由于天生的潜行天赋，他们都是当盗贼的行家。卡吉特能在黑暗中保持绝佳的视力，徒手时可以用利爪进行攻击。

String.Source: Natives of Cyrodiil, they have proved to be shrewd diplomats and traders. They are skilled with combat and magic. Anywhere gold coins might be found, Imperials always seem to find a few more. They can call upon the Voice of the Emperor to calm an enemy.
String.Dest: 帝国人是希罗帝尔的原住民，精明的交际家和商人。战斗和魔法天赋都很出众。在任何有可能发现金币的地方，帝国人似乎总能比别人找到更多。他们可以用“帝王之音”使敌人平静下来。

String.Source: Falion in Morthal can perform a ritual to cure vampirism. He requires a filled black soul gem. I should be careful not to be Blood-Starved when I meet with him or he won't trust me enough to help.
String.Dest: 莫萨尔的法利昂可以举行治愈吸血鬼的仪式。他需要一个充满的黑色灵魂石。我跟他见面的时候要小心克制自己对鲜血的饥渴，否则他会不相信我，不会帮忙。

String.Source: I've found myself within the dreams of a priest of Vaermina. I am experiencing the Orc invasion of the temple over a decade ago. In the guise of the priest, I've been tasked with releasing the Miasma and placing everyone inside the temple in a deep sleep.
String.Dest: 我发现自己在瓦尔迷纳祭司的梦中。我正在亲身经历多年前兽人入侵神殿的事。这名祭司需要释放毒气让神殿里的所有人都陷入沉睡。

String.Source: Citizens of Skyrim, they are a tall and fair-haired people. Strong and hardy, Nords are famous for their resistance to cold and their talent as warriors. They can use a Battlecry to make opponents flee.
String.Dest: 诺德人是天际的住民，高大金发的种族。强壮而顽强的他们以耐寒性和身为战士的天赋而闻名。他们可以使用战吼让敌人逃窜。

String.Source: In addition to their quick and perceptive grasp of spellcraft, even the humblest of Bretons can boast a resistance to shock attacks. They are particularly skilled at conjuration magic.
String.Dest: 除了对魔法的掌握快速而敏锐，即使高岩布莱顿人中最卑微者也可以夸耀自己的闪电抗性。他们特别擅长召唤系魔法。

String.Source: With Vaermina's Torpor in hand, I am ready to undergo the Dreamstride. I must drink the liquid which will enable me to enter the dreams of those who still slumber within these walls and use them to breach the inner sanctum.
String.Dest: 瓦尔迷纳之眠到手，我已经准备好体验梦中漫步了。我需要喝下药液，它能够使我进入那些还在墙内沉睡者的梦境，借此进入内部密室。

String.Source: The tables have unexpectedly turned, and Mercer Frey has been revealed as Gallus's killer. I now find myself in Karliah's care after Mercer tried to murder me, claiming I'd outlasted my usefulness by witnessing their conversation. I've also discovered that Mercer, Gallus and Karliah were members of some sort of group calling themselves "The Nightingales" - guardians in service to the goddess Nocturnal. What they're protecting or what this has to do with the Guild is still a mystery to me.
String.Dest: 形势突然逆转，墨瑟·弗雷才是杀害加卢斯的凶手。我发现自己正被卡莱亚照顾，因为墨瑟试图杀我，说我因为目睹了他们的对话而失去价值。我还发现墨瑟、加卢斯、卡莱亚都是某个自称“夜莺”的组织中的成员，夜莺是女神诺克图娜尔的守护者。他们在保护什么，或者说这与公会有什么关系，对我来说仍然是谜。

String.Source: The people of the Wrothgarian and Dragontail Mountains, Orcish smiths are prized for their craftsmanship. Orc troops in Heavy Armor are among the finest in the Empire, and are fearsome when using their Berserker Rage.
String.Dest: 兽人生活在沃斯嘉与龙尾山脉之中，他们的锻造技艺受到珍视。全身重甲的兽人部队在帝国中是最优秀的部队之一，当他们使用了“狂战士之怒”时，十分可怕。

String.Source: The clanfolk of the Western Valenwood forests, also known as "Bosmer." Wood elves make good scouts and thieves, and there are no finer archers in all of Tamriel. They have natural resistances to both poisons and diseases. They can Command Animals to fight for them.
String.Dest: 西方威伦森林的种族，也被称为“波斯莫”。木精灵是优秀的斥候和盗贼，全泰姆瑞尔难觅可以与之比肩的弓箭手。他们对毒素和疾病都具有天然的抵抗力。可以命令动物为其作战。

String.Source: I met and killed a strange hermit named Septimus Signus, who needed the knowledge of an Elder Scroll and a collection of blood to open a dwarven lockbox he had studied for years.
String.Dest: 我遇到并杀死了一个名叫赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的古怪隐士，他需要上古卷轴的知识以及采集来的血液打开研究多年的矮人密锁箱。

String.Source: Also known as "Dunmer" in their homeland of Morrowind, dark elves are noted for their stealth and magic skills. They are naturally resistant to fire and can call upon their Ancestor's Wrath to surround themselves in fire.
String.Dest: 暗精灵在自己的家乡晨风也被称为“丹莫”，以潜行和魔法技艺闻名。他们天生对火焰的抵抗性更佳，并能召唤“先祖之怒”将自己包围在火焰中。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus and brought him a dwarven lexicon containing the distilled knowledge of an Elder Scroll. With it, he believes he can open the lockbox he's been studying. He will contact me when he has the secret.
String.Dest: 我遇到了赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，帮他在方典中刻录了上古卷轴的知识精华。他相信，有了它，就能打开自己一直在研究的箱子。一旦发现秘密他就会联系我。

String.Source: I met Septimus Signus, a brilliant but mad scholar living in the northern ice fields. He's directed me to a dwarven observatory that supposedly houses an Elder Scroll. He doesn't care about the Scroll itself, but wants me to use some kind of machine there to inscribe a dwarven lexicon with the Scroll's knowledge and bring it to him.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一位生活在北方冰原的学者赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯，他才华横溢却疯疯癫癫。他指引我去一个矮人观测台寻找上古卷轴。他并不关心卷轴本身，但希望我用某种机械把卷轴上的知识刻录在一块矮人方典中带给他。

String.Source: I met a strange hermit named Septimus Signus, who needed the knowledge of an Elder Scroll and a collection of blood to open a dwarven lockbox he had studied for years. I helped him open it. It did not contain what he had expected, but instead a book of great knowledge, the Oghma Infinium.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一个名叫赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯的古怪隐士，他需要上古卷轴的知识以及采集来的血液打开研究多年的矮人密锁箱。我帮他打开了箱子。里面没有他期望的东西，而是一本充满知识的《无限智典》

String.Source: I've learned that Septimus Signus, a preeminent scholar of the Elder Scrolls, is currently living in the far north, studying a dwarven artifact. He might know where I can find an Elder Scroll for Paarthurnax.
String.Dest: 据我了解，一位研究上古卷轴的杰出学者，赛普蒂莫斯·希格纳斯住在北方遥远的地方，正在研究矮人器物。他可能知道去哪里寻找帕图纳克斯需要的上古卷轴。

String.Source: Also known as "Altmer" in their homeland of Summerset Isle, the high elves are the most strongly gifted in the arcane arts of all the races. They can call upon their Highborn power to regenerate magicka quickly.
String.Dest: 高精灵在自己的家乡夏暮岛也称“傲特莫”，是所有种族中奥术天赋最高的存在。他们可以召唤自己的“高贵血统”来迅速恢复魔力。

String.Source: I've heard the words of the goddess Vaermina, who claims that Erandur will kill me after the ritual to destroy the Skull of Corruption is complete. I must make a choice; either allow Erandur to complete the ritual and destroy the Skull, or kill Erandur and wield the Skull of Corruption as my own.
String.Dest: 我听到了瓦尔迷纳女神的话，她说，在依兰杜尔完成仪式摧毁头骨之后，他就会杀了我。我必须做出抉择：让依兰杜尔完成仪式并摧毁头骨，或者杀死依兰杜尔夺取头骨作为武器。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <50>% resistance to Frost.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<50>%寒霜抗性。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <30>% resistance to Frost.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<30>%寒霜抗性。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <15> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<15>点。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <60> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<60>点。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <40>% resistance to Frost.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<40>%寒霜抗性。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <45> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<45>点。

String.Source: Health, Magicka, and Stamina do not recover while in Sunlight and are reduced by <30> points.
String.Dest: 生命、魔力、耐力在阳光下不会恢复，并减少<30>点。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <20>% resistance to Frost.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<20>%寒霜抗性。

String.Source: Safe from the dangers below, Karliah, Brynjolf and I finally have a moment to breathe. Mecer Frey is dead, the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal is in my possession and, most importantly, the Nightingales have survived.
String.Dest: 远离了地下的危险，卡莱亚、布林乔夫和我终于有了喘息的时间。墨瑟·弗雷死了，诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙被我拿到了，最重要的是夜莺都活了下来。

String.Source: I've finally located Mecer Frey within the ruins of Irkngthand. He seemed to be expecting us, and I'm afraid he led us here with the express purpose of eliminating the Nightingales once and for all.
String.Dest: 我终于在厄金坦德遗迹里找到了墨瑟·弗雷，他似乎在等着我们。他把我们引到这里应该是为了彻底消灭夜莺。

String.Source: Karliah and Brynjolf have joined me in my exploration of Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
String.Dest: 卡莱亚和布林乔夫加入了我对巨大矮人遗迹厄金坦德的探索，传说这里存放着“伐莫之眼”。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

String.Source: I've entered Irkngthand, a vast dwarven ruin that supposedly contains the legendary "Eyes of the Falmer." Karliah and Brynjolf are waiting for me within. Together we hope to stop Mercer Frey from stealing the Eyes and escaping from Skyrim with the Skeleton Key of Nocturnal.
String.Dest: 我进入了大型矮人遗迹厄金坦德，传说这里存放着“伐莫之眼”。卡莱亚和布林乔夫在里面等我。我们希望能够制止墨瑟·弗雷偷走眼睛，然后带着诺克图娜尔的万能钥匙从天际逃走。

String.Source: I've made my decision and Erandur has died by my hands. Unfortunately, the Skull of Corruption was destroyed before I could take his life. Such moments are the misfortunes of the indecisive.
String.Dest: 我做出决定并亲手杀了依兰杜尔。可惜的是，在我杀他前，堕落头骨已经被毁了。这就是优柔寡断的下场。

String.Source: I've made my decision, and allowed Erandur to live. The Skull of Corruption has been destroyed and Erandur has offered his services as a companion if I should ever need his assistance.
String.Dest: 我决定让依兰杜尔活下去。堕落头骨被摧毁了。依兰杜尔愿意作为我的同伴，在我需要时提供帮助。

String.Source: I've made my decision and Erandur has died by my hands. I now possess the Skull of Corruption and look forward to performing my duties for Lady Vaermina.
String.Dest: 我做出决定并亲手杀了依兰杜尔。我现在已经拿到了堕落头骨，期待能为瓦尔迷纳女士效劳。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who said he wanted my help. He's waiting outside Haemar's Shame.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯，还说需要我的帮助。他在海玛之羞外面等我。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who said he had a falling out with his master and wanted my help. He's waiting outside Haemar's Shame.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯。他和主人闹翻了，想要我帮忙。他在海玛之羞外等我。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who had a falling out with his master Clavicus Vile. Clavicus has agreed to take Barbas back if Barbas and I retrieve the Rueful Axe.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯。他和主人卡拉威库斯·维尔闹翻了。卡拉威库斯同意把巴巴斯带回，前提是我们找回悔恨之斧。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who had a falling out with his master Clavicus Vile. I've retrieved the Rueful Axe for Clavicus who offered me a deal. I decided to kill Barbas and keep the Rueful Axe.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯。他和主人卡拉威库斯·维尔闹翻了。根据交易，我为卡拉威库斯找回了悔恨之斧。我决定杀了巴巴斯，留下斧子。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who had a falling out with his master Clavicus Vile. I've retrieved the Rueful axe for Clavicus. I can keep the axe if I kill Barbas or I can return the axe, reunite Barbas and Clavicus Vile and receive the Masque of Clavicus Vile.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯。他和主人卡拉威库斯·维尔闹翻了。我为卡拉威库斯找回了悔恨之斧。如果我选择杀了巴巴斯，我就可以保留斧头；反之，等巴巴斯与卡拉威库斯·维尔重聚后，我能拿到卡拉威库斯·维尔的面具。

String.Source: I ran in to a talking dog named Barbas who had a falling out with his master Clavicus Vile. I've retrieved the Rueful Axe for Clavicus who offered me a deal. I decided to reunite Barbas and Vile and received the Masque of Clavicus Vile.
String.Dest: 我遇到了一只会说话的狗，自称巴巴斯。他和主人卡拉威库斯·维尔闹翻了。根据交易，我为卡拉威库斯找回了悔恨之斧。我决定让巴巴斯和维尔团聚，并接受卡拉威库斯·维尔的面具。

String.Source: Falion in Morthal has cured me of vamprism, if I ever contract it again I should contact him.
String.Dest: 莫萨尔的法利昂治愈了我的吸血鬼病，如果我再次感染，可以重新联系他。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <-50>% weakness to Fire.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<-50>%火焰抗性削弱。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <-20>% weakness to Fire.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<-20>%火焰抗性削弱。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <-40>% weakness to Fire.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<-40>%火焰抗性削弱。

String.Source: Your Vampiric blood gives you <-30>% weakness to Fire.
String.Dest: 你的吸血鬼血统给予你<-30>%火焰抗性削弱。

String.Source: Stand aside!
Help me!
Forgive me, but I am on urgent business for the Dawnguard. Stand aside!
String.Dest: 抱歉，不过我找黎明守卫有急事。靠边去！

String.Source: Gods, Vampires! I... I can't take this anymore! I'm not cut out for this!
String.Dest: 神啊，吸血鬼！我……我受不了了！我可搞不定这个！

String.Source: Look, take whatever you want. I'm getting out of here!
String.Dest: 听着，拿上你想拿的。我可要走了！

String.Source: Forgive me, but I am on urgent business for the Dawnguard. I have no time to speak with you.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我找黎明守卫有急事。我没空跟你说话。

String.Source: It's done, then. We've been chasing that fiend for a long time.
String.Dest: 完事了。我们已经追那个怪物很久了。

String.Source: North, I think, then they turned west and that's the last I saw of them.
String.Dest: 我觉得是北边，然后我看见他们往西边拐了，那是我最后一次看见他们。

String.Source: That's close enough, fool. Now you die!
String.Dest: 够近了，蠢蛋。现在去死吧！

String.Source: Well met, friend. We've been chasing that fiend for a long time. On behalf of the Vigil, you have my thanks.
String.Dest: 朋友，你好啊。我们已经追那个怪物很久了。我代表警戒者向你表示感谢。

String.Source: You there! Traveler! Over here!
Shadows take you!
Halt, vampire!
Stand aside!
I'm getting out of here!
Your end has come!
Perish, worm!
Light take you!
Excellent. I trust she'll find her situation more accommodating, now that she is a member of the family.
String.Dest: 太好了。既然已经是家中一员，我相信她适应这里会更容易。

String.Source: Have you decided? I am not a patient man.
String.Dest: 你决定好了吗？我可没什么耐心。

String.Source: I only hope that you will allow me the precious moments of time there through your call.
String.Dest: 只希望你通过召唤给我一些宝贵的时间。

String.Source: (grunt)
Well, there's the Falmer, to start with. Deadly rapids. Major earthquakes. Massive chasms. Unstable ground. Lethal falls.
String.Dest: 嗯，首先是伐莫。还有致命的湍流、大地震、巨型裂缝、不稳定的地面、危险的瀑布。

String.Source: Your choice.
True. But I know a way we can get to the courtyard without arousing suspicion.
String.Dest: 没错。不过我知道一个不引起怀疑就能进庭院的方法。

String.Source: I got a warmer welcome from my father, and that's saying something.
String.Dest: 在我父亲那的欢迎都比这里热烈，这就说明了问题。

String.Source: Ah, yes. That. There were... well, complications.
String.Dest: 啊对了，那个。出了……嗯，连锁反应。

String.Source: Damn things are like flies. No matter how many you kill...
String.Dest: 跟苍蝇一样该死的东西，不管杀多少遍……

String.Source: You'd become the very thing you've sworn to destroy. I don't know how the Dawnguard will react.
String.Dest: 你会变成你誓死要消灭的东西。我不知道黎明守卫会有何反应。

String.Source: You there, hold fast!
I feel like it was a long time. Who is Skyrim's High King?
String.Dest: 我觉得已经过了好久了。现在谁是天际至高王？

String.Source: My desire to speak with you was born from the result of our battle, Qahnaarin.
String.Dest: 我想和你谈谈是因为我们的那场战斗，夸纳林。

String.Source: Quickly, this way.
I'd heard stories about the Soul Cairn, but never thought I'd see it myself. So far it's... about what I imagined.
String.Dest: 我听说过灵魂石冢的故事，但从没想过亲眼来看看。到现在为止……和我想的不一样。

String.Source: Fortunately, I was able to hold them at bay and retreat into these ruins.
String.Dest: 所幸我击退了他们，撤退到这片废墟中。

String.Source: Okay, here goes.
Yes, of course.
There is but one gift I can give that is equal in value to the Elder Scroll and my daughter.
String.Dest: 只有一个礼物能跟上古卷轴和我女儿相提并论。

String.Source: The second scroll declares that "The Blood of Coldharbour's Daughter will blind the eye of the Dragon."
String.Dest: 第二卷卷轴则称：“冷港之女的鲜血会蒙蔽巨龙之眼。”

String.Source: I'm not sure about this circle, but it's obviously... something.
String.Dest: 我不太清楚这个圆环，但很明显……是什么。

String.Source: What's that? No, that's not what I... Yes, but... Are you sure? Really?
String.Dest: 什么？不，我不是那……对，但是……你确定？真的？

String.Source: I didn't even know the crests could be removed. Maybe my mother's trying to tell us something?
String.Dest: 我都不知道这些纹样是能取下来的，难道我妈是想告诉我们什么？

String.Source: But before I send you on your way, you'll need the Initiate's Ewer.
String.Dest: 在我送你离开前，你需要新人之壶。

String.Source: I'm guessing you figured this part out already, but my father's not exactly a good person. Even by vampire standards.
String.Dest: 你一定已经猜到了，我父亲不是什么好人。就算以吸血鬼的角度来讲也一样。

String.Source: Auriel, Auri-El, Alkosh, Akatosh... so many different names for the sovereign of the snow elves.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔，奥瑞-艾尔，阿尔科什，阿卡托什……雪精灵的至高神有这么多不同的名讳。

String.Source: Good question. Hard to say.
Yes, I see them now... One contains the ancient secrets of the dragons, and the other speaks of the potency of ancient blood.
String.Dest: 没错，我现在看见了……一份写着巨龙古老的秘密，另一份诉说着古老血脉的预言。

String.Source: It's sort of a random assortment of things. See anything useful?
String.Dest: 各种各样的东西都有。看见什么有用的了吗？

String.Source: Grrah!
Look at this place. This has to be it!
String.Dest: 瞧瞧这个地方。一定就是它了！

String.Source: Harkon would likely sense my return to Tamriel. The last thing you need right now is a trail for him to follow.
String.Dest: 哈孔可能会感知到我回了泰姆瑞尔，现在你最好小心点，不要给他留下线索。

String.Source: Yes, I see that. I trust his capture was not too difficult a task?
String.Dest: 嗯，我知道了。相信抓他不太难吧？

String.Source: But I had no idea she had a setup like this.
String.Dest: 但我不知道她有这样一个实验室。

String.Source: Wait...
No one will soon forget that you were the one to defeat Harkon.
String.Dest: 没人会马上忘记是你打败了哈孔。

String.Source: We've made it to the courtyard.
While the blessed state of undeath can be "accidentally" conferred - consider the brutish creatures you find wailing in dank hovels in the wild...
String.Dest: 虽然神圣的不死之身可以被“意外”授予——想想那些在野外潮湿的茅屋里嚎叫的野蛮生物吧……

String.Source: Only those who can trace their ancestry through Harkon's mortal blood line can faithfully accept the power conferred by his Vampiric blood.
String.Dest: 唯有能哈孔的凡人血脉追溯祖源者，才能完全接纳他吸血鬼之血赋予的力量。

String.Source: You're back and alive to boot! Fantastic.
String.Dest: 你回来了，而且还活着！太好了。

String.Source: However, the majority of necromancers that are foolish enough to enter into a bargain with the Ideal Masters wind up here... as harvested souls.
String.Dest: 然而，大多数蠢到去和理想之主讨价还价的死灵法师最终都会来到这里……成了被收割的灵魂。

String.Source: Hey! Grab my journal. If you survive, you're going to need it.
String.Dest: 嘿！拿上我的日记，你想活下去的话就需要它。

String.Source: He took the road southwest out of town, and said he was going to be crossing over the Dragon Bridge. That's all that he told me. I hope it helps.
String.Dest: 他走了镇外西南方向的那条路，说他是要过龙桥。他就跟我说了这些。希望对你有所帮助。

String.Source: We're getting close. I'm sure of it.
String.Dest: 我们越来越接近了，我敢肯定。

String.Source: But now... we have a clue. Something made by the Forge. Something that can lead us to it.
String.Dest: 但现在……我们有线索了。锻炉打造的一些东西，能带我们去找到它的东西。

String.Source: I'm afraid he's a few years too late. I've moved on. I have more important business to attend to.
String.Dest: 恐怕他这话晚了几年。我已经向前看了，还有更重要的事情要做。

String.Source: You'd figure a couple hundred years locked away with one would have given me some insight, but no.
String.Dest: 你可能觉得，跟一个东西一起关个几百年会让我有什么顿悟，然而并没有。

String.Source: I've been really wanting to get out and explore a bit.
String.Dest: 我一直都特想出去探索一下世界。

String.Source: Now, let's get you the Elder Scroll and you can be on your way.
String.Dest: 现在，拿着上古卷轴然后你就可以上路了。

String.Source: Stay sharp out there.
Aye lad.
If I return to Tamriel, that increases Harkon's likelihood of bringing the Tyranny of the Sun to fruition.
String.Dest: 如果我回到了泰姆瑞尔，那就会增加哈孔实现太阳暴政的可能性。
