String.Source: If Harkon obtained Auriel's Bow and Serana's blood was used to taint the weapon, the Tyranny of the Sun would be complete.
String.Dest: 如果哈孔获得了奥瑞艾尔之弓，再用瑟拉娜的血玷污这把武器，那么太阳暴政就终结了。

String.Source: Now a voice whispers, saying "Among the night's children, a dread lord will rise."
String.Dest: 现在有一个声音低语：“黑夜之子中，将会有可怖的君主崛起。”

String.Source: Not bad. Not bad at all.
All right, calm down... Here, take this.
Oh, I see. I just assumed he'd sent for both of us. How awkward for you.
String.Dest: 哦，懂了。我还以为他把我俩都叫上了。真替你尴尬。

String.Source: And you carried out my instructions to kill the victim in view of others and while wearing the Dawnguard uniform. Very good.
String.Dest: 你执行了我的指示在众目睽睽下杀了人，还穿着黎明守卫制服，很好。

String.Source: Look to the cities. Speak to innkeepers, carriage drivers, anyone who would meet a traveler.
String.Dest: 去城市里看看，跟旅店老板、马车夫这些有可能见过旅客的人谈谈。

String.Source: After all these years, that's the first thing you ask me? Yes, I have the scroll.
String.Dest: 都多少年了，你张口问我的第一个问题竟然是这个？是啊，我带着卷轴呢。

String.Source: Do you, now? Hircine doesn't usually bestow his favor on the fickle.
String.Dest: 是吗？海尔辛通常可不会赐福善变之人。

String.Source: See the Resonators up there? Strike them in the right order, and the doors should open.
String.Dest: 看到上面的谐振器了吗？按正确的顺序击打它们，门就会打开。

String.Source: Harkon's vision is a world plunged in eternal darkness where the vampire can flourish and never again fear the "tyranny of the sun."
String.Dest: 哈孔所见的幻象是一个跌入永恒黑暗的世界，在那里吸血鬼繁荣昌盛，再也不用惧怕“太阳暴政”了。

String.Source: Perhaps they were once corporeal beings, but they've obviously reached a point where they no longer require a tangible presence.
String.Dest: 也许它们曾经有实体，不过显然它们已经达到了不需要实体的境界。

String.Source: Farewell. Remember that Harkon's not to be trusted.
String.Dest: 别了。记住不能相信哈孔。

String.Source: I don't know what you're talking about.
Your wife, kidnapped!
What now?
Go. Reconsider your plight.
You realize that doesn't impress anyone here.
String.Dest: 你要知道那不会让这儿的人多佩服你。

String.Source: The ability to summon powerful undead guardians as one would conjure an atronach or daedra.
String.Dest: 召唤强大的不死守卫，就跟召唤侍灵或者迪德拉一样。

String.Source: Yes. Please, follow me.
It's possible that your killing blow has merely displaced Durnehviir's physical form while he reconstitutes himself.
String.Dest: 你可能只是摧毁了杜耐维尔的物理形态，而他可以自我重塑。

String.Source: I can feel my strength returning each time I am set free from that prison!
String.Dest: 每次从那监狱里被释放出来，都感觉到我的力量又回来了！

String.Source: The Ideal Masters have charged him with overseeing the Keepers, and will undoubtedly intervene if you're perceived as a threat.
String.Dest: 理想之主委任他来监管看守者们，如果你被视为威胁，他肯定会介入。

String.Source: And since the Dawnguard are still around, that must not have happened.
String.Dest: 既然黎明守卫还活着，那就不可能。

String.Source: My long-lost daughter returns at last. I trust you have my Elder Scroll?
String.Dest: 我失散多年的女儿终于回来了。你应该还带着我的上古卷轴吧？

String.Source: Hmph.
Look at these fools, so concerned with tending their precious "beacon."
String.Dest: 这群傻瓜，这么担心照看他们的宝贝“信标”。

String.Source: Wait a moment... you've brought a stranger here? Have you lost your mind?
String.Dest: 等一下……你带来了个陌生人来这里？你疯了吗？

String.Source: Then root out the monster, and destroy it.
String.Dest: 然后斩草除根，彻底摧毁。

String.Source: I... Well, that's actually something I never would've anticipated. Interesting.
String.Dest: 我……嗯，这倒是我从没想到的，有趣。

String.Source: Now where is it Isran expects me to go?
String.Dest: 那么伊士冉想让我去哪儿？

String.Source: They say that vampires attacked the Hall of the Vigilant. Burned it to the ground! Never heard of vampires doing anything like that before.
String.Dest: 他们说吸血鬼攻击了警戒者之厅。一把火把它烧了个精光！以前从没听说过吸血鬼会做这种事。

String.Source: Not that it helps us anyway, because they're all half a continent away in Cyrodiil.
String.Dest: 不过这也帮不上什么忙，他们都在希罗帝尔，隔着半个大陆呢。

String.Source: All right. Lead on, then.
It's what some call the domain of Molag Bal. His place in Oblivion.
String.Dest: 这是一些人所谓的莫拉格·巴尔的领域。他在湮灭的领地。

String.Source: I see a vision before me, an image of a great bow. I know this weapon! It is Auriel's Bow!
String.Dest: 我眼前看到了预兆，一幅巨大弓箭的图像。我知道这个武器。这是奥瑞艾尔之弓！

String.Source: I began to explore what the dovah call "Alok-Dilon," the ancient forbidden art that you call necromancy.
String.Dest: 我开始探索都瓦称为“阿洛克-迪隆”的古老禁术，你们称之为死灵法术。

String.Source: That... well, that might change things.
String.Dest: 那……好吧，那可能就不一样了。

String.Source: I spent my life tracking down that legend... until my damn apprentice stole everything from me, and published it all under his own name.
String.Dest: 我一生都在追寻那个传说……直到我那该死的徒弟偷走了我的一切，并以他自己的名义发表。

String.Source: If all else fails, just take a chance, see what happens. Wouldn't be surprised if half the traps had been sprung by now...
String.Dest: 如果多失败了，就随便试下，看看会发生什么。就算已经打开了半数的陷阱我也不惊讶了……

String.Source: How dare you! I gave up everything I cared about to protect you from that fanatic you call a father!
String.Dest: 你怎么能这么说！我放弃了一切在乎的东西，就是为了保护你，不被你那个发狂的父亲伤害！

String.Source: Well, then... Best of luck to you.
Marriage is a fine institution, however, one that does present certain difficulties for such as like ourselves.
String.Dest: 婚姻是一种很好的制度，然而，对我们这种人来说确实存在一些难处。

String.Source: Was I wrong?
But don't draw attention. Some kills are for fun, some for profit. And others are for sending messages. This one is a message.
String.Dest: 但别引起注意。有些杀戮是为了好玩，有些是为了收益。还有些是为了发送信息，这就是一条信息。

String.Source: Normally, the study of a scroll's meaning can take months or even years. Even then, there are no guarantees.
String.Dest: 通常来说，研读卷轴的含义可能需要几个月甚至几年时间。即便如此，也不能保证。

String.Source: I'll finish up here and head in that direction soon as I can. See you there.
String.Dest: 我会把这里的事忙完然后尽快去那边。到时候见。

String.Source: Look, there's a chest in there. Door's sealed tight, though...
String.Dest: 看，里面有个箱子，不过门关得很严。

String.Source: Turn back...
But you did not follow instructions to kill the victim in view of others while wearing the Dawnguard uniform.
String.Dest: 但你没有按照指示穿着黎明守卫制服在其他人面前杀人。

String.Source: We need to destroy him before he turns his comrades into a brood of vampires.
String.Dest: 我们得在他把这些战友们变成一群吸血鬼之前干掉他。

String.Source: Spheres! On the upper level!
In an age of strife, when dragons return to the realm of men, darkness will mingle with light and the night and day will be as one.
String.Dest: 纷乱之时，龙族重归尘世，光暗混同，昼夜归一。

String.Source: This is it. Home sweet... castle.
String.Dest: 就是这样了。甜蜜的家……一座城堡。

String.Source: Thank you! It's not much, but this will help a great deal with some things I've been researching.
String.Dest: 多谢！虽然不多，但这对我一直在研究的一些东西有很大帮助。

String.Source: What he fails to realize is how much attention would be called to our kind if the prophecy came to fruition.
String.Dest: 然而他不明白，如果预言成真，那么我们会引起多大的注意。

String.Source: I have spread false rumors about the discovery of an Elder Scroll in Skyrim to lure a Moth Priest here.
String.Dest: 我已经散布了谣言，说在天际发现了上古卷轴来引诱蛾祭司到这来。

String.Source: If anyone is going to stand in their way, it's going to be us.
String.Dest: 如果说还有人能阻止他们，那也只能是我们了。

String.Source: Be still!
Hey!
Been a pleasure doing business with you.
I've learned of a possible monster.
String.Dest: 我听说有个潜在的怪物。

String.Source: I've never been in those tunnels before, but I'd bet they run right under the courtyard and into the tower ruins.
String.Dest: 我以前从没进过这些地道，不过我敢肯定它们通向庭院下方，一直通向塔楼的废墟里。

String.Source: A little extra protection never hurts.
Tread lightly. The law is unaware of the danger and will treat you as a criminal if you are caught.
String.Dest: 下手要轻，当权者不会意识到这种威胁，如果你被抓了，就会被当成罪犯。

String.Source: This is everything I've got right now.
Turning someone is a very... personal thing for vampires. It's intimate. For us.
String.Dest: 对于吸血鬼来说，把某人转化成吸血鬼是一件……很私人的事情。对我们而言，这事很私密。

String.Source: I think they transcend what we perceive as a physical form.
String.Dest: 它们应该已经超越了我们所能感知的物质形态。

String.Source: Now, if everyone will please be quiet, I must concentrate.
String.Dest: 现在，大家请安静，我必须集中注意力。

String.Source: It's my fault. In my haste to read the first scroll, I neglected the careful preparation required.
String.Dest: 是我的错，我匆忙地阅读第一幅卷轴，忽略了必要的仔细准备。

String.Source: Have to say, I'm pretty impressed.
Aye lass.
And now... now I can't rest. Not until I have proof. Something to show the world what I discovered, what I did. That my life... mattered.
String.Dest: 而现在……现在我不能休息，除非我有证据。向世界展示我的发现和成就。我的一生才……有意义。

String.Source: I'd rather not be here either, but I needed to talk to you.
String.Dest: 我也不想在这里呆着，不过我得跟你谈谈。

String.Source: Come on!
The Chantry was a place of peaceful worship. I led a small group of paladins, but we were no match for the Betrayed's sheer numbers.
String.Dest: 神殿是一个平静的礼拜场所，我手里只有一小队圣骑士，所以不是背叛者的对手。

String.Source: I can't think of a more deserving champion to carry it than you.
String.Dest: 我想不到比你更有资格保管它的勇士了。

String.Source: Don't worry about me, I'll be fine!
I'm sorry I don't have more to offer.
String.Dest: 抱歉我没有更多卖的了。

String.Source: Well, at least we're getting closer. Let's go.
String.Dest: 好吧，至少我们越来越近了。走吧。

String.Source: Hmm... well, you can pick up where I left off. My notes should still be in my journal, if you can read it.
String.Dest: 嗯……把我的遗物带上吧。我的笔记应该还在日记里，如果你看得懂的话。

String.Source: Try asking one of the guards.
Now that I think about it... I should have expected that. Sorry.
String.Dest: 我想起来了……我早就该想到的。抱歉。

String.Source: So, welcome to Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 那么，欢迎来到黎明守卫堡垒。

String.Source: They'd be even less welcoming to her than they've been to me. It would have been a bloodbath.
String.Dest: 她比我更不受他们欢迎。那会是一场大屠杀。

String.Source: Vingalmo, is there... can I do anything for you?
String.Dest: 文嘉莫，有没有……我能为您做些什么吗？

String.Source: See if you can find a pattern in the sequence. Most of these locks have a pattern of some kind.
String.Dest: 看看能不能在次序中找到一个范式，这些锁大多数都有某种范式。

String.Source: Look at the sky. What kind of a place is this?
String.Dest: 看天上，这到底是什么地方。

String.Source: I therefore honor-name you "Qahnaarin," or Vanquisher in your tongue.
String.Dest: 因此我尊称你为“夸纳林”，在你的语言中是“征服者”。

String.Source: I'd be happy to, but your purse is lighter than you think.
String.Dest: 我很乐意，但你的钱包好像比你想的要轻。

String.Source: I'm sorry, it's not that... it's just that I don't know who I can trust just yet.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我……我只是还不知道我能相信谁。

String.Source: Well then I'm very sorry, but I just can't walk away from this project yet.
String.Dest: 好吧，那我很抱歉，但我还不能放弃这个项目。

String.Source: Well, the Moth Priests are the only ones I've heard of who can do it. They spend years preparing before they start reading, though.
String.Dest: 嗯，我只听说过蛾祭司能办得到。不过在开始阅读之前，他们会花上几年的时间来准备。

String.Source: No, you've got it all wrong. We're here to stop him... to make everything right.
String.Dest: 不，你全都搞错了。我们来这里是为了阻止他……让一切回归正轨。

String.Source: Do you... do you need anything, Feran?
Possibly. I guess even a vampire mother is still a mother.
String.Dest: 可能吧。我猜即便是一位吸血鬼母亲也依旧是母亲。

String.Source: Time has very little meaning to me. Consequently, it has little meaning to the Ideal Masters as well.
String.Dest: 时间对我而言没什么意义。不过，对理想之主也是如此。

String.Source: I'm sure you've heard a bit of what we're up against. Powerful vampires, unlike anything we've seen before.
String.Dest: 相信你们对我们面临的挑战有所耳闻了。强大的吸血鬼，与以往我们见过的完全不同。

String.Source: You can't trust a word that comes out of Vingalmo's mouth. Remember that.
String.Dest: 文嘉莫嘴里的你一个字儿都不能信，记住了。

String.Source: There was a time when I called Tamriel my home, but those days have long since passed.
String.Dest: 曾几何时，泰姆瑞尔也是我的家，但已经过去太久了。

String.Source: For my daughter's safe return, you have my gratitude.
String.Dest: 感谢你带我的女儿平安归来。

String.Source: I've lasted this long because I don't take chances, I cover my tracks, and I keep my eyes open. If you're smart, you'll do the same.
String.Dest: 我能坚持这么久就是因为从不投机，掩盖行踪，时刻警惕。聪明的话就学着点。

String.Source: Of course, I wouldn't be telling you where to find them if I desired them for myself.
String.Dest: 当然，我要是想要的话也不会告诉你它们在哪儿了。

String.Source: All right, you've heard what it has to say. Now tell me, is there any reason I shouldn't kill this bloodsucking fiend right now?
String.Dest: 好了，你已经听完它说的了。该你说了，我凭什么不杀这个吸血怪物？

String.Source: Feel the last word of Soul Tearing within yourself: "Zol" - the unlife that results when a soul is imprisoned in dead flesh.
String.Dest: 在内心感受灵魂撕裂的最后一个词：“佐尔”——灵魂被囚禁在死躯中的非生命状态。

String.Source: This stranger may call himself vampire, but he knows nothing of our struggle. Why should I entrust you to him?
String.Dest: 这个陌生人是可以自称吸血鬼，但他对我们的努力一无所知。我为什么要把你托付给他？

String.Source: Years of mocking, of dismissal... and now suddenly here you are, begging for help.
String.Dest: 多年来的嘲笑，无视……然后现在你突然就来求我帮忙了。

String.Source: We're just going to need some help.
String.Dest: 我们只是需要一些帮助。

String.Source: You hear me? Don't feel like a guest, because you're not. You're a resource. You're an asset.
String.Dest: 听清了吗？别拿自己当客人，你不是。你是资源。是财产。

String.Source: The Elder Scroll is just ahead.
I count the nobility of both the Empire and the Dominion among my clients.
String.Dest: 帝国和先祖神洲的很多贵族们都是我的客户。

String.Source: Woah...
If you want that scroll, the barrier needs to come down.
String.Dest: 你想要卷轴的话，就得先推倒屏障。

String.Source: They had control of my mind, but fortunately they couldn't possess my soul.
String.Dest: 好在他们只能控制我的思想，却不能占据我的灵魂。

String.Source: There's so much to do. I'm going to head out and start tracking things down. We'll meet again, I'm sure of it.
String.Dest: 有太多事情要做了，我要出去开始找些东西。我们还会再见面的，我相信。

String.Source: Any idea how you're going to find a Moth Priest? Skyrim's a pretty big place.
String.Dest: 你知道怎么去找蛾祭司吗？天际可挺大的呢。

String.Source: Only a single spire remains. Be careful, I'm almost certain the final Keeper will be prepared for your assault.
String.Dest: 只剩一座塔了，小心，我敢肯定最后一个看守者已经做好迎击准备了。

String.Source: Besides, he can handle anything alone! He assured me so himself. What could he possibly need my help with?
String.Dest: 再说了，他一个人什么都能搞定！他亲口跟我保证过，还需要我来帮什么忙？

String.Source: It looks like there's another lever over on the other side.
String.Dest: 另外一边好像还有一个拉杆。

String.Source: And how exactly do you plan on stopping him?
String.Dest: 那么你打算怎么阻止他呢？

String.Source: I once killed thirty vampires with my bare hands, you know. Ask Arkay, he'll tell you.
String.Dest: 我曾经徒手杀了三十个吸血鬼，知道吗？问阿尔凯吧，他会跟你说的。

String.Source: Here. Let me show you how it's made...
String.Dest: 来，我给你看看它是怎么做的……

String.Source: I'm right behind you.
Hmm?
Back, huh? Well, price is still 4,000 coins.
String.Dest: 买回去对吧？价格还是4000金币。

String.Source: So either I need to find the satchel those mudcrabs stole, or I need another gyro from someplace. You wouldn't happen to have one, would you?
String.Dest: 所以，要么我得找到被那些泥沼蟹偷走的包，要么需要从别的地方另找一个陀螺仪。你不会正好有一个吧？

String.Source: May I strongly suggest that you make a visit to this spouse of yours. And "invite" him to the family by offering him Harkon's Gift.
String.Dest: 我强烈建议你去见下你的配偶，用哈孔的礼物“邀请”他到我们这个大家庭中来。

String.Source: You ever heard of Aetherium? A rare mineral used by the dwarves.
String.Dest: 你听说过神光水晶吗？矮人用过的一种稀有矿物。

String.Source: The name's Katria. I am - was - an adventurer. Raided ruins like this for nigh on twenty years.
String.Dest: 我叫卡提雅，是个——曾经是个冒险家。探索这样的遗迹已经二十年了。

String.Source: Cozy little place, isn't this?
Don't you worry about me. I've been through worse. I'll come out of this just fine.
String.Dest: 你不用担心我，我经历过更糟的事情，会好起来的。

String.Source: Now where is it I'm supposed to be going?
Follow me, this way.
She'll definitely know where it is, and if we're lucky, she actually has it herself.
String.Dest: 她肯定知道它在哪里，如果我们运气好的话，没准她自己就拿着那东西呢。

String.Source: We have to find the other pieces, of course. There should be, hmm... three more. One for each of the four cities that worked on the Forge.
String.Dest: 当然了，我们得找到其他的碎片。应该有，嗯……还有三个。四个参与锻造的城市各有一个。

String.Source: Do me this simple honor and I will fight at your side as your Grah-Zeymahzin, your Ally, and teach you my Thu'um.
String.Dest: 给我这个简单的荣耀，我将作为你的格拉-泽伊玛津，你的盟友，与你并肩作战，并把我的吐'目教给你。

String.Source: Bring the two of them back here, and we can get started on coming up with a plan.
String.Dest: 把他们俩带回来，我们就可以开始制定计划了。

String.Source: I've allowed my hatred of your father to estrange us for too long. Forgive me.
String.Dest: 对你父亲的恨意让我疏远你太久了。原谅我。

String.Source: Put his mind to rest, allay his fear through vampiric seduction and when he is in a pliant condition, embrace him and bite him on the neck.
String.Dest: 让他思维放松，以吸血鬼的诱惑来减轻他的恐惧，当处于顺从状态时，拥抱并咬他的脖子。

String.Source: I was on the trail of something big. It led me here, and... I didn't make it.
String.Dest: 我在追踪一件大玩意儿，它把我带到了这里，然后……我没成功。

String.Source: Watch yourself. Since the quake, this place has been pretty unstable.
String.Dest: 自己小心，自从地震以来，这地方一直不太安稳。

String.Source: The Jarl's in danger. A vampire plays as a visiting "advisor" to the court. Destroy it before it's able to complete its foul business.
String.Dest: 领主有危险。有个吸血鬼假扮成来访的“顾问”。在他干出什么脏事前杀了他。

String.Source: I'm impressed you could find a Moth Priest so quickly.
String.Dest: 你能这么快找到蛾祭司，真不简单。

String.Source: Hold up. We... need to talk.
Follow me and stay close. Keep your eyes open for Durnehviir.
To think... no one's been here in four thousand years...
String.Dest: 想想看……已经四千年没人来过这儿了……

String.Source: Yes, that was my point. I felt it was rather clear.
String.Dest: 对，就是这个意思。我觉得说得很清楚了。

String.Source: We just need... we need help.
String.Dest: 我们只是需要……需要帮助。

String.Source: Well... we weren't the closest of friends... Here, take this.
String.Dest: 嗯……现在咱俩算得上好朋友了……给，拿去吧。

String.Source: A vicious night stalker rules over a group of bandits - seeks to gain leverage over the righteous.
String.Dest: 一个恶毒的夜行者统治着一群抢匪，试图挑战公平正义。

String.Source: The kinship between us is gone. I don't understand what he's become, but he's no longer the brother I once knew.
String.Dest: 我们之间没有亲缘关系了。我不明白他变成了什么样，但他不再是我曾经认识的那个兄弟了。

String.Source: Oh. You read the book, didn't you? "The Aetherium Wars"?
String.Dest: 哦，你读过这本书了对吧？《神光之战》？

String.Source: If Isran is anything, he's stubborn.
String.Dest: 要说伊士冉有什么了不起的，那就是他很固执。

String.Source: I had a map, in my journal. That's where we should start.
String.Dest: 我有一幅地图，就在日记上。我们应该从那上面开始。

String.Source: In return, I was to serve them as a Keeper until the death of the one who calls herself Valerica.
String.Dest: 作为回报，我将服侍它们直到那个叫瓦蕾莉卡的人死去。

String.Source: Cursed, not dead. Doomed to exist in this form for eternity. Trapped between laas and dinok, between life and death.
String.Dest: 被诅咒了，所以不会死。我注定要以这种形态存在下去，困在拉斯与迪诺克，生与死之间。

String.Source: Yaahh!
I'd be happy to, but you already have a creature under your command.
String.Dest: 我很乐意，但你已经带着一头动物了。

String.Source: You've done Lord Harkon two great services. Take what you've learned to heart, and be careful who you trust.
String.Dest: 你为哈孔大人立了两件大功。把学到的记在心里，小心那些原本信任的人。

String.Source: My mother was meticulous about her research. If we can find her notes, there might be some hints in there.
String.Dest: 我母亲对待研究一丝不苟。如果我们能找到她的笔记，那里面肯定有些线索。

String.Source: We need to stop this creature before it kills again.
String.Dest: 我们得在这头畜生再造杀孽前阻止它。

String.Source: All right, now pull your lever!
String.Dest: 好了，现在拉动你的拉杆！

String.Source: Like Serana, I am a Daughter of Coldharbour, an vampire offspring of Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 我跟瑟拉娜一样，是冷港之女，莫拉格·巴尔的吸血鬼后裔。

String.Source: Oof!
Conduits through which the Ideal Masters speak to their underlings and feed on their victims.
String.Dest: 理想之主能通过水晶与手下交谈，并以受害者为食。

String.Source: Might need a little convincing, but she should.
String.Dest: 可能要说服一下，但她会的。

String.Source: I don't want you to feel like I'm forcing you into this.
String.Dest: 我不想让你觉得我是在逼你。

String.Source: I am but your humble servant, milord.
String.Dest: 我只是您卑微的仆人，大人。

String.Source: If there's one thing I know, it's weapons and armor. Take a look.
String.Dest: 如果说我有什么真正了解的东西，那就是武器盔甲了。来看看吧。

String.Source: As promised, I now teach you the first word of Soul Tearing: "Rii" - the essence of your enemy's life force.
String.Dest: 依照承诺的那样，我现在教你灵魂撕裂的第一个词：“瑞尔”——敌人生命能量的精华。

String.Source: Watch it!
Of course, master.
He rode through town not long ago with an escort of soldiers. They didn't stop, just headed south across the Dragon Bridge.
String.Dest: 他前不久才跟一队士兵驾车穿过镇子。他们没做停留，往南走一直跨过了龙桥。

String.Source: Would you want me to? After what happened the last time I tried it?
String.Dest: 你想让我帮忙吗？我上次可是失败了哦？

String.Source: It seems our work is not yet done. But I have waited this long, and we are so very close now. I can wait a bit longer.
String.Dest: 看来我们的任务还没完成呢。但都等了这么久，我还能再等一会儿。

String.Source: That circle in the center of the room is definitely some type of portal.
String.Dest: 这房间中央的圆圈很明显就是某种传送门了。

String.Source: Still, it's beautiful.
Let's go have a little chat with it, shall we?
I'm not the most powerful of vampires, but I'm good with a hammer. See for yourself.
String.Dest: 我不算很强大的吸血鬼，但我锤子使得很熟练。看看吧。

String.Source: It's not easy to get supplies way out here, but I'm managing. Take a look.
String.Dest: 往这里运补给不容易，但我能应付的过来。看看吧。

String.Source: Depends on who you ask. Some say Molag-Bal himself gave these amulets to ancient powerful vampire lords. Some say this is just a myth.
String.Dest: 看你问谁了。有人说莫拉格·巴尔亲手将这些护符送给了古代的强大吸血鬼领主，有人说这不过是传说罢了。

String.Source: If we don't, he'll keep chasing us for the rest of our lives.
String.Dest: 不然的话，他会在余生里一直追杀我们。

String.Source: Being selected as an offering to Molag Bal is an honor. She wouldn't have dared turn her back on that.
String.Dest: 成为莫拉格·巴尔的祭品是种荣幸。她不敢拒绝的。

String.Source: Watch out!
I've discovered the whereabouts of a vampire lair.
String.Dest: 我发现了一个吸血鬼巢穴。

String.Source: Arkay's never clear on life and death. Is she still alive? There's always hope...
String.Dest: 阿尔凯从不明说生死。她还活着吗？总有希望……

String.Source: The Chantry is quite isolated, so it took some time for word of the dwarves' offer to reach us here.
String.Dest: 神殿非常偏僻，所以矮人的提议过了一段时间才传到我们这里。

String.Source: Still, if he sent you to find me, it may actually be pretty bad.
String.Dest: 尽管如此，他都派你来找我了，说明可能非常严重了。

String.Source: Of course. What is it that you need me to do?
Grab my journal, would you? We're going to need it.
String.Dest: 带上我的日记好吗？我们会需要的。

String.Source: Didn't want that lot getting wind of it. Especially my father.
String.Dest: 不想让这事传得沸沸扬扬。尤其不想让我父亲知道。

String.Source: You might look around a bit. Maybe one of our predecessors still has a clue.
String.Dest: 可以四处看看，也许某位前辈还有线索。

String.Source: Isran had a surprising stockpile of weapons and armor. Take a look.
String.Dest: 伊士冉拥有惊人的武器盔甲储备，来看看。

String.Source: Always a pleasure to serve a fellow alchemist.
String.Dest: 能为炼金术士效劳是我的荣幸。

String.Source: Greetings, master. What do you need?
Good job.
Well, before we spoke to my mother in the Soul Cairn, I would have said we bring the bow to my father.
String.Dest: 嗯，在我们和我妈谈话之前，我会说把弓带给我父亲。

String.Source: Very good, though I suspect there's more wherever he came from.
String.Dest: 干得好，不过我怀疑还会有更多。

String.Source: This is, or was, the epicenter of our religion. Most of the snow elf people worshipped Auri-El.
String.Dest: 这里是，或者曾经是我们的宗教中心。大多数雪精灵都信奉奥瑞-艾尔。

String.Source: Now... you'd be lucky to find a single room intact.
String.Dest: 现在……你能找到一间完好的房间都算幸运了。

String.Source: All right... Here, take this.
I keep the forge running day and night in case Lord Harkon needs anything.
String.Dest: 我让锻炉日夜保持运转，没准哈孔大人有所需求呢。

String.Source: Look, what is it you want from me?
Yah!
Scions of the night! Hear my words!
Each sought to gain power by using his underling to kill you and keep the Chalice for himself.
String.Dest: 两个人都想利用手下把你干掉，把圣杯据为己有，来获得力量。

String.Source: It's hard to describe. The Soul Cairn is... well, hungry, for lack of a better word. It's trying to take your life essence as payment.
String.Dest: 很难形容，灵魂石冢很……嗯，饥渴，只能这么说了。它试图收取你的生命精华作为报酬。

String.Source: Aye. And you be careful with the creature.
You disrespect our Lord by speaking to me instead of him.
String.Dest: 你不尊重我等的主人，竟然不和他交谈来找我。

String.Source: The hostility was necessary. I was bound to an oath.
String.Dest: 这种敌视非我本意，我被誓言所束缚了。

String.Source: The Ideal Masters's weakness is their insatiable hunger for pure souls.
String.Dest: 理想之主的弱点就是对纯粹灵魂的贪婪。

String.Source: She actually did it... created a portal to the Soul Cairn. Incredible.
String.Dest: 她真的做到了……创造一个通往灵魂石冢的传送门。真了不起。

String.Source: You risked everything to get Auri-El's Bow, and in turn, you've restored the Chantry.
String.Dest: 你们不顾一切地取得了奥瑞-艾尔之弓，但也因此帮忙恢复了神殿。

String.Source: I'm sorry, Serana. I didn't know... I didn't see.
String.Dest: 抱歉，瑟拉娜。我不知道……我不知道这事。

String.Source: You'll also want to find Gunmar. Big brute of a Nord, hates vampires almost as much as I do.
String.Dest: 你还得去找甘马尔，诺德蛮夫，跟我一样仇恨吸血鬼。

String.Source: Now tell me, whom do you represent, and what do you want with me?
String.Dest: 现在告诉我，你代表谁，找我有什么事？

String.Source: It pains me to think you'd travel with Serana under the guise of her protector in an effort to hunt me down.
String.Dest: 一想到你以保护瑟拉娜的名义和她来追捕我，就很不舒服。

String.Source: For the reading? Yeah. Just let the old man know when you're ready.
String.Dest: 读卷轴吗？好。你这准备好的话就跟老爷子说一声。

String.Source: My dear Salonia, how are you?
String.Dest: 亲爱的莎洛妮雅，你好吗？

String.Source: Then, well... you got a taste. Stronger, faster.
String.Dest: 然后，嗯……你已经尝试过了。更强了，也更敏捷了。

String.Source: Why, because of that story about the prophecy? About some vampire trying to put the sun out?
String.Dest: 就因为这个故事跟预言有关？跟什么吸血鬼要灭了太阳有关？

String.Source: The moment your father discovers your role in the prophecy, that he needs your blood, you'd be in terrible danger.
String.Dest: 一旦你父亲发现你在预言中的作用，需要你的血，那你就已经很危险了。

String.Source: Arkay says it's good that we're here, but I don't know... Something about this place doesn't feel right.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯说我们在这儿就很好，但我不确定……这里有些地方不对劲。

String.Source: Performing the Ritual of the Ancestor Moth within the glade should provide the answers you seek.
String.Dest: 在林地里进行先祖蛾仪式应该就能找到你想要的答案。

String.Source: Trivial in your mind, perhaps. For me, it would mean a great deal.
String.Dest: 或许对你而言微不足道，但对我来说，这意义重大。

String.Source: Finish them!
Actually, now that I think of it... I'm going to come along with you.
String.Dest: 事实上，我在想……和你一起去。

String.Source: No. It'll have to run its course, and there's always the chance I may never recover.
String.Dest: 不必了，顺其自然即可，我有可能永远无法复明了。

String.Source: Hmmm... interesting... those dwarves were clever creatures. I'll tinker around with these techniques and see what I can come up with around here.
String.Dest: 嗯……有意思……矮人们以前可真聪明。我会改进这些技术，看看会发现什么。

String.Source: We could just "pay the toll" another way. It wants a soul, so we give it a soul. Yours.
String.Dest: 我们可以用另一种方式“交路费”。它想要灵魂，我们就给它个灵魂，你的灵魂。

String.Source: She would have hated to see it like this.
String.Dest: 她肯定不喜欢看到这花园变成这样。

String.Source: It's... well, it's about me. And the Elder Scroll that was buried with me.
String.Dest: 是……嗯，是关于我，还有跟我一起埋起来的上古卷轴的事情。

String.Source: Perhaps if he had spent more time with us, he would have recognized the beauty for himself.
String.Dest: 他要是肯多花点时间在我们身上，说不准还能意识到家里有多美。

String.Source: Got him!
Yes, you've explained yourself. I'm supposed to just throw myself in front of you all and offer protection, am I?
String.Dest: 对，你说的很明白了。我就该挡在前面保护你们，是吧？

String.Source: By the Eight...
Well what did you expect, Tolan? Didn't I tell you? Didn't I warn you this would happen?
String.Dest: 那你在期待什么呢，托兰？我没告诉你们吗？是我没警告过你们会出这种事吗？

String.Source: Well, your thrall awaits and we have given him the Elder Scroll. Command him to read it, and let us hear the words of prophecy together.
String.Dest: 好了，你的奴隶在等我们，上古卷轴已经给他了。去命令他阅读卷轴，我们来一起听听预言说了什么。

String.Source: So are you here as a client? Shall I remake your face?
String.Dest: 你是作为客户来的吗？我能重塑你的脸吗？

String.Source: Something's happened, I can't quite remember...
String.Dest: 发生了什么事，我不太记得了……

String.Source: I can't believe it.
I think our potential is on the rise. Hircine smiles on us. Let's not question too much.
String.Dest: 我们的潜力可能还在提升，海尔辛在向我们微笑，还是别问太多了。

String.Source: Very few people appreciate all the horrible things that can happen to you if you're not being cautious.
String.Dest: 很少有人意识到，自己不够谨慎会遇到多可怕的事情。

String.Source: Like myself, Serana was a human once. We were devout followers of Lord Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 跟我一样，瑟拉娜曾是人类。我们是莫拉格·巴尔大人的忠实追随者。

String.Source: This may be the last time we're able to converse. If you have any questions before you leave, I suggest you ask them.
String.Dest: 这可能是我们最后一次谈话了，离开前还有什么问题，建议尽快讲。

String.Source: Hey, there's my bow! There, out on the log. Wondered what happened to it.
String.Dest: 嘿，这是我的弓！那边，在木头上。我想知道它都经历了些什么。

String.Source: I see... I... I understand. Thank you
You may not be dovah, but the defeat of Alduin earns you the right of title.
String.Dest: 你可能不是都瓦，但击败奥杜因使你赢得了这个头衔。

String.Source: I'm not sure what they would do with one, but in this case Isran is probably correct in thinking it isn't good.
String.Dest: 我不确定他们会用它来干什么，但这种情况下，伊士冉认为局势不妙应该是对的。

String.Source: But something's wrong. He never looks as though he's in pain or under duress. He just... stands there and watches, as though waiting.
String.Dest: 但是有些不对劲，他看上去不像是痛苦或受到胁迫。他只是……站在那里看着，就像在等待。

String.Source: Why not just scream at the top of your lungs "Here we are, monsters! We're oh so tasty! Come and get us!"
String.Dest: 不如扯嗓子大喊“在这儿呢，怪物！我们味道好极啦！来抓我们啊！”

String.Source: The more we feed, the greater our prowess will grow. We could perhaps discover even more gifts of Hircine.
String.Dest: 我们吃的越多，能力就越强，也许还能得到海尔辛更多恩赐。

String.Source: I think we have a better chance of surviving here, don't you?
String.Dest: 我认为我们在这里存活下去的可能性更大，你说呢？

String.Source: Our blood grants us power to calm and relax. If you currently lack the gift, forgo feeding for a day and that power will come naturally.
String.Dest: 我们的血赋予了我们冷静与放松的力量。如果你尚且缺乏这种天赋，就放弃一天的进食，这力量自然会到来。

String.Source: It is my sworn duty to see Arkay's wrath delivered to all the undead. It's usually a good bit of fun, too.
String.Dest: 我曾发誓要把阿尔凯之怒宣泄在所有亡灵身上，一般也很有趣。

String.Source: The soul of a dragon is as resilient as its owner's scaly hide.
String.Dest: 龙的灵魂就像他的鳞皮一样坚韧。

String.Source: They will allow you to draw the waters from the shrine's basin as if you've been enlightened.
String.Dest: 他们会让你从路龛的水池里取水，就像得到启蒙一样。

String.Source: It's good to see you all in one piece. Who is this?
String.Dest: 很高兴见到你没缺胳膊少腿。这是谁？

String.Source: Sometimes they go out looking for Elder Scrolls. Lucky for you, there's a Moth Priest in Skyrim right now, doing just that.
String.Dest: 有时候他们会到外面走走寻找上古卷轴。算你走运，天际现在就正好有一个在找卷轴的蛾祭司。

String.Source: She has the scroll!
This is generally performed at the Imperial Library, but as history has shown us, that isn't always possible.
String.Dest: 阅读一般要在帝国图书馆进行，但历史告诉我们，凡事都有例外。

String.Source: I will place my name with you and grant you the right to call my name from Tamriel.
String.Dest: 我会把我的名字告诉你，并允许你在泰姆瑞尔召唤我。

String.Source: ...Yeah. I thought I was prepared for anything. How can you prepare for a damned earthquake?
String.Dest: ……是啊。我就算准备得再全，又怎么知道会有地震？

String.Source: And you haven't forgotten what you need to do, have you?
String.Dest: 你也还没忘了该干什么吧，对吗？

String.Source: If you can find them, we might have a chance.
String.Dest: 如果你能找到他们，我们也许就有机会。

String.Source: So to protect me you decided to shut me away from everything I cared about?
String.Dest: 所以为了保护我，你就决定让我远离我在乎的一切？

String.Source: Yes, Feran. Of course. I'll see to it.
String.Dest: 好的，费兰，当然了。我来处理。

String.Source: There might be, but I don't think you're going to like it.
String.Dest: 可能有，但是我觉得你不会喜欢。

String.Source: What are you doing?
Oh thank you, milord. Thank you!
I know how it all sounds, but if there was another way I'd have done it long ago.
String.Dest: 我知道听来很奇怪，但要是有别的办法，我早就那么做了。

String.Source: Well done! I trust you'll put those to good use then.
String.Dest: 干得漂亮！希望你会好好利用它们。

String.Source: Did you really come here expecting to claim Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: 你们还真的来这儿拿奥瑞艾尔之弓了啊？

String.Source: Forgive me, Qahnaarin. We will continue this when time releases you from its relentless grasp.
String.Dest: 原谅我，夸纳林。当你从时间的无情掌控中释放后，我们再继续吧。

String.Source: I've sensed the blood pulsing a little stronger, of late. I had assumed you had as well.
String.Dest: 我最近感到血液跳动得更烈了。你没感受到么。

String.Source: I don't know what a Moth Priest is, but I did see an old man in a robe not long ago. He was riding in a wagon with some Imperial guards.
String.Dest: 我不知道什么蛾祭司，不过我前不久见过一个穿袍子的老人。他坐着一辆马车，车上有几个帝国卫兵。

String.Source: I suppose I could... what, praytell, is there?
String.Dest: 我想可以……什么，再说一下，哪里？

String.Source: Honestly, I don't know. Necromancers are always interested in souls, though, so that probably has some kind of interest.
String.Dest: 老实说，我不知道。死灵法师总会对灵魂感兴趣，所以可能是有某种吸引力。

String.Source: Look at all this. She must have spent years collecting these components.
String.Dest: 瞧瞧这些。她一定花了很多年时间来收集这些部件。

String.Source: Gaan!
He's alive. I've seen him.
That's how I ended up here. I can't rest. Not until I find the Forge, until I can prove that it was my discovery. Mine, not his!
String.Dest: 所以我才沦落至此，我不能休息，至少在找到锻炉之前，除非我能证明那是我的发现。是我的，不是他的！

String.Source: I... don't know who that is. Did he... mention my father at all?
String.Dest: 我……不认识他。他……提过我父亲吗？

String.Source: You did? Let me see them.
Well, what are they up to?
A vicious night stalker rules over a group of necromancers - seeks to gain leverage over the righteous.
String.Dest: 一个恶毒的夜行者统治着一群死灵术士，试图挑战公平正义。

String.Source: This was my mother's garden. It... do you know how beautiful something can be when it's tended by a master for hundreds of years?
String.Dest: 这里曾经是我母亲的花园。哎……你知道某样东西被主人精心保养上百年后能有多漂亮吗？

String.Source: I don't want to hear about it. I want what I asked for.
String.Dest: 我不想听那些。我要我要求的东西。

String.Source: Serana?
Not your first choice, I'd guess.
Do you have a moment to talk?
If I had to guess, I'd say the moment mother fled the castle, father went on a rampage.
String.Dest: 要我猜的话，大概我母亲一逃离城堡，我父亲就暴跳如雷了。

String.Source: Hey... we did pretty well for ourselves here. Good work.
String.Dest: 嘿……我们在这里做得很好，干得漂亮。

String.Source: You'd be surprised what people leave behind when you burn their village to the ground.
String.Dest: 把村庄夷为平地后，你会惊讶于人们留下的东西。

String.Source: Your words do me great honor.
Any luck yet?
Blind? Yes. I'm afraid so.
String.Dest: 瞎了？是的，恐怕就是如此。

String.Source: Let's not waste too much time, then.
String.Dest: 那我们就别浪费时间了。

String.Source: I don't require an answer, Qahnaarin. Simply speak my name to the heavens when you feel the time is right.
String.Dest: 你无需答复，夸纳林。只要在你觉得时机成熟向天空呼唤我的名字即可。

String.Source: I want us to be a family again. But I don't know if we can ever have that.
String.Dest: 我想让我们重新成为一个家。不过我不知道我们还能不能这样。

String.Source: And that was just one trap! Look around! Who knows what else this thing is capable of?
String.Dest: 而且那只是陷阱之一！看看周围吧！谁知道这里还会有什么？

String.Source: I am well, sire.
I prefer snow elf. The name "Falmer" usually holds a negative meaning to most travelers.
String.Dest: 我更喜欢雪精灵这个称呼，“伐莫”这个名字对大多数旅人通常都有负面含义。

String.Source: This will put my father in a great mood. You should come enjoy it while it lasts.
String.Dest: 父亲会为此高兴的，趁他还在兴头上的时候来享受吧。

String.Source: Isran? Needing someone else's help? Never thought I'd hear that.
String.Dest: 伊士冉？需要我的帮助？没想到我会听到这话。

String.Source: You've helped me, so I suppose the least I can do is find out what Isran wants. He's still at that fort near Stendarr's Beacon, I assume?
String.Dest: 你帮了我，我想至少要搞清楚伊士冉想做什么。他还在斯丹达尔的烽火台附近的那个堡垒，对吧？

String.Source: My claws have rended the flesh of innumerable foes, but I have never once been felled on the field of battle.
String.Dest: 我的爪子撕碎了无数敌人的血肉，从没有在战场上倒下过。

String.Source: No, there's another way. The question is, how much are you willing to risk to find Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: 不，还有别的办法。问题是，你愿意冒多大的风险去找奥瑞艾尔之弓？

String.Source: You made it! And you've brought the shards!
Once your thrall is suitably sedated, you will be able to impart the gift without resistance.
String.Dest: 当你的奴隶自然地镇静下来，就可以无阻力地赐予礼物了。

String.Source: This used to lead into the castle's great hall. It looks like my father had it sealed up.
String.Dest: 这条路曾经通向城堡大厅。看起来我父亲把它给封起来了。

String.Source: Vampires aren't counted among the living. I could probably go through there without a problem.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼不算是活物。我也许能顺利通过那里。

String.Source: It appears that way. I suppose he wanted to put the past behind him.
String.Dest: 似乎是这样。我觉得他想把这些抛诸脑后。

String.Source: You need something?
Well, my notes were in my journal, but you didn't grab that, did you? Hmph.
String.Dest: 嗯，我的笔记就在日记里，但你还没拿上吧？哼。

String.Source: It can stay for now, but if it so much as lays a finger on anyone here, I'll hold you responsible. Got it?
String.Dest: 它可以暂时待在这里，但只要它胆敢碰谁一根汗毛，就拿你是问。懂了？

String.Source: Hurry back. You don't want to keep Lord Harkon waiting.
String.Dest: 快点回来，你不会想让哈孔大人久等的。

String.Source: Good.
The tone of your voice is understandable. Perhaps I can alleviate your suspicions.
String.Dest: 你言语中的顾虑在所难免，也许我可以解释一二。

String.Source: Scattered across Tamriel are secluded locations known only as Ancestor Glades. There's one in Skyrim, in the Pine Forest.
String.Dest: 泰姆瑞尔散布着一些人迹罕至的“先祖林地”。天际的松树林中就有一个。

String.Source: Return to me when your part is done.
String.Dest: 完成你的任务后就回来找我。

String.Source: We need strength, power. Not magic. Elves don't seem to understand that.
String.Dest: 我们需要力量，权力，不是魔法。精灵好像不懂这点。

String.Source: Oh, absolutely. But my mother's not a coward.
String.Dest: 啊，当然啦。不过我母亲才不是个胆小鬼。

String.Source: Unf!
There are at least thirty different ways of being attacked and killed in your own home at any given moment.
String.Dest: 就算在自己家里都能遇到至少三十种遇袭和谋杀的方式。

String.Source: Here we go...
Other than that, she wouldn't tell me anything.
String.Dest: 除此之外，她就什么都不跟我说了。

String.Source: It was only just a little bit ago. I bet you can catch them if you hurry up.
String.Dest: 就在一小会前。我觉得如果你赶紧去追的话，肯定能追上他们。

String.Source: I only know what she told me.
String.Dest: 我只知道她跟我说过的内容。

String.Source: Isran, these vampires are different. I know you've disagreed with the Order in the past...
String.Dest: 伊士冉，这些吸血鬼不一样。我知道你反对教团以前的做法……

String.Source: (Sigh)...
I know very little about them.
Excellent! I'm sure you'll put those to good use.
The Soul Cairn is a tiny sliver of Oblivion, the realm of the daedra.
String.Dest: 灵魂石冢位于湮灭，也就是迪德拉领域的一小块区域。

String.Source: When the prey is riled, it makes things difficult for us.
String.Dest: 当猎物被激怒时，我们就麻烦了。

String.Source: I have not always been a ragged beggar. I learned my art from the masters of the art of flesh sculpture.
String.Dest: 别拿我当成臭乞丐，这技术可是从一个血肉雕刻师那里学到的。

String.Source: Head on in and behave yourself.
In case you haven't noticed, Isran is always concerned about something. That's what got us working together in the first place.
String.Dest: 你没注意到的话，伊士冉一直都在担心某些事情。这就是为什么我们当初会合作。

String.Source: We cannot afford to relax.
Can I assist you? You know I live to serve.
String.Dest: 我能帮你的忙吗？你清楚我是为了服务而活的。

String.Source: All right, I suppose I could do that.
Like I said. I don't know what you're talking about.
String.Dest: 我说过了，听不懂你在说什么。

String.Source: Still, its liquid is powerful, full of magic. Others have noticed, though they have never fully realized its potential.
String.Dest: 尽管如此，它的力量依然

String.Source: For those who cherish memories of loved ones, their compassion often conceals the beast.
String.Dest: 对于那些珍惜亲人记忆的人来说，他们往往会因为怜悯之心把野兽藏起来。

String.Source: Ain't too often we get a visitor like that.
String.Dest: 像这样的客人可不常有呀。

String.Source: Tell me, what is your name?
Hmmm... I see. Clever dwarves. With a similar technique and a little tinkering I should be able to improve the capabilities of our crossbows.
String.Dest: 嗯……我明白了。聪明啊矮人。我应该能通过类似的技术和一些修补来提高我们弩箭的性能。

String.Source: But of course, neither of us can read it.
String.Dest: 不过当然了，我们谁都没法读。

String.Source: Yes, how may I serve you, milord?
String.Dest: 是，我要怎么服侍您，大人？

String.Source: Absolutely. You could turn around and travel back from wherever you started empty handed, or you could assist me.
String.Dest: 当然了，你也可以从哪儿来回哪儿去，空手而归。不然，就只能帮我。

String.Source: I am afraid you're beyond my meager abiliities. I am sorry I cannot serve you better.
String.Dest: 恐怕您已经超越了我这微薄的能力。很抱歉我无法更好地为您服务了。

String.Source: Mother!
What? What meeting? I wasn't informed of any such thing!
String.Dest: 啊？什么会议？我都没听说这件事！

String.Source: Now that you've retrieved the Elder Scroll, you should be on your way.
String.Dest: 你现在已经找回上古卷轴了，你该上路了。

String.Source: What are you doing?
Trust me. I lived here for a very long time and I know every nook and cranny.
String.Dest: 相信我。我在这里可住了很长一段时间，我对这里了如指掌。

String.Source: But you've proven your worth. I'm willing to try.
String.Dest: 但你已经证明了自己的价值，我愿意试试。

String.Source: She was very fond of her alchemical garden in the castle courtyard. She taught me quite a bit about cultivating quality reagents.
String.Dest: 她很喜欢城堡院子里的炼金花园，教了我很多有关培养高质量试剂的知识。

String.Source: You realize it's not really necessary to take on that form here.
String.Dest: 你明知道没必要在这儿变成那样。

String.Source: The order of the day would be our destruction until every last vampire was hunted down and eliminated.
String.Dest: 那天将会是我们的灭绝之日，直到所有吸血鬼都被猎杀致死。

String.Source: I believe in civility among seasoned warriors, and I find your ear worthy of my words.
String.Dest: 我相信老练的战士应该懂得礼节，也认为我的话有必要说给你听听。

String.Source: Prelates of these shrines were charged with teaching the mantras of Auri-El to our Initiates.
String.Dest: 这些路龛的高级教士负责向我们的新人传授奥瑞-艾尔的咒语。

String.Source: You're pretty good. I don't think there's anything more you can learn from me.
String.Dest: 你很厉害了。我不认为你还能从我这里学到什么。

String.Source: No, you don't...
I'm quite alright, thanks to you. Dexion Evicus is my name. I'm a Moth Priest of the White Gold Tower.
String.Dest: 多亏了你，我很好。我叫戴希翁·艾维库斯，是白金塔的一名蛾祭司。

String.Source: It appears I have you to thank for turning my daughter against me.
String.Dest: 看来我还要感谢你让我女儿背叛我呢。

String.Source: And promise me you'll keep my daughter safe. She's the only thing of value I have left.
String.Dest: 答应我，保护好我女儿。她是我唯一珍视的东西了。

String.Source: I understand. Take your time.
I didn't even think you knew what a book was, my brutish friend.
String.Dest: 还以为你都不知道书是什么呢，糙汉。

String.Source: Yes... yes, you're right. I'm sorry. I just didn't expect anyone to care how I felt about her. Thank you.
String.Dest: 是啊……没错，你说得对。对不起。我只是没想到会有人在乎我对她的看法。谢谢。

String.Source: It's the reason for the Soul Cairn's existence, and the only leverage a necromancer has when bargaining with them.
String.Dest: 这就是灵魂石冢存在的原因，也是死灵法师与它们交易的唯一筹码。

String.Source: So, in case you didn't notice the giant thing on my back, I have the Elder Scroll with me.
String.Dest: 另外，如果你还没注意到我背的东西，这就是上古卷轴。

String.Source: Are you ready now?
I do. It's how the vampire has survived for millennia, and the only way we can continue to survive in the future.
String.Dest: 是啊。这是千年来吸血鬼的生存之道，也是未来我们活下去的唯一方法。

String.Source: Yes, I did. When I told you that I was grateful for my daughter's safe return, I told the truth. But I did not tell you everything.
String.Dest: 没错。当我跟你说我很感激你带我女儿安全回家的时候，我说的是实话。不过我没把所有事情都告诉你。

String.Source: Good luck.
Looking at the equipment and materials, it looks like she was trying to advance her necromancy.
String.Dest: 从这些设备和材料来看，大概是想精进自己的死灵法术吧。

String.Source: Pouring the contents of the ewer into the sacred basin of the Sanctum would allow him to enter for an audience with the Arch-Curate himself.
String.Dest: 把水壶里的水倒进圣堂的盆中，就可以进去见教士长了。

String.Source: That's quite a bold claim. I'd need proof before I could possibly accept it.
String.Dest: 这指控还真是大胆。我需要证据才能相信。

String.Source: To harness it is to know. The fundaments. The Dwemer lockbox hides it from me.
String.Dest: 想要驾驭它就要了解它。很简单的道理。但锻莫的密锁箱把它和我隔绝了。

String.Source: No, sorry. It's 4,000 coins or no deal.
String.Dest: 不，抱歉。4000金币不然就算了。

String.Source: Are you ready to go? I'm not entirely sure what this thing is going to do when I add my blood.
String.Dest: 你准备好出发了吗？我不完全确定加入我的血液后，这东西会怎么样。

String.Source: Afraid my memory can't be bought with what you've got there.
String.Dest: 恐怕你的钱还不够买我的记忆。

String.Source: Good. I suspected you might possess some intellect.
String.Dest: 很好，我看你还有些逻辑。

String.Source: He's holed up with a group of a necromancers.
String.Dest: 他跟一群死灵法师躲在一块儿。

String.Source: Of course. I wouldn't be telling you where to find them if I desired them for myself.
String.Dest: 当然可以，我想要的话就不会告诉你去哪找它们了。

String.Source: This structure is known as a wayshrine. They were used for meditation and for transport when the Chantry was a place of enlightenment.
String.Dest: 这种结构被称为路龛。当神殿还是启蒙之地时，它们被用于冥想和运输。

String.Source: The voice fades and the words begin to shimmer and distort. But wait, there is more here.
String.Dest: 声音消失了，文字开始闪烁扭曲。等等，还有别的。

String.Source: My presence in Tamriel would simply double the risk that Harkon could complete the prophecy.
String.Dest: 我在泰姆瑞尔只会倍增哈孔实现预言的风险。

String.Source: Now, you be careful with the creature.
String.Dest: 现在，你要小心这东西了。

String.Source: That's all I can tell you. He asked me not to let anyone know where he was going. I suppose he didn't want the attention.
String.Dest: 我能告诉你的就这些。他让我别跟别人说他去哪里了。我觉得他是不想引起注意。

String.Source: Would you look at that. An exploding crossbow bolt. This should be fun!
String.Dest: 你看那个，会爆炸的弩箭。这应该很有趣！

String.Source: The scroll I presume you found with Serana speaks of Auriel and his arcane weapon, Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 我想你发现的那卷跟瑟拉娜在一起的上古卷轴记载了奥瑞艾尔和他的神器————奥瑞艾尔之弓。

String.Source: The prophesied time is at last upon us. Soon we will claim dominion over the sun itself, and forge a new realm of eternal darkness.
String.Dest: 预言的时代终于到来了，我们很快就会支配太阳，建立一个新的永夜王国。

String.Source: Very good. I'll just... I'll be going now.
Everything's been torn down... the whole place looks... well, dead. It's like we're the first to set foot here in centuries.
String.Dest: 全都被拆了……整个地方好像……好吧，死了。就好像我们是几百年来第一个踏进这里的人。

String.Source: Glorious. Serana claims you're her guardian, yet your first instinct appears to be greed. I see that my daughter is still as naive as ever.
String.Dest: 真不错啊。瑟拉娜说你是在保护她，但你的第一反应却是表现出贪心。看来我女儿还是跟从前一样天真。

String.Source: Let's take a look around. There has to be something here that tells us where she's gone.
String.Dest: 我们四处找找。这里肯定有些东西能告诉我们她去了哪里。

String.Source: Look, I've just gotten myself out of quite a mess here, in case you haven't noticed, and while I appreciate your help, I...
String.Dest: 听着，你看我刚刚才摆脱了这堆烂摊子，虽然感谢你的帮助，但我……

String.Source: Stay your weapons. I would speak with you, Qahnaarin.
String.Dest: 且慢动手，听我一言，夸纳林。

String.Source: Fine. Arkay says it's a good idea for me to go. I don't agree, but he's not the sort of fellow you can just ignore.
String.Dest: 好吧。阿尔凯说我最好还是去。我再不同意，也不能无视他的旨意。

String.Source: Very good. Should you visit her again, I suspect you'll find our new sibling appreciates her transformation.
String.Dest: 非常好，如果你再去拜访她，我想你会发现我们这位新姐妹会很感激她的转化。

String.Source: Let's keep moving. I feel like we're being watched.
String.Dest: 继续走吧，感觉我们被监视了。

String.Source: If my desire to end your life was still my purpose, we would not be speaking.
String.Dest: 如果我还想着取你性命，就不会来谈话了。

String.Source: Harkon disbelieved in their existence, though perhaps he felt slighted they were not already in his possession and only feigns indifference.
String.Dest: 哈孔不相信它们存在，尽管他可能是觉得它们还没有为他所用，假装漠不关心。

String.Source: The Ideal Masters unleashed their Keepers and sent them to destroy me.
String.Dest: 理想之主派出了手下的看守者，让它们来杀我。

String.Source: Of course. What is it?
No, I don't need anything right now. Please stop asking.
String.Dest: 不，我现在不需要任何帮助。请别再问了。

String.Source: Lah...Haas!
I am Knight-Paladin Gelebor. Welcome to the Great Chantry of Auri-El.
String.Dest: 我是圣骑士盖勒布。欢迎来到奥瑞-艾尔的伟大神殿。

String.Source: Quite a place, huh? Was even more impressive before it all fell to pieces.
String.Dest: 不错的地方，是吧？在一切化为碎片之前更好看呢。

String.Source: Working metal isn't easy. Let me show you a few things.
String.Dest: 加工金属并不简单，让我给你看些东西。

String.Source: Yes? What did you need?
Are you sure? I'm willing to turn you, but you need to think it through.
String.Dest: 你确定？我是不介意转化你的，不过你得好好考虑考虑。

String.Source: Well done! Somehow I knew it would be you and Serana who found our moth priest.
String.Dest: 干得漂亮！我就知道你和瑟拉娜会找到我们的蛾祭司。

String.Source: You are to make a public show of murdering someone. Do it in the streets for all to see. The higher the profile the better.
String.Dest: 你要公开谋杀某人，在大街上让所有人都看到。越高调越好。

String.Source: Because most of the stories end with the Ideal Masters duping the necromancers, who end up dead or wishing they were dead.
String.Dest: 因为大部分故事都以理想之主欺骗死灵法师收场，这些家伙要不就是死了，要不就是生不如死。

String.Source: This is the power that I offer!
String.Dest: 这就是我赐予你的力量！

String.Source: You're doing well, but two of the spires remain intact.
String.Dest: 你做的很好，但还有两座塔完好无损。

String.Source: Well, you could waste a lot of time trying to figure out our next move, or you could let me help.
String.Dest: 好吧，你可以花很久很久试图去想明白我们该怎么办，或者你可以让我搭把手。

String.Source: I have found such a soul and the stars appear cooperative.
String.Dest: 我找到了一个这样的灵魂，星象也正合意。

String.Source: I don't know. Certainly not longevity. Kind of a waste of time for a vampire.
String.Dest: 不知道，肯定不是为了延年益寿，对吸血鬼来说完全是浪费时间。

String.Source: Ah, you are here. Good.
I'm sure I'll manage to repay him later, but you... What can I do to thank you?
String.Dest: 我相信以后会偿还他的，但你……我该怎么感谢你呢？

String.Source: Thank the divines for you!
I've found a new candidate, ripe for Harkon's Gift. I'm sending you to welcome this soul into our family.
String.Dest: 我找到了一个适合接受哈孔礼物的新人选。就由你去欢迎这个灵魂加入我们。

String.Source: I mean... as much as anyone. Not a lot.
String.Dest: 我……跟其他人一样，也不多。

String.Source: And among those, it seems, only when the heavens show the correct aspects.
String.Dest: 而这些人，似乎是天堂向他们敞开了到来之路。

String.Source: Idiot! I can't get to the scroll with Durnehviir attacking us!
String.Dest: 傻瓜！我不能在杜耐维尔攻击我们的时候去拿卷轴！

String.Source: The Dawnguard have increased their operations and have been aggressively recruiting.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫增加了他们的行动，并积极招募人员。

String.Source: I've read stories. Stories about fools that managed to... communicate with them.
String.Dest: 我读过一些故事。讲述蠢蛋们试图去……跟它们交流。

String.Source: Ooh, good. I was just starting to get bored.
String.Dest: 哦，非常好。我刚才还有些无聊呢。

String.Source: I do not practice my art for free, however. I doubt you can afford my services. You have the smell of the vagabond about you.
String.Dest: 要我表演技艺可不免费，我怀疑你付不了账。你身上带着一股流浪汉的味道。

String.Source: Yyyaaahh!
Back already? Can't wait.
Let's go. My mother must be waiting on the other side of that thing.
String.Dest: 我们走吧。我母亲肯定在那东西的另一边等着呢。

String.Source: Tradition dictates the females be offered to Molag Bal on his summoning day. Few survive the ordeal. Those that do emerge as a pure-blooded vampire.
String.Dest: 传统决定了在莫拉格·巴尔的召唤日要献上女性给他。很少有人能熬过这趟折磨，成功了的都转化为了纯血吸血鬼。

String.Source: I suppose you're right. I should have a little more faith.
String.Dest: 我想你说得没错。我应该更信任你的。

String.Source: Never made it far in the Companions, but now... I'd like to see any of them try and call me "whelp" again.
String.Dest: 在战友团那会儿确实不太行，但现在……我倒要看看他们谁来叫我一声“小崽子”。

String.Source: Oh no...
I knew she was deep into necromancy. I mean, she taught me everything I know.
String.Dest: 我就知道她沉迷于死灵法术。我是说，她教会了我一切。

String.Source: All right Isran, you've got us all here. Now what do you want?
String.Dest: 好了，伊士冉，我们都来了。你打算做什么？

String.Source: I used to walk through here after evening meals. It was beautiful, once.
String.Dest: 我过去常常在晚餐后路过这里。这里曾经很漂亮。

String.Source: I requested refuge in the Soul Cairn, and in exchange, I would provide the Ideal Masters the souls that they craved.
String.Dest: 我在灵魂石冢里寻求庇护，而我会提供理想之主它们所渴望的灵魂作为交换。

String.Source: It all comes back to my father.
Lah!
She wasn't, always. But I think you're right.
String.Dest: 她也不是一直这样。不过我想你说的没错。

String.Source: Let's get to my home, and I'll have a better sense of where we all stand.
String.Dest: 去我家吧，我需要再多了解一下当前的情况。

String.Source: My vision darkens, and I see no more.
String.Dest: 视野变黑了，什么都看不见了。

String.Source: Here we are.
We should keep it small. Too many people, and we'll draw unwanted attention to ourselves.
String.Dest: 我们应该控制规模，太多人会引起不必要的注意。

String.Source: I have no choice. As I told you before, I'm a Daughter of Coldharbour.
String.Dest: 我没得选。之前跟你说过，我是冷港之女。

String.Source: Serana? What are you doing here? Where's your father?
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜？你在这里干什么？你父亲在哪里？

String.Source: Excuse us. I need to fetch the Bloodstone Chalice.
String.Dest: 打扰了，我要去拿血石圣杯。

String.Source: No doubt she'd like you to lead her into such a place. Then, when you're alone and beyond help, the fangs will come out!
String.Dest: 毫无疑问她希望你带她去这种地方。然后，当你独自一人、孤立无援的时候，她就会亮出牙齿！

String.Source: I am sure Nazir's cooking is great and all, but my appetites are a little more... discerning.
String.Dest: 我知道纳兹尔厨艺很棒，但我的胃口有点……特别。

String.Source: Any ideas?
Destroy the Keepers that are tending them, and it should bring the barrier down.
String.Dest: 消灭守卫它们的看守者，应该就能破坏屏障。

String.Source: I wish Orthjolf and Vingalmo would just get it over with and kill each other. I'm tired of listening to them.
String.Dest: 我希望欧兹约夫和文嘉莫赶紧动手同归于尽。他俩吵得我够够的了。

String.Source: Get it wrong, and... well. You've seen what happened when I tried it.
String.Dest: 打错了的话，那么……好吧，你也看到我尝试的后果了。

String.Source: Brother Adalvald had been there not long ago. Said he found something of great importance.
String.Dest: 阿达瓦尔德修士不久前还去过那里，说他发现了非常重要的东西。

String.Source: Nobody really knows.
Ah. Been working more on his secret hideout, has he? It'll be interesting to see how much progress he's made.
String.Dest: 啊，他还在他的秘密藏身处忙活，对吧？看看他取得了什么成果会有趣的。

String.Source: People say there's someone in Riften that can... change your face. Make you look completely different. Do you believe that?
String.Dest: 人们说在裂谷城有个人能……改变你的面容。让你看起来完全变了个人。你信吗？

String.Source: Did you have anything to ask before you depart?
String.Dest: 出发前你有什么要问的么？

String.Source: Watch your step.
Do you actually believe any of that?
String.Dest: 你真的相信那些鬼话吗？

String.Source: There's an unused inlet on the northern side of the island that was used by the previous owners to bring supplies into the castle.
String.Dest: 小岛的北边有一个废弃的入口，城堡的前主人用它来运送补给。

String.Source: It certainly seems the Vigilants of Stendarr can't help themselves. No surprise there.
String.Dest: 看来斯丹达尔的警戒者们也自顾不暇了，这并不奇怪。

String.Source: But, my techniques only work on the living, not those that have crossed over into undeath.
String.Dest: 但我的技术只对活人有效，而非那些已经转化为亡灵的人。

String.Source: Now this is a find! Plans for improving the Dwemer crossbow. This should add some extra punch to an already devastating weapon.
String.Dest: 这可是个大发现！改进锻莫弩。这会给本就具有毁灭性的武器增加额外的冲击力。

String.Source: Hope you're getting along with Isran. He takes some getting used to.
String.Dest: 希望你和伊士冉处得来，他这人需要点时间才能结交。

String.Source: Well done. Nothing like a good kill to get the blood pumping, is there?
String.Dest: 干得好。没什么比杀戮更让人热血沸腾了，不是吗？

String.Source: No, sire. I have not.
That letter's the last I've heard of him and mentions where he is. Now please, leave me alone.
String.Dest: 那封信是我最后听到有关他的消息，还提到了他的下落。现在别来烦我，求你了。

String.Source: I see you chose a suitably high profile target. Well done.
String.Dest: 看来你选了个高调的目标，干得好。

String.Source: Yes. I once practiced my art in the salons and manors of Tamriel's great and good. Now, the scum of Skyrim are my only clients.
String.Dest: 是的，我曾经在全泰姆瑞尔最上流的沙龙和庄园里施展我的技术。现在，我的客户只剩天际的渣滓们了。

String.Source: Let's see... Ooh! This diagram explains how to fashion a bolt that will send a jolt of shock through whatever it hits.
String.Dest: 我看看……哦！这张图解释了如何制造一种使打击目标受闪电震击的弩箭。

String.Source: The scroll!
I was. But unlike some of my brethren, I sought solutions outside the norm in order to maintain my superiority.
String.Dest: 是的，但与我的兄弟们不同，为保持优势，我开始寻求非常手段。

String.Source: All of the ingredients for our potions came from there. She used to say that my father couldn't stand the place. Too... peaceful.
String.Dest: 我们所有药剂的材料都出自那里。她常说我父亲受不了那个地方，太……平静了。

String.Source: Yes, he's a fanatic... he's changed. But he's still my father. Why can't you understand how that makes me feel?
String.Dest: 没错，他是着魔了……是变了。但他还是我父亲啊。为什么你就不明白这对我而言是什么感受？

String.Source: Well, don't just stand there!
As much as it pains me to send you and Serana back alone, I can't take the risk.
String.Dest: 让你跟瑟拉娜自行回去，我心里也不好受，但我不能冒险。

String.Source: How do we get inside? We have to talk.
String.Dest: 我们该怎么进去？我们得谈谈。

String.Source: You know more than I do now. Arkay has us both beaten, but he's not giving up all his secrets.
String.Dest: 你现在知道的比我都多了。阿尔凯又在我俩之上，但他不会说出他所有的秘密。

String.Source: What're you up to, Garan?
Right. I'll settle in and then Arkay and I will start to put things right. Don't you worry.
String.Dest: 好吧，我会在这里安顿下来，然后和阿尔凯一起干正事。别担心了。

String.Source: I'm not going to talk you out of it, am I? I know, I know. I was just like you, once.
String.Dest: 我不会劝你放弃的。我都明白，以前的我就跟你一样。

String.Source: It's your funeral.
They're mystic entities that lord over the Soul Cairn, controlling every aspect from its fabric to its appearance.
String.Dest: 他们是主宰灵魂石冢的神秘存在，控制着从结构到外观的方方面面。

String.Source: I know! Arkay told me of your success!
String.Dest: 我知道！阿尔凯告诉我你成功了！

String.Source: You are the Dovahkiin, the Dragonborn. You may not be one of us in body, but you have earned the right to bear this title.
String.Dest: 你是都瓦克因，龙裔。可能没有我们的躯体，但已经赢得了这个头衔。

String.Source: Last I knew, she was out in the Reach, convinced she was about to find the biggest dwarven ruins yet.
String.Dest: 上次听说她去了瑞驰，坚信能找到迄今最大的矮人遗迹。

String.Source: No, and I'm not going to waste men looking. We're fighting a war against your kind, and I intend to win it.
String.Dest: 不知道，而且我可不想浪费时间找人。我们正在和你的同类们作战，而且还要赢。

String.Source: Now, what is our Lord's wish?
String.Dest: 那么，我们大人有何吩咐？

String.Source: I wonder what we're up against here.
String.Dest: 我想知道我们是在对抗什么。

String.Source: Isran's done nothing but mock me. He's never given me the respect I deserve.
String.Dest: 伊士冉就会嘲笑我。从来没给我应有的尊重。

String.Source: It was very sudden. It was almost like one day we were a normal family, and then the next I didn't know who they were.
String.Dest: 变得很突然。就好像昨天我们还是一个正常的家庭，然后第二天我就不认识他们了。

String.Source: I've got more leads on additional Dwemer plans.
String.Dest: 我还有更多有关锻莫图纸的线索。

String.Source: Ah! The free air of Vus at long last!
String.Dest: 啊！终于有威斯的自由空气了！

String.Source: You managed to destroy all three Keepers? Very impressive.
String.Dest: 三个看守者都被你消灭了？很不错。

String.Source: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn. Be wary of him.
String.Dest: 我还有一句警告。石冢中游荡着一条龙，自称杜耐维尔，小心。

String.Source: What do you mean? Why were the vampires after this woman?
String.Dest: 你是什么意思？为什么吸血鬼要找这位女人？

String.Source: I guess I'm expected.
Let's just say that my mother and father had a bit of a falling out.
String.Dest: 就算是我父母闹翻了吧。

String.Source: If we're going to survive this, we're going to have to be as ruthless as our enemies.
String.Dest: 要想活下来，就得像我们的敌人那样冷酷无情。

String.Source: She had an alchemy setup in her drawing room, but nothing that even comes close to what's here.
String.Dest: 她的客厅里有一个炼金装置，但根本比不了这里的东西。

String.Source: A single gyro would be enough, I think. Believe me, this is useful stuff.
String.Dest: 我想一个矮人陀螺仪就够了。相信我，能派上用场。

String.Source: He wasn't always like that, though. There was... a turn. He stumbled onto this obscure prophecy and just kind of lost himself in it.
String.Dest: 不过，他并非一直如此。他……变了。他无意中发现了一个模糊的预言，然后有点把自己陷进去了。

String.Source: An unattended attachment, such as found in your beloved husband creates... an opportunity for unnecessary agitation.
String.Dest: 这就是一种没有约束力的爱恋，万一被你心爱的丈夫发现……不免有些不必要的麻烦。

String.Source: The skies of Keizaal are mine again!
String.Dest: 凯扎尔的天空又属于我了！

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: 你根本不在乎瑟拉娜跟我们的处境。

String.Source: And while I do not know its exact whereabouts, I do have information suggesting someone who does.
String.Dest: 虽然不清楚准确下落，但情报表明确实有人知道。

String.Source: Yes. I've kept it safely secured here ever since I was imprisoned.
String.Dest: 没错。自从我被关在这里，我就一直把它妥善保管好了。

String.Source: Keep yourself armed and protected as best you can.
String.Dest: 尽你所能的武装好来保护自己。

String.Source: The letter left on the corpse shall have to suffice. It will no doubt be found.
String.Dest: 留在尸体上的信足够了，毫无疑问会被发现的。

String.Source: The restoration of this wayshrine means that Vyrthur must be dead and the Betrayed no longer have control over him.
String.Dest: 这座路龛的修复意味着维苏尔已经身死，背叛者们再也无法控制他了。

String.Source: Help!
Why worry about who has the bigger chair at the table when there's more than enough to go around?
String.Dest: 既然餐桌的椅子是足够的，为什么要担心谁的椅子更大呢？

String.Source: I'd try to visit my mother in the garden, and she'd quickly shoo me away saying she was much too busy.
String.Dest: 我试图去花园里去找我母亲，不过她说她太忙了，很快就把我轰走了。

String.Source: So this is it...
But she loved it. I don't know. I guess it's like having a piece of art, if you're into that sort of thing.
String.Dest: 但她很喜欢，我不太理解。大概和收藏艺术品一样吧，如果你对这方面感兴趣可能就理解了。

String.Source: She's... she's a vampire? Are you a complete fool? You can't trust them! She'll turn on you the first chance she gets!
String.Dest: 她是……她是吸血鬼？你傻了吗？你不能相信他们！一有机会她就会背叛你的！

String.Source: Not... yet...
This is all well and good, but do we actually know anything about what they're doing? What do we do now?
String.Dest: 说的是没毛病，但我们真的了解他们的企图吗？现在要怎么行动？

String.Source: I must head back to the Sanctuary before dawn. I will see you there, Listener.
String.Dest: 我必须得在黎明前回到圣所。聆听者，我会在那里见你的。

String.Source: Is it really you? I can't believe it!
The Chalice? Why?
He's holed up with a group of a bandits.
String.Dest: 他跟一群抢匪躲在一块儿。

String.Source: Neither do I.
Take my advice, don't listen to that talk of the "face sculptor" down in the Ragged Flagon. "Face butcher" is more like it from what I've heard.
String.Dest: 听我的劝，别听漏壶那所谓的“脸部雕塑家”说的。据我所知更像是“脸部屠夫”。

String.Source: You want to find him, try talking to anyone who'd meet a traveler. Innkeepers and carriage drivers in the big cities maybe. But you're on your own.
String.Dest: 如果你想找他，试试去跟见过他的旅行者聊聊。也许旅店老板或者马车夫知道他在哪儿。不过你们得自己去问了。

String.Source: It's my family home. Not the most welcoming place, but depending on who's around, I'll be safe there.
String.Dest: 那就是我的家。不是最好的地方，不过这得取决于谁在那里，我在那里会安全的。

String.Source: Welcome to the politics of Lord Harkon's court.
String.Dest: 欢迎参与哈孔大人的宫廷政治。

String.Source: You must understand that he's no longer the man I married all that time ago.
String.Dest: 你得明白，他已经不是我很久之前嫁的那个人了。

String.Source: Once you've located a wayshrine, there will be a spectral Prelate tending to it.
String.Dest: 每次你找到了路龛，会发现有一位幽灵教士照看它。

String.Source: You met Stalf and Salonia, I assume? Lord Harkon and I suspected they might follow you there.
String.Dest: 我猜你见过斯达弗和莎洛妮雅了吧？哈孔大人和我怀疑他们可能会跟着你去那儿。

String.Source: You could call it that. Didn't put up much of a fight but made for a tasty snack. A rich bouquet of flavors, I would definitely recommend it.
String.Dest: 你可以这么说。没怎么打架，但做了一顿美味的点心。香气浓郁，我绝对推荐。

String.Source: I don't converse with my meals.
Is this... some kind of a joke? Did Arkay put you up to this?
String.Dest: 这是……在讲笑话吗？阿尔凯让你这么干的？

String.Source: I think we'll want Sorine Jurard. Breton girl, whip-smart and good with tinkering. Fascination with the Dwemer. Weapons in particular.
String.Dest: 索琳·菊拉德是个好人选。伶牙俐齿的布莱顿姑娘，擅长修补。沉迷锻莫，尤其是武器。

String.Source: Wonderful. Carry on, then.
I appreciate your concern for me, but Serana is all that I care about. You must keep her safe at all costs.
String.Dest: 谢谢你的好意，不过我唯一在乎的只有瑟拉娜。你必须不惜一切代价保护好她。

String.Source: A noble cause. Arkay likes the idea very much, so I'm happy to help.
String.Dest: 这是崇高的事业。阿尔凯欣赏这个想法，我也很高兴帮忙。

String.Source: Do you think mudcrabs might've taken it? I saw one the other day... Wouldn't be surprised if it followed me here.
String.Dest: 你觉得会不会是已经被泥沼蟹给拿了？前几天看到过一只……要是跟着我来了也不奇怪。

String.Source: I rejoice in my freedom, if only for a moment.
String.Dest: 我为我的自由而高兴，哪怕只有片刻。

String.Source: Making sure you're not vampires. Can't be too careful.
String.Dest: 确保你们不是吸血鬼，小心为上。

String.Source: Well, at least you're smart enough to want to learn more. I'll show you what I can.
String.Dest: 嗯，至少你够聪明，想学习更多。我会教你我知道的东西。

String.Source: I suppose I'd rather be here than most other places in Skyrim. If Isran needs me, it must be pretty bad.
String.Dest: 比起天际其他地方，我更愿意待在这里。如果伊士冉需要我，情况一定很糟了。

String.Source: Is it really... it is! I was hoping we'd find this. It's a diagram for a dwemer crossbow. Much more sophisticated, and powerful, than the ones we use.
String.Dest: 真的吗……就是它！我就希望能找到这个。这是锻莫弩的设计图。比我们用的更精密，更强大。

String.Source: Many in the court don't bother with potions, but I keep things stocked just in case.
String.Dest: 宫廷里的很多人都懒得买药水，但我还是准备好了以防万一。

String.Source: I had hoped you would have chosen a higher profile target. But the deed is done, and it's effect secured.
String.Dest: 我本来希望你选个更高调的目标，但事情已成定局，效果已有保证。

String.Source: Even with Vyrthur gone and the Inner Sanctum destroyed, my duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auri-El remains.
String.Dest: 即使维苏尔已死、内殿被毁，我身为奥瑞-艾尔圣骑士的职责依然存在。

String.Source: Figures I'd be woken by a couple of know-nothings. So where are we off to, now?
String.Dest: 我就知道我会被一些一问三不知的人弄醒。所以现在我们要去哪里？

String.Source: You give me freedom from the enslavement of the Ideal Masters. Thank you.
String.Dest: 你让我从理想之主的奴役中解脱出来，感谢你。

String.Source: You need something? I am happy to help, if I can.
String.Dest: 需要什么吗？我很乐意帮忙，能帮的话。

String.Source: What did you want?
But be warned. The Jarl's guards are unaware of the threat, and will treat violence against this "advisor" as a crime.
String.Dest: 但请注意，领主的卫兵们没有意识到威胁，还会把针对“顾问”的暴力行为视为犯罪。

String.Source: Idiot. You didn't really think I'd let you walk out of here either, did you? Vingalmo wants you both dead.
String.Dest: 白痴。你不会真以为我会让你离开这里吧？文嘉莫想让你俩都去死。

String.Source: We need to put a damper on their efforts and give those trouble makers something to worry about other than harassing our interests.
String.Dest: 我们得抑制他们的努力，让那些麻烦人物担心，而不是骚扰我们的利益。

String.Source: Put her mind to rest, allay her fear through vampiric seduction and when she is in a pliant condition, embrace her and bite her on the neck.
String.Dest: 让她思维放松，以吸血鬼的诱惑来减轻她的恐惧，当处于顺从状态时，拥抱并咬她的脖子。

String.Source: There's only one thing left to do. We have to prove this actually works. That this is the real Aetherium Forge.
String.Dest: 只剩一件事情了，我们要证明这里就是真正的神光水晶锻炉。

String.Source: Can't say I'm surprised.
Of course he did.
I discovered too late that the Ideal Masters favor deception over honor and had no intention of releasing me from my binding.
String.Dest: 理想之主们热衷欺骗，毫无信誉，根本无意解除束缚，可惜我发现太晚了。

String.Source: I don't know. Coming from a place like this, well... it's not really me. I hope you can believe that.
String.Dest: 我不确定。来到这么个地方，嗯……这不是真正的我。我希望你能相信我说的。

String.Source: Minutes? Hours? Years? I can't even begin to guess. I suggest we don't wait around to find out.
String.Dest: 几分钟？几小时？几年？我不清楚。咱们不能干等着。

String.Source: We still have to find the Forge itself. I had a lead on that, too.
String.Dest: 我们还是要找到锻炉本身，那里我也有一个线索。

String.Source: We'll stop these monsters. We have to; we're the only ones who can.
String.Dest: 我们会阻止这些怪物，必须这么做，也只有我们能做到。

String.Source: I'm sorry, I'm not about to do that without at least a single gyro to show for my efforts.
String.Dest: 抱歉，如果没有一个陀螺仪来证明我的心血，我是不会走的。

String.Source: Serana has sacrificed everything to prevent Harkon from completing the prophecy. I would have expected her to explain that to you.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜牺牲了一切阻止哈孔完成预言。我还指望她已经跟你说过了。

String.Source: There are five in total, spread far apart across the Chantry.
String.Dest: 总计五个，分散在神殿各处。

String.Source: I wasn't sure you'd come back for me. I'm still looking for a guide to get me home. What do you say?
String.Dest: 我不确定你会不会回来找我，还在找一个向导带我回家呢，怎么样？

String.Source: We can't give up. There's no one else to stand against these monsters.
String.Dest: 我们不能放弃，没人能对抗这些怪物了。

String.Source: If you believe that, then you're a bigger fool than I originally suspected. Don't you think I weighed that option before I enacted my plans?
String.Dest: 如果你真这么打算，那你比我原来想得还要笨。难道我在实施计划前没考虑过吗？

String.Source: Isran? Wants me?
And then you get to the real danger. We can discuss that when the time comes. If it comes.
String.Dest: 然后才是真正的危险，如果遇到了的话，到时候我们再讨论。

String.Source: I fear for what is to come.
It's... it's true. It's all true! Come on, let's check it out!
String.Dest: 这是……是真的。都是真的！来吧，我们来看看！

String.Source: It's good to see you again.
Arkay is so hard to understand when it comes to life and death. Is he still alive? There's always hope...
String.Dest: 阿尔凯在谈及生死时很难理解。他还活着吗？总有希望……

String.Source: I studied with the Faculty of Chirurgeons in Cloudrest. I walked with the Hollow-Faced Men of Nohotogrha for three years.
String.Dest: 我以前在云息城的外科塑型师学院，跟随无面人诺霍塔格拉学了三年。

String.Source: Let's see what you've got there.
String.Dest: 我们来看看你带了些什么。

String.Source: When it comes to vampires, if you're sloppy or careless, you're dead. And good people will die because of you.
String.Dest: 面对吸血鬼切勿大意，不然就是害人害己。

String.Source: I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard, then. Don't worry, Arkay will show me the way.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫堡垒再会。别担心，阿尔凯会给我指路。

String.Source: Just be sure to keep your eyes open and your guard up.
String.Dest: 你一定得睁大眼睛，提高警惕。

String.Source: Hear now the second word of Soul Tearing: "Vaaz"- meaning to tear your enemy's soul from its living vessel.
String.Dest: 现在听好灵魂撕裂的第二个词：“瓦兹”——意为从敌人的生命容器中撕裂灵魂。

String.Source: The wizards know about all kinds of things that people probably shouldn't know about.
String.Dest: 巫师知道很多不为人知的事情。

String.Source: Ronthil, where is the last batch of alchemy ingredients I asked you for?
String.Dest: 隆席尔，我问你要的最后一批炼金材料在哪儿？

String.Source: The air here... it feels different. Almost like...
String.Dest: 这里的空气……不太对劲，就像是……

String.Source: Well, this isn't exactly a palace, is it? Still, it's sturdy, secure, and seems defensible.
String.Dest: 嗯，这也算不上什么宫殿，是吧？尽管如此它还是坚固，安全，似乎足以据守的。

String.Source: Are we ready then?
And I suppose you're the one Tolan says is actually doing something about this mess.
String.Dest: 我想你就是托兰说的那个真正在为这烂摊子做些什么的人。

String.Source: I guess you'll never get to find out.
String.Dest: 我想你永远都别想找到答案。

String.Source: In the meantime, don't make me regret my sudden outburst of tolerance and generosity, because if you do, your friend here is going to pay for it.
String.Dest: 还有，别让我后悔突然对你这么仁慈，不然的话，你的朋友就得跟着倒霉了。

String.Source: Our friend here has been ordered to fill the Chalice.
String.Dest: 我们的朋友得到了填充圣杯的命令。

String.Source: I warned them. I knew something like this would happen eventually. But they didn't listen, and look where it's gotten them.
String.Dest: 我警告过他们，我知道迟早会出这种事。但他们不听，看看他们的下场吧。

String.Source: You're back, good! So, what happened?
String.Dest: 你回来了，很好。所以，发生了什么？

String.Source: If we had the crests, we wouldn't have to keep hanging around this lovely place.
String.Dest: 要是有了这些纹样，我们就不用一直在这“好”地方打转了。

String.Source: You never disappoint. What've you got there?
String.Dest: 你从我不让我失望，带什么回来了？

String.Source: It is the greatest token we can bestow upon those we love and wish to see protected.
String.Dest: 这是我们能送给所爱之人、想保护的人最好的信物。

String.Source: What are you still doing here?
But I'm not just going to abandon what I've been working on here. It's too useful. I need at least one intact dwarven gyro.
String.Dest: 但我不能直接放弃在这里干的活儿，它们很有用。我至少得有一个完整的矮人陀螺仪。

String.Source: If you want the Elder Scroll, it's yours.
String.Dest: 如果你想要上古卷轴的话，给你。

String.Source: And what do you plan to do with it? Do you even know what you're asking about?
String.Dest: 你计划对它做什么呢？你知道你在问什么吗？

String.Source: You're going to go kill a Dawnguard spy.
String.Dest: 你得去杀一个黎明守卫间谍。

String.Source: Good. Maybe now they'll afford the vampire threat a tad bit more respect, eh?
String.Dest: 干得好。也许现在他们会多关注一下吸血鬼的威胁，是吧？

String.Source: Arkay's been watching over me for years now. He says he's not too sure about you yet, though.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯已经观察我多年了，但他说对你还不是很了解。

String.Source: Fine, fine! I can't afford to forget about this work, though. Some very interesting applications.
String.Dest: 好吧好吧！但我忘不了这项工作。一些非常有趣的应用。

String.Source: This is fine for now, but we can't stay holed up here forever.
String.Dest: 现在还好，但我们不能永远躲在这里。

String.Source: I assumed you were here to see me about your face. To have it sculpted into something more... artful than Nature has bestowed upon you.
String.Dest: 我猜你是为了你的脸来找我的，来把它雕刻成……比自然赋予你的更巧妙的样子。

String.Source: My life's work. Unraveling one of the great mysteries of the dwarves.
String.Dest: 这是我毕生的事业，解开矮人最伟大的谜团之一。

String.Source: Excuse me, but I must address the court.
String.Dest: 抱歉，不过我必须得跟宫廷说一声。

String.Source: Be careful, and keep my daughter safe.
I keep the forge running day and night in case you need anything.
String.Dest: 我让锻炉日夜保持运转，没准您有所需求呢。

String.Source: If I'm reading this right, there's a formula here that should give us safe passage into the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 如果我没理解错的话，这里这个配方应该能给我们创造出安全进入灵魂石冢的通道。

String.Source: Now, this Chalice needs to be filled directly from the bloodspring that is the source of Redwater Den. But that's not enough.
String.Dest: 这个圣杯需要直接从红水窝点的源头，血泉中注水。但这还不够。

String.Source: Heard they're reforming the Dawnguard. Vampire hunters or something, in the old fort near Riften. Might consider joining up myself.
String.Dest: 听说他们在重建黎明守卫。在裂谷城附近的旧堡垒，是吸血鬼猎人或者什么的。我自己也会考虑考虑入伙的。

String.Source: At first you may pity the thin-bloods. But after disposing of a few, you realize they aren't worth the worry.
String.Dest: 一开始你可能会怜悯那些瘦血之人。但处理了几个后，你会意识到他们不值得担心。

String.Source: It's... not as shiny as I was expecting.
Hmph... maybe so. Then again, I thought I could, too.
String.Dest: 嗯……可能吧。话说回来，我也以为我可以呢。

String.Source: It was expected of her, just as it was expected of me.
String.Dest: 这是对她的期望，正如对我的期望一样。

String.Source: The items it made were so powerful they went to war over it, and the Forge was lost. Or so the story goes.
String.Dest: 它制成的物品威力巨大，以至于矮人为它开战，锻炉也就失踪了，至少传说如此。

String.Source: Well, as far as I'm aware it's the only one in existence.
String.Dest: 嗯，据我所知这是现存的唯一月晷。

String.Source: Like the best of friends. I would never hesitate to share anything with her.
String.Dest: 就像最好的朋友一样。我想都不会想就会跟她分享一切。

String.Source: I'm afraid I won't be able to help you with the scrolls any longer, milord.
String.Dest: 恐怕我在卷轴的事上帮不上忙了，大人。

String.Source: Beyond that... well, maybe one of our predecessors still has a clue.
String.Dest: 除此以外……嗯，也许某位前辈还有线索。

String.Source: My traitor wife stole one of them away and then disappeared.
String.Dest: 我那叛徒妻子偷了一幅然后失踪了。

String.Source: You have kept your side of the bargain, now let me fulfill mine.
String.Dest: 你已经履行了你的承诺，现在该我了。

String.Source: Well, your loss...
Ah, yes, the Elder Scroll! I admit, I'm looking forward to this.
String.Dest: 啊是的，上古卷轴！我承认我很期待。

String.Source: I've scrounged up a few things. Here, please, take a look.
String.Dest: 我找到了一些东西。在这儿，请看。

String.Source: You're here because we're abominations in your mind. Evil creatures that need to be destroyed.
String.Dest: 你来到这里是因为你对我们深恶痛绝。觉得我们只是应该被消灭的邪恶生物。

String.Source: My family's home is west of Solitude. If you help me get back there, they'll be grateful to you.
String.Dest: 我家在独孤城西边。如果你能帮我回到那里，我的家人会感谢你的。

String.Source: By the divines! It's as if my eyes have been opened! I am blinded by the light of your majesty. I... I must obey you.
String.Dest: 圣灵在上！我的眼睛就像是被解封了！我被大人您的光芒蒙蔽了双眼。我……我必须服从您。

String.Source: Don't just stand there! Come on!
For the first time in a long while, I think I - we - may actually be able to do this. And... and I owe it all to you. Thank you.
String.Dest: 很长一段时间以来，我头一次觉得——我们——可能真的能办成这件事。还有……这是我欠你的，多谢。

String.Source: Present yourself to Lord Harkon at once.
The Ideal Masters assured me that my powers would be unmatched, that I could raise legions of the undead.
String.Dest: 理想之主向我保证，我的力量将无人可敌，能够召集亡灵军团。

String.Source: Ugh, saying it out loud makes it sound so... common. "Little girl who doesn't get along with her father." Read that story a hundred times.
String.Dest: 啊，讲出来听上去就很……寻常。“跟父亲关系不好的小女孩”，这种故事都读过上百遍了。

String.Source: You're already as good as I am. There's nothing you can learn from me.
String.Dest: 你已经和我一样优秀了，从我这里学不到什么。

String.Source: The scroll you found with Serana is one of those scrolls of prophecy. Now that it is back within my grasp, we can read the scroll and learn more.
String.Dest: 你发现的和瑟拉娜在一起的卷轴就是记载了预言的卷轴之一。如今它又回到我的掌控中了，我们可以阅读上古卷轴，了解更多信息了。

String.Source: The only way I'd even consider returning to Tamriel was if Harkon were not only to fail, but to be destroyed.
String.Dest: 不能只是失败，只有哈孔身死，我才能考虑返回泰姆瑞尔。

String.Source: Alright. Now take note. He'll mind you and us Dawnguard, but there's no accounting for other folk.
String.Dest: 好啊，记住了，他会在意你还有我们黎明守卫，但其他人就不考虑了。

String.Source: As well you should have.
Gaaahh...
Why, are you interested in my services? I warn you, my skills do not come cheaply.
String.Dest: 为什么，你对我的服务感兴趣吗？先说清楚，我的技术可不便宜。

String.Source: In his eyes, she'd be dying for the good of all vampires.
String.Dest: 在他看来，她应该为了全体吸血鬼的利益去死。

String.Source: You give the Ideal Masters souls, they give you powers to summon the undead. It's all very business-like.
String.Dest: 你给理想之主灵魂，它们给你召唤亡灵的力量。就像是做生意一样。

String.Source: So how has it come to pass that a vampire hunter is in the company of my daughter?
String.Dest: 那么一个吸血鬼猎人怎么会和我女儿在一起呢？

String.Source: When I entered the Soul Cairn, I had intended to strike a bargain with the Ideal Masters, the custodians of this place.
String.Dest: 当我进入灵魂石冢时，我本来是打算跟管理此地的理想之主讨价还价的。

String.Source: You already know as much as I do. And that's a compliment.
String.Dest: 你知道的已经和我一样多了，这是我的致意。

String.Source: Put her mind to rest, allay her fear through vampiric seduction and when she is in a pliant condition, embrace her and bite her on the neck.
String.Dest: 让她思维放松，以吸血鬼的诱惑来减轻她的恐惧，当处于顺从状态时，拥抱并咬她的脖子。

String.Source: I see you have returned. Lord Harkon will be pleased.
String.Dest: 看到你回来了，哈孔大人会很高兴的。

String.Source: Die!
The prophecy tells of a time in which vampires will gain power over the sun, and will no longer fear its tyranny.
String.Dest: 这预言说，吸血鬼将会得到控制太阳的力量，不再惧怕它的暴政。

String.Source: I have never understood the Nord fascination with weapons. Magic is so much more versatile, don't you think?
String.Dest: 从来理解不了诺德人对武器的痴迷，魔法用途更广，你不觉得吗？

String.Source: Vampires?
Because he himself bestowed upon you a portion of his vitality when he infused you with his own blood the night you returned with Serana.
String.Dest: 因为在你带瑟拉娜回来的那晚，他给你注入自身血液的同时，也赐予了你一部分活力。

String.Source: A bunch of feral vampires are running wild, upsetting the mortals.
String.Dest: 一群野蛮的吸血鬼四处游荡，招惹了凡人。

String.Source: I think we both know... it's time to face my father.
String.Dest: 我想我们都知道……该面对我父亲了。

String.Source: Always good to have a backup plan, in case the claws and teeth aren't enough.
String.Dest: 有个备用计划总是好的，以防爪子和牙齿不够用。

String.Source: My mother spent a lot of time trying to contact them directly, to travel to the Soul Cairn itself.
String.Dest: 我母亲花了很长时间，试着直接跟它们交流并进入灵魂石冢。

String.Source: It wasn't always like this. Best-preserved dwarven city I'd ever laid eyes on. And then... the earthquake hit.
String.Dest: 这种情况只是偶然。这是我见过的保存最完好的矮人城市。后来……来了地震。

String.Source: Ah, so that was a Moth Priest, then?
String.Dest: 啊，所以那就是蛾祭司了吧？

String.Source: Half the people in your little crew would just as soon kill me as talk to me.
String.Dest: 你们小队里还有一半的人只会在杀我的时候跟我说句话。

String.Source: Listener! Fancy seeing you out here.
String.Dest: 聆听者！想不到在这里能撞见你！

String.Source: It had to be one of us, and, well, she's so much more powerful than I am. It just made sense for her to be out here.
String.Dest: 肯定是我们中的一个人，嗯，她比我强得多，留在外面合情合理。

String.Source: Just look around, will you?
Of course I'm delighted to see you, my daughter. Must I really say the words aloud?
String.Dest: 见到你当然高兴了，我的女儿。这些话一定要大声说出来吗？

String.Source: You could always go back and get my journal, you know.
String.Dest: 随时可以回去拿我的日记，知道吗。

String.Source: I must rest now. The reading has made me weary.
String.Dest: 我是得歇歇。阅读卷轴太累了。

String.Source: Hey! Journal?
She persuaded an elven artisan to make some improvements. You can see the plates that show the phases of the moons, Masser and Secunda.
String.Dest: 她说服一个精灵工匠做了一些改进，你可以看到显示双月进程的板块，马瑟尔和瑟坤达。

String.Source: You know what this is? It's a lock. A 'Tonal Lock'. Simple, and very, very deadly.
String.Dest: 知道这是什么吗？这是一把锁，“音调锁”。简单而且非常、非常致命。

String.Source: It's no Warmaiden's, but I've got a decent supply.
String.Dest: 虽然不是战争少女打造的，但我这里供应充足。
