String.Source: Be on your guard at all times. Avoid sleep if you can... Sleep is for the weak.
String.Dest: 时刻保持警惕。能不睡就别睡了……只有弱者才需要睡觉。

String.Source: I may not have potions to block the sun, but I do have nearly everything else.
String.Dest: 我可能没有防晒药水，但除了这个几乎都有。

String.Source: Hard to say. Maybe if we found the missing crests, we could figure it out.
String.Dest: 很难说，也许等我们找到了缺失的纹样，就知道了。

String.Source: Have I heard anything? It was the talk of the city for three days straight.
String.Dest: 我有没有听说过？这三天来城里净传这事了。

String.Source: All right, look. I'll consider it, but I can't just leave this bear to prey on more innocent people.
String.Dest: 好吧，听着。我会考虑，但不能放这头熊去猎杀更多无辜之人。

String.Source: As you can see from my bandages, it's not that I'm unwilling, it's that I'm physically unable.
String.Dest: 您可以从我的绷带上看到，不是我不愿意，而是我的身体不行了。

String.Source: Something has shifted in the moons, brother.
There are people I've met and worked with over the years. We need their skills, their talents, if we're going to survive this.
String.Dest: 这些年来我遇到过一些人，也和他们共事过。如果我们要渡过难关，需要他们的技术与才能。

String.Source: A Moth Priest? What in Oblivion do you need a Moth Priest for?
String.Dest: 蛾祭司？你找蛾祭司做什么？

String.Source: Besides, I can't imagine a single place my father would avoid looking. And he's had all this time, too.
String.Dest: 再说，我也想不到有哪个地方我父亲没找过了，他有这么长的时间。

String.Source: Now you're beginning to see why I wanted to protect Serana, and why I've kept the other Elder Scroll as far from her as possible.
String.Dest: 现在你明白我为什么要保护瑟拉娜，以及为什么我要让另一部卷轴尽可能离她越远越好了吧。

String.Source: Home? Well, where is that? Some dusty crypt or frigid cave?
String.Dest: 家？嗯，在哪里？什么脏兮兮的地穴或是冷冰冰的洞穴吗？

String.Source: You've nothing to fear from me. Please, we have much to discuss.
String.Dest: 你不用怕我。拜托了，我们有很多事要谈。

String.Source: Forgive my astonishment, but I never thought I'd witness the death of that dragon.
String.Dest: 请原谅我的惊讶，但我从没想过会亲眼目睹那条龙的死亡。

String.Source: A small measure of his blood now and forever flows through your veins.
String.Dest: 你的血管里永远流着他的部分血液。

String.Source: Got a pretty full stock of potions and alchemy reagents.
String.Dest: 这里有很多药水和炼金原料。

String.Source: That was the plan, yes. Assuming the rest of them can trust a vampire. Come on, I'll need you to help convince them.
String.Dest: 计划就是那样，没错。只要他们能相信一个吸血鬼的话。来吧，我需要你帮我劝劝他们。

String.Source: Return to me when your part is done.
String.Dest: 完成你的任务后就回来找我。

String.Source: He doesn't know we're here. I don't have time to explain.
String.Dest: 他不知道我们来这里了。我没时间解释。

String.Source: Free? No. I have been here too long, Qahnaarin.
String.Dest: 自由？不，我在这里呆的太久了，夸纳林。

String.Source: It is the greatest token we can bestow upon those we love and wish to see protected.
String.Dest: 这是我们能送给所爱之人、想保护的人最好的信物。

String.Source: But we have to stop him. Before he goes too far. And to do that, we need the Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 不过我们得阻止他，在一切不可挽回之前。我们需要上古卷轴才能做到这一点。

String.Source: It's a long story.
She was practically smirking as we left home. Almost like she was proud of herself.
String.Dest: 当我们离家出走时，她几乎在傻笑，就像是为自己感到骄傲一样。

String.Source: An impressive display, but a wasted effort. You delay nothing but your own deaths!
String.Dest: 你们的表演很精彩，但还是白费力气，不过是拖延自己的死期罢了！

String.Source: I knew it! I knew Arkay would save me. I asked for help, and he sent you!
String.Dest: 我就知道！我知道阿尔凯会救我的。我请求帮助，他就派你来了！

String.Source: I like what Isran has done with the place. It's good to see someone else who's really prepared.
String.Dest: 伊士冉把这地方打理得很不错。有人真正做好了准备的感觉真不错。

String.Source: And yet, I have fallen so low that I must justify myself to a wanderer in the sewers of this backwater of the world.
String.Dest: 然而，我却沦落到如此地步，必须在这穷乡僻壤的阴沟里向一个流浪者证明自己。

String.Source: No, I just... I thought perhaps...
There's only one thing worth remembering.
It's important, so please just listen before your friend, here, loses his patience.
String.Dest: 这很重要，所以在你那位朋友觉得不耐烦之前，好好听着。

String.Source: Here's where I fell. Feels like ages ago.
String.Dest: 这就是我掉下来的地方，像是几个世纪之久了。

String.Source: Even in the Soul Cairn, the defeat of the World Eater has reached my ears, Dovahkiin.
String.Dest: 即便是在灵魂石冢，世界吞噬者的战败之讯也已传到了我的耳中。

String.Source: I find your choice of words quite interesting considering that Serana is in far more danger now than she was following my "foolish plan."
String.Dest: 你这话可真有意思，比起遵照我的“愚蠢计划”，瑟拉娜现在的处境才更加危险。

String.Source: That is... I don't think we'll actually trip over her there. But it's worth a look.
String.Dest: 只不过……咱们应该碰不上她。试试看吧。

String.Source: That something... was probably me.
I fear that my time here has taken its toll upon me. I share a bond with this dreaded place.
String.Dest: 恐怕是因为我长期驻留，与这恐怖之地建立了某种联系。

String.Source: Vampires? Really?
No! I will not allow that happen. The Elder Scrolls only tell of events that might be, not events that will be.
String.Dest: 不是！我不会让它发生的。上古卷轴只会记载可能发生的事情，而不是将会发生的事情。

String.Source: The vampires will show us no mercy. They've proven that.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼不会对我们手下留情，他们证明过了。

String.Source: Well, let's move then. I'm nothing if not persuasive.
String.Dest: 嗯，那让我们继续吧。如果没什么说服力的话，我的努力就白费了。

String.Source: I'm sorry, my friend. I can no longer be of use in this matter.
String.Dest: 抱歉朋友，我在这件事上帮不上忙了。

String.Source: Take the scroll, then be on your way.
String.Dest: 拿着上古卷轴，然后你该上路了。

String.Source: As you know, vampires are powerful, but we have limits. Our great enemy is the sun, and until recently it's an enemy we've had no way to fight.
String.Dest: 如你所知，吸血鬼是很强大，但是我们也有极限。我们最大的敌人就是太阳，它一直是我们无法解决的敌人。

String.Source: This is true, but my techniques only work on the living. You've chosen a different path to remake yourself.
String.Dest: 这是事实，但我的技术只为谋生。你已经选择了一条不同的路来重塑你自己。

String.Source: Knowing him, anything at all that reminded him of her was just destroyed.
String.Dest: 据我对他的了解，所有让他想起我母亲的东西都会被毁掉。

String.Source: By forging something, of course!
String.Dest: 当然是锻造一个东西了！

String.Source: What do you need? Blades, armor, smithing materials?
String.Dest: 你需要什么？刀剑，盔甲，锻造材料？

String.Source: I'm sorry, I had heard there were vampire hunters here. I thought they might want to know about a vampire plot to enslave the rest of the world.
String.Dest: 抱歉啊，可是我听说这里有吸血鬼猎人。我觉得他们也许想了解了解吸血鬼企图统治世界的阴谋。

String.Source: Well, some necromancers believe they are the crystalline structures dotting the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 嗯，有些死灵法师相信它们就是点缀在灵魂石冢的水晶体。

String.Source: Hold it right there.
I thought I'd be able to allay the after effects, but I was wrong. Now I'm paying for it.
String.Dest: 我以为能减轻后遗症，但我错了。现在只能承受代价了。

String.Source: I suppose you could call this the ultimate waiting game, each watching the other to see which will give in.
String.Dest: 你可以管这叫终极等待游戏，看着哪一方会先投降。

String.Source: You know where to find me if you need more.
String.Dest: 还需要的话，知道上哪儿找我吧。

String.Source: All I wanted is for us to be a family again... for things to return to the way they were before.
String.Dest: 我想过的全是让我们重新组成一个家……让一切都变回老样子。

String.Source: Even with all my preparations, we can't be too careful. The monsters could strike at us at any moment.
String.Dest: 即使我做了那么多准备，我们也得小心。怪物随时都可能袭击我们。

String.Source: Just know that... whatever path you choose, I won't think any less of you. Sometimes things just have to be done.
String.Dest: 你要知道……不管你怎么选，我都不会看不起你。有时候事情必须得做个了结。

String.Source: Then you will be prey, like all mortals. I will spare your life this once, but you will be banished from this hall.
String.Dest: 那么你就跟其他凡人一样，成为猎物。我这次姑且先饶你一命，不过我会把你从这座大厅驱逐出去。

String.Source: Take good care of it for me.
Incredible. Simply incredible.
And from what I could tell, a thousand extra years of obsession haven't made him any better. We should have found him a hobby.
String.Dest: 就我所知，一千年的时间并没让他有所好转。我们应该给他找个爱好的。

String.Source: She worried about me. About all of us. But she wanted to get me as far away from my father as possible before he really went over the edge.
String.Dest: 她很关心我，还有我们所有人。但她想在我父亲彻底崩溃前，带我离他越远越好。

String.Source: Yes?
You don't scare me.
I'm sorry. I wish I knew a better way, something that would be easier for you.
String.Dest: 抱歉。我也希望我知道更好的法子，对你来说更容易接受的那种。

String.Source: As you wish.
You're lucky to be alive, then. I'm guessing you don't have a plan for where to go next, then?
String.Dest: 那你没有死可真是走运。那么我猜你没有计划好接下来要去哪里吧？

String.Source: Who sent you?
By the blood of my ancestors...
What? No, no. Yes, I see. All right.
String.Dest: 什么？不，没有。是的，我明白。好吧。

String.Source: I find it hard to believe he's changed his mind. He said some very hurtful things to me before I left.
String.Dest: 很难相信他会改变主意。我离开前他说了些很伤人的话。

String.Source: ...this is where I ended up. It was... quite the fall.
String.Dest: ……这就是我最后的归宿，还真是……摔得够惨。

String.Source: Hsss
Falmer up ahead.
Gaan...
What the... get back! Hurry!
Please, make use of my coffin whenever the need arises.
String.Dest: 请吧，有需要就用我的棺材吧。

String.Source: Oh, very well. I don't know how you expect me to keep this place in order when I can't make a profit.
String.Dest: 哦，好吧。要是我赚不到钱，你又怎么指望我把这里收拾好呢。

String.Source: Gah...
That's what he's after. He wants to control the sun, have vampires control the world.
String.Dest: 那就是他想要的。他想控制太阳，让吸血鬼控制世界。

String.Source: Something has shifted in the moons, sister.
The obvious answer is to go to the Imperial City. The Moth Priests make their home in the White Gold Tower.
String.Dest: 当然是去帝都了。蛾祭司们就住在白金塔里。

String.Source: Any other ideas?
Caves? Oh, no. The Chantry encompasses far more than a few caves, as you'll soon discover.
String.Dest: 洞穴？哦不。神殿包括的远不止几个洞穴，你很快就知道了。

String.Source: Keep watch for Durnehviir. With the prison's barrier down, he's almost certain to investigate.
String.Dest: 当心杜耐维尔，监狱的屏障被破除，他肯定会来调查。

String.Source: And you'd do well to be more careful of whom you engage in witty banter.
String.Dest: 而你最好小心点在跟谁开玩笑。

String.Source: Volumes written on Durnehviir allege that he can't be slain by normal means. It appears they were mistaken.
String.Dest: 关于杜耐维尔的书卷记载，正常手段杀不死他。看来记载有误。

String.Source: A handful of soul gem shards, some finely-ground bone meal, a good bit of purified void salts...
String.Dest: 一小把灵魂石碎片，一些磨细的骨粉，一点纯净的虚无盐……

String.Source: My name is Serana. Were you... sent to wake me?
String.Dest: 我是瑟拉娜。是有人……派你来唤醒我的吗？

String.Source: Oh, I'm sure I have something you'll find useful.
String.Dest: 哦，我肯定有些对你有用的东西。

String.Source: He stopped in to do some research in the library, then left for Dragon Bridge. If you hurry, you might catch him there.
String.Dest: 他停下来在图书馆里做了些调查，然后奔龙桥去了。如果你动作快点的话，没准能在那里追上他。

String.Source: These vampires claimed they had some purpose in store for me, but they wouldn't say what. Probably hoping to ransom me, the fools.
String.Dest: 这些吸血鬼说我有些价值，但又不愿细说。可能是想勒索我，一群傻瓜。

String.Source: Go ahead, give it a try.
I... I can't really tell.
Don't worry, I'm not in any danger or anything like that. It'll just be more unpleasant to run into my father.
String.Dest: 别担心，我很安全。就是碰见我父亲不会太愉快罢了。

String.Source: I... I feel... different. What happened?
String.Dest: 我……我觉得……有些不一样了。发生了什么？

String.Source: I merely wish to respectfully ask a favor of you.
String.Dest: 只是想恭敬地请你帮个忙。

String.Source: Forgive me, my instinct was to grant you this title. I am uncertain why. Perhaps one day it will become clear to both of us.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我的本能让我授予你这个头衔，我也不知道为什么，或许某天我们都会明白。

String.Source: So, it is real...
I feel terrible for the dead who end up here for eternity. Seems awful. Like they're still suffering.
String.Dest: 我为那些永远死在这里的人难过，看上去很糟糕，就像还在继续受苦一样。

String.Source: Are you alright? That looked painful.
String.Dest: 你还好吗？你看起来很难受。

String.Source: The sooner we get the scroll home, the sooner we deal with my father.
String.Dest: 我们越早把卷轴拿回去，就能越早对付我父亲。

String.Source: I knew it would come to this one day. I knew, and no one believed.
String.Dest: 我知道这天会来的。早就知道了，但没人相信。

String.Source: For countless years I've roamed the Soul Cairn, in unintended service to the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: 我在灵魂石冢漫游了无数岁月，一直被迫为理想之主们服务。

String.Source: Sorry, what?
Arkay has some grave news, friend.
String.Dest: 朋友，阿尔凯有些坏消息。

String.Source: I see. Where are you taking me, then? Is that much my business?
String.Dest: 我知道了。那么你要带我去哪里？这总该关我的事了吧？

String.Source: My love! I knew you'd come for me! I just knew it!
String.Dest: 亲爱的！我就知道你会来救我！我就知道！

String.Source: What I can't figure out is why she said it that way.
String.Dest: 我就是搞不懂她为什么用这种方式说那句话。

String.Source: His own little fortress. Well, I guess I'll get to see what he's been up to all this time.
String.Dest: 他自己的小堡垒。好吧，我看可以去看看他这些日子到底在忙些什么。

String.Source: Surprised you weren't at the last meeting with our Lord, Vingalmo. Too busy plotting to overthrow him to show up?
String.Dest: 上次主人开会你居然没来，文嘉莫。为了密谋推翻他，忙得没空露面是吧？

String.Source: Well, well. Where've you been, Vingalmo? Nose stuck in a book all day?
String.Dest: 嘿，上哪儿去了文嘉莫？又把鼻尖埋到书里一整天了吗？

String.Source: You see the Tyranny of the Sun as your chance at deification, and like Harkon you won't hesitate to destroy anything that stands in your path.
String.Dest: 你把太阳暴政视为神化自己的机会，就跟哈孔一样，你会毫不犹豫地摧毁任何挡路者。

String.Source: Well, back before I... you know. The College of Winterhold was the first place I'd think to go for any kind of magic or historical thing.
String.Dest: 嗯，之前在我……你懂的。如果我想找跟魔法或者历史相关的东西，我第一个想到的就是冬堡学院。

String.Source: You haven't seen a sack full of dwarven gyros lying around, have you? I'd swear I left it right here.
String.Dest: 你看到放在附近的满满一袋矮人陀螺仪了吗？我发誓我刚刚就放在这儿的。

String.Source: Well, well. He wants the Chalice, then.
String.Dest: 好吧好吧。看来，他想要圣杯了。

String.Source: Hsss
In the unlikely event that I ever require you for some reason, I shall find you. Until then I see no reason for us to be speaking.
String.Dest: 万一有什么事需要你，我自会找你。在那之前，我看我们没必要谈话。

String.Source: Maybe.
This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known him than you've done in centuries!
String.Dest: 这个“陌生人”在我认识他的短短时间里为我做的比你几个世纪以来做的还要多！

String.Source: Questions? I expected as much.
String.Dest: 有什么问题吗？我等着你开口呢。

String.Source: Once it's dealt with, then perhaps I'll see what Isran expects of me.
String.Dest: 等这里的事解决，也许我会去看看伊士冉有什么打算。

String.Source: That was... not as useful as I would have liked. Even so, you did well.
String.Dest: 这……没我想得那么有用。即便如此，你干得不错。

String.Source: I'll take this one back to the castle.
Get the ingredients in the vessel and let me know when you're ready.
String.Dest: 把材料放进容器里，准备好了就告诉我。

String.Source: Very good. Should you visit him again, I suspect you'll find our new sibling appreciates his transformation.
String.Dest: 非常好，如果你再去拜访他，我想你会发现我们这位新兄弟会很感激他的转化。

String.Source: Destroying the head vampire is usually sufficient to scatter its minions, though it's best to destroy every last one of them.
String.Dest: 干掉吸血鬼首领足以驱散他的仆从，当然最好是全部干掉。

String.Source: This stranger aligns himself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to him?
String.Dest: 这个陌生人和那些把你当成野兽一样追捕猎杀的人站在一边，我却还要把你托付给他？

String.Source: Indeed. She's off to Redwater Den.
I've been asking myself the same thing since we came back to the castle.
String.Dest: 自从我回到城堡后，我就一直问自己同样的问题。

String.Source: May I strongly suggest that you make a visit to this spouse of yours and "invite" her to the family by offering her Harkon's Gift.
String.Dest: 我强烈建议你去见下你的配偶，用哈孔的礼物“邀请”她到我们这个大家庭中来。

String.Source: Focus on the dragon!
Hmm, I suppose I can work with your face. After all, the sculptor cannot always choose the finest clay.
String.Dest: 嗯，看来我能处理你的脸。毕竟雕刻师也不能总是挑最好的粘土。

String.Source: I've located the petrified remains of an elder vampire. Bring them to me, and I should be able to extend the effects granted by the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 我定位了一个老吸血鬼的石化残骸。把它们带给我，就能延长血石圣杯的功效。

String.Source: Oh, and I suppose now he remembers that I proposed no less than three different scenarios that involved vampires overrunning the population.
String.Dest: 哦，我猜现在他想起来了我提出了至少三个与吸血鬼肆虐人间有关的设想。

String.Source: Hsss...Hsss
Though there's plenty more where he came from. Be ever watchful.
String.Dest: 不过老巢里还多的是，保持警惕。

String.Source: I guess so.
That was my theory, you know. My research. My life's work. All of it, lost! Stolen by my own damn apprentice!
String.Dest: 这是我的理论，知道吗。我的研究，我毕生的事业，全丢了！被我那该死的徒弟偷走了！

String.Source: Why, you would be distraught with emotion, perhaps even to the point of questioning your loyalty to this Court. And we ours to you.
String.Dest: 何必呢，你可能会情绪激动，甚至会质疑自己对宫廷的忠诚，还有我们对你的忠诚。

String.Source: And what's this thing?
It's not a question of trust... he's just obsessed with the prophecy.
String.Dest: 这与信任无关……他就是对那预言很痴迷。

String.Source: They didn't stop to visit, though. They rode through town heading south, and went across the big bridge.
String.Dest: 不过他们没停下来。他们坐车穿过镇子奔南，还跨过了大桥。

String.Source: Very well. I'll hurry on my way there before more of those vampires turn up.
String.Dest: 很好。我得在更多吸血鬼出现前赶紧动身。

String.Source: Track him down and dispose of him.
I'll set out at once, then.
Unless...
For centuries I searched for an answer to this problem. I found an old prophecy written by a Moth Priest, those scholars who read the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 千百年以来我一直在寻找办法解决这个问题。我发现了一则由蛾祭司书写的古老预言，这些祭司就是阅读上古卷轴的学者。

String.Source: A feral-blooded has holed up with a group of necromancers. Likely wants to create a nest of broodlings.
String.Dest: 一头野血种和一群死灵术士藏在一起，很像是要造个野血种窝。

String.Source: I saw a drawing of this once. This shard... it's... it's part of a key. A key made of pure Aetherium! The key to the Forge!
String.Dest: 我曾经看过这幅画，这碎片……是……是钥匙的一部分。一把由纯净神光水晶制成的钥匙！通往锻炉的钥匙！

String.Source: You don't scare me. Let's go.
That's the thing... what's the point of a moondial? I always wondered why she didn't just have the whole thing ripped out.
String.Dest: 这就是问题所在了……月晷有什么用？我一直在想为什么她不把这些全部拆掉。

String.Source: This one's mine!
I've located the whereabouts of a vampire masquerading as a common citizen.
String.Dest: 我发现了一个伪装成普通市民的吸血鬼。

String.Source: But for Serana's sake, I'll assist you in any way that I can.
String.Dest: 但为了瑟拉娜着想，我会尽我所能帮你。

String.Source: It's really too bad, you know. The little accident you had here, completely unexpected...
String.Dest: 真的太遗憾了，知道吧。你在这里出的小小事故，完全出乎意料。

String.Source: Put his mind to rest, allay his fear through vampiric seduction and when he is in a pliant condition, embrace him and bite him on the neck.
String.Dest: 让他思维放松，以吸血鬼的诱惑来减轻他的恐惧，当处于顺从状态时，拥抱并咬他的脖子。

String.Source: Wait, what? That's not what we agreed. We take it back together.
String.Dest: 等下，什么？我们之前说的不是这样，是一起把它带回去。

String.Source: Hsss...
Well of course they did.
Although I would gladly die by your hand, perhaps I could offer an alternative way to read the scrolls?
String.Dest: 虽然我很乐意死在您手里，或许我能提供另一种阅读卷轴的方式。

String.Source: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while her blood undergoes the change.
String.Dest: 当你给予拥抱时，要远离窥视的目光。我们新的姐妹在血液变化时可能需要休息。

String.Source: I can't guarantee you'd be free from harm. Becoming blind could be the least of your worries.
String.Dest: 我不保证你不会受伤，失明倒是最不用担心的事情。

String.Source: Your friend, kidnapped!
She had a theory about soul gems. That the souls inside of them don't just vanish when they're used... they end up in the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 她有个关于灵魂石的理论。使用时，宝石里的灵魂没有消失……而是去了灵魂石冢。

String.Source: I'm afraid in my haste to read the first scroll, I neglected the time I needed to prepare. The failure is purely mine to bear.
String.Dest: 恐怕我在匆忙阅读第一幅卷轴时，忽略了需要的准备时间。这次失败全归咎于我自己。

String.Source: It's not exactly the hospitality I'm used to, but your man Isran has seen to my needs well enough.
String.Dest: 虽然不是我习惯的待客方式，不过伊士冉已经很周全了。

String.Source: Should your husband go missing, perhaps unable to bear the thought of living with a... a monster...
String.Dest: 也许你的丈夫会因为无法忍受和……怪物一起生活的念头，逃走了呢。

String.Source: Should your blushing bride go missing, perhaps unable to bear the thought of living with a... a monster...
String.Dest: 也许你害羞的新娘会因为无法忍受和……怪物一起生活的念头，逃走了呢。

String.Source: My sincerest pardons, I but look after your own peace of mind.
String.Dest: 诚心请你原谅，我只是关心你内心的安宁罢了。

String.Source: The air, the ground... this is all wrong.
In my language, the Qahnaarin is the Vanquisher, the one who has bested a fellow dovah in battle.
String.Dest: 在我的语言中，夸纳林是征服者，是在战斗中击败了都瓦的同族。

String.Source: Now you decide to give up? Fine. I'll be here.
String.Dest: 现在决定放弃了？好吧，反正我就在这儿。

String.Source: All right. Good luck.
I believe there's more to it than that.
It's ruled by unseen beings known as the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: 被一种称为“理想之主”的不可见存在统治着。

String.Source: Go cull the brutish beasts before the problem gets out of hand.
String.Dest: 趁着问题还没失控，赶紧把这些野兽宰了吧。

String.Source: Let me see it. ...Huh...
Make it seem you are a member of the Dawnguard, thus sowing confusion among the herd. Wear this armor and plant this note on the victim.
String.Dest: 让自己看上去像是黎明守卫的一员，这样就能在牧群中制造混乱。穿上这身盔甲，把这张字条放在死者身上。

String.Source: What happened to this place?
If only such a miracle existed, I'd overcome the impossible in order to secure it if it meant pleasing you.
String.Dest: 如果真有这样的奇迹，我愿克服一切不可能来得到它。只要能取悦于您。

String.Source: Isran? My help?
The dovah roamed the skies, vying for their small slices of territory that resulted in immense and ultimately fatal battles.
String.Dest: 都瓦漫游于天空中，为了小小领土大打出手，引发了浩大、致命的战斗。

String.Source: I saw more than enough political maneuvering in my time in House Dres. I was tired of it then, and I'm tired of it now.
String.Dest: 我在德莱斯家议会目睹了太多政治操纵，当时就厌倦了，现在也一样。

String.Source: Indeed. It is no small thing to submit yourself to the flesh sculptor's knife.
String.Dest: 确实，把自己交给血肉雕刻师的刀可不是件小事。

String.Source: Fine, fine. No need to get your breeches in a twist.
String.Dest: 好吧好吧。没必要和你拧着干。

String.Source: I can't even begin to imagine how much time she spent in this room. Doesn't look too cozy.
String.Dest: 我甚至无法想象她在这个房间里待了多久，看起来是不太舒服。

String.Source: That doesn't exactly make me want to open up.
String.Dest: 这让我完全不想说这事。

String.Source: A Moth Priest? I'm sorry, but I don't know anything about that.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司？抱歉，我对此一无所知。

String.Source: The Elder Scroll is just a bit further.
I am Harkon, lord of this court.
String.Dest: 我是哈孔，这座宫廷的君主。

String.Source: It's on an island near Solitude. Hopefully we can find a boat to take us there.
String.Dest: 它在独孤城附近的一座岛上。希望我们能找到一艘船划过去。

String.Source: Do I detect a hint of reproach? I am only looking out for your best interests. And perhaps, a small measure of my own.
String.Dest: 你在责备我吗？我只是为你的利益而着想。可能还有一小部分我自己的。

String.Source: It's come to my inescapable attention that you, my dear friend, are married.
String.Dest: 我无可避免地注意到你，亲爱的朋友，你已经结婚了。

String.Source: And here we are.
Really?
Lord Harkon has never cared to use the Chalice, relying on his more than adequate powers until now.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人的力量绰绰有余，从来都不考虑使用圣杯，直到现在。

String.Source: Lord Harkon. Remember your place.
String.Dest: 是哈孔大人。记住你的地位。

String.Source: I hope I have something that interests you. I always wish to be of service.
String.Dest: 希望我有些东西能让您感兴趣，一直都希望能为您效劳。

String.Source: Anyway, I'm quite happy in my current pursuits. So if you'll excuse me...
String.Dest: 无论如何，我对现在的事业很满意。所以你不介意的话……

String.Source: Now, I believe that Lord Harkon wishes to speak with you.
String.Dest: 现在，估计哈孔大人想跟你谈谈。

String.Source: Have you been listening to me? Like Serana, I'm a pure-blooded vampire. My presence on Tamriel is as much of a danger as hers.
String.Dest: 你没听我说话吗？跟瑟拉娜一样，我是纯血吸血鬼。我出现在泰姆瑞尔比呆在这里危险得多。

String.Source: Hmmm. Not bad. We'd better hope that's good enough. Mistakes with these kinds of portals can be... gruesome.
String.Dest: 嗯。不赖啊。希望这就够了。这种传送门如果出错的话……后果挺可怕的。

String.Source: Well that's just fine. Orthjolf told me to finish off anyone who got in the way.
String.Dest: 嗯那也行。欧兹约夫让我把挡道的都杀了。

String.Source: We're just lucky I was here to return the Chalice to Vingalmo, so he could make sure Harkon gets it back.
String.Dest: 很幸运有我来把圣杯带回去给文嘉莫，这样他才能确保哈孔拿到它。

String.Source: Excellent. That's one less beast and nest of broodlings we needn't worry about any longer.
String.Dest: 很好，又少了一头野兽以及一窝幼崽要担心了。

String.Source: Change it? I can remake your face, if that's what you desire.
String.Dest: 改变？如果你想的话，我能重塑你的脸。

String.Source: And instead you found me. So what's your next step, now that I'm here?
String.Dest: 结果你却发现了我。现在既然我在这里了，你接下来打算怎么办？

String.Source: You came for me? How did you know? I thought I was going to die in here. Thank you!
String.Dest: 你怎么收到消息来救我的？我还以为要死在这了。多谢！

String.Source: You'd think a vampire would be right at home in this place. You'd be wrong. Let's just find my mother and get out of here, quickly.
String.Dest: 要是你觉得吸血鬼在这里会很舒适，那就错了。找到我妈就离开这里吧，快。

String.Source: Very good. That should, for a time, direct the people's anger towards the Dawnguard and away from us.
String.Dest: 很好。这应该会暂时把人们的愤怒引向黎明守卫而不是我们。

String.Source: I... I almost can't believe it. We did it! We actually did it!
String.Dest: 我……我都不敢相信。我们做到了！真的做到了！

String.Source: Wonderful. I'll make the necessary preparations for infusion into the Chalice presently.
String.Dest: 太棒了。我马上就去为灌注圣杯做必要的准备。

String.Source: It's pointless and vague, like all prophecies. The part he latched onto said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun.
String.Dest: 跟所有预言一样，它毫无意义又含糊不清。他死抓不放的那部分说，吸血鬼再也不用害怕太阳了。

String.Source: What is your command?
What are you waiting for? Get out there and find a moth priest!
String.Dest: 你还磨蹭什么呢？出去找蛾祭司去！

String.Source: Come now, and hear my proclamation.
Look at the device here - the gear in the center is just about the right size. Try putting the shards in and... we'll see what happens.
String.Dest: 看这个装置，中心的齿轮正好合适。试下把碎片放进去然后……看看会怎么样。

String.Source: Now that I have reclaimed one of my Elder Scrolls, we must find a Moth Priest to read it.
String.Dest: 我已经找回了一幅上古卷轴，必须找一个蛾祭司来阅读。

String.Source: Don't know how well I'd have managed by myself. You have my thanks.
String.Dest: 我一个人不知道会干成啥样，多谢你了。

String.Source: Oh, most certainly! Let's find out what secrets the scroll can tell.
String.Dest: 哦，当然啦！让我们找找看卷轴里有些什么秘密。

String.Source: Ah, my rescuer! It's good to see you again.
String.Dest: 啊，我的救命恩人！再见到你真好！

String.Source: Come on, old man. You should get some rest.
String.Dest: 来吧，老爷子。你得歇一歇了。

String.Source: Those last ones helped me immensely. If you could collect this one for me, it's sure to result in extraordinary success!
String.Dest: 上次那个对我帮助很大，如果你能帮我找到这个，肯定会取得非凡的成功！

String.Source: You have an Elder Scroll? Remarkable!
String.Dest: 你们有上古卷轴？了不起！

String.Source: I don't recall addressing you, worm.
String.Dest: 我不记得跟你说过话，虫子。

String.Source: I had no idea you felt that way about me, Serana. It was never my intention to push you aside.
String.Dest: 从没想过你会这样看我，瑟拉娜。我从来没想过对你置之不理。

String.Source: I never knew the darkness held such colors, or the night air smelled so sweet. You have given me a great gift.
String.Dest: 我都不知道黑夜中有如此的色彩，空气是这样甜美好闻。你给我的礼物很珍贵。

String.Source: I'll be here if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 如果你改了主意，我就在这儿。

String.Source: You think I'd have the audacity to place my own daughter in that tomb for the protection of her Elder Scroll alone?
String.Dest: 你以为我鲁莽地把女儿放在那坟墓里只是为了保护上古卷轴吗？

String.Source: The scrolls are merely a means to an end. The key to the Tyranny of the Sun is Serana herself.
String.Dest: 卷轴不过是达到目的的一种手段，太阳暴政的关键在于瑟拉娜本身。

String.Source: We were once a wealthy and prosperous society that occupied a portion of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我们的社会曾经是富裕繁荣，占据了天际的一部分。

String.Source: Well, I certainly can't help any less than the Vigilants of Stendarr, now can I?
String.Dest: 好吧，我当然不能比斯丹达尔的警戒者帮的少了，现在可以了吗？

String.Source: I can certainly try.
Agh!
Hold still, then.
Got it into his head years back that his experience with animals would help. Trolls in particular, from what I hear.
String.Dest: 几年前他就想过他和动物相处的经验能派上用场，他尤其擅长训练巨魔。

String.Source: Well... I trust you'll take care of this unwanted visitor. My guards will not interfere with you carrying out my justice.
String.Dest: 嗯……希望你处理好这位不速之客。我的卫兵不会妨碍你执行我的判决。

String.Source: This attack... it's unlike the vampires. Do we at least know what they were after, or is this completely a lost cause?
String.Dest: 这种袭击……不像是吸血鬼。我们至少知道他们在找什么吗，还是说我们注定要失败？

String.Source: Oh, Serana. If you'd only open your eyes.
String.Dest: 哦，瑟拉娜，睁开你的眼看看吧。

String.Source: If eternal night fell, there are many who wouldn't stand for it. They would raise armies in attempts to return things to normal.
String.Dest: 如果永夜降临，很多人对此会无法忍受。他们会组建军队试图让一切回到正轨。

String.Source: Once the Initiate completed his mantras, he'd dip a ceremonial ewer in the basin at the wayshrine's center and proceed to the next wayshrine.
String.Dest: 当新人念完了咒语后，会把一只仪式用的水壶浸泡在路龛中心的盆里，然后前往下个路龛。

String.Source: A feral-blooded has holed up with a group of bandits. Likely wants to create a nest of broodlings.
String.Dest: 一头野血种和一群抢匪藏在一起了，可能想造个野血种窝。

String.Source: Very good. That's one less monster we need to worry about.
String.Dest: 干得好，又少了一头需要担心的怪物。

String.Source: What is it now?
At their bases, the barrier's energy is being drawn from unfortunate souls that have been exiled here.
String.Dest: 屏障的能量源自那些被放逐至此的不幸灵魂。

String.Source: Before my father became obsessed with the prophecy, mother and I spent quite a bit of time together.
String.Dest: 在我父亲痴迷于那则预言之前，我母亲跟我总是呆在一起。

String.Source: Life here is better than you could find anywhere in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 这里的生活比你在天际任何地方的都要好。

String.Source: Thank you for your kindness. I'll remember it the next time I'm feeling hungry.
String.Dest: 谢谢你的好意。下次我觉得饿的时候，我会想着的。

String.Source: Your lack of planning fills me with confidence.
String.Dest: 你这缺少计划的样子可真让我信心满满啊。

String.Source: They slaughtered everyone and stormed the Inner Sanctum where I believe they corrupted Vyrthur.
String.Dest: 他们屠杀了所有人，冲进了内殿。我认为维苏尔就是在那里被他们腐化了。

String.Source: Supposedly, they had to build a special forge, the Aetherium Forge, to even work with it.
String.Dest: 据说，他们必须建造一个特殊锻炉，神光水晶锻炉，才能加工它。

String.Source: The Soul Cairn has become a part of what I am. I can never fully call Tamriel my home again, or I would surely perish.
String.Dest: 灵魂石冢已经成为了我的一部分，我再不能回泰姆瑞尔安家了，不然肯定会死。

String.Source: Your husband, kidnapped!
Hmm. Very well. Just tell me what you desire - beauty or hideous deformity, nothing is beyond my skill.
String.Dest: 嗯，好吧，告诉我你想变成啥样——变得好看或者丑成畸形，没什么是我做不到的。

String.Source: I can hardly believe it. This is it. We've actually found the Forge! At last!
String.Dest: 简直不敢相信，就是这里，我们真的找到了锻炉！找到了！

String.Source: Convince the Jarl of the threat and he'll let you destroy the creature. If not, then do your best not to get caught.
String.Dest: 说服领主相信这个威胁，他就会让你除掉那玩意儿。不然的话，就尽量不要被抓住。

String.Source: Orthjolf, I'm surprised!
String.Dest: 欧兹约夫，真是出人意料。

String.Source: If you wish to learn more about the bow, or obtain Sunhallowed Arrows for it, I'd be more than happy to help. You've but to ask.
String.Dest: 如果你再多了解一下这把弓，或者取得圣阳箭，我很乐意帮忙。尽管提就是了。

String.Source: He's obsessed... insane. Everyone around him fears him as they would a rabid dog.
String.Dest: 他早已……走火入魔。他就像疯狗一样，周围人都避之不及。

String.Source: Remember that Harkon isn't to be trusted. No matter what he promises, he'll deceive you in order to get what he wants.
String.Dest: 记住不能相信哈孔。不管他跟你做过什么保证，他都会为了他想要的东西而欺骗你。

String.Source: Tell me more about what's going on.
Both of you were obsessed with your own paths. Your motivations might have been different, but in the end, I'm still just a pawn to you, too.
String.Dest: 你们俩都执迷于自己的路，你的动机或许不同，但最终，我对你来说也只是个棋子罢了。

String.Source: I've tracked this damned bear for two weeks; I'll not let it have any more victims.
String.Dest: 我已经跟踪这头该死的熊两周了，不能再让它伤人了。

String.Source: In the meantime, we're going to get to the bottom of why a vampire showed up here looking for you.
String.Dest: 与此同时，我们要搞清楚为什么会有一个吸血鬼来找你。

String.Source: All right. If nothing else, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to learn more about what's going on so I can better defend myself.
String.Dest: 好吧，没别的话，多了解一下发生了什么也无妨，这样我才能更好的保护自己。

String.Source: Of course! It is my duty to serve, and I am happy to do it!
String.Dest: 当然了，服务是我的职责，我很乐意这么做。

String.Source: Some Imperial scholar arrived in Skyrim a few days ago. I was staking out the road when I saw him pass by. Maybe that's your Moth Priest.
String.Dest: 几天前有一些帝国学者到天际来了。他路过的时候，我正用木桩标路。也许那就是你们要找的蛾祭司。

String.Source: Vingalmo and Orthjolf are Harkon's primary advisors. I'm sure they're quite surprised to learn that you're taking the Chalice.
String.Dest: 文嘉莫和欧兹约夫是哈孔的主要顾问。我肯定他们知道你要拿走圣杯会很惊讶。

String.Source: Keep searching for her notes. She probably had a journal or something.
String.Dest: 继续找她的笔记，她可能有一本日记之类的东西。

String.Source: No, you must be mistaken. He made it exceedingly clear the last time we spoke that he had no interest in my help.
String.Dest: 不，你肯定搞错了。上次我们谈话时他非常明确地表示，对我的帮助不感兴趣。

String.Source: Safe? You call bringing her here safe? Has she explained nothing to you?
String.Dest: 安全？你说带她到这里是安全？她什么都没跟你说吗？

String.Source: I understand that, but I really can't leave here without at least one usable piece of dwarven equipment.
String.Dest: 我知道，但在有一件能用的矮人装备前我真的离不开这儿。

String.Source: Maybe.
Our compassion compels us to destroy it.
String.Dest: 而我们的怜悯之心迫使我们去将其摧毁。

String.Source: Look, on the edge here. This has been cut, precisely cut. If you had another piece, about the same size, it would... it would snap right in.
String.Dest: 看，在这边缘，这里已经被切开了，很精确的切割。如果你有另一件同样大小的碎片，它……应该正好拼在一起。

String.Source: As for the other, the last that I heard, it was lost in the bowels of a Dwemer ruin.
String.Dest: 至于另一幅，我最后听说是消失在了锻莫遗迹深处。

String.Source: Master, I have done as you asked and traveled here.
String.Dest: 主人，我已经照您说的做了来到这里了。

String.Source: He's been working on that place for years now. Never lets anyone in.
String.Dest: 他在那里忙了很多年了，从不放任何人进去。

String.Source: For all of this to end, he must die.
String.Dest: 要给这一切画上句号，他必须死。

String.Source: I'll meet you there.
Watch yourself. This bear is vicious.
String.Dest: 自己小心。这头熊很凶暴。

String.Source: Oh, he just left a short while ago. He said he'd finished up his work and it was time to move on.
String.Dest: 啊，他刚走没多久。他说他已经办完了事，是时候得走了。

String.Source: And they have an Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 而且他们还有一幅上古卷轴。

String.Source: It's something all right.
I often wonder where we'd be if the Dwemer were still around. Ah well. We'll have to manage with the scraps we find.
String.Dest: 我常常想矮人们要是还存在，我们将会如何。现在我们只能凑合用找到的残骸了。

String.Source: You probably weren't expecting to see me again.
The Soul Cairn is home to very powerful beings. Necromancers send them souls, and receive powers of their own in return.
String.Dest: 灵魂石冢里有很强大的东西。死灵法师送给他们灵魂，然后得到他们的力量作为交换。

String.Source: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while his blood undergoes the change.
String.Dest: 当你给予拥抱时，要远离窥视的目光。我们新的兄弟在血液变化时可能需要休息。

String.Source: (grunt)
Vingalmo and Orthjolf both long for our Lord's throne, but cannot make overt moves against him.
String.Dest: 文嘉莫和欧兹约夫都觊觎主人的王位，又不敢公开对抗。

String.Source: You know as much as I do. I can't teach you anything new.
String.Dest: 你知道的和我一样多，教不了你新东西了。

String.Source: Anything else?
Right to the point, aren't you. I like that. Not like those fools in the order.
String.Dest: 直入正题，是吧。我喜欢，不像教团里那些傻瓜。

String.Source: Sure, that's what they all say.
Hold it. If you're going downstairs, you keep your weapons to yourself or we'll be getting better acquainted.
String.Dest: 等等。如果你要下楼，收好自己的武器，不然我们就得深入交流一下了。

String.Source: It begins again.
By ensuring the Chalice reaches our Lord, you have increased his power over them, and at the same time deprived them of their little pets.
String.Dest: 而把圣杯带回来，不仅增强了主人的力量，还让他们折损了自己的小宠物。

String.Source: For the thousands of years I've served as the Chantry's sentinel, there hasn't been a single visitor here for any other reason.
String.Dest: 我守卫了神殿几千年了，没有一个人是因为其他原因来这里的。

String.Source: Good work. It's always best to deal with a problem by ripping it out at the root.
String.Dest: 干得好。解决问题最好的办法一直都是彻底根除它。

String.Source: An ancient font, full of power. As much as it looks like blood, sadly it is not. Can you imagine if it were? We'd never need to hunt again.
String.Dest: 一座充溢着力量的古老泉眼。虽然看上去像血水，但很遗憾并不是。能想象它真是血水吗？那我们就再也不用打猎了。

String.Source: Remember your place, and you'll be taken care of.
String.Dest: 记住自己的身份，你就会过得好。

String.Source: Son of a...
An unattended attachment, such as found in your beloved wife creates... an opportunity for unnecessary agitation.
String.Dest: 这就是一种没有约束力的爱恋，万一被你心爱的妻子发现……不免有些不必要的麻烦。

String.Source: I'd... rather not get into that with you. If that's all right.
String.Dest: 如果可以的话，我……不太想谈论这个。

String.Source: Indeed. He's off to Redwater Den.
She was so sure of what we did to my father, I couldn't help but go along with her. I never thought of the cost.
String.Dest: 她很清楚我们对父亲做了些什么，我忍不住就同意了她的做法，而从来没考虑过代价。

String.Source: What?
My name is Serana. Who sent you here?
String.Dest: 我叫瑟拉娜。谁派你到这里来的？

String.Source: This is my savior, the one who freed me.
String.Dest: 他就是救了我的那个人。

String.Source: You need to locate the tallest of the rocky spires that surround these ruins.
String.Dest: 去找废墟周围最高的石塔。

String.Source: What have you done to yourself? I can't work with you in this state, night-walker.
String.Dest: 你把自己怎么了，这种状态下我没法跟你合作，夜行者。

String.Source: Here you are.
We need to find my mother, Valerica.
String.Dest: 我们得找到我母亲，瓦蕾莉卡。

String.Source: I don't know yet. The Moth Priest died before finishing the transcription, but he did name the Elder Scrolls that contained the prophecy.
String.Dest: 我还不知道。蛾祭司在完成翻译之前就死了，不过他的确叫出了书写着预言的上古卷轴的名字。

String.Source: And heed also this. He's no pet. Mistreat the beast or leave him alone for too long, and he'll return to the wild forgetting you ever existed.
String.Dest: 还要注意这点，他不是宠物。虐待或者放他独自待上太久，他就会忘了你，回到野外。

String.Source: We're also going to need a sample of her blood. Which... if we could get that, we wouldn't even be trying to do this in the first place.
String.Dest: 我们还需要她的血液样本。这东西……如果我们能拿得到的话，我们还来这里干嘛啊。

String.Source: Ah, well, in that case I'll tell you what I know.
String.Dest: 啊，好吧，那样的话我就把我知道的都告诉你。

String.Source: I see... similar to the exploding bolt, only this one will cause damage with splintering shards of ice sharp as glass. Charming!
String.Dest: 我明白了……和爆炸弩箭很像，只是这个会造成玻璃一般锋利的冰屑伤害。太好了！

String.Source: The previous owners of the castle had a sundial in the courtyard, and obviously that didn't appeal to my mother.
String.Dest: 前任城堡主在庭院里放了一个日晷，不过我母亲显然对此不感兴趣。

String.Source: I don't feel... right... I'm going to lay down... for awhile...
String.Dest: 我有点……不对劲……我得……躺一会儿……

String.Source: You are a very welcome addition to this dreary place, my friend. I owe both you and Arkay a great deal.
String.Dest: 热烈欢迎你来到这个沉闷的地方，我的朋友。我欠你和阿尔凯太多了。

String.Source: I think my father wanted to see you. Have you talked to him yet?
String.Dest: 我想我父亲想见你。你跟他谈了吗？

String.Source: Depends on who you ask. Some say Molag-Bal himself gave these rings to ancient powerful vampire lords. Some say that is just a myth.
String.Dest: 取决于你问谁了，有人说莫拉格·巴尔把这些戒指赐给了一些远古的强大吸血鬼君王。有人说那只是个传说。

String.Source: Harkon himself disbelieved in their existence, though perhaps he felt slighted they were not already in his possession and only feigns indifference.
String.Dest: 哈孔自己也不相信它们的存在，虽然他可能是因为自己还没有掌控它们，所以假装无所谓而轻视它们。

String.Source: Even if I could, it would only serve to hinder your efforts.
String.Dest: 即使我能，也只会妨碍你的努力。

String.Source: Rrrraaaaahhhh!
Not... like... this...
Hey, watch it!
The last time I saw her, she said that she'd go somewhere safe... somewhere that my father would never search.
String.Dest: 上一次我见她的时候，她说她会去一个安全的地方……一个我父亲永远也找不到的地方。

String.Source: I see you've already taken it upon yourself to gather the information you seek.
String.Dest: 你要自己去收集你要的情报了。

String.Source: Come on!
Got it!
None of the others ever made it this far.
String.Dest: 其他人都没走到过这一步。

String.Source: Finally came to your senses, eh? Realized what you gave up?
String.Dest: 终于醒悟了，是吧？意识到你放弃了什么？

String.Source: When I fled Castle Volkihar, I fled with two Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 当我逃离沃基哈尔城堡时，我带走了两个上古卷轴。

String.Source: As far as I've heard, no one's seen them and returned to Tamriel to tell about it.
String.Dest: 据我所知，没有人见过它们后还能活着回泰姆瑞尔。

String.Source: Lord Harkon's orders, Orthjolf. Calm yourself.
String.Dest: 是哈孔大人的命令，欧兹约夫。冷静点。

String.Source: It must have been important to the vampires as well, for them to risk an open attack on the Vigilants.
String.Dest: 对吸血鬼来说肯定也很重要，因为他们竟然冒险在毫无掩护的情况下攻击警戒者。

String.Source: Then the rest is up to me.
And how exactly do you plan on completing the prophecy without the death of my daughter?
String.Dest: 那么你打算如何在我女儿不死的情况下完成预言？

String.Source: I promise to try and make this as painless as possible. Hold still.
String.Dest: 我保证尽量不弄疼你。别动。

String.Source: So how has it come to pass that a vampire of mixed blood is in the company of my daughter?
String.Dest: 那么一个混种吸血鬼怎么会和我女儿在一起呢？

String.Source: Our sense of what's right is what separates us from the vampires. Don't forget that.
String.Dest: 我们的正义感是与吸血鬼的区别所在，别忘了。

String.Source: Tell you what, I'll sell it back to you for 4,000 coins.
String.Dest: 跟你说吧，我卖回给你要4000金币。

String.Source: When did I say that?
Like she didn't want to just stop my father... she wanted to stick it to him, too.
String.Dest: 就好像她不仅仅是想要阻止我父亲……她还想要他难受。

String.Source: She always seemed happy, before we heard the prophecy. Then it all changed. She became a different person. They both did.
String.Dest: 在我们听说预言之前，她总是那么快乐。然后一切都不一样了。她完全变了一个人。他们俩都是。

String.Source: I trust your journey was successful?
String.Dest: 我相信您的旅途还算顺利？

String.Source: The secret of the bow's power is written elsewhere. I think there is more to the prophecy, recorded in other scrolls.
String.Dest: 弓之力量的秘密写在别处。看来还有记载在别的卷轴上的预言。

String.Source: Beautiful. That crown... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 太美了，那王冠……这就是我所期待的全部了。

String.Source: Something's wrong with the moondial here. Some of the crests are missing and the dial is askew.
String.Dest: 这里的月晷出了些问题，有些纹样缺失，仪表盘也歪了。

String.Source: She had to be up to something in that garden. I'm hoping it's a clue that will tell us where she went.
String.Dest: 她肯定在花园里策划了些什么。我希望这是条线索，能告诉我们她去了哪里。

String.Source: Oh please, milord. Please... forgive me!
String.Dest: 哦求您了，大人。请您……宽恕我！

String.Source: Well, if you want to reach the summit, you're going to need some help. You... want a hand?
String.Dest: 好了，如果你想抵达最高处，需要一些帮助。需要……我帮忙吗？

String.Source: Otherwise, all I can do now is grant you my hopes for a safe journey.
String.Dest: 否则，我就只能希望你旅途平安了。

String.Source: If you need anything else, I'll be here.
String.Dest: 还需要什么东西的话，我就在这儿。

String.Source: I had no idea that her laboratory even existed.
String.Dest: 我根本不知道这里有个实验室。

String.Source: Well, once the Initiate's enlightenment was complete, he'd bring the ewer to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 一旦启蒙完成，新人会把水壶带到神殿的内殿。

String.Source: Since the Keepers weren't able to claim my soul, they had their minions construct a barrier that I'd never be able to breach.
String.Dest: 看守者们没办法索取我的灵魂，它们就让手下建造了这个我没法突破的结界。

String.Source: Yeah, too bad. Lord Harkon's new favorite, dead so soon after joining the family.
String.Dest: 是啊，很遗憾，哈孔大人的新宠，刚加入这个家就死了。

String.Source: If I had foreseen the value they placed on my own soul, I would never have come here.
String.Dest: 如果预见到了它们对我灵魂的重视，我绝不会来这里。

String.Source: We call such confluences the "Daughters of Coldharbour."
String.Dest: 我们将这种转化者称为“冷港之女”。

String.Source: But no matter. The greatest artists are never recognized in their own time.
String.Dest: 但没关系，最伟大的艺术家们从未在当代获得认可。

String.Source: My father and I don't really get along.
String.Dest: 我跟我父亲不太合得来。

String.Source: Having trouble finding those ingredients?
Your intentions are still somewhat unclear to me.
String.Dest: 我还是不太清楚你的意图。

String.Source: Quickly now! The longer you delay, the more danger the Jarl is in.
String.Dest: 快！你去拖得越久，领主就越危险。

String.Source: I don't think so. She said she wanted to stay awake in case the situation was resolved.
String.Dest: 我不这么认为，她说她想保持清醒，也许能解开这个局面。

String.Source: I am more than happy to buy or sell whatever you might need.
String.Dest: 我很乐意买卖你需要的任何东西。

String.Source: Wait... that almost makes sense!
String.Dest: 等等……这差不多就说得通了。

String.Source: Fortunately, you're in a position to breach the barrier that surrounds these ruins.
String.Dest: 所幸你可以突破包围这些废墟的屏障。

String.Source: Once that's done, the blood of a powerful vampire needs to be added to it.
String.Dest: 完成了这一步后，还需要加入一个强大吸血鬼的血。

String.Source: Now, let me get the scroll's case opened.
String.Dest: 现在，我们来打开卷轴匣。

String.Source: Now tell me, who is this stranger you have brought into our hall?
String.Dest: 现在跟我说说，你带进我们大厅的这位陌生人是谁啊？

String.Source: A savior?
After what I've put Serana through, I would understand if she never wished to see me again. I leave that decision in your hands.
String.Dest: 是我让瑟拉娜经受了这一切，如果她不想再见我也在所难免。我把决定权交给你。

String.Source: That Moth Priest, Dexion. He said we needed two other Elder Scrolls. I think I know where we can start looking.
String.Dest: 那个蛾祭司，戴希翁。他说我们还需要两个上古卷轴，我大概知道从哪里开始找了。

String.Source: Hey, if you don't like it, you could always shop for your Elder Scrolls elsewhere.
String.Dest: 嘿，要是不喜欢，你可以去别处买上古卷轴试试。

String.Source: Pay a visit to the beast's last known contact. Do what you must to find where it's hiding now.
String.Dest: 去拜访一下这头野兽最后的已知联系人，尽你所能找到它的藏身处。

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: 你根本不在乎瑟拉娜跟我们的处境。

String.Source: I can crush skulls with the best of them. Let me show you a few things.
String.Dest: 我能用他们来打烂头骨，这就给你看些东西。

String.Source: If I ventured far from the Soul Cairn, my strength would begin to wane until I was no more.
String.Dest: 如果我冒险远离灵魂石冢，力量就会开始减弱，直至消散。

String.Source: Before this, I roamed the skies above Tamriel. I desire to return there.
String.Dest: 在这之前，我也曾在泰姆瑞尔上空翱翔，我渴望着回到那里。

String.Source: I must have failed. Harkon's found a way to decipher the prophecy, hasn't he.
String.Dest: 我肯定失败了吧。哈孔找到了破解预言的办法了，对吧？

String.Source: You. Come forward. I would speak with you.
We'll get to that. For now, get acquainted with the space.
String.Dest: 咱们回头再谈，现在，先熟悉一下这个地方吧。

String.Source: Certainly. Where can I find this castle?
String.Dest: 当然可以。我在哪里能找到这座城堡？

String.Source: Whatever it says, it will have something that can help us stop my father.
String.Dest: 不管那上面写了什么，它都能帮我们阻止我父亲。

String.Source: Despite my present low estate, I am no beggar. Begone until you have the coin to warrant my skills.
String.Dest: 尽管我现在混的很惨，但也不是什么乞丐。起开，等你有钱了再来找我证明我的能力。

String.Source: I have ordered the court to assemble. I have a new task for us all to carry out, and that includes you.
String.Dest: 我已经命令宫廷集合了。我有一项新任务让大家去完成，这其中也包括你。

String.Source: Hang on... could you pull that again?
String.Dest: 等一下……你能再拉它一下吗？

String.Source: I'll buy whatever you're looking to get rid of.
String.Dest: 有什么不要的都可以卖我。

String.Source: I know that better than anybody.
String.Dest: 我比任何人都清楚这件事。

String.Source: We usually feed on our visitors, but perhaps we'll make an exception in your case.
String.Dest: 我们经常以我们的访客为食，不过也许我们对你会破个例。

String.Source: Unh... where is... who sent you here?
I didn't want you to think I was one of those... you know, the women who just sit in their castle all day?
String.Dest: 我不想让你觉得我是那种……你懂的，成天只知道坐在城堡里的那种女人？

String.Source: You'd do well to watch that tongue, elf.
String.Dest: 最好小心你的舌头，精灵。

String.Source: All right. Here goes.
We end this here and now!
String.Dest: 就在此时此地结束这一切！

String.Source: Refuse me, and I will banish you from this castle. I will spare your life this once, but after that, you are prey.
String.Dest: 拒绝我，我会把你驱逐出这座城堡。我这次饶你一命，不过在那以后，你就是猎物了。

String.Source: My lord! Everyone! Serana has returned!
String.Dest: 大人！列位！瑟拉娜回来了！

String.Source: Ah, welcome, welcome! I don't believe we've seen you here before, have we? You can buy from me, then join any booth you'd like.
String.Dest: 啊，欢迎欢迎！我们以前没在这见过，对吧？你可以在我这买，然后想进哪个棚子都行。

String.Source: No one ever escapes. There is no escape. Why would you even try?
String.Dest: 无人能逃，无处可逃。你还在尝试什么呢？

String.Source: Make use of my coffin whenever you like. My home is your home.
String.Dest: 随时可以用我的棺材，我家就是你家。

String.Source: I ought to cut you to pieces right where you stand...
String.Dest: 我是该现在就把你劈个粉碎的……

String.Source: I wonder how many copies I'll sell? Hundreds? Thousands? I'll hire the finest bookbinder I can find.
String.Dest: 我在想能卖出多少本？数百本？数千本？我要雇最好的装订工。

String.Source: The Vigilants of Stendarr, in over their heads. What a surprise.
String.Dest: 斯丹达尔的警戒者们这次摊上大事了，根本搞不定。

String.Source: Not like this...
Look around you. There are some extremely powerful undead here.
String.Dest: 看看你周围呀。这里可有一些很强大的亡灵呢。

String.Source: Even in this weather, it's better than the cave.
String.Dest: 就算是这种天气，也比洞穴里强。

String.Source: Hhyyaarrggh!
May mortals quake at your approach.
String.Dest: 愿凡人因你的到来而颤抖。

String.Source: Are you... Did you get infected?
I'm ready to go when you are.
String.Dest: 当你准备好的时候，我们就走。

String.Source: Surrender and give us the bow!
Farewell, friend. May the light of Auri-El illuminate your darkest hours.
String.Dest: 再见了朋友，愿奥瑞-艾尔的光芒在黑暗时刻指引你。

String.Source: A song? I, uh... I seem to have misplaced my lute. Another time perhaps?
String.Dest: 弹个曲子？呃……我好像忘了鲁特琴放哪去了。要不下次吧？

String.Source: All that just to end up dumping it out? Makes no sense to me.
String.Dest: 所有这些只是为了把它倒了？毫无意义。

String.Source: Take a left up here. This is one of those weird double-barred security measures that my father put in when he got more paranoid.
String.Dest: 在这里左转。这是我父亲在他变得更偏执的时候，建造的奇怪双保险设施之一。

String.Source: May Auri-El's glow shield you from your enemy.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光保护你不受敌人伤害。

String.Source: Leaving huh? Good. Maybe I can get some work done.
String.Dest: 走了吗？很好，也许这下我能干点活儿了。

String.Source: Watch out! He's pulling down the ceiling!
String.Dest: 小心！他把天花板拉下来了！

String.Source: Not much. If you read any history, it shows up from time to time, but it's a hard thing to track.
String.Dest: 也不多。如果你读历史就会发现它时不时出场，但难以追踪。

String.Source: Let's go.
Do we at least know what the vampires are after?
String.Dest: 至少我们知道了吸血鬼在找什么吧？

String.Source: Arkay says bandits. Or, wait... no, he says bandits.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯说有抢匪。或者，等下……不，他说就是抢匪。

String.Source: Well of course we do. I'm old, not stupid.
String.Dest: 当然了。我只是老了，但不笨。

String.Source: We are blood bound, but we can never be too careful. Never know who might be watching, right?
String.Dest: 我们血脉相连，但越小心越好。万一有人在偷看呢，是吧？

String.Source: Whatever they're doing with them, they've been harvesting for millennia. No telling how many souls are trapped here.
String.Dest: 不管它们用灵魂干什么，它们都已经收割几千年了。不知道有多少灵魂被困在这里。

String.Source: Mind yourself in that form. Don't go damaging my thralls.
String.Dest: 那种形态就小心点儿，不要伤害我的奴隶。

String.Source: What I didn't know is someone had hired the Morag Tong to kill him as well.
String.Dest: 但我不知道的是，有人还雇了别人来谋杀他。

String.Source: All right...
If remnants of our kind who escaped the betrayal at the hands of the dwarves exist out there, perhaps they will find this place one day.
String.Dest: 如果有残存同族能够逃离矮人掌控的背叛者，或许某天他们会找到这个地方。

String.Source: Good luck.
But I think I turned out ok.
If there's any way I can be of service, please let me know.
String.Dest: 有什么我能帮上忙的话，就请告诉我。

String.Source: I believe we can prolong its salutary effects if we infuse it with potent vampiric blood.
String.Dest: 我相信如果我们给它注入强大吸血鬼的血液，就能延长它的增益效果。

String.Source: Are you alive? I must be imagining this.
String.Dest: 你是个活人？我肯定是出幻觉了。

String.Source: One of the feral brood has joined a group of bandits, presumably with aims to grant the gift to the entire lot of them.
String.Dest: 有个野血种加入了一群抢匪，大概想把礼物分给他们。

String.Source: In my heart, I know that it was my wife, Valerica, who took my beloved daughter away from me.
String.Dest: 我心里明白，是我的妻子瓦蕾莉卡，把我挚爱的女儿从我身边带走了。

String.Source: I'm... not sure. I've never heard of the Divines speaking directly to someone before.
String.Dest: 我……我不好说。以前从没听说过圣灵直接跟谁说话。

String.Source: Look, I'm just here to keep watch. What you're looking for is down inside.
String.Dest: 听着，我只是放哨的。你要找的东西在里面。

String.Source: Apparently you had blood in your ears when I said not to draw attention to yourself. If I wanted a messy kill I would have said so.
String.Dest: 显然在我跟你说别给自己引起注意的时候，你耳朵里塞血了。我要是想要一场混乱的杀戮肯定是会那么说的。

String.Source: Nordic ruins. Even older than I am. I wonder if the draugr are as gullible as they were when I was a girl.
String.Dest: 诺德遗迹，甚至比我都古老。不知道尸鬼是不是跟我小时候一样好骗。

String.Source: You really don't look well. Have you talked to Florentius? Maybe he can help you.
String.Dest: 你看起来真的不太好，跟佛伦提乌斯谈过了吗？也许他能帮你。

String.Source: Were did you go?
I've located additional petrified remains of an elder vampire. Bring them to me, and I'll extend the effects granted by the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 我又找到了一具远古吸血鬼的石化残骸。把它们带给我，我会延长血石圣杯的功效。

String.Source: There's enough for us to fight out there. I don't need us having to defend ourselves within our own fort.
String.Dest: 这儿用来战斗的足够了。我不需要用来在堡垒自卫的东西了。

String.Source: Want my advice? Never welch on a bargain with the Ideal Masters... they don't take it very well.
String.Dest: 想听我的建议吗？永远不要和理想之主们讨价还价……他们很讨厌这个。

String.Source: I took it upon myself to join the cause and fight the dremora, thinking this would simply be another feather in my cap.
String.Dest: 我主动加入了与魔人的战斗，想着不过是收获另一段荣誉罢了。

String.Source: So this is what it's like on the other side.
You know, an important member of society. Someone attached to the Jarl's court, a merchant, a bard, a priest, someone with stature.
String.Dest: 就是，社会上的重要成员。依附于领主宫廷的人、商人、吟游诗人、祭司，诸如此类有地位的人。

String.Source: A more "serious" group of the Vigilants of Stendarr. Sometimes when you skin a skeever, you find he has a more aggressive mate.
String.Dest: 斯丹达尔的警戒者中一个更“严肃”的队伍。有时你刚剥了恶鼠的皮，会发现它还有个更发狂的伴儿。

String.Source: The sky is so dark. What does it mean?
String.Dest: 天好黑啊。这发生了什么？

String.Source: Go on downstairs. You're bothering me.
Auriel is one of the elven gods. He's with the rest of them in Aetherius.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔是精灵诸神之一，他们都在光界。

String.Source: Careful, here. If you fall down that thing I'm going to have to drag you out of... wherever it leads.
String.Dest: 小心这里。要是你被冲下去了我还得拉你上来……无论是冲到哪儿去了……

String.Source: The boss said it's some sort of profaned spring. It looks like blood, but it's not the real thing.
String.Dest: 老大说这是某种遭亵渎的泉水。看起来像血水，但不是真的。

String.Source: Arkay bless you, friend.
Well, that's usually the trick. It's possible to do it through a simple portal.
String.Dest: 好吧，这一般都是小把戏。通过一道简简单单的传送门就能办到。

String.Source: There are plenty of other adventures I've had over the years, but you'll just have to read my next work to find out.
String.Dest: 这些年来，我还有很多其他的冒险经历，但你只要读了我的下一部作品就知道了。

String.Source: If you're buying, go on in. Otherwise, shove off.
We're all that stands between Skyrim and disaster.
String.Dest: 我们是为天际阻挡灾难之人。

String.Source: I will not be defeated!
Let me go...
What a horrible place.
See that thing? Dwarves called them 'Kinetic Resonators'. Don't see them very often, least not among the clans in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 看见那个了吗？矮人们称它们为“动力谐振器”。这东西本来就不常见，在天际的氏族里更稀少了。

String.Source: You appear to have something on your mind. What is it?
String.Dest: 你好像有什么心事。怎么了？

String.Source: That's easy to say, but I definitely didn't help things.
String.Dest: 说来容易，但我确实没帮上忙。

String.Source: Your crown... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: 你的王冠……神啊，是神光水晶造的！纯神光水晶！

String.Source: Katria? No, no that's not possible!
Give up while you can!
Last I knew, he was headed to Ruunvald. But then, we hadn't heard from anyone there in a few weeks.
String.Dest: 我最后所知的是他去了鲁恩瓦德。但后来，我们几个星期都没收到那里的消息了。

String.Source: That's the last one, isn't it? It's... it's almost time. I'll meet you at the Forge!
String.Dest: 最后一个了，对吧？时间……差不多了。我在锻炉那等你！

String.Source: I had always just assumed that the other tower was completely destroyed inside.
String.Dest: 我一直以为另一座塔楼的内部已经彻底被摧毁了。

String.Source: But bringing something from the Soul Cairn gives you something much more powerful.
String.Dest: 不过从灵魂石冢里带出来的东西会带给你更加强大的力量。

String.Source: If I ever see her again, she will pay most dearly for that betrayal.
String.Dest: 如果我再见到她，她会为背叛付出最惨痛的代价。

String.Source: Get yourself cured immediately. You're a threat to all of us otherwise.
String.Dest: 立刻去治好自己，否则你对我们所有人都是一个威胁。

String.Source: No matter how long I've been here, I'll still never get used to this place.
String.Dest: 不管我在这里呆了多久。我还是不习惯这里。

String.Source: It's also quite possible that there are some other isolated conclaves of snow elves nestled elsewhere on Nirn.
String.Dest: 在奈恩别处很可能也还有一些孤立的雪精灵聚居地。

String.Source: A magical shield that when blocked with, surrounds it's wielder with a holy aura that harms the undead.
String.Dest: 一副魔法护盾，用以格挡时，使用者周身环绕神圣光环，并对亡灵造成伤害。

String.Source: We're looking for some Vampires that have been reported in the area. Seen any?
String.Dest: 有报告说这一地区有吸血鬼，我们正在找他们。你看见了吗？

String.Source: Auri-El forgives you.
Others think they use them as payment to an even higher power... almost like a currency. A very strange currency.
String.Dest: 其他人认为它们将灵魂向更高的力量做交易……差不多像一种货币，一种非常奇怪的货币。

String.Source: By the Eight... look at the sky!
Serana can make you one of us again.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜能把你再变回我们中的一员。

String.Source: Please... No more...
She wanted to get it as far away from my father as possible. I can't imagine a better place.
String.Dest: 她想让那东西离我父亲远远的。我再也想不到更好的地方了。

String.Source: Honestly, I don't think they care what a bunch of vampires would do with Auriel's Bow. They're pretty focused on the past.
String.Dest: 说实话，我觉得他们根本不在乎一群吸血鬼拿奥瑞艾尔之弓要做什么，他们只专注于过去。

String.Source: Hide if you wish. It's only a matter of time.
String.Dest: 想躲就躲把，只是时间问题罢了。

String.Source: Oh, you're off on your own for a while? All right.
String.Dest: 哦，你要自己离开一会儿？好吧。

String.Source: The Dawnguard are apparently focused on exterminating vampires, noble and brute alike.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫明显更专注于消灭吸血鬼，无论贵贱。

String.Source: I just wonder if that meant it was my job to be giving.
String.Dest: 我就想知道我的意义就是用来牺牲。

String.Source: Mmm hmm.
Find Sorine and Gunmar, and maybe we can do something about this mess.
String.Dest: 去找索琳和甘马尔，也许我们还能搞定这个烂摊子。

String.Source: I am Jiub. Some call me Saint Jiub. Others call me Jiub the Eradicator. Perhaps you've heard of me?
String.Dest: 我是鸠步，有人叫我圣鸠步，还有人叫我“铲除者”鸠步，也许你听说过我？

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

String.Source: You are to destroy the feral creature before this small problem becomes a larger one.
String.Dest: 在这个问题加剧之前，你得消灭这个野种。

String.Source: How could they trick me like this? I was one of Reman's court wizards!
String.Dest: 他们怎么能骗到我？我可是雷曼的宫廷法师！

String.Source: And now the feeding begins.
Next time I say to please not go over the waterfall, maybe you'll listen to me.
String.Dest: 下次我说别蹚瀑布的时候，请你还是听一下吧。

String.Source: The sun is gone! We're all doomed!
Oh, good. Well then... let's head over to the portal vessel and I'll do the rest.
String.Dest: 哦，好啊。那么……我们去传送门，剩下的交给我。

String.Source: Forgive me... Auri-El...
I can't say that I'm surprised by your answer. Until I get my second volume published, no one will ever know of my achievements.
String.Dest: 只能说我并不惊讶，毕竟在我出版第二卷之前，没人会知道我的成就。

String.Source: This weather is incredible.
I cast you out!
It might take decades to restore the castle to its former glory... but I appear to have plenty of time.
String.Dest: 可能得需要几十年的时间才能让城堡恢复旧日辉煌……不过我的时间似乎挺充足的。

String.Source: Correct. We only numbered perhaps a hundred at the time, so our presence remained a secret to the dwarves and the Nords.
String.Dest: 是的，当时只有约一百人，所以我们的存在对矮人和诺德人还是个秘密。

String.Source: Fellow hunter, we're looking for some Vampires that have been reported in the area. Have you seen any?
String.Dest: 猎人伙伴，有报告说这一地区有吸血鬼，我们正在找他们。你看见了吗？

String.Source: Thank you. I'll be going.
Gah!
I'll fight anything that can be fought. Beyond that... I don't want your death on my conscience.
String.Dest: 我会尽力和一切去战斗。毕竟……我不想看到你死了，会让我良心不安的。

String.Source: Go to Lord Harkon at once, beg him to turn you back. You're dead if you don't.
String.Dest: 马上去找哈孔大人，乞求他把你变回去，不然你死定了。

String.Source: Dexion said something about that scroll. What was it... something to do with dragons I think?
String.Dest: 戴希翁说过关于卷轴的事情。什么来着……跟龙有关的对吧？

String.Source: I can't afford to make any assumptions. That's how people wind up dead.
String.Dest: 我不能想当然，那就是人们沦落至死的原因。

String.Source: Well met, sister.
The reason I had it... and why I was down there.
String.Dest: 我拿着它……以及被关在那里的原因。

String.Source: Excellent. I trust he'll find his situation more accommodating, now that he is a member of the family.
String.Dest: 太好了。既然已经是家中一员，我相信他适应这里会更容易。

String.Source: I commanded every vampire in the court to look for them, but after centuries of searching without success, I lost hope.
String.Dest: 我曾命令宫廷里每个吸血鬼都去找她们，但找了几个世纪都没找到，就不抱希望了。

String.Source: That will make them all more upset to have one of their citizens slain, and under such flimsy pretense.
String.Dest: 这会让他们更加不安,因为公民竟因如此脆弱的借口被杀害。

String.Source: I can take you to any port on the coast.
String.Dest: 我能带你去海岸上的任何港口。

String.Source: All I heard is that without a Septim sitting on the throne of the Empire, the Dragonfires in a place called the Temple of the One were no longer lit.
String.Dest: 我只是听说，帝国皇位若无塞普汀坐镇，至尊神殿的龙火就会熄灭。

String.Source: But a kill is a kill, and it'll send a message to the Dawnguard, if not exactly the one we wanted.
String.Dest: 但杀了就杀了，并且也会给黎明守卫发送信息，就算不是我们想要的那个。

String.Source: That's the last of them. Poor sods can't resist after they get a taste of your dosed Skooma.
String.Dest: 这是最后一个了，这些可怜的家伙尝过你加料的斯库玛后就抵抗不了了。

String.Source: Are you infected? Keep your distance from me.
String.Dest: 你被感染了吗？离我远点。

String.Source: They used to criss-cross the skies over Morrowind like vermin. Nasty flying creatures with a habit of sneaking up on the unwary.
String.Dest: 这群讨厌的飞行生物，曾经像害虫一样在晨风上空纵横，还喜欢偷偷接近毫无防备之人。

String.Source: Back to visit Jiub the Magnificent, eh?
String.Dest: 又回来拜访伟大的鸠步了？

String.Source: What? Are you certain?
Don't make a big scene. Don't get caught.
String.Dest: 别搞出个大场面，别被抓住。

String.Source: Arkay, we're going to need your help more than ever.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯，我们现在比任何时候都更需要你帮助。

String.Source: Turns out my mother was sneakier than I thought. I wonder what she's hiding?
String.Dest: 原来我母亲比我认为的还聪明啊。我想知道她在藏些什么？

String.Source: One of the feral brood has joined a group of nercromancers, presumably with aims to grant the gift to the entire lot of them.
String.Dest: 有个野血种加入了一群死灵术士，大概想把礼物分给他们。

String.Source: Look at you, wandering around causing trouble. Precious.
String.Dest: 看看你吧，到处游荡闯祸，奇葩啊。

String.Source: Unnff!
I wonder if the fires are still burning in the Imperial City...
String.Dest: 我想知道帝都是否还是一片火海……

String.Source: I'll be with the Dawnguard if you need me.
String.Dest: 你要找我就来黎明守卫这里。

String.Source: Probably to avoid whatever my father would do to her if he could get his hands on her.
String.Dest: 可能是以防我父亲抓到她后会发生的那些事情。

String.Source: Normally, I'd send you to the Imperial City in Cyrodiil to seek answers at the Imperial Library, but that avenue no longer exists.
String.Dest: 一般来说，我会让你去希罗帝尔的帝都，上帝国图书馆找答案，但那条路早就没了。

String.Source: But to finalize the deal, you have to travel here yourself... and most of them never come back.
String.Dest: 但要完成交易，你得亲自来这里……而他们中的许多人再也没回去。

String.Source: How dare you profane this place!
Let's just say I sold something to a guy who turned out to work for a whole coven of necromancers.
String.Dest: 这么说吧，我出手了一批东西，结果买主是给一群死灵法师效力的。

String.Source: Excellent. I knew I could count on you. That's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on.
String.Dest: 太好了，我就知道你靠得住。又少了一个要关注的麻烦制造者。

String.Source: Wait... Serana? Is that truly you? I cannot believe my eyes!
String.Dest: 等等……瑟拉娜？真的是你吗？我不敢相信我的眼睛！

String.Source: I'll feed your corpse to the Betrayed.
I will find you...
Death first!
My sister in darkness. While it's good to see you, we'll keep up appearances, yes?
String.Dest: 黑暗中的姐妹啊，虽然很高兴见到你，但我们还是得保持体面，好吗？

String.Source: I must return to the frontline Alessian headquarters at once... lives are hanging in the balance!
String.Dest: 我得回到阿莱西亚前线指挥部去……命悬一线呐！

String.Source: Maybe I can't leave, but my writings can.
String.Dest: 可能我走不了，但我的稿子可以。

String.Source: None of this feels right. We need to know more.
String.Dest: 听起来不对劲，我们还需要了解更多。

String.Source: Is... everything all right here?
I didn't say that. I wondered if perhaps he did it for the attention, but every now and then he'll say something that makes me reconsider.
String.Dest: 我可没这么说。我猜他这么做是为了引人注意，但他时不时会说些让我再三考虑的话。

String.Source: I'll scatter your ashes myself!
I hope you find life in the castle to be to your liking.
String.Dest: 希望城堡的生活能让你满意。

String.Source: You've arrived at the Wayshrine of Resolution.
String.Dest: 这里是决心之路龛，新人。

String.Source: Madness. It was madness to attack that coven of witches! Why didn't they listen to me?
String.Dest: 疯了，去袭击那个女巫团简直是疯了！他们怎么就不听呢？

String.Source: Just get all of the ingredients into the vessel.
String.Dest: 把所有的材料都放进容器里吧。

String.Source: Stay vigilant, friend.
Not at this rate, no.
I will send you back to the shadows!
Not... over... yet...
Don't speak to me, meat.
Keep quiet! We're hunting vampires spotted in the area.
String.Dest: 小声点！我们正在猎杀这个地区的吸血鬼。

String.Source: May Auri-El's brilliance illuminate your path.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光照亮你的道路。

String.Source: If there's anything at all I can help you with, please ask.
String.Dest: 如果有什么能帮你的，问我就行。

String.Source: So why don't you just drink the blood from the spring? I mean, that seems easier than running a skooma den...
String.Dest: 那你为什么不直接喝泉水里的血呢？我的意思是，这似乎比经营一个斯库玛窝点容易……

String.Source: My father's never been much for building things, so it just stayed like this.
String.Dest: 我父亲从来都对建筑不怎么上心，所以就让它保持这个样子了。

String.Source: So, you think he's just crazy?
You've given up the powers granted to you? Get away from me. I don't want to be seen talking to you.
String.Dest: 你放弃了授予你的力量？从我这里滚开。我可不想被看到跟你谈话。

String.Source: Farewell, friend. May the warmth of Auri-El provide you strength.
String.Dest: 再见了朋友，愿奥瑞-艾尔的暖阳赐你力量。

String.Source: We don't need competition for blood, and we don't want the mortals getting up in arms making things difficult for us.
String.Dest: 我们不需要为了鲜血而争斗，也不希望凡人拿起武器给我们制造麻烦。

String.Source: If I hadn't lost all of the pages, I wouldn't be in this predicament and we wouldn't be having this conversation.
String.Dest: 如果我的书稿没丢，就不会陷入这种困境，我们也就不用在这里闲谈了。

String.Source: Want my advice? Avoid getting wrapped up in Vingalmo's schemes. He's after the throne, and he'll kill anyone that gets in his way.
String.Dest: 想听我的建议吗？别卷入文加莫的阴谋。他谋求王位，任何妨碍的都会死于他手。

String.Source: Your life ends here, Vyrthur!
I can only assume the gates have been closed by now.
String.Dest: 我只能假设那些门已经关上了。

String.Source: Die, monster!
Good riddance.
The poor thing living here probably just fell out of favor upstairs.
String.Dest: 住在这里的可怜人应该是在楼上失宠了。

String.Source: Who are you?...
Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end!
String.Dest: 很遗憾，这意味着你已经完全没用了！

String.Source: I've learned the whereabouts of a troublesome Dawnguard member. You will track him down and dispose of him.
String.Dest: 我知道了一个麻烦的黎明守卫的下落。你要找到他，然后处理掉他。

String.Source: Couldn't hurt to gather more I suppose.
String.Dest: 我猜多收集一些也无妨。

String.Source: Dexion didn't really give us a lot to go on, did he?
String.Dest: 戴希翁没给我们太多线索，对吧？

String.Source: I can't believe it. You're one of them... Talk to Isran. Maybe he can help you. Please, I don't want to have to kill you.
String.Dest: 我简直不敢相信，你成了它们的一员了……去找伊士冉，也许他能帮你。快去，我不想杀你。

String.Source: A pathetic creature in her present condition, but the gift will embolden her. And her lowly state suits her to being our eyes and ears in Markarth.
String.Dest: 有个人现在的处境是很可悲，但这份礼物会让她更加大胆。她的卑微姿态让她适合成为我们在马卡斯的耳目。

String.Source: Have you talked to Isran?
I hope this is important, I have an experiment I'm working on.
String.Dest: 我希望这件事很重要，我在做实验呢。

String.Source: Otherwise, I don't have the faintest idea.
String.Dest: 不然，我就什么都看不懂了。

String.Source: Time was I could barely hold my own in the Companions. Now I could slaughter them all without a second thought.
String.Dest: 有段时间我都没法在战友团里站稳脚跟，现在我可以毫不犹豫地把他们全杀了。

String.Source: Not a serious threat, but we can't leave them completely unchecked or they may become one.
String.Dest: 不算是个严重威胁，但我们不能放任不管，否则必成后患。

String.Source: The prophecy's end approaches!
One thousand steps and a thousand more...
Enough of these games.
Indeed! One moment I was writing diligently, and the next, my door bursts open.
String.Dest: 正是！上一秒我还在写作，下一秒我的门突然开了。

String.Source: I've failed you... my lord...
I wonder what happened here.
String.Dest: 我想知道这里发生了些什么。

String.Source: That sky... it feels like I'm being watched. Can't stand it anymore!
String.Dest: 这天色……让我感觉像被监视着，受不了了！

String.Source: Why hide? Face Auri-El. Face your end!
String.Dest: 藏起来干嘛？来直面奥瑞-艾尔。直面你的死期！

String.Source: Time to gather some bark.
Why me...
What are you doing that's so dangerous?
String.Dest: 什么活儿能干的这么危险？

String.Source: Her blood will be mine!
Justice will prevail!
I hear you're doing a lot of the work in tracking down these vampires. If there's anything I can do to help, let me know.
String.Dest: 听说你在追查这些吸血鬼上做了很多，如果我能帮上什么忙，就告诉我吧。

String.Source: When I was tossed in here I felt myself falling... and I dropped the pages I had been holding.
String.Dest: 当我被扔进这里时感觉自己在坠落……我丢了手里的那几页。

String.Source: Well, if I were a betting woman, I'd say it's a scraper of some sort.
String.Dest: 嗯，要是让我来猜，我觉得这是某种刮刀。

String.Source: There's no one around to disturb me and distract me from my writing. Present company excepted of course.
String.Dest: 周围没人打扰，分散我写作的注意力。当然，现在在场的除外。

String.Source: Show yourself!
Its craftsmanship has no equal anywhere within Tamriel and possibly beyond.
String.Dest: 它的工艺在泰姆瑞尔乃至其他任何地方都无与伦比。

String.Source: Hunters! Take his heart!
What is it?
I think that might have been what we were waiting for.
String.Dest: 我猜这可能就是我们一直在等的。

String.Source: Good luck.
Go with the Light.
Arrggh!
This must be the place.
Where are you headed?
I keep an eye on their comings and goings. No one suspects poor Cairine. Poor, poor Cairine. Ha!
String.Dest: 我关注着他们的出入，没有人怀疑可怜的凯林。可怜啊，可怜的凯林。哈！

String.Source: More spiders? I liked the ones back home better.
String.Dest: 又有蜘蛛？我更喜欢家里的那些。

String.Source: Your time will come.
Gunmar and I agree that we're going to need Florentius to help.
String.Dest: 甘马尔和我都认为我们需要佛伦提乌斯的帮助。

String.Source: This time, to the death!
Ugh. I told you!
I ain't in the mood to talk. Ohhhh...
Yes, I can smell it on you.
String.Dest: 是啊，我从你身上闻得出来。

String.Source: Unh!
I was.
What trickery is this?
Blood of the sick. Blood of the weak. Blood of the unsuspecting noble lord. Savor each flavor. Unsuspecting, delicious prey.
String.Dest: 病人的血，弱者的血，毫无戒心的贵族老爷的血。各有特色，都是没有意识到危险的美味猎物。

String.Source: Lots of theories. Some say they feed on them like I feed on blood.
String.Dest: 有很多说法。有些人认为它们以灵魂为食，就跟我喝血一样。

String.Source: I wish I could help. The scrolls have changed hands so many times, it's impossible to keep track.
String.Dest: 希望我帮得上忙，这些卷轴易手太多次了，很难记得住。

String.Source: I've often asked myself that very same question. The blinding of my race was supposedly accomplished with a toxin.
String.Dest: 我也经常问自己同样的问题，我们种族的失明据说是一种毒素导致的。

String.Source: I absolve you of your sins!
I can actually assist you in that regard.
String.Dest: 实际上这方面我可以帮你。

String.Source: I cast you to Oblivion!
Spiders!
Follow me. I'll take you to it.
It's our time now.
Maybe we don't deserve that kind of happiness. Maybe it isn't for us.
String.Dest: 也许我们就不配拥有那种幸福。也许那就不是给我们准备的。

String.Source: Not again!
Let Auri-El smite you with his wrath!
Remember, I'm not leaving until Harkon's no longer a threat.
String.Dest: 记住，直到哈孔不再构成威胁前我是不会离开的。

String.Source: Perfect. This should do it.
Isran is the only one trying to do something about these vampires.
String.Dest: 尝试对付这些吸血鬼的也就伊士冉了。

String.Source: Unh!
Is there no end to this nightmare?
I settled in the city of Kvatch to write my memoirs and to find some peace and quiet.
String.Dest: 在科瓦奇定居下来，写我的回忆录，寻求一些安宁时光。

String.Source: Florentius? Really? I assumed Isran would want nothing to do with him.
String.Dest: 佛伦提乌斯？真的？我以为伊士冉不想跟他有任何关系了。

String.Source: We'll stop them, whatever it is they're up to...
String.Dest: 我们会阻止他们，粉碎他们的阴谋……

String.Source: Haran manages the inn in Winterhold. A forsaken place under the shadow of the mages guild. She will help us keep an eye on the mages.
String.Dest: 哈兰经营着冬堡的旅店，是个法师公会阴影中的破败地盘。她会帮我们盯着那些法师。

String.Source: Brought some soul husks or are you wasting my time?
String.Dest: 是带了灵魂荚来，还是单纯浪费我的时间？

String.Source: While you're looking for the vampires, I'll try to get us some help. Come find me at Dead Drop Falls when you've learned more.
String.Dest: 在你去找吸血鬼的同时，我要去找些帮手。等你了解更多后来密会点瀑布找我。

String.Source: In a manner of speaking.
Auri-El, give me strength to smite my foe!
String.Dest: 奥瑞-艾尔赐我力量毙敌！

String.Source: Walked right into a trap, and didn't even realize it until I was captured.
String.Dest: 我直到被抓都没意识到那是个陷阱。

String.Source: Well. After you.
Run, coward! Run and never return!
String.Dest: 跑吧懦夫！快跑，永远不要回来！

String.Source: I don't know. I honestly don't know. After all these years, it's a miracle even this much survived.
String.Dest: 我不知道，真的不知道。过了这么多年，现在还能剩下来这么多已经是个奇迹了。

String.Source: You really ought to become one of us again. Bad for your health, otherwise.
String.Dest: 你确实应该再成为我们中的一员。否则对你的安全不利。

String.Source: What was that?
Fair enough.
The power of my blood will purge that filth and make you whole again.
String.Dest: 我的血液的力量会净化掉那污秽，让你重新完整。

String.Source: Aye, I was. Didn't progress very far. Never did care for their attitude, acting like they're better than everyone else.
String.Dest: 啊，是的。没待多久。从不关心他们的态度，表现得就像是比别人都高贵一样。

String.Source: Then he found that prophecy, and... that was it.
String.Dest: 后来他找到了那个预言，再然后……就这样了。

String.Source: Wagh!
One moment I'm raising a sword against that necromancer, the next moment I found myself here. What happened?
String.Dest: 上一秒我还朝那个死灵法师挥剑，下一秒我就在这儿了。什么情况？

String.Source: Your death will be my gift to Auri-El!
String.Dest: 我会把你的死献给奥瑞-艾尔！

String.Source: Maybe I could have seen this coming. We could all be better off now.
String.Dest: 也许我该早点预见这点，那我们现在都会过得更好。

String.Source: Gave me a lot of time to think, that's for sure.
String.Dest: 不过这倒是给我了很长时间用来反思。

String.Source: Centuries of preparation will not fall to ruin because of you!
String.Dest: 几个世纪的准备不会因为你而白费！

String.Source: This has gone on long enough.
Good. I prefer to nip budding problems before they reach full bloom. I trust it wasn't too much of an effort on your part.
String.Dest: 很好。我喜欢在问题萌芽阶段就把它们扼杀，相信对你来说并不太费力。

String.Source: Well, I assume so. It cast a spell at me from some kind of strange black crystal.
String.Dest: 嗯，我想是的，他用一种奇怪的黑色水晶向我施法。

String.Source: What day is it? What year? What era even?
String.Dest: 现在是哪天？哪年？哪个纪元？

String.Source: Between you and me, there's too many of them. Can't trust the lot of them; never could.
String.Dest: 这话咱俩私下说，这里人是不少，但没几个可信的，永远不可信。

String.Source: "Saviour of Morrowind." Hm, that's good but it sounds too narrow of scope...
String.Dest: “晨风的救世主”。嗯，是不错但听起来范围太窄了。

String.Source: But... it's hopeless. I died here, just like all the others. Turn back. Turn back before you become the next victim.
String.Dest: 但……没希望了。我跟其他人一样死在这里了。回头吧，在你成为下一个受害者之前回去吧。

String.Source: We both realized that if Isran's even allowed us in here, he must be really concerned.
String.Dest: 我们都觉得，伊士冉愿意邀请我们，说明他一定非常忧虑。

String.Source: Arrggh!
Woah!
That part, I don't know. Once we have it, hopefully it'll be obvious.
String.Dest: 这部分我就不知道了。希望等咱们拿到它后，答案就能水落石出吧。

String.Source: Why in the world did you ever try putting armor on trolls?
String.Dest: 你到底为什么要给巨魔穿上盔甲？

String.Source: You will not leave this valley alive!
String.Dest: 不会让你活着离开这个山谷！

String.Source: Go ahead. After everything you've done, you should do the honors.
String.Dest: 去吧，你做了这么多，这份荣耀应该属于你。

String.Source: Guards! Kill her!
Look, I loved my father, but when he found that prophecy... that became his life. Everything else, even me and my mother... we just became clutter.
String.Dest: 听着，我过去是爱我父亲的，不过当他找到那个预言……那东西就占据了他的人生。其他的东西，甚至是我们母女……都变成了多余的。

String.Source: I beg your pardon, sir. I don't know what you're getting at, but whatever it is, it's not appreciated.
String.Dest: 对不起先生，我不知道你在说什么。但无论如何我都不感兴趣。

String.Source: I believe the secret to unraveling that prophecy is written in Serana's Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 我看这预言尚未揭秘的部分，就写在瑟拉娜的上古卷轴里。

String.Source: You'll think you're best of friends, until you find his fangs in your neck.
String.Dest: 你以为你们是最好的朋友，然后就发现他的獠牙咬住了你的脖子。

String.Source: The sky shouldn't look like that...
You're a fool to have become mortal again. I want nothing to do with you.
String.Dest: 你又变成凡人了，真是个蠢货。我不想跟你扯上什么关系。

String.Source: The sky is all wrong. What's happening?
String.Dest: 天色有大问题，出了什么事儿？

String.Source: Ancestors guide you.
If you want to find the remaining scroll, you'll have to consult with someone versed in magical knowledge. Perhaps at the College of Winterhold?
String.Dest: 你要是想找剩下的卷轴，得去请教精通魔法知识的人，或许在冬堡学院？

String.Source: With a sky like that, something bad is coming.
String.Dest: 天色都这样了，坏事就要来了。

String.Source: I'm afraid I'll need elven arrows if you want me to produce the Sunhallowed Arrows, and it seems you're all out of them at the moment.
String.Dest: 制作圣阳箭，需要精灵箭当材料，不过看来你也没带。

String.Source: You've no chance against a true vampire!
String.Dest: 面对真正的吸血鬼你毫无胜算！

String.Source: Then behold Auri-El's gift, my child. May it light your path as you seek tranquility within the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 那就来见证奥瑞-艾尔的恩赐吧，孩子。愿它照亮你在内殿寻求安宁的道路。

String.Source: Lead on.
Castle looks so big from down here. I mean, it is big, but, well, even bigger.
String.Dest: 从这个角度看城堡好大啊。我是说，它是很大，不过，嗯，这里看更大。

String.Source: I trust you're keeping my daughter safe.
String.Dest: 希望你能保护好我女儿的安全。

String.Source: You've got plenty of moths. What's our next move?
String.Dest: 你吸引了很多飞蛾，接下来做什么？

String.Source: It's disrespectful and dangerous to walk around here mortal. What were you thinking?
String.Dest: 在这走来走去既无礼又危险，凡人。你在想什么呢？

String.Source: Bleed Skyrim dry.
How is the work coming along?
Craven fool. This isn't over.
I'll be seeing you.
Your time is at an end!
One less monster in the world.
I think...
You need anything, talk to Master Dreth.
String.Dest: 有事的话去找德莱瑟大师吧。

String.Source: Let me guess. You're here for the treasure, aren't you? Just like all the others.
String.Dest: 我猜下，你是来找宝藏的吧？就跟其他人一样。

String.Source: In order to write the second volume of my opus, I need the notes from my first volume. Otherwise I need to do all of this from memory.
String.Dest: 为了写我巨著的第二卷，我需要第一卷的笔记，不然我得全凭记忆来写。。

String.Source: Arrrggghh...
Hmph. I tell you what's crazy.
Find Lord Harkon at once and ask him to please... "correct" the situation.
String.Dest: 立刻去找哈孔大人，然后请他……“纠正”这种情况。

String.Source: That was close...
Why is it so dark?
Don't. Get. Caught.
They tried me for murder, threw me on a prison ship and sent me to the jail in Vivec City.
String.Dest: 他们以谋杀罪审判我，把我扔到一艘运囚船上，然后送到维威克城的监狱。

String.Source: Hrargh!
Good. I knew I was sending the right woman for the job.
String.Dest: 很好。我知道我选对了干这活的人。

String.Source: The old water cistern. On some days, this would smell just... be glad you weren't here then.
String.Dest: 旧蓄水池，在某些日子，这闻起来简直……庆幸那会儿你不在吧。

String.Source: Until next time.
Perhaps. Do you have a way out of here?
String.Dest: 也许吧。你有出去的办法吗？

String.Source: I yearn to see the great dunes of Hammerfell once again.
String.Dest: 我渴望能再看一眼落锤的大沙丘。

String.Source: Really? Well, now, that make things easier...
String.Dest: 真的吗？那好吧，这样事情就简单多了。

String.Source: Show yourself.
I've found another beast hiding from the light of day.
String.Dest: 我发现了另一头躲避阳光的野兽。

String.Source: For Auri-El!
I'm on my way to Markarth to confer with my colleague, Calcelmo. I've no time to stop and chat.
String.Dest: 我在去马卡斯找同事卡赛莫交流的路上，没时间停下来闲聊。

String.Source: An axe imbued with magic fueled by the destruction of the unholy. With every victorious blow against an undead creature, its power grows.
String.Dest: 一把灌注了魔法的斧头，以毁灭邪恶为动力。力量会随着每次消灭亡灵生物而增长。

String.Source: You've reached the Wayshrine of Learning, Initiate.
String.Dest: 这里是学习之路龛，新人。

String.Source: Turns out you don't learn much from just sleeping with something.
String.Dest: 事实证明，光是一起睡觉什么也学不到。
