String.Source: Coming from one who murders vampires as a trade, I find it hard to believe your intentions are noble.
String.Dest: 你以猎杀吸血鬼为业，我很难相信你意图高尚。

String.Source: You got it. Horse, wagon and all. Plopped here without so much as a word.
String.Dest: 你猜对了。马，马车等等，一句话的功夫都没就栽到这里来了。

String.Source: Then I'll take it from your corpse! Kill her!
String.Dest: 那就从你的尸体上拿了！杀了她！

String.Source: But if this miracle were to somehow happen, I would gladly return to Tamriel.
String.Dest: 不过如果奇迹真的发生了，那我很乐意回泰姆瑞尔。

String.Source: After I was freed from prison, I decided to turn my life around. Give something back to the people of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 出狱后，我决定改过自新，做些事情回报晨风人民。

String.Source: Well, that's a ridiculous question. Everyone traveling through here has said that the Oblivion Gates have been opening all over Tamriel.
String.Dest: 嗯，这个问题太荒谬了。所有来这里的人都说全泰姆瑞尔各处都开启了湮灭之门。

String.Source: Nuhn!
I don't much like him, but I can't allow the people of Skyrim to be preyed upon by those monsters.
String.Dest: 我不太喜欢他，但我不能看着这些怪物去捕食天际的人们。

String.Source: Sorry, but that Moth Priest's comings and goings are none of my business, and none of yours either.
String.Dest: 抱歉，不过那个蛾祭司咋样了不关我的事，而且也不关你的。

String.Source: None of this makes any sense. What does she have to do with this?
String.Dest: 这没什么意义，她跟这事有什么关系？

String.Source: You test my patience with these questions.
String.Dest: 你问这些是在考验我的耐心。

String.Source: Any moment now, I'll find you...
Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

String.Source: This accursed place is nothing but a prison without walls.
String.Dest: 这该死的地方就是个没有围墙的监狱。

String.Source: Hunh!
I'll find you soon.
You've given me a great gift friend. The night air hums and the shadows are full of color.
String.Dest: 你给了我一件大礼，朋友。夜晚的空气在低吟，阴影中充满了色彩。

String.Source: But we'll put a swift end to that.
String.Dest: 但我们马上就会终结这种局面。

String.Source: Are you mad, woman? After the trouble I've gone through?
String.Dest: 你疯了吗，女人？你给我找的麻烦已经够多了。

String.Source: That's why I always try to be ready for anything.
String.Dest: 所以我才随时做好万全准备。

String.Source: I've never even seen this part of the castle before. Be careful. I don't know what might be around.
String.Dest: 我以前从来没有见过城堡的这一部分。当心点。我不知道周围会有什么东西。

String.Source: Follow your instincts.
Heh... wait, you're serious? This is the Redwater Den, purveyors of the best Skooma outside of Balmora.
String.Dest: 嘿……等等，你认真的？这是红水窝点，巴尔莫拉之外最好的斯库玛供应地。

String.Source: He's a little eccentric, but we can trust him and we could definitely use his skills.
String.Dest: 他有点古怪，但我们可以信任他，也肯定用得上他的技术。

String.Source: Finally! I never thought I'd see these again.
String.Dest: 终于！从没想过我还能再看到这些。

String.Source: Then go forth, child. May the enrichment of Auri-El strengthen your resolve as you undertake your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 那就继续向前吧，孩子。愿奥瑞-艾尔的充实强化你的决心，让你迈步通往内殿的旅途。

String.Source: I live in a dark world, where no light shines through. I carry this burden with every step I take.
String.Dest: 我活在无光的黑暗世界，每一步都是负重前行。

String.Source: We had always maintained an uneasy alliance with the underground-dwelling dwarves, and when faced with extinction we turned to them for help.
String.Dest: 我们一直和地下的矮人保持着不太稳定的联盟，当灭族之祸来临，我们向他们求助。

String.Source: Out of our way.
Are you seeing this? It's fantastic!
That's, what, your third? All right, only one left to go. I'll meet you there.
String.Dest: 那是，诶，你找到第三个了吗？好吧，只剩一个了，我会在那边等你。

String.Source: I feed when I'm hungry, I sleep when I'm tired, and I kill whenever I'm in the mood. Those are the things that are important to me.
String.Dest: 我饿了就吃，累了就睡，兴致来了就杀人。这些对我都很重要。

String.Source: Farewell.
Was it "Between the forces of good and evil."? No, no... that's not it...
String.Dest: 是“在善与恶之间”吗？不，不对……不是这么写的……

String.Source: If it'll get him closer to being in charge, he'll slit your throat without a moment's thought.
String.Dest: 如果割断你的喉咙能让他向权力更进一步，他不会犹豫的。

String.Source: Politics bore me terribly, but they're a fact of life here.
String.Dest: 政治快烦死我了，但确是这里生活的一部分。

String.Source: I'll return to Castle Volkihar as soon as I'm finished gathering my things.
String.Dest: 我一收拾完东西就回沃基哈尔城堡去。

String.Source: Taron Dreth. The world's foremost expert on Dwemer forging techniques. Now answer my question!
String.Dest: 泰荣·德莱瑟，世上最顶尖的锻莫锻造技术专家，现在回答我的问题！

String.Source: Excuse me? I told you we should go to my family's home.
String.Dest: 打扰一下？我跟你说了你应该带我回家。

String.Source: I think so. And thanks for asking.
String.Dest: 我觉得还行。谢谢你关心我。

String.Source: Take care.
This weather seems all wrong to me.
String.Dest: 我觉得这种天气太不正常了。

String.Source: I could see it in your eyes. You looked about a thousand leagues away.
String.Dest: 我能从你眼睛里看出来，就像是去了千里之外。

String.Source: A book? I'd hardly call a twenty-six volume epic simply a "book."
String.Dest: 一本书？我很难把一部二十六卷的史诗简称为“书”。

String.Source: Gods, don't let Isran see you like that. Look, I hear Falion in Morthal deals with this kind of thing. Go see him immediately.
String.Dest: 天啊，别让伊士冉看到你这模样。听着，我听说莫萨尔的法利昂会搞定这种事情。马上去找他。

String.Source: Let's head back up there and see if we can read the scrolls.
String.Dest: 我们回去看看能不能读卷轴了。

String.Source: Arkay and I think it could be a great advantage for us. You should look into retrieving it.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯和我认为这对我们来说是一个很大的优势，你应该把它们找回来。

String.Source: Welcome, Initiate. This is the Wayshrine of Illumination.
String.Dest: 欢迎你，新人。这里是启迪之路龛。

String.Source: This feels like the right way. I was starting to worry.
String.Dest: 我感觉这条路是对的。我都开始担心起来了呢。

String.Source: Well done! I said you'd return victorious, Arkay wasn't so sure. Wield it bravely.
String.Dest: 干得好！我说过你会凯旋而归的，阿尔凯还不确定。大胆地使用它吧，

String.Source: Might come in handy.
Where did the sun go?
Almost...
Precisely! The people will put pressure on the Dawnguard who are apparently murdering their fellows without provocation.
String.Dest: 正是如此！人们会对无缘无故谋杀自己同胞的黎明守卫施加压力。

String.Source: After 400 years, you think you'll be the one to take me down?
String.Dest: 我都活了400年了，你以为自己就是能放倒我的那个人？

String.Source: Wait... I hear something!
Then let's get going. I want to get there before my father has a chance to track us down.
String.Dest: 那赶快出发吧，得赶在我父亲追上我们之前赶到那里。

String.Source: But I got used to it.
Yiiee!
Can I cound on you to handle whatever smithing work we need done? Repairs, new armor, weapons...
String.Dest: 我能指望你来处理我们所有必需的锻造工作吗？修理、新盔甲、武器……

String.Source: I liked to explore. My parents almost never let me off the island, so yeah, I poked around down here a lot.
String.Dest: 我喜欢探索。我父母几乎不让我离开岛，所以，我老是在这里闲逛。

String.Source: Well, look what we have here... someone with flesh on their bones.
String.Dest: 嗯，看看是谁来了……有血有肉的活人啊。

String.Source: You'll be a welcome addition to the court, I'm sure.
String.Dest: 你会被欢迎加入宫廷的，我肯定。

String.Source: All I said to Potema was I thought she looked a little portly in that gown. How was I supposed to know?
String.Dest: 我不过是对波特玛说她穿那件礼服有些发福，谁晓得会成这样？

String.Source: Look at this place. Do you think anything would want to live here?
String.Dest: 瞧瞧这地方。你觉得有谁想生活在这里啊？

String.Source: Auri-El... save me...
Life here has many advantages, don't you agree?
String.Dest: 这里的生活有很多好处，你不同意吗？

String.Source: Rrargh!
Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

String.Source: I wanted to thank you for getting me this far. But after we get in there, I'm going to go my own way for a while.
String.Dest: 谢谢你带我走了这么远。不过在我们进去后，我想暂时按照我自己的方式行事。

String.Source: Needless to say, we can't abide that, as it would raise general alarm amongst the herd, to say nothing of the increased feeding competition.
String.Dest: 不用怀疑，我们不能容忍这种行为，这会引起牧群的普遍警觉，更不用说会导致更激烈的进食斗争了。

String.Source: May the light of Auri-El cleanse your soul!
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光净化你的灵魂！

String.Source: Ha ha. They seem quite taken to you now that you're carrying some of the tree bark.
String.Dest: 哈哈，看来它们很喜欢你，因为你拿着那些树皮。

String.Source: No, and if you're smart you won't either. I know he's one of your kind and all, but he's only looking out for himself.
String.Dest: 不，你要是够聪明也不会的。我知道他是你的同族，但他只在乎自己。

String.Source: You only delay the inevitable.
String.Dest: 你只是在拖延必将到来的事情。

String.Source: Hurrnhh...
Your staff... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: 你的法杖……神啊，是神光水晶造的！纯神光水晶！

String.Source: No... all these wasted months, or has it been years? I don't even remember how much time has passed.
String.Dest: 不……我这是浪费了好几个月，还是好几年？甚至不记得已经过了多久了。

String.Source: Well, we've got that knife. There has to be a use for it.
String.Dest: 嗯，刀是拿到了，肯定能派上用场。

String.Source: Need... to sleep...
It may seem cruel that we hold our thin-blooded kin in low esteem. But our needs must come before theirs.
String.Dest: 对瘦弱的血亲不屑一顾可能是有些冷酷，但我们的需求必然先于他们。

String.Source: Come, infidel, meet your end!
So let's hear it.
He has neglected using it for ages. If he wants it filled now, then grander things are afoot. This is good.
String.Dest: 他多年来一直忽视了对它的使用，如果现在想把它填满，那么就有更宏伟的计划要开始了。很好。

String.Source: The law will require proof that we can't present. And Jarls disapprove of bloodshed they haven't called for themselves.
String.Dest: 当权者会要求我们提供证据，但我们拿不出来。领主们不乐意见到自己没批准的流血事件。

String.Source: Okay. Hope this helps.
I once paid 3000 gold for this fungus that grows in giants armpits. Couldn't stand up for days, but no where as good as this stuff.
String.Dest: 我以前花了3000金币买了一种长在巨人腋窝的真菌。好几天都站不起来了，但没哪个货比这够劲儿。

String.Source: Only thirty more pages and my next volume will be complete.
String.Dest: 再写个三十几页，我的下一卷就写完了。

String.Source: Who's there?
No... I won't let you ruin centuries of preparations...
String.Dest: 不……我不会让你们毁了我几百年的筹划……

String.Source: You seem to have lost the gift that has been given to you. Perhaps Serana will grant it to you again.
String.Dest: 你好像搞丢了赐予你的礼物。也许瑟拉娜会再给你一次。

String.Source: Fight well.
It is time to cull the weak.
Something bad happens, word spreads. More bad things happen, people worry.
String.Dest: 只要出事，消息就会传开。出的事越来越多，人们就开始担心了。

String.Source: Door's shut tight. I bet those Resonators would open it, though.
String.Dest: 门关死了，我猜那些共振器能打开它。

String.Source: Hunh!
It's only a matter of time!
Let twilight fall and blood spill!
Good.
I never trusted those damn scrolls. Who knows what those things could have done to you... just look at Dexion.
String.Dest: 我从不相信这些该死的卷轴，谁知道会对你有什么伤害……看戴希翁就知道了。

String.Source: Oh no! What have I done?
I suggest you have Serana change you back. At once.
String.Dest: 建议让瑟拉娜把你变回去，马上去。

String.Source: Oh yes. They were an important part of the process here.
String.Dest: 啊对。它们是这个过程中的重要组成部分。

String.Source: Look at this place. No one's been here in centuries.
String.Dest: 看看这地方，像是几个世纪没人来过了。

String.Source: Nnnnyyaarrggh!
My time... has come...
I wonder if my family misses me? I wonder if they're still alive. How much time has passed?
String.Dest: 不知道家人们还想我吗？他们还活着吗？已经过了多久了？

String.Source: There you are!
This meant that we were vulnerable to the forces of Oblivion.
String.Dest: 这意味着我们很容易受到湮灭势力的攻击。

String.Source: Whatever is required! I am happy to do whatever is asked of me. I only wish to be useful.
String.Dest: 需要什么我就做什么！我乐意干任何让我去干的活儿，只希望能派上用场。

String.Source: Be careful who you trust. Not all of us have the court's best interests at heart.
String.Dest: 小心你信任的人，不是每个人都把宫廷的利益放在心上。

String.Source: W...Where's the sun?
Umm... this is the part where we usually get in the boat. You with me?
String.Dest: 嗯……这就是我们经常登船的地方。你要跟我一起吗？

String.Source: Return to me when your part is done. And may you enjoy your second nuptials.
String.Dest: 等完成你的任务后回来找我，祝第二次新婚愉快。

String.Source: Thanks again for all your help.
I don't think anyone's ever met the Ideal Masters. I'm not even sure anyone knows what they look like.
String.Dest: 我觉得没人曾遇见过理想之主。我甚至不确定有谁知道它们长什么样。

String.Source: I mean, why would that idea even cross your mind?
String.Dest: 我是说，你是怎么想到这个点子的？

String.Source: Not sure what you're waiting for... step into the light.
String.Dest: 不知道你在等什么……进光柱去啊。

String.Source: You can't stop the inevitable!
I'm going to rend you limb from limb!
May Auri-El's warmth imbue your body with strength.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔以力量温暖你的身体。

String.Source: Oh, gods...
I can see that.
What's that basin in the center signify?
String.Dest: 中间那个盆是做什么的？

String.Source: Child, my life ended long before you were born!
String.Dest: 孩子，我的生命在你出生前就结束了！

String.Source: Exactly. It's a lost art. Most necromancers just raise up whatever bodies are nearby. A simple trick, really. Child's play.
String.Dest: 正是如此。这是门失传的手艺。大部分死灵法师只能唤起周围的什么尸体。真的只是个小把戏。雕虫小技罢了。

String.Source: Well, unless my vision's playing tricks, there seems to be some sort of magical effect around you. Seems like we're on the right track.
String.Dest: 嗯，除非我的视力出了问题，你的周围似乎有某种神奇现象。看来我们的方向是对的。

String.Source: With Sunhallowed Arrows, you would be able to produce a much more spectacular effect... causing bursts of sunlight to envelop your foes.
String.Dest: 有了圣阳箭后，你能造成更壮观的景象……将敌人笼罩于日光爆发中。

String.Source: Yiiee!
That'll teach you.
A strange race, these Falmer.
String.Dest: 真是怪异的族类，这些伐莫。

String.Source: What am I doing here? I don't belong in a place like this!
String.Dest: 我在这里干嘛？我可不属于这种地方！

String.Source: Considering the state I'm in, I'd say that option vanished a long time ago.
String.Dest: 考虑到我现在的状态，这个选项应该早就没了。

String.Source: Feran is so good to me, allowing me to be his assistant.
String.Dest: 费兰对我很好，同意让我当他的助手。

String.Source: Yeeeaarrggh!
Enjoy yourself.
Parading around in that form won't do you any good here.
String.Dest: 在这儿到处炫耀那种形态对你没好处。

String.Source: Aggh!
Wha- who... you're that one from Helgen. Barely made it out of there myself. I hurt my back and I- I just need something for the pain.
String.Dest: 哇呼……你是海尔根那个。我自己差点就没逃出来。我的背受伤了，我呃需要点东西来止痛。

String.Source: What a wonderful place you've brought me.
String.Dest: 你带我来的这地方真不错啊。

String.Source: I will erase you from existence!
I don't care about politics. You want to fight over the throne with the rest of them, go right ahead.
String.Dest: 我不关心政治，你要是想和他们争王位，去就是。

String.Source: Only those who have suffered long can find the light within the shadows.
String.Dest: 只有久经磨难之人才能于阴影中找到光明。

String.Source: I can smell your blood!
String.Dest: 我能闻到你的血的味道！

String.Source: But of course, those days are gone now.
String.Dest: 不过当然了，那些日子一去不复返了。

String.Source: No, no more!
Huh? What do you want?
If anything happens to Serana, I'll have you answer for it.
String.Dest: 如果瑟拉娜有个什么三长两短，我拿你是问。

String.Source: Arrggh!
Filthy vampire!
By the time the compact had been completed, it was too late for us to even attempt to intervene.
String.Dest: 当盟约订立的时候，我们已经来不及干预了。

String.Source: None can deny your power now.
String.Dest: 再没人能否定你的力量了。

String.Source: Knowing that Serana shares that blessing with me, I'm already terrified that Harkon will get his hands on her.
String.Dest: 想到瑟拉娜跟我拥有同样的祝福，我就担心哈孔会把魔爪伸向她。

String.Source: So close...
Aggh!
It was.
I hope you're not trying to lord your abilities over me.
String.Dest: 希望你不要试图在我身上用你的能力。

String.Source: Ah, yes. Saint Jiub, Jiub the Eradicator, Jiub the Magnificent... I've earned a lot of those titles thanks to my campaign against the Winged Menace.
String.Dest: 啊对，圣鸠步，铲除者鸠步，伟人鸠步……我有许多的类似的头衔，这要归功于我对带翼威胁的战斗。

String.Source: This is pointless.
Speak with Sorine. She has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟索琳谈谈，她找你有事。

String.Source: Valindor of Riften has his ears in places that we'd love to listening in. Joining our family should increase our possibilities in the south.
String.Dest: 裂谷的瓦林多能监听我们想听的地方。让他加入家庭里来应该会增加我们在南方的机会。

String.Source: Have to put a stop to this menace...
I knew it!
Go destroy the feral beast before this becomes a problem.
String.Dest: 在这出问题之前去消灭那个野种吧。

String.Source: Shhh. They're watching us. Always watching.
String.Dest: 嘘，他们在监视我们，一直都在。

String.Source: Here we are, in view of seeing the prophecy fulfilled. These are truly great times.
String.Dest: 我们在此见证预言的实现，这是真正的伟大时代。

String.Source: Surely you've heard of "The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator: Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer."
String.Dest: 你一定听说过《铲除者鸠步的兴衰：晨风的英雄与丹莫的救世主》。

String.Source: Hide if you wish, it matters little to me.
String.Dest: 想藏就藏吧，对我无关紧要。

String.Source: The sunbursts would certainly hurt anything, but is especially devastating to the undead.
String.Dest: 日光爆发能伤害一切事物，但对亡灵生物尤其具有毁灭性。

String.Source: While it would fill me with joy to see the Chantry back to its former glory, that time has long since passed.
String.Dest: 虽然看到神殿恢复昔日辉煌让我欣慰，但那已经过了太久了。

String.Source: Without a Septim on the throne of the Empire, Dagon was able to leave Oblivion through the gates and attack.
String.Dest: 由于帝国缺少了塞普汀皇帝，大衮得以离开湮灭，穿过湮灭门发动袭击。

String.Source: And from the bottom of my heart, I thank you.
String.Dest: 以及我衷心地向你表示感谢。

String.Source: I will herald the fall of eternal night!
Another cave. I've spent enough time underground, myself, but if you want to go in, I'm right behind you.
String.Dest: 又是山洞，我在地下待的够久了，但如果你要进去，我就在你身后。

String.Source: Where is this "Darkfall Cave?"
I thought death was a release, not an eternity of torment.
String.Dest: 我还以为死亡是种解脱，结果是永恒的折磨。

String.Source: Spiders? All right, we can handle this. Come on!
String.Dest: 蜘蛛？好吧，对付得了。来吧！

String.Source: Without the royal blood flowing through you, you're one step away from the rest of the thralls.
String.Dest: 没有了王室血脉，你离其他奴隶就只有一步之遥。

String.Source: I've found the infidel!
Everything eventually tumbles down to you.
String.Dest: 一切最终都会压在你的头上。

String.Source: I suppose we're all a little crazy to be here, right?
String.Dest: 我们能来这儿都算是有点发疯了，是吧？

String.Source: They shouldn't be that hard to find. Shelves, tables... should be easy to find. She wouldn't have hidden them.
String.Dest: 它们应该不难找。架子、桌子……应该挺好找的。她不会把它们藏起来的。

String.Source: I was. Honestly, it took me up until now to figure out that my mother was really just as bad as he was.
String.Dest: 是啊。老实说，我现在才明白我母亲真的跟我父亲一样坏。

String.Source: "What do I mean," indeed!
By the Divines, what happened to the sky?
Hrargh!
Where are you!
Very clever, mother. Very clever.
If you're here for business, go ahead. Otherwise, get lost.
String.Dest: 来做生意的话就进去。不然就滚开。

String.Source: Simple. He says 'kill', I kill.
While that's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on, you could have been more discreet in your approach to the problem.
String.Dest: 虽然少了一个需要关注的麻烦制造者，但你本可以更谨慎的处理这个问题。

String.Source: Surprisingly, they agreed to protect us but demanded a terrible price... the blinding of our race.
String.Dest: 出乎意料的是，他们同意提供保护，但开了一个可怕的条件……全族失明。

String.Source: But the way she said it... "someplace he would never search." It was cryptic, yet she called attention to it.
String.Dest: 但她说的是……“一个他永远不会去找的地方”。意义不明，但确实引起了我的注意。

String.Source: Uhhhhh.
Show yourself!
What's going on? Where did the sun go?
String.Dest: 发生了什么？太阳去哪儿了？

String.Source: You watch yourself around him.
The darkness hums and we sing its praises. Sweet melodies. Sweet like the water that flows through their veins.
String.Dest: 黑夜在低吟，而我们为它献上赞歌。这甜美的旋律，甜美的如同漫过他们血管的水流。

String.Source: The Elder Scrolls vanished from the Imperial City around 175 of this era and have been scattered across Tamriel by forces unknown.
String.Dest: 上古卷轴在本纪元175年左右就从帝都消失了，被未知力量分散到了泰姆瑞尔各地。

String.Source: Step from the shadows, defiler.
String.Dest: 从阴影里出来吧，玷污者。

String.Source: Maybe you should leave the writing to an expert and stop making foolish suggestions.
String.Dest: 也许你该让专家来写书，别提愚蠢的建议了。

String.Source: Therefore, when an arrow is loosed from the bow, it produces a magical effect very similar to being burned by fire.
String.Dest: 因此当箭射出时会产生一种神奇功效，类似于被火灼伤。

String.Source: Unnff!
Watch yourself. The sky is a bad omen.
String.Dest: 自己小心点儿。天上有不祥之兆。

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

String.Source: Farewell.
At least the pain is gone...
Fine. If it will get you to leave me alone. Lead the way.
String.Dest: 好吧，只要能让你别来烦我。带路吧。

String.Source: Nervous?
How about sitting in your home, minding your own business and then suddenly getting attacked by a dremora and his cronies.
String.Dest: 你坐在家里，思考自己的事情，然后突然就被魔人和他的亲信们袭击了，如何？。

String.Source: Yeah, just around this bend.
I hope you've read the first volume of my epic by now.
String.Dest: 希望你已经读过我的第一卷史诗了。

String.Source: The Dawnguard apparently like killing vampires.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫显然更喜欢杀吸血鬼。

String.Source: The tyranny of the sun is over!
Alas, the vampire can cloud the minds of those he preys upon. It won't be easy to convince anyone he's other than he appears.
String.Dest: 唉，吸血鬼能模糊猎物的思维，要让别人相信他的真面目并不简单。

String.Source: I used to be one of the best traders in High Rock, you know. People would track me down just to see what I had for sale.
String.Dest: 你知道吗，我以前可是高岩最好的商人之一。人们常来找我，只为看看我卖的货。

String.Source: I... fell. When the earthquake hit. The ground just... opened up.
String.Dest: 我……摔倒了。地震发生时，地面就……裂开了。

String.Source: Good to see you again. It's becoming quite lonely out here.
String.Dest: 很高兴又见面了，在这里可太寂寞了。

String.Source: No.
You think I do this for my health? Come back when you've got the coin.
String.Dest: 你觉得我会为了这点钱赌命吗？有钱了再回来吧。

String.Source: I can't remember how long I've been here. Has it been a day or a century?
String.Dest: 记不得我在这儿呆了多久了。一天还是一个世纪？

String.Source: I know you're here somewhere.
This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known her than you've done in centuries!
String.Dest: 这个“陌生人”在我认识她的短短时间里为我做的比你几个世纪以来做的还要多！

String.Source: You can use my coffin whenever you like.
String.Dest: 你随时可以用我的棺材。

String.Source: Then we find out where she hid it. If she's still alive... well, as alive as she was before. Or is now. Or... you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 那我们就得找到她藏在哪里。如果她还活着……嗯，还和以前一样。或者现在也是。又或者……你懂我意思吧。

String.Source: Hyargh!
Speak with Orthjolf. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟欧兹约夫谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: Even a necromancer as seasoned as my mother would be willing to spend years trying to gain access to them.
String.Dest: 即便是像我母亲这样老练的死灵法师也愿意花上许多年时间，试着得到它们。

String.Source: Now, where was I...
Mother had something similar back home when she was tending the courtyard gardens to scrape moss and fungus off of the trees.
String.Dest: 我妈在家里打理庭院花园，刮掉树上的苔藓和真菌时，也有类似的东西。

String.Source: Well I need to do some testing on this new weapon, and I was thinking a live target would be helpful.
String.Dest: 嗯，我要给新武器做些实验，活靶子的效果可能更好。

String.Source: Accept my gift and I promise that you will learn the difference.
String.Dest: 接受我的礼物，我保证你就会知道不同之处了。

String.Source: If you're putting yourself in harm's way, you'd best be prepared. Take these.
String.Dest: 如果置身于危险之中，那你最好做好准备，这些拿去。

String.Source: The herd is becoming distressed, which makes it more difficult for us to slip in and out undetected.
String.Dest: 牧群们越来越忧虑，这让我们更难在不被发现的情况下进出。

String.Source: Dragons weren't enough. Now we've lost the sun too?
String.Dest: 有龙还不够，现在我们连太阳都没了？

String.Source: I no longer hunger, grow weary or feel anything but loneliness.
String.Dest: 不再饥饿，不再疲劳，除了孤独什么都感觉不到了。

String.Source: I can't believe I'm trading this for some dried up plants. Oh well, a sale's a sale.
String.Dest: 难以置信我要用这个换一些干枯的植物。好吧，就当是打折了。

String.Source: Oof!
Stay away from the Oblivion Gate I told them. Did they listen? Of course not.
String.Dest: 都告诉过他们离湮灭之门远点了，听进去了吗？当然没有。

String.Source: For the time being I will remain here, on the overlook and continue trying to keep the Sanctum free of the Betrayed.
String.Dest: 目前我将留在这里，继续俯瞰，尽量让背叛者远离圣地。

String.Source: Okay, let's head into the portal.
That's the last time I argue with a dremora.
String.Dest: 那是我最后一次和魔人争论。

String.Source: I'm putting a lot of faith in you. Don't let me down.
String.Dest: 我对你抱有很大信任，别让我失望。

String.Source: Leave this place.
Get back here!
While I ready things here, you find out what this woman means to the vampires. She must be important somehow.
String.Dest: 我这边准备的时候，你去看看这个女人对吸血鬼意味着什么。她一定很重要。

String.Source: Stay away from the crystals or you may find yourself becoming one of us.
String.Dest: 离那些水晶远点，不然你就跟我们一样了。

String.Source: Living here, I have access to magic I couldn't possibly imagine before.
String.Dest: 在这里生活，我能接触到以前无法想象的魔法。

String.Source: You're... you're mortal! What are you doing here like that?
String.Dest: 你……你是凡人！你这样在这儿干什么？

String.Source: Death to those who defile the Chantry!
For the time being, they will remain open.
String.Dest: 目前的话，它们仍旧是开放的。

String.Source: Monster? What monster? Don't know what you're game is, but I'll humor for a moment.
String.Dest: 怪物？什么怪物？不懂你在打什么主意，但我就幽默一下吧。

String.Source: Get out of here, monster.
Arkay says you'll be facing warlocks.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯说你会遇到术士。

String.Source: Do you know where he's staying now?
String.Dest: 你知道他现在住在哪里吗？

String.Source: I've been pouring over some of the tomes left here in the keep. Interesting stories, indeed.
String.Dest: 我一直在翻看堡垒里剩下的几本大部头书，确实是有趣的故事。

String.Source: Speak with Florentius. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟佛伦提乌斯谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: We meet again. That was quite the trek.
String.Dest: 又见面了，上次可真是走了好久啊。

String.Source: The Chantry was constructed near the beginning of the First Era to provide a retreat for those that wished to become enlightened.
String.Dest: 这座神殿建于第一纪元初期，用来为那些寻求启蒙之人提供静修地。

String.Source: We don't have many other options, do we?
String.Dest: 我们也快没得选了，不是吗？

String.Source: See those things in the alcoves up there? 'Kinetic Resonators', the dwarves called them. Strike them in the right order, and the doors should open.
String.Dest: 看到上面那些壁龛里的东西了吗？矮人们称它为“动力谐振器”。按正确的顺序击打他们，门就会打开。

String.Source: No, no, you must get away! If I'm seen talking to you, they'll blame me!
String.Dest: 不，你必须离开！要是被看到和你说话，他们就要责怪我了！

String.Source: Come on!
Darkness shroud you.
I see. You're simply here to stop the Tyranny of the Sun, despite the cost to Serana. Nothing else matters.
String.Dest: 我懂了。你来这里只是为了阻止太阳暴政，哪怕瑟拉娜会为此付出代价。这些对你来说都不重要。

String.Source: I've fought worse than you!
Yeeeaarrggh!
I got enough troubles on my mind just tryin' to scrape by out here.
String.Dest: 我脑子里的破事已经够多了，只想挣钱糊口。

String.Source: Right. Well, you can relax. I have it under control.
String.Dest: 确实。好吧，你可以放松了。这活儿我就包了。

String.Source: If you'll excuse me.
I wish I could say how many we numbered, but only a privileged few knew that, and they're dead now.
String.Dest: 我希望我能讲出我们有多少人，不过那只有少数关键成员知道，而他们现在都死了。

String.Source: Wait! ...Yes, yes there is. The shards we collected... they're pure Aetherium, remember? It's not much, but it'll do.
String.Dest: 等等！……是的，还有。我们收集的碎片……它们是纯净神光水晶，还记得吗？虽然不多，但也够了。

String.Source: Keep an eye out and let us know if you see any vampires.
String.Dest: 注意周围，如果你看见任何吸血鬼跟我们说一声。

String.Source: The light be with you.
But when it was all said and done, those elves were either slaughtered, vanished or gave up and took the dwarves' bargain.
String.Dest: 但当尘埃落定后，那些精灵要么被屠杀，要么消失或放弃，接受了矮人的提议。

String.Source: Hyargh!
The clouds, the sky... it's all wrong. Everything's wrong.
String.Dest: 云层，天空……不对劲，全都不对劲。

String.Source: See that thing?
What's that, Lord? Well, should I tell him?
String.Dest: 什么，大人？嗯，我应该告诉他吗？

String.Source: Arvak! Where are you, boy?
String.Dest: 阿瓦克！你去哪儿了，小家伙？

String.Source: You've found the Wayshrine of Radiance, Initiate.
String.Dest: 这里是光芒之路龛，新人。

String.Source: I can't see the sun. Where did it go?
String.Dest: 我看不见太阳了。它去哪里了？

String.Source: That one's far nicer though... almost ceremonial.
String.Dest: 这把刀就要好的多了……几乎是仪式用的。

String.Source: He said he was heading for Dragon Bridge next. I hope that helps you.
String.Dest: 他说他下一站要去龙桥。希望能对你有所帮助。

String.Source: Look around for the missing crests. Even in this mess, they should stick out.
String.Dest: 在周围找找缺失的纹样。即使这么乱，它们也应该很显眼。

String.Source: I'm ready when you are.
Do you have a moment? Gunmar and I have been talking and, well, we're slightly worried.
String.Dest: 你现在有空吗？甘马尔和我谈过了，嗯，我们有点担心。

String.Source: Speak with Gunmar. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟甘马尔谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: You're new here, so I'll explain this once. You feed from the thralls as much as you like. You kill them, and I'll split you in half.
String.Dest: 你是新来的，我就说明一次。想吸多少吸多少，但要是杀了他们，我就把你劈成两半。

String.Source: I mentioned that there was one more danger. Here it is.
String.Dest: 我说过还有一个危险，就在这里。

String.Source: Could you get this for me? I don't exactly have a lockpick...
String.Dest: 能帮我把这个拿出来吗？我实在没有开锁器了……

String.Source: But I'm warning you, do anything funny, and you'll regret it.
String.Dest: 但我警告你，你会后悔搞什么滑稽的事。

String.Source: I have. There was a time, years ago, when we were both members of the Vigilants, and both equally dissatisfied with them.
String.Dest: 是的。有段时间，几年前吧，在我们还都是警戒者的时候，我俩都对他们不满意。

String.Source: Enjoy your hunt.
Never much cared for folks who can't mind their own business.
String.Dest: 跟我生意无关的事情我从来不关心。

String.Source: Just hit them, and they'll... do whatever it is they're supposed to do.
String.Dest: 只要被打中，它们就会……发挥本来的作用。

String.Source: Here's everything I have. Sorry there isn't more.
String.Dest: 全都在这儿，抱歉没多的了。

String.Source: You'll be meeting my friend Arkay very, very soon!
It's daytime... Why is it so dark outside?
String.Dest: 现在是白天啊……外面怎么这么黑？

String.Source: Might be that I have, but I can't say for sure.
String.Dest: 也许我有，不过我可不敢肯定。

String.Source: I felt I had two choices. I could either live in fear of the night, or I could do something to help protect my people.
String.Dest: 我认为也就有两个选择，要么活在对黑夜的恐惧中，要么做点什么来保护我的子民。

String.Source: Your shield... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: 你的盾牌……神啊，是神光水晶造的！纯神光水晶！

String.Source: Oof!
Do you... hear something?
Assuming you have the smithing skills, you should be able to make this yourself at Gunmar's forge. Either way, I'll have some for sale soon.
String.Dest: 你要是掌握了锻造技能，应该可以在甘马尔的锻炉自己做一个。但无所谓，我很快就会开卖了。

String.Source: Well, if you do just let us know. We'll be in this area until we find them.
String.Dest: 好吧，如果你看见了，跟我们说一声。直到找到他们前，我们都会在这一片。

String.Source: He wanted me to take him out to Dragon Bridge, but I told him it ain't one of my stops.
String.Dest: 他想让我载他去龙桥，不过我跟他说我不去那边。

String.Source: "A powerful warhammer imbued with magic that places warding runes on the ground to obliterate it's wielder's foes."
String.Dest: “一把注满魔法的战锤，能在地面放置守护符文，来消灭使用者的敌人。”

String.Source: Come forward. You have nothing to fear here.
String.Dest: 过来吧，在这里你没什么好怕的。

String.Source: Let me take a look at it.
Well... so long as you don't tell anyone. Here take it and slip into a booth before someone notices.
String.Dest: 嗯……只要你能保密。拿去吧，在别人注意到你前进棚子里去。

String.Source: I was paid to assassinate some high-ranking official from House Redoran.
String.Dest: 我受雇暗杀瑞多然家的一些高级官员。

String.Source: Why? What do you want?
I'll darken the skies with her blood!
String.Dest: 我要用她的血遮蔽天幕！

String.Source: Florentius still worked with the Order from time to time.
String.Dest: 佛伦提乌斯还时不时地与教团合作。

String.Source: I was simply an addict who needed money for skooma. The stuff wasn't cheap, and murder always seemed to be in demand.
String.Dest: 我只是个瘾君子，需要钱来买斯库玛。这东西不便宜，而谋杀似乎总是很有市场。

String.Source: He tried to hire me for a trip to Dragon Bridge, but I told him that ain't one of my stops.
String.Dest: 他想雇我载他去龙桥，不过我跟他说我不去那边。

String.Source: I was in the midst of writing the second volume and they just threw me into this prison. It's unfair!
String.Dest: 我当时正在写第二卷，他们就把我扔进了这个监狱，不公平！

String.Source: My best beloved! I never knew the night held such vibrant color, or that the air vibrated so. And at times, it's as if the very shadows whisper.
String.Dest: 亲爱的！我从不知道夜里的色彩这么鲜艳，空气是这么有活力，影子们就像是在低语一样。

String.Source: If my friends could try this Redwater Skooma they might finally understand why I like slumming it with you commoners.
String.Dest: 要是我朋友们试过了这种红水斯库玛，他们可能就明白我为什么喜欢和你们这些平民住贫民窟了。

String.Source: It feels... old, doesn't it? Even by dwarven standards. No one has been here in thousands of years.
String.Dest: 感觉……很旧了，不是吗？即使是以矮人标准来看，几千年都没人来过这了。

String.Source: Really? You had to take the armor? Come on, leave me with a little dignity...
String.Dest: 真的吗？你要拿走这副盔甲？拜托了，给我留点尊严吧……

String.Source: Let's finish this!
When something is trapped in a soul gem, and then the energy is used for powering an enchantment, the remnants are sent here.
String.Dest: 当一个灵魂被关进灵魂石，然后能量被用来附魔时，剩下的部分就会被传进这里。

String.Source: Please... end this misery.
Come and face your destruction!
What's wrong with the sky?
An' maybe it won't.
Unnff!
I told you, I've prepared for this. It's going to work.
String.Dest: 跟你说过了，我准备好了的，会成功的。

String.Source: I was glad to find out not only the bad rumors were true.
String.Dest: 所幸不是只有坏传闻是真的。

String.Source: If I may, let me offer you a piece of advice.
String.Dest: 可以的话，我来给你个建议。

String.Source: Even so, I almost made it... another foot or two to the side, and the water would have broken my fall. But... nothing I could do.
String.Dest: 即便如此，我也只差一点……再往边上走一两步，水流就不会让我掉下来了。但是……我无能为力。

String.Source: Look at you. Mortal. Weak.
Not that I ever saw.
Yiiee!
Damn it, not again!
Her name was Valerica. She has been gone for so long now, I can only assume she has left this world, one way or another.
String.Dest: 她叫瓦蕾莉卡。离开了这么久，我只能假设她已经离世了，无论方式如何。

String.Source: Well, that's the thing. We don't know where he is. Haven't seen him in years.
String.Dest: 嗯，这就是问题所在了。我们不知道他在哪儿，很多年没见过了。

String.Source: So I'm thinking that wasn't the right way.
String.Dest: 所以我觉得那条路不对。

String.Source: You seem to have lost the gift that Lord Harkon gave you. I suggest you tell him at once.
String.Dest: 你好像搞丢了哈孔大人赐你的礼物，建议你马上告诉他。

String.Source: Why can't I just die? I fear I'm cursed to walk this desolate land forever.
String.Dest: 我为什么没有彻底死掉？怕是被诅咒要永远在这荒凉之地上游荡了。

String.Source: You can't beat us!
I hope you find Lord Harkon's court to your liking.
String.Dest: 希望哈孔大人的宫廷能让你满意。

String.Source: My ship... what happened to my ship? Where am I?
String.Dest: 我的船……我的船怎么了？我在哪儿？

String.Source: Come to visit this lost soul again?
String.Dest: 又来拜访我这失落的灵魂？

String.Source: Yes. I'm speaking of the Cliff Racer of course. Wretched things.
String.Dest: 对，我说的当然是峭壁行者。扭曲的生物。

String.Source: Supposedly, the bow draws its energy from the sun itself, which it why it shows up in that prophecy.
String.Dest: 据说弓的能量来自太阳本身，这就是为什么它会出现在那个预言里。

String.Source: That's it...
Your husband is such a soul, and the stars appear cooperative. Now is your chance.
String.Dest: 你的丈夫就是这样的灵魂，星星们也都很配合，机会已经给你了。

String.Source: Why do you think I was asking?
Hhyyaarrgghh!
Hm. Did I call it "The Great Hunt" or was it just "The Hunt?" Bah, I can't remember!
String.Dest: 嗯，我叫它“伟大狩猎”还是“狩猎”来着？呸，不记得了！

String.Source: Arkay warns it's baneful charge abates with each dawn. Something to keep in mind, I suppose.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯警告，每到黎明，它危险的充能就会减弱。这一点应该需要牢记。

String.Source: Where... am I...
He'll tell you what a monster I am, that I can't be trusted... You mark my words, it's him you need to worry about.
String.Dest: 他会告诉你我是个怪物，不值得信任……记住了，你该担心的是他。

String.Source: Rrargh!
There isn't any Aetherium here, is there? Damn it!
String.Dest: 没有神光水晶了，是吗？该死！

String.Source: Was it "Having the adoration of thousands..." No, wait. I could make it "the adoration of tens of thousands."
String.Dest: 是“拥有成千上万人的崇拜……”不，等等。我可以写成“数万人的崇拜”。

String.Source: Lead the way. Take me to this "monster" of yours.
String.Dest: 带路吧，带我去你说的“怪物”那里。

String.Source: If you're so worried about the trolls, why agree to let me go ahead with it?
String.Dest: 要是你这么担心巨魔的话，为什么又同意让我接着干呢？

String.Source: A swift death is all you deserve!
Bleed!
I am above the petty squabbles here. I have lived for far too long to be bothered with them.
String.Dest: 我不关心这里的琐碎争吵，我活的够久了，这些烦不到我。

String.Source: Suits me just fine.
Oh, I see. You've decided to cease pursuing your busy schedule and wish to talk now. How kind.
String.Dest: 哦我懂，你中止了繁忙的日程安排，现在就想谈谈，真善良。

String.Source: Have you made up your mind?
I hope you comprehend killing better than you comprehend speech.
String.Dest: 我希望你对杀戮的理解比对话语更好。

String.Source: Do you... know what you're doing?
We'll speak again soon.
String.Dest: 我们很快就会再聊聊的。

String.Source: You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me.
String.Dest: 你完全照我预言，把你迷人的同伴带到我这儿来了。

String.Source: Unnnnhhh...
It's good to speak to you again.
Hunh!
Don't leave, you'd have better dreams here...
String.Dest: 别走啊，你会在这儿做个好梦的……

String.Source: May not look like much, but my boat can get you there faster than walking.
String.Dest: 可能不太像，但坐我的船去那儿比走路快。

String.Source: Wagh!
See you.
Well, using an arrow with the bow that's been dipped in blood may cause it to function differently... corrupting its purpose.
String.Dest: 嗯，把箭涂上血液可能会导致功效不同……腐化它的意义。

String.Source: I can't wait to see the courtyard again.
String.Dest: 我等不及再次看见庭院了。

String.Source: And you think I do? Humph.
Maybe that's why I worked so hard to redeem myself once I was freed.
String.Dest: 可能这就是为什么我要在获释后努力赎罪。

String.Source: Ohhh... that's good stuff. Believe me friend, I've tried it all and this is the best.
String.Dest: 哦……好东西啊。听我的朋友，我全试过了，这个最好。

String.Source: Keep your neck covered!
Gah!
Any luck finding my pages yet?
It is good to know that I will not have to do it alone. I am glad this Dawnguard exists.
String.Dest: 所幸我不是独自复仇。多亏有了黎明守卫。

String.Source: All over Skyrim. It's my job to collect them. I try and keep something for everyone. For every taste, I mean.
String.Dest: 全天际。我的工作就是搜集他们。尽量保证给所有人都留点。哦我是说，留点不同口味。

String.Source: Nnnnyyaarrgghh!
I find it tiring to converse with someone in that form. Too much effort.
String.Dest: 我觉得和那种人交谈很累，太费劲了。

String.Source: You're always welcome to return here at any time, of course.
Otherwise, you're a threat to all of us.
String.Dest: 不然的话，你就是我们所有人的威胁了。

String.Source: I assume that the Arch-Curate was corrupted by them when they found a way to breach the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 我猜他们找到入侵内殿的通道后，腐化了教士长。

String.Source: Besides this isn't so bad when you think about it.
String.Dest: 再说，仔细想想也没那么糟。

String.Source: Well, go on! What are you waiting for?
String.Dest: 喂，接着走啊？你还在等什么？

String.Source: Your suffering will be legendary!
Let's check that out.
If he's moved on, perhaps the Vigilants there can tell you where he's gone.
String.Dest: 他要是离开了，可能那里的警戒者能告诉你去哪儿了。

String.Source: I'll hang back for a bit, but you're not leaving me behind. This is too important.
String.Dest: 我会稍微等一会儿，但你不能把我丢在这里，这很重要。

String.Source: He got to my target first and called the guard to cover his tracks. By the time I got there, the place was on alert.
String.Dest: 他先我一步找到了目标，然后呼唤卫兵以掩盖行踪。等我到那里时，已经处于警戒状态了。

String.Source: Indeed I was. I hunted down and killed every last one of them. Took years.
String.Dest: 当然了。我追捕并杀死了每一只峭壁行者，花了好几年。

String.Source: Gunmar, do you think I could borrow a troll?
String.Dest: 甘马尔，我能借一头巨魔吗？

String.Source: Must stay away from the Keepers... must stay away from the Keepers.
String.Dest: 必须离看守者远点儿……必须离看守者远点儿。

String.Source: Skyrim is ours!
Ah yes, I remember your Moth Priest now.
String.Dest: 啊没错，我现在想起来那个蛾祭司了。

String.Source: Help yourself to anything you need in my laboratory.
String.Dest: 如果你需要我实验室了的任何东西，请自便。

String.Source: What foul magic could put the sun out?
String.Dest: 什么邪恶魔法能熄灭太阳？

String.Source: Wait, please! Don't leave me for the wolves to find!
String.Dest: 拜托，等一下！别把我丢在这里喂狼！

String.Source: Aggh!
That is a personal matter, and one I will not discuss.
String.Dest: 这是我的私事，没得讨论。

String.Source: You're not welcome here as long as you're one of those... monsters.
String.Dest: 这里不欢迎你了，因为你是那群……野兽的一员。

String.Source: The sun... it's gone!
The more they worry, the more they talk about it. I've been hearing rumors for a bit now.
String.Dest: 他们越是担心，就越要讨论。我已经听到各种传闻有一阵子了。

String.Source: Arrrgh...
Bring the Dawnguard honor.
They could be underground, flying above us... They might be the ground. I have no idea.
String.Dest: 它们可能在地下，可能飞在我们头顶……他们可能就是大地。我不知道。

String.Source: Hrargh!
I miss my homeland, but I can't say that I miss all the noise!
String.Dest: 我想念我的故乡，但不想念那些吵闹！

String.Source: Well, that's certainly a line of thinking I can relate to.
String.Dest: 嗯，你这思路确实可以理解。

String.Source: What... have I done... Auri-Eil forgive me...
String.Dest: 我……都干了什么……奥瑞-艾尔宽恕我吧……

String.Source: I finally bit off more than I could chew.
If you wanted to bring some to me, I'd be happy to provide you some of the extract. It should help resist the draining aura of the crystals.
String.Dest: 如果你能给我带点的话，我很乐意给你点这种提取物。它能帮你抵御水晶的吸收场。

String.Source: We have not finished speaking yet. Come back at once.
String.Dest: 我们还没说完呢。赶紧给我回来。

String.Source: I'll also assume Vyrthur didn't exactly give you the option to stay your hand.
String.Dest: 我觉得维苏尔并没有给你手下留情的选择。

String.Source: Hunnnhh...
There you are. Looks like this place has been cleaned out. At least the shard is still here...
String.Dest: 你来了，看来这里已经被洗劫一空了，至少碎片还在这里……

String.Source: So maybe you could ask Isran if he knows anything? Just keep in mind that he... well, he might not like the idea.
String.Dest: 也许你可以问问伊士冉知不知道什么？但记着……他可能不喜欢这个主意。

String.Source: I know your friends would probably want to kill everything in here. I'm hoping you can show some more control than that.
String.Dest: 我知道你的朋友想把里面杀个精光。但希望你能多点耐心。

String.Source: At this rate, my first volume will be complete. Don't give up.
String.Dest: 照这个速度，我的第一卷就要完成了，别放弃。

String.Source: May you always prevail.
You're no match for me!
You seem tense. Join a booth and relax a bit. Or did you need another fix?
String.Dest: 你看起来很紧张，进棚子里来放松放松吧。或者你还想再来一口？

String.Source: No, no. You must speak with Lord Harkon, not me!
String.Dest: 不，你得和哈孔大人说话，不是我！

String.Source: Well, go on, take it!
It is a rather well-kept secret.
String.Dest: 这是个保守的很好的秘密。

String.Source: Gods curse you!
I lost two wives to vampires. I will avenge them.
String.Dest: 我两位妻子都死于吸血鬼，我要为她们报仇。

String.Source: Come on, I think it's over here.
See you around... if you live long enough.
String.Dest: 回见……如果你能活下去的话。

String.Source: You don't know what it's like, coming from a family like that.
String.Dest: 出生自这种家庭，你不知道这是种什么感觉。

String.Source: Now what was it I said to that prisoner? "Stand up, there you go. You were dreaming..." Yes, that was it.
String.Dest: 我对那个囚犯说了什么来着？“起来吧，好了。你在做梦……”对的，确实是这样。

String.Source: I'll admit, I don't know that I can trust you, but I know I can't rely on the Vigilants for anything. So we'll have to work together for now.
String.Dest: 我承认，我不清楚能否信任你，但我知道让警戒者干什么都靠不住。所以我们得合作了。

String.Source: Not the most solid construction here. About what I'd expect from... creatures like this.
String.Dest: 看到这些……生物，希望它们不是这里最坚固的结构。

String.Source: This is a waste of time.
Don't try and impress me. It only leaves you looking foolish.
String.Dest: 别装模做样的来吸引我，只会让你像个傻子。

String.Source: That damn dremora and his minions. They didn't even give me a chance to explain who I was.
String.Dest: 那个该死的魔人和他的爪牙，甚至没给我机会说清楚我是谁。

String.Source: The Chalice has been in Lord Harkon's possession for quite some time now. It is, when used properly, able to increase the potency of our powers.
String.Dest: 圣杯被哈孔大人保管了有段时间了，如果运用得当，能增强我们力量的效力。

String.Source: Your pathetic powers are no match for mine!
String.Dest: 你可怜的力量不是我的对手！

String.Source: These Vigilants never know when to give up. I thought we'd taught them enough of a lesson at their hall.
String.Dest: 那些警戒者从来不知道什么时候该放手。我觉得我们在他们的大厅已经给足他们教训了。

String.Source: Allow me to gather some of my things and I'll head back to Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 请允许我收拾下东西，我要回沃基哈尔城堡了。

String.Source: Their hearts are in the right place, of course. But Isran and I were never comfortable.
String.Dest: 当然了，他们出发点是好的，但我跟伊士冉一直都不对付。

String.Source: We'll need to watch our steps inside.
String.Dest: 我们得找找进去的楼梯。

String.Source: But please, do be discreet. Our aim isn't to stir the nest, just to skin a rat, reminding them that they are the prey.
String.Dest: 但请谨慎行事。我们的目的不是为了捣了老窝，只是剥老鼠的皮，提醒他们自己是猎物。

String.Source: This vampire showed up while you were away.
String.Dest: 你走了以后，这个吸血鬼就来了。

String.Source: The Hall was a place of respite, learning and comradeship, where a road-weary brother or sister could rest for a time in peace and comfort.
String.Dest: 大厅是一个休息、学习和结交朋友的地方，在那里劳顿的兄弟姐妹能安静、舒适地休息一会儿。

String.Source: Of course there are. Most of us spend our lives as nomads, traveling from place to place in our endless war against evil.
String.Dest: 当然有。 我们大部分人像游牧民一样生活，在我们与邪恶无止境的交战中，从一个地方走到另一个地方。

String.Source: Maybe we should try asking at the College of Winterhold. Sounds like something they'd know about.
String.Dest: 也许我们应该去冬堡学院问问，听起来他们应该知道。

String.Source: How about you pay for your habit like everybody else. We're not running a charity here.
String.Dest: 你还是和别人一样买单吧。我们这儿不是慈善机构。

String.Source: Looks like they're better at making traps than they are at making bridges.
String.Dest: 看来他们更擅长设置陷阱而不是架桥。

String.Source: Poor thing. I know it would have tried to kill us, but still...
String.Dest: 可怜玩意儿，我知道它想杀我们，但……

String.Source: This is incredible. It's like a whole other world.
String.Dest: 不可思议。像是另一个世界。

String.Source: Emptiness consumes me.
Does this ice feel a little... thin to you?
String.Dest: 你觉得这冰层是不是有点……薄了？

String.Source: That... has to be the place. I've never seen a building like that before.
String.Dest: 那里……肯定就是了，从没见过这样的建筑。

String.Source: Death is but a door, time is but a window. I'll be back.
String.Dest: 死亡只是一扇门，时间只是一扇窗。我终将归来。

String.Source: This is a statue of Auriel, but it's using the older signs of his power. This temple must be ancient.
String.Dest: 这是奥瑞艾尔的雕像，但用的是旧时的力量象征。这神殿年岁肯定很久了。

String.Source: You know I'm more than capable. Why are you bringing this up?
String.Dest: 你明知道我能胜任，为什么还这么问？

String.Source: I don't relax. Ever.
Why her? What significance does she have? We don't have enough information.
String.Dest: 为什么是她？她有什么重要性？我们没有足够的情报。

String.Source: Well, it seems the Dawnguard really is needed again.
String.Dest: 嗯，看来又需要有个黎明守卫了。

String.Source: As far as I know, though, it's never been held by a vampire. That would be a new one.
String.Dest: 据我所知，它从没有被吸血鬼持有过。看来要破记录了。

String.Source: How dare you set foot in here, after being infected by those foul beasts?
String.Dest: 你还敢进这里来？在被那些肮脏野兽感染后？

String.Source: I am at your service, as always.
String.Dest: 随时为您效劳，一如既往。

String.Source: Die, heathen!
That's of course if you're foolish enough to try it.
String.Dest: 当然，只有蠢人才会那么做。

String.Source: Good thing the boss heard that old farmer running his mouth off in the tavern about finding this place.
String.Dest: 还好老大听到酒馆里那个老农啰里吧嗦说要找到这地方。

String.Source: Anyway, enough of that. Let's get started.
String.Dest: 不管怎样，这就够了。我们开始吧。

String.Source: It was a little... quieter... back then. Guess a little vampire girl was enough to scare off the rats.
String.Dest: 那时候……这里……更安静些。我猜一个吸血鬼小姑娘也足够把老鼠们吓跑了。

String.Source: This leads out to the courtyard. Just head for the door.
String.Dest: 这条路通往庭院。去开门吧。

String.Source: Who knows? It was in shambles when we first got here.
String.Dest: 谁知道呢？我们第一次来这里的时候，它就已经一片狼藉了。

String.Source: My mother kept this a secret, even from me. She must have been up to something she thought was dangerous.
String.Dest: 我母亲一直保密，连我也瞒着。她一定是觉得这件事很危险。

String.Source: My mother had a bit of a thing for magical constructs. Not... not what you're thinking. She just found them fascinating.
String.Dest: 我母亲有个小爱好，喜欢有点魔力的东西。不……不是你想的那样。她就是觉得很吸引人。

String.Source: May Auri-El's radiance fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光以欢愉充实你的内心。

String.Source: I'll stain the ground with your blood!
Like I said, we were never very close. Not a lot of father-daughter bonding if you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 就像我说的，我们俩从来都不是很亲。我俩之间没太多父女之情，你明白我的意思吧。

String.Source: Sorry, I know you're trying to help. Thanks.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我知道你试着在帮我。谢谢。

String.Source: I murdered others for money. And before you think I belonged to some romantic or secretive guild, think again.
String.Dest: 我为了钱谋杀了别人，如果你认为我属于某个浪漫或者秘密的公会，还是算了吧。

String.Source: I know that in my head. But I just can't help feeling bad about... the way things are.
String.Dest: 我心里很清楚，但我就是忍不住难过……事实如此。

String.Source: Anyway, we should keep moving.
String.Dest: 不管怎样，我们得继续前进了。

String.Source: Die, damn it... die!
If you think of any juicy details to add to my work, let me know!
String.Dest: 你要是想到什么有趣的细节能加到我的作品，告诉我就行。

String.Source: Oh, they definitely were.
Oh, definitely. Mother would have plenty of those materials in her laboratory, you just need to find them.
String.Dest: 哦，当然了。我妈的实验室里有很多这样的材料，只需要找到它们就行了。

String.Source: Enough of these games. Fight me!
String.Dest: 受够了这些把戏了，来战斗吧！

String.Source: Leave me be.
So this is where your Vigilants came from? No wonder you look so lost all the time.
String.Dest: 所以你那帮警戒者就是从这里来的？怪不得你一直看上去无所适从。

String.Source: I await your answer.
Serana can change that. I suggest you ask her to.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜能改变这点。我建议你去找她。

String.Source: You are worth very little if you're not one of us.
String.Dest: 如果你不是我们中的一员，那就没什么价值。

String.Source: Mortals aren't allowed to freely roam the castle. Not even you.
String.Dest: 凡人是不允许在城堡里自由活动的，即使是你。

String.Source: Oh, wait a moment. Here, I want you to have these before you go.
String.Dest: 哦，等一下。收下吧，希望你走前带上这个。

String.Source: Damn it. How could I be so foolish?
You're mortal? What are you doing here like that?
String.Dest: 你是个凡人？在这里干什么？

String.Source: Then it's almost over. We can finally rewrite the prophecy as we see fit.
String.Dest: 我们终于可以按照合适的方式重写预言了。

String.Source: My wares? I, uh... Oh so sorry, I'm all sold out.
String.Dest: 我的货？呃……哦抱歉，都卖完了。

String.Source: It is a cherished gift you have given me. To see the world this way, through your eyes. It will only bring us closer.
String.Dest: 你给我的礼物太珍贵了，通过你的眼睛以这样的方式看待这个世界，我们一下就亲近了。

String.Source: Feed well.
Without the royal blood flowing through you, you're one step away from the rest of the thralls.
String.Dest: 没有了王室血脉，你离其他奴隶就只有一步之遥。

String.Source: You disrespect Lord Harkon by walking around here like that. Go see him at once, else you might find yourself in a cage.
String.Dest: 你在这儿到处乱走是对哈孔大人的不敬。现在就去见他，不然你会发现自己被关在笼子里。

String.Source: May your blades stay sharp.
You'd best beg Lord Harkon to turn you at once. Although, you do smell delicious...
String.Dest: 你最好去求哈孔大人马上把你变回去。不过，你闻起来是有点美味……

String.Source: Ask Serana to make you one of us again, before someone makes a meal out of you.
String.Dest: 在某些人把你当饭吃了之前，让瑟拉娜把你再变回来。

String.Source: You can't walk around here like some common mortal!
String.Dest: 你不能像个凡人一样在这儿到处乱走！

String.Source: You'd best find him soon. Ask him to change you back.
String.Dest: 最好快点找到他，让他把你变回去。

String.Source: Relieved... I think.
You would dare show up here after becoming mortal, abandoning all that Lord Harkon has granted you?
String.Dest: 你抛弃了哈孔大人赐你的一切，变成凡人后，还敢出现在这里？

String.Source: Hopefully he'll be gracious enough to make you one of us again.
String.Dest: 希望他会仁慈地让你再次成为我们的一员。

String.Source: Best not to damage our reputation. Let your actions be as discrete as possible.
String.Dest: 最好不要损害我们的声誉，尽可能地减少牵连。

String.Source: There you are. Give me a hand with this door, would you?
String.Dest: 你来了，帮我打开这扇门，好吗？

String.Source: I had thought better of you.
String.Dest: 我本来以为你能做得更好。

String.Source: And what exactly are you going to pay me with? Take a look around. Gold doesn't exactly win you any friends around here.
String.Dest: 你又有什么东西来付钱？看看周围吧，黄金在这里什么朋友都交不到。

String.Source: With any luck he'll bleed to death before anyone notices. A cold corpse will say what we want better than a warm one.
String.Dest: 走运的话，他会在被人发现前失血过多而死。一具冰冷的尸体比一具温暖的更能表达我们的意思。

String.Source: Die!
So these Initiates had to lug around a heavy pitcher of water. Marvelous.
String.Dest: 所以这些新人还得拖着沉重的水壶，了不得。

String.Source: Great gift of blood you've given me. Blood that boils in my veins. Gives me strength.
String.Dest: 你给我的血是份厚礼。它在我的血管中沸腾着，赐给了我力量。

String.Source: A wondrous blade... ahhh, never mind. Just take the darn thing.
String.Dest: 一把神奇的剑……啊，别在意。把这该死的东西拿走。

String.Source: Well, I hate to see it go, but what am I gonna do with it here anyway?
String.Dest: 嗯，不想看它没了，但在这里我留着又能干什么呢？

String.Source: I know this isn't an easy choice. Take your time.
String.Dest: 我知道这个做这个选择不容易。慢慢来。

String.Source: Well, it started with the followers of Mehrunes Dagon having Emperor Uriel Septim VII assassinated.
String.Dest: 好吧，梅鲁涅斯·大衮的追随者暗杀了皇帝尤瑞尔·塞普汀七世。

String.Source: It's not working! Try something else!
Almost as much as we like killing them.
String.Dest: 就跟我们喜欢杀他们一样。

String.Source: There's no escape.
This won't stop your soul from getting ripped out, but at least you'll look good when your corpse hits the ground.
String.Dest: 这并不能防止你的灵魂被撕裂，但至少当尸体落地时看起来还算完整。

String.Source: Oh sure, keep pestering me then, by all means.
String.Dest: 哦好啊，那就继续纠缠我吧，随你的便。

String.Source: They're a splinter group of the "Vigilants of Stendarr." A bit more ambitious, it seems.
String.Dest: 他们是“斯丹达尔警戒者”的一个分支，看来更有野心。

String.Source: Their focus will be shifted from us, giving us one less nuisance to deal with.
String.Dest: 他们的注意力会从我们身上移开，这样就少了一个麻烦。

String.Source: All right.
Isran has a problem with most people, if you haven't yet noticed.
String.Dest: 你要是还没发现的话，其实伊士冉对大多数人都有意见。

String.Source: Arkay and I will stand triumphant!
The one with the ruined castle? Don't you know that place is cursed? Even seasoned sailors steer far around that place.
String.Dest: 有座城堡废墟的那个？你不知道那地方被诅咒了吗？即使是经验丰富的船家也会远远绕开那里。

String.Source: It is good to have powerful allies, is it not?
String.Dest: 有强大的盟友是好事，不是吗？

String.Source: Yeah, all right. I'll take you as far as I can.
String.Dest: 对，没错。我能带你去尽可能远的地方。

String.Source: Speak with Isran. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟伊士冉谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: You just enjoy the fresh air and leave the rowing to me.
String.Dest: 你就享受下新鲜空气吧，划桨交给我了。

String.Source: The people of Morrowind were so grateful to have the roads safer again, they took to calling me "Saint Jiub" and then the other names followed.
String.Dest: 晨风人民非常感激道路又安全了，他们开始称我为“圣鸠步”，其他的头衔也就都来了。

String.Source: Looking to hire a boat?
Stay alert.
Don't get in my way, and I won't tear your arms off. Simple, isn't it?
String.Dest: 别挡我的路，我就不会撕烂你的胳膊。很明了，不是吗？

String.Source: Sometimes he doesn't even have to say it.
String.Dest: 有时候他都不需要开口。

String.Source: Absolutely. I can only do twenty at a time, so if you want the rest of your arrows blessed, let me know.
String.Dest: 当然了，我一次只能做二十支，所以如果还想让我赐福于剩下的箭，就告诉我。

String.Source: I was sure I heard something.
Definitely. You must think my life has been so strange. It sounds like your family wasn't nearly as fractured as mine.
String.Dest: 当然了。你一定觉得我的生活非常奇怪。听起来似乎你家不像我家一样这么不圆满。

String.Source: Back to the darkness with you!
Where is this "Darkfall Cave?"
Back, godless beast!
I think he had regular contact with the Vigilants, and I know Isran kept track of them...
String.Dest: 我想他经常和警戒者有联系，而伊士冉一直都在追踪他们。

String.Source: Can you feel it? You're now so much more than you were before.
String.Dest: 感觉到了吗？你比以前成熟多了。

String.Source: Speak with Vingalmo. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟文加莫谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: Be sure to enjoy some of our Redwater Skooma before you leave.
String.Dest: 离开前一定要享受享受我们的红水斯库玛。

String.Source: All I remember is that damn dremora and his minions bursting into my home and sending me to their prison.
String.Dest: 我只记得那该死的魔人和他的爪牙闯进我家，把我送到监狱了。

String.Source: The potency of the Blood Chalice is beginning to wane. We must infuse it with more power if we are to keep it's fullest effects.
String.Dest: 血石圣杯的效力开始减弱了。如果我们要保存它最大的效果，就必须给它注入更多力量。

String.Source: You're welcome here, as long as you don't overfeed on the thralls.
String.Dest: 这里欢迎你，只要你不过量进食。

String.Source: You must be clever. Find a way not to be caught or accused of murder.
String.Dest: 你得机灵点，想办法不被抓或被指控谋杀。

String.Source: Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end!
String.Dest: 很遗憾，这意味着你已经完全没用了！

String.Source: Very well. I suppose a moment or two of my time couldn't hurt.
String.Dest: 好吧，花点时间陪你聊聊也无妨。

String.Source: I'm still hard at work on the second volume of my epic.
String.Dest: 我还在努力写我的第二卷史诗。

String.Source: You contracted a disease, perhaps, but you are no true vampire.
String.Dest: 也许你染上了疾病，不过你还不是一个真正的吸血鬼。

String.Source: Those twisted creatures you call Falmer, I call the Betrayed.
String.Dest: 那些你们叫伐莫的扭曲生物，我称之为背叛者。

String.Source: This is the most peace and quiet I've had in a lifetime.
String.Dest: 这是我一生中最平静的时光。

String.Source: I will say only that we did not part on good terms.
String.Dest: 我只能说，我们是不欢而散。

String.Source: They were both drunk with power, and pulling in different directions.
String.Dest: 他俩都沉迷于力量，然后分道扬镳了。

String.Source: The only things that can survive here are the Ideal Masters, the undead and the souls themselves. Well, if you want to call that "living."
String.Dest: 唯一能在这里生存的只有理想之主、亡灵以及灵魂。嗯，如果你管那叫“活物”的话。

String.Source: Keep going...
I immediately realized things must be pretty bad. Looks like I was right.
String.Dest: 马上我就意识到情况很糟糕，看来没错。

String.Source: These pages meant the world to me. Thank you!
String.Dest: 这几张纸对我来说就是全世界，感谢你！

String.Source: Still, those of us here have as much of an obligation to protect Skyrim as any other, wouldn't you agree?
String.Dest: 不过，我们这些人和其他人一样都有保护天际的义务，不是吗？

String.Source: The reason I'm standing in front of you as only a whisper of my former self should tell you that.
String.Dest: 跟你说，站在你面前的我，只是过去自我的低语回声罢了。

String.Source: A cadre of lesser beasts has become a nuisance, taking too bold an approach to their feeding.
String.Dest: 有个低级野血种的骨干变得令人生厌，对食物们的方式过于大胆。

String.Source: I miss the warm sunshine. Green grass. Blue skies. I miss being alive.
String.Dest: 我怀念暖阳，青草，蓝天。我想活下去。

String.Source: Skyrim will be purged of your filth!
Half the pages, eh? You're getting there.
String.Dest: 已经找到一半了？已经快成功了。

String.Source: You again? I thought it was clear I was busy.
String.Dest: 又是你？我不是已经告诉过你我很忙了么。

String.Source: That's over half of the pages found. Keep it up!
String.Dest: 已经有过半书页找回来了，继续加油！

String.Source: I can't believe I lost those pages.
String.Dest: 不敢相信我把那些手稿给弄丢了。

String.Source: Hey, where are you going. I need those pages!
String.Dest: 嘿，你要去哪儿？我需要那些手稿！

String.Source: Climb on in and let's get this over with.
String.Dest: 爬上来吧，让我们把这一趟跑完。

String.Source: You did it! You have all of my pages!
String.Dest: 你做到了！我全部的手稿！

String.Source: Hello there.
How dare they cast me from the Battlespire! I will make them pay dearly.
String.Dest: 他们怎么敢把我从战斗神塔赶出去！我要让他们付出沉重的代价。

String.Source: Speak with Feran Sadri. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟费兰·萨德利谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: "Just step into the painting" he said. Yeah, sure... like it's that simple.
String.Dest: “走进画里去吧。”他这么说的。对，当然了……就这么简单。

String.Source: I'm guessing it's the one you found in Dimhollow Crypt. Says it's got something really important to say to you.
String.Dest: 我猜这就是你在幽空地穴发现的那个吧，它说有要紧事跟你说。

String.Source: Damn Akaviri Shaman... how could I know it would trap my soul?
String.Dest: 该死的阿卡维尔萨满……我怎么知道那东西会困住我的灵魂？

String.Source: They mentioned some place called Dimhollow Crypt, but I don't know where that is.
String.Dest: 他们提到了什么幽空地穴，但是我不知道它在哪里。

String.Source: I doubt very much that they'll hasten to exact revenge for freeing me from the ruins.
String.Dest: 我很怀疑它们会因为把我从废墟中放出，而立刻报复回来。

String.Source: Now, where was I...
I can't decide which parts of you I'd like to keep for a while...
String.Dest: 我可没法保证你身上哪块儿能完整保留下去……

String.Source: Slay any vampires lately have we?
String.Dest: 我们最近杀过吸血鬼吗？

String.Source: I remember she use to keep a small journal. See if you can dig it up.
String.Dest: 我记得她过去经常写日记。看看你能不能找到它。

String.Source: When I rewrite those pages... they'll see what they missed.
String.Dest: 等我重写这几页……他们会发现自己错过了什么。

String.Source: That was a dark time in my life. I did a lot of things I ended up regretting.
String.Dest: 那是我生命中的黑暗时光。我做了很多后悔的事。

String.Source: An old jetty where boats would bring supplies to the castle. Once we moved in, it never got used, along with the rest of the undercroft.
String.Dest: 一个旧码头，船只可以通过它给城堡运送补给。自从我们搬进来以后，就再也没用过它和其他的地下室了。

String.Source: Hmph. Beat me to it, this time.
Feast on life, friend.
Sounds useful.
Farewell, friend. May the radiance of Auri-El fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: 再见了朋友，愿奥瑞-艾尔的光辉充实你的内心。

String.Source: Once I get it done, first I'll publish a regular edition, then the folio. I'll be rich!
String.Dest: 等我写完，先出版一本普通版，然后是对开本。我马上就要赚钱了！

String.Source: Perhaps it was nothing after all.
The water from the spring makes the skooma so much more potent, we'll have all the thralls we'll ever need.
String.Dest: 泉水能把斯库玛变得非常浓烈，我们的奴隶也将无穷无尽。

String.Source: Something's not right here. Be careful. I think we may be in for some trouble.
String.Dest: 这里不对劲，注意了。我认为可能要碰上麻烦了。

String.Source: Absolutely. I've spent a great deal of time perfecting an extract that increases the potency of soul husks.
String.Dest: 当然可以。我花了很多时间完善一种可以提高灵魂荚效力的萃取物。

String.Source: What's happening...
Speak with Gunmar. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟甘马尔谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: You've heard of the Bloodstone Chalice?
That bark's pretty fragrant, no wonder the moths are attracted to it.
String.Dest: 那树皮很香，难怪飞蛾会被它所吸引。

String.Source: Fine, don't worry about it. When we get in, you won't have to babysit about me any more.
String.Dest: 没事，别担心。我们进去以后，你就不用再给我当保姆了。

String.Source: What's that, Lord? Well, should I tell her?
String.Dest: 什么，大人？嗯，我应该告诉她吗？

String.Source: May the blessings of Auri-El protect you as you climb the road to the Inner Sanctum and final enlightenment.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔的赐福在你通往内殿和最终启蒙的攀登路上守护你。

String.Source: Why?
I trust you're faring well?
The sun's gone dark. What could be happening now?
String.Dest: 太阳变黑了。到底发生什么事儿了？

String.Source: As I've told you before I'm a Daughter of Coldharbour... offspring to Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 正如之前跟你说过的，我是冷港之女……莫拉格·巴尔的孩子。

String.Source: If I can remain useful, those above me will see fit to keep me here.
String.Dest: 要是我能一直有用，上头会看到留我在这里的好处。

String.Source: Unfortunately, we were constantly at war with the Nords who claimed the land as their ancestral home.
String.Dest: 不幸的是，我们一直在和声称这片土地是祖先家园的诺德人战斗。

String.Source: Look at the sky... the Divines must be angry with us!
String.Dest: 看天上……圣灵一定降怒于我们了！

String.Source: Take care of yourself.
Careful now... this area's not stable.
String.Dest: 小心了……这个区域不稳定。

String.Source: Every last drop of your blood is mine!
These Vigilants are nothing but talk.
String.Dest: 这些警戒者也就会空谈了。

String.Source: Ah, it's so good to breathe again!
String.Dest: 啊，能再次呼吸真是太棒了。

String.Source: We left together, but that partnership didn't last very long. I didn't agree with some of his methods.
String.Dest: 我们一起离开了，但并没有合作太久，我不能接受他的一些做法。

String.Source: Climb on in the boat and get comfortable.
String.Dest: 上船来吧，怎么舒服怎么来。

String.Source: My what? Wait. That means...
String.Dest: 我的什么？等等，这意味着……

String.Source: Give Harkon my regards... and a dagger to his heart.
String.Dest: 替我向哈孔送上我的问候……还有一把插在他心脏里的匕首。

String.Source: Where'd you come from?!
Oh. Well, I'm not sure. I guess it came from fighting them, thinking "what could be worse?"
String.Dest: 哦，嗯，不好说。我猜可能是在和它们战斗时想过“还有更糟的情况吗？”

String.Source: Speak with Fura Bloodmouth. She has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟“血口”芙拉谈谈，她找你有事。

String.Source: Rargh!
Or maybe her plan was to come back, but she was stuck here. We won't know until we find her.
String.Dest: 也可能是她打算回去，不过她被困在这了。在我们找到她之前，我们什么都不知道。

String.Source: Your deception is useless. I'll find you.
String.Dest: 你的骗术没用的，我会找到你。

String.Source: Well Arkay isn't going to intervene... not here, not now. Best point yourself towards Morthal, find a man named Falion.
String.Dest: 呃阿尔凯没法介入的……此时此刻不行。你最好去莫萨尔，找一个叫法利昂的人。

String.Source: Not even the gods will show you mercy!
Nnnnyyaarrggh!
It's difficult to have a conversation with you like that. Would you mind changing back?
String.Dest: 你这样很难交流，介意变回去吗？

String.Source: Come now, you think you stand a chance against me?
String.Dest: 来啊，觉得自己有机会打败我是吧？

String.Source: He can help you. Go now, please, before you lose control of yourself.
String.Dest: 他能帮你的忙，快去吧，别让自己失控了。

String.Source: Keep that in mind, will you?
Is this a dwarven city? I can't believe they'd let it get so run down.
String.Dest: 那是矮人城市吗？不敢相信他们会让它这么破败。

String.Source: You have done well.
Huhn!
Speak with Garan Marethi. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟加兰·玛瑞锡谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: Well, that's the second one - we're halfway there. I'll keep looking. See you soon!
String.Dest: 嗯，那是第二个了——我们还差一半了，我会接着找的，再见！

String.Source: Thanks again for searching. I don't know what I'd do without my pages.
String.Dest: 再次感谢你愿意帮我寻找，真不知道没了那些手稿该怎么办。

String.Source: New blood, eh? Let's get something very clear.
String.Dest: 新人吗？我们先来把话说清楚。

String.Source: Well, I think it's specifically the black ones. I don't know if the Soul Cairn takes just any leftovers.
String.Dest: 好吧，我觉得确切讲黑色的是这样。我不知道灵魂石冢是不是只带走了些残渣。

String.Source: No. I try to avoid it. Always seems to end in an argument. You?
String.Dest: 没有，能不聊就不聊了。我们最后总会吵起来，你呢？

String.Source: Testing this will require some extra precautions, I think.
String.Dest: 我想，测试这个估计需要一些额外防护措施。

String.Source: So, this is snow elf magic. Incredible.
String.Dest: 看来，这就是雪精灵魔法，太妙了。

String.Source: Yes. They swarmed the Chantry in vast numbers until we were completely overrun. We never really stood a chance.
String.Dest: 是的，他们大量涌入神殿，直到完全占领了这里。我们一点机会都没有。

String.Source: Seems the previous incarnation of the Dawnguard had, at one time, some interesting toys.
String.Dest: 看来从前的黎明守卫曾有过一些有趣的玩具。

String.Source: That's enough!
Arkay says you'll be facing forsworn.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯说你会遇到弃誓者。

String.Source: As long as we can get this "Vyrthur" out of the Sanctum, I think they'll be happy to just hand it over.
String.Dest: 只要我们能把这个“维苏尔”赶出圣堂，估计他们会很乐意把弓交给我们。

String.Source: The effect around you looks an awful lot like that huge column of light shining on the dais.
String.Dest: 你周围的样子就像巨大光柱照在台上。

String.Source: Are you okay? Almost thought I lost you there... you went white as the snow.
String.Dest: 你没事吧？我快以为你要没了……你变得跟雪一样白。

String.Source: You've mistaken me for someone who cares about you and your problems. Find someone else.
String.Dest: 你把我认成对你的麻烦感兴趣的人了，找别人吧。

String.Source: By the Divines... you're infected. What are you doing here?
String.Dest: 圣灵啊……你被感染了，还待在这儿干什么？

String.Source: Was there something else?
Hunh!
They probably would have tried to kill her, and that has a way of souring relationships.
String.Dest: 他们可能会试图杀了她，关系也就恶化了。

String.Source: Hunh!
He'll cozy up to you, use his honeyed words to get you to lower your guard, then use you and throw you away when he's done with you.
String.Dest: 他会讨好你，用甜言蜜语让你放松警惕，然后在利用完后把你扔掉。

String.Source: If we follow that path around, we can find the other switch.
String.Dest: 如果我们沿着这条路走，就能找到另一个开关了。

String.Source: Quite bold, to return here as a mortal. Some will take offense.
String.Dest: 胆子真大啊，以凡人身份回到这里。有些人要发火了。

String.Source: If you're not one of us, you're just another piece of meat.
String.Dest: 如果不是我们中的一员，你就是另一块肉罢了。

String.Source: Gah!
And then realizing a troll with armor is even more intimidating.
String.Dest: 然后意识到穿了盔甲的巨魔更具威胁。

String.Source: You can't hide from us!
Must be gone now.
Huhn!
Can't help you, friend. I might remember better if my pockets weren't so light.
String.Dest: 朋友，我没法帮你。不过如果我的钱包没这么扁的话，没准我记性能好点。

String.Source: This is no place for you.
Terrible, simply terrible.
Wagh!
Hmmm, I'd say five of them would be enough.
Maybe you're finally ready to list to me.
String.Dest: 也许你终于想起帮我了哈。

String.Source: Oh, look at you. What've you done? You've gone and gotten yourself turned into one of them.
String.Dest: 哦，看看你自个儿吧，都干了些啥？你已经把自己变成它们中的一员了。

String.Source: Most of our learning could be found there. We always studied our enemies, so we might better learn how to defeat them.
String.Dest: 那里能找到我们大多数的研究成果。我们一直在研究我们的敌人，所以我们最好学会击败他们的方法。

String.Source: It's like I said, I'm not going to talk about it.
String.Dest: 我说了，我不想谈这件事。

String.Source: You've found her journal!
I never knew what became of Kvatch. I wonder if they were triumphant without me.
String.Dest: 我不知道科瓦奇后来怎么样了，没了我他们还能不能打赢。

String.Source: Damn! What the...
You have no dominion here!
Nature will take care of the rest.
This stranger aligns herself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to her?
String.Dest: 这个陌生人和那些把你当成野兽一样追捕猎杀的人站在一边，我却还要把你托付给她？

String.Source: Good to see a new face here. Especially one that isn't attached to an elf.
String.Dest: 很高兴在这儿看到一张新面孔，尤其是与精灵无关的。

String.Source: I had just moved from my ancestral home in Morrowind to the continent of Cyrodiil.
String.Dest: 我刚从晨风老家搬到希罗帝尔。

String.Source: A pristine copy of my first volume. Only one in print, actually.
String.Dest: 我第一卷的原始副本，实际上只有一本印出了。

String.Source: Another time, perhaps.
If you need anything, say the word. I can still forge a decent blade.
String.Dest: 需要什么尽管说。我还能打造一把像样的刀。

String.Source: Still, it's my duty to help protect Skyrim as much as any Nord's, don't you think?
String.Dest: 不过，我和诺德人一样都有保护天际的义务，不是吗？

String.Source: Fine, suit yourself.
You here for the Skooma? Head around inside, there's a trap door that'll lead you in.
String.Dest: 来买斯库玛的？朝里面走，有个活板门带你进去。

String.Source: Not a lot of our kind here, I see. Suppose I shouldn't be surprised.
String.Dest: 看来，这里没几个我们的同族。我也不该太过惊讶。

String.Source: Well, I don't know. Everything seemed fine until that dremora attacked me. I only heard later about the gates from the other souls.
String.Dest: 嗯，我不知道。在那个魔人袭击我之前好像一切都好。后来我才从其他灵魂那里听说湮灭之门的事。

String.Source: I'll tell you, the only thing more surprising than hearing from Isran after all these years was hearing that he wanted my help.
String.Dest: 跟你说，这么多年来除了比伊士冉给我写信更让我惊讶的，就是听他说需要我帮忙。

String.Source: The steam! Quick, shut it off!
Watch yourself.
Nothing. Well, not on purpose. But you never know. The strangest accidents can happen at any time.
String.Dest: 没什么。嗯，不是故意的。但谁知道呢，意外随时都可能发生。

String.Source: Another elf, I see. I'm sure Vingalmo will be sizing you up as we speak, trying to figure if you're friend or foe.
String.Dest: 又来个精灵，对吧。文加莫肯定会在我们说话时打量你，试图弄清你是敌是友。

String.Source: Orthjolf, for example. He'll tell you he means well, but believe me, he can't be trusted at all.
String.Dest: 比如欧兹约夫，他会告诉你他是善意，但相信我，他根本不可信。

String.Source: This place tears at me as though I'm still alive and being drawn and quartered. I... can't stand it anymore.
String.Dest: 这地方撕扯着我，活着都感觉像是五马分尸。我……我再也受不了了。

String.Source: What about Auriel's Bow? Do you know where we can find it?
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔之弓呢？你知道哪里能找到吗？

String.Source: I used to hide down here and look out at the sea. Usually when my father was in a bad mood.
String.Dest: 我过去常常躲在这里看海。通常是我父亲脾气不好的时候。

String.Source: The way I've heard it, the sun represents the connection from our world to theirs.
String.Dest: 据我所知，太阳代表着我们世界与他们世界之间的联系。

String.Source: Did you know I visited Elswyr once? What a strange and wondrous place.
String.Dest: 你知道我去过艾斯维尔吗？多么奇妙的地方啊。

String.Source: Rrargh!
Your existence is meaningless!
Begone, foul creature!
I heard what's going on. The vampires, the Dawnguard, all of it. I wanted to help, so here I am.
String.Dest: 我知道出了什么事，吸血鬼，黎明守卫，这一切。我想帮忙，所以就来了。

String.Source: Vampires, perhaps?
Now that the first volume's complete, there's no much left to do but begin work on the second.
String.Dest: 既然第一卷已经完成，那么除了写第二卷就没什么了。

String.Source: But none of that matters now.
String.Dest: 但现在这些都不重要了。

String.Source: Exactly.
Get out while you can.
String.Dest: 趁你还有机会赶紧走吧。

String.Source: His ambition will justify any actions. Put your faith in him, and you will regret it, I promise you.
String.Dest: 他的野心会通过行为表露。相信他你肯定会后悔，我保证。

String.Source: I've waited so long for this moment. We found it. At last.
String.Dest: 我等这一刻等了太久了，找到了，终于。

String.Source: Then it's almost over. We can finally put an end to this ridiculous prophecy.
String.Dest: 那就快结束了。我们终于能了结这可笑的预言了。

String.Source: Then I'll take it from your corpse! Kill him!
String.Dest: 那就从你的尸体上拿了！杀了他！

String.Source: Guards! Kill him!
You... you know too much. I can't afford to let you live.
String.Dest: 你……你知道的太多了。我可不能让你活下去了。

String.Source: Still over half the pages are missing. Keep trying.
String.Dest: 还有超过一半的手稿，继续努力。

String.Source: If you were to bring me some good quality elven arrows, I could imbue them with the proper incantations and rituals.
String.Dest: 要是你能给我带来一些高质量的精灵箭，我会用专用的咒语和仪式为它们注能。

String.Source: Yes. These vampires are a new threat, and a truly deadly one.
String.Dest: 是的。这些吸血鬼是新的威胁，而且是真正致命的威胁。

String.Source: Of course not. He's an elf, isn't he?
String.Dest: 当然不了，他是个精灵，不是吗？

String.Source: What?
They represented the steps the Initiates took on the path to total enlightenment.
String.Dest: 它们象征新人通往完全启蒙之路上的步伐。

String.Source: Rargh!
Sometimes you get one who comes willingly, but most have to be convinced to join us here.
String.Dest: 有时候能遇到自愿来的，但大多数人得说服后才会加入这里。

String.Source: I see you, heathen!
The reason I was down there... and why I had the Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 我在那里……以及拿着上古卷轴的原因。

String.Source: And I'm not half the vampire Lord Harkon is. Truth is I'm better with a forge than I am with claws or fangs.
String.Dest: 但我的力量不及哈孔大人一半。比起用利爪和獠牙，还是看锻炉更适合我。

String.Source: Vampires enjoy stalking their prey. Passing among us undetected emboldens them. Makes them feel powerful, untouchable.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼享受跟踪猎物的过程，置身我们之中而不被发现壮了他们的胆，他们感到强大，不可触及。

String.Source: For the Dawn!
Have to say, I'm glad that's over.
String.Dest: 不得不说，我很高兴一切都结束了。

String.Source: You've gone from a between-meal snack to the darling of the court. Impressive.
String.Dest: 你已经从餐间小吃变成宫廷红人了，了不起。

String.Source: Next thing I knew, I arrived here.
String.Dest: 接下来我记得就到了这里。

String.Source: Nature will do the rest.
Then I see nothing preventing my return to Tamriel.
String.Dest: 那么我觉得没有什么能不让我回泰姆瑞尔了。

String.Source: Try... taking it out?
Auri-El bless you, child. For you are a step closer to the Inner Sanctum and everlasting wisdom.
String.Dest: 奥瑞-艾尔祝福你，孩子。你离内殿和永恒的智慧又近了一步。

String.Source: So you found the Moth Priest. Let's see you find the rest of the Elder Scrolls all on your own.
String.Dest: 看来你找到了蛾祭司，让我们拭目以待你能不能自己找到剩下的上古卷轴。

String.Source: All those things had been building for a while. You have no idea how long I wanted to say that to her.
String.Dest: 这些事情都过了一段时间了，你不知道我有多想对她说这几句。

String.Source: Hey there, friend. If you're looking for a fix, you're at the right place. Just head on down the trap door.
String.Dest: 嘿朋友。你要是想整两口，那就是来对了。顺着活板门往下走就是了。

String.Source: An old escape tunnel from the castle exits there. I think that's our way in.
String.Dest: 那里有个老旧的逃生通道。我们可以从那里进去。

String.Source: Don't get yourself killed!
Do you think Florentius really talks to Arkay?
String.Dest: 你认为佛伦提乌斯真的在和阿尔凯说话吗？

String.Source: Certainly not enough to devolve them into the sad and twisted beings they've become.
String.Dest: 当然还不足以让他们变成现在这样悲伤而扭曲的生物。

String.Source: Maker... it can't be. Serana?!
It's Durnehviir... he's here! Defend yourselves!
String.Dest: 是杜耐维尔……他来了！保护好你们自己！

String.Source: Ran off, I suppose.
He claims to serve loyally, but he really covets the throne. He sees himself in charge someday.
String.Dest: 他自称忠心耿耿，实则觊觎王位，认为他自己终会掌权。

String.Source: You know you can't win, so all you can do is hide...
String.Dest: 知道自己赢不了，所以只能藏起来了……

String.Source: I can't imagine that opinion has changed.
String.Dest: 我难以想象他会改变这种看法。

String.Source: I was close with my mother, but she just kept feeding me her opinions of him, and eventually I started believing them.
String.Dest: 我以前跟我母亲很亲密，不过她总是向我灌输她对我父亲的那些看法，最终我开始相信了。

String.Source: I guess we should have seen this coming... Moth Priest, moths... they're apparently related in some way.
String.Dest: 我们是该预知这些事情……蛾祭司，蛾子……他们显然在某种程度上有联系。

String.Source: I'll take you as far as I can, but I'm not hanging around and it's gonna cost you extra.
String.Dest: 我会带你到尽可能远的地方，但我不会逗留，而且你得多出些钱。

String.Source: No, but there's no way she would have left it in Tamriel.
String.Dest: 不，不过她也没理由把它们留在泰姆瑞尔啊。

String.Source: I'm not backing down!
Nooo!
I try and meet the needs of everyone here. No reason for any of us to go hungry.
String.Dest: 我尽力满足这儿每个人的需求，我们没理由挨饿。

String.Source: Wow.
Oof!
Excellent, here you are.
Yeargh!
Yeeeaarrggh!
He was obsessed with power. She was obsessed with seeing him fail. It was just so... toxic.
String.Dest: 我父亲沉迷于力量。而母亲沉迷于看他落败。这真是……有毒啊。

String.Source: Pitiful sorcery. You'll not stay hidden long.
String.Dest: 可悲的巫术，你躲不了多久的。

String.Source: Now that my brother's dead, it's quite possible I'm the last of our kind.
String.Dest: 现在我兄弟已死，我可能是族中最后一人了。

String.Source: Rargh!
I've heard the rumors around Skyrim. I know something's going on. And I've seen the vampires.
String.Dest: 我听说了天际的传言，知道出了什么事，也见过了吸血鬼。

String.Source: You there, bring me another bottle of skooma... wait, who are you? You look like fun. Pull up a seat friend.
String.Dest: 那边儿的，给我再来一瓶斯库玛……等等，你是谁？看来有点意思，拉个座位过来吧。

String.Source: Hunh!
Oh, this is simply getting infuriating!
Often I take on tasks that Garan or Feran find distasteful, or... beneath them.
String.Dest: 我经常接一些加兰和费兰讨厌的任务，或者说……有失他们身份的任务。

String.Source: Nothing you can't handle.
You never asked me if hiding me in that tomb was the best course of action, you just expected me to follow you blindly.
String.Dest: 你从没问过我，把我藏在坟墓里是不是最好的选择，只希望我盲目地跟着你。

String.Source: Serana and her mother disappeared long ago.
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜和她母亲很久以前就失踪了。

String.Source: The corpse is to be the message, not the attack.
String.Dest: 尸体是用来传达信息的，不是用来袭击。

String.Source: There's no need for that kind of talk. I said it was possible.
String.Dest: 没必要那么说，我说的是可能。

String.Source: Speak with Isran. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟伊士冉谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: Keep your guard up.
Ironically, our undoing came at the hands of our own people.
String.Dest: 讽刺的是，灭族是由我们自己的人民导致的。

String.Source: Revel in your power.
I got nothing on me. If you're looking for Skooma, head on downstairs.
String.Dest: 我身上啥也没有。你要是在找斯库玛，就去楼下。

String.Source: There were splinter groups that resisted the agreement, and even some that sought alternate alliances.
String.Dest: 有一些分裂组织抵制该协议，有的甚至去寻求别的同盟。

String.Source: It's symbolic. I don't expect you to understand.
String.Dest: 这是象征性的，我不指望你们能理解。

String.Source: How long would they have to do that?
String.Dest: 他们走完全程要花多久？

String.Source: Taron Dreth, the world's foremost expert in Dwemer metallurgy. Not that you would know anything about that.
String.Dest: 泰荣·德莱瑟，世上最顶尖的锻莫冶金专家。虽然你对此一无所知。

String.Source: Look out!
Gunmar and I have a lot of work to do here, so we were hoping that maybe you could track him down.
String.Dest: 甘马尔和我还有很多工作要做，所以希望你能找到他。

String.Source: Good.
Did I start with my ride on the prison ship, or was it before that?
String.Dest: 我是在运囚船上开始写的，还是那之前就开始了？

String.Source: That's one of them Imperial scholars, right? Old man with a gray robe?
String.Dest: 是个帝国学者，对吗？穿灰袍子的老头？

String.Source: Do you need something?
The secret is our mystic Redwater Spring. The magic in the waters opens the mind to experience Skooma in a way like never before.
String.Dest: 秘密在于我们的神秘红水泉。水中的魔力能让你敞开心灵，以前所未有的方式来体验斯库玛。

String.Source: You're dead!
Sadly, the magic used to construct these wonders were lost long before I arrived here.
String.Dest: 可惜，建造这些奇迹的魔法在我来这里之前就失传了。

String.Source: What are you talking about? I don't know anything about any monsters.
String.Dest: 你说啥呢？我不懂在说什么怪物。

String.Source: But those temples paled in comparison to the glory of the Chantry and its wayshrines.
String.Dest: 但这些神殿与奥瑞艾尔神殿的光辉相比黯然失色。

String.Source: He's up there, on the balcony. Come on!
String.Dest: 他就在那儿，在露台上。来吧！

String.Source: If you think you can accomplish that feat, knowing hundreds before you have tried and failed, then I wish you the best of luck.
String.Dest: 你要知道，在此之前已经有上百人尝试却为此丢了性命。如果你觉得能完成这项使命，那我祝你好运。

String.Source: No answer? Then I'll take it from your corpse!
String.Dest: 不回答？那就从你的尸体上拿了！

String.Source: How dare you trespass here!
Settle down. No need for threats. Lead the way. But I'm warning you, I'm not afraid to fight you if I have to.
String.Dest: 打住，没必要威胁，带路吧。但我警告你，真要打一架我也不怕你。

String.Source: My brother in darkness. While it's good to see you, we'll keep up appearances, yes?
String.Dest: 黑暗中的兄弟啊，虽然很高兴见到你，但我们还是得保持体面，好吗？

String.Source: He's a priest of Arkay. Well, he was. It's... it's complicated.
String.Dest: 他是个阿尔凯祭司。嗯，以前是。这……有点复杂。

String.Source: Good hunting.
I beg your pardon, ma'am. I don't know what you're getting at, but whatever it is, it's not appreciated.
