String.Dest: 对不起女士，我不知道你在说什么。但无论如何我都不感兴趣。

String.Source: I'll find you yet, coward.
Hmm...
And if he's that concerned, the situation must be pretty bad. Make sense?
String.Dest: 如果他真的如此，那情况肯定很糟糕。明白了吗？

String.Source: Hey, so... before we go in there...
String.Dest: 嘿，所以……在我们进去之前……

String.Source: Ah, it's good to be home again.
"And without any regard for my safety, I fearless charged the enemy!" No, much too dramatic...
String.Dest: “我不顾自身安危，勇敢地冲向敌人！”不行，太戏剧化了……

String.Source: Fairly well, I'd say. I've managed to get this far without blowing myself up, I still have all my limbs...
String.Dest: 还行吧，我觉得。目前为止我还没有被炸飞，四肢也还完整。

String.Source: The day is dark as night! What's happening?
String.Dest: 天黑得跟晚上一样！出什么事儿了？

String.Source: I will banish you from this castle. I will spare your life this once, but after that, you are prey.
String.Dest: 我会把你驱逐出这座城堡。我这次饶你一命，不过在那以后，你就是猎物了。

String.Source: Did you really come here expecting to claim Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: 你们还真的来这儿拿奥瑞艾尔之弓了啊？

String.Source: But once we threw our lot in with Molag Bal... people just don't think about their families anymore. "Power takes precedence," he always said.
String.Dest: 不过一旦把自己交给莫拉格·巴尔……人们就不太考虑他们的家庭了。“力量第一。”他总是这么说。

String.Source: I would gladly accept my fate at their hands if it robs Harkon of victory.
String.Dest: 如果能夺走哈孔的胜利，我很乐意让他们来掌控我的命运。

String.Source: Time is almost irrelevant to the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: 时间对理想之主来说几乎无关紧要。

String.Source: What is it now?
That make you feel any better?
Farewell, friend. May the glow of Auri-El shield you from your enemies.
String.Dest: 再见了朋友，愿奥瑞-艾尔的光辉阻挡你的敌人。

String.Source: Look at the sky!
Well, we're definitely not going to find our way out from here.
String.Dest: 好吧，我们铁定是不知道怎么出去了。

String.Source: Certainly. I can only do twenty at a time, but I see that won't be a problem in this case.
String.Dest: 没问题。我一次只能做二十支，不过我看这次倒不是个问题。

String.Source: We're not going to have a problem with your little... project, are we?
String.Dest: 你的小……研究不会给我们带来麻烦，对吧？

String.Source: Has it been that long? Oh my.
String.Dest: 过了那么久了吗？哦天哪。

String.Source: The bow draws its power from Aetherius itself, channeling it through the sun.
String.Dest: 这把弓从光界吸取能量，并引导来穿越太阳。

String.Source: I've planted some new herbs in the courtyard garden. I hope they'll grow.
String.Dest: 我已经在庭院花园里种了些新草药。希望它们能长起来。

String.Source: The bow was said to be carried by Auri-El himself into battle against the forces of Lorkhan in ancient and mythic times.
String.Dest: 据说奥瑞-艾尔曾亲自佩弓与洛克汗的军队作战。

String.Source: Any other ideas?
Leave me be!
Since it's your first time... sure. Find a booth and enjoy.
String.Dest: 既然你头一回来……好吧。找个棚子去享受吧。

String.Source: Now my work will never see the light of day. My name will be forgotten.
String.Dest: 现在我的书再也不能面世了，我的名字也会被忘记。

String.Source: All right, so obviously not this way, either.
String.Dest: 好吧，很明显也不是这条路。

String.Source: It's not about you! You've been so great in getting me back here.
String.Dest: 不是你的问题！你能带我回这里真是太棒了。

String.Source: Why does the sky look like that?
That's it, out there to the north. We used to keep a boat around here to get there and back.
String.Dest: 到了，就在北边。我们过去经常在这附近放一艘船载我们往返。

String.Source: Just what my mother told me. I've also studied a little bit on my own, but there's not much.
String.Dest: 就是我母亲告诉我的那些。我也自己做了点研究，但不是很深入。

String.Source: Please, turn back... before it's too late...
What do you think I mean?
Your guess is as good as mine. This place looks pretty different from when I was locked away.
String.Dest: 我知道的也不比你多。这地方跟我被关起来时候相比，似乎变了挺多。

String.Source: There were ten of them in all. Find them for me, please, I beg you!
String.Dest: 一共有十页。帮我找到它们，拜托了！

String.Source: Speak with Florentius. He has something for you.
String.Dest: 跟佛伦提乌斯谈谈，他找你有事。

String.Source: Watch your back.
Keep your eyes open.
Fight bravely, friend.
Fine. You could've just said 'no'.
String.Dest: 好吧，你直接说“不行”不就完了。

String.Source: Hhyyaarrggh!
Over here!
Divines guide you.
Our empire had temples to some of the other deities: Trinimac, Syrabane, Jephre and Phynaster rounded out the rest.
String.Dest: 我们的帝国还有一些其他神灵的神殿：崔尼玛克，希拉班，杰符瑞和菲纳斯特。

String.Source: All right, here we go.
You dare walk away from me? In my own hall, before my own court, you dare insult me?
String.Dest: 你竟然敢从我身边走开？在我的大厅，当着我的手下的面，你竟敢侮辱我？

String.Source: I look forward to our next meeting.
Well, if I were a betting woman, I'd say it's a scraper of some sort.
String.Dest: 嗯，要是让我来猜，我觉得这是某种刮刀。

String.Source: A soul gem... that's what it was. Then... I must be... Oh, no.
String.Dest: 一块灵魂石……当时就是那样……我一定是……哦不。

String.Source: You'll figure something out. We must be vigilant and self sufficient if we are to defeat these monsters.
String.Dest: 你会找出办法的。要打倒这些怪物，我们就必须保持警惕和自全。

String.Source: Now, volume two begins! What else?
String.Dest: 现在，第二卷要开始写了！还有什么事？

String.Source: You need to get cured, friend. You're a danger to the Dawnguard otherwise.
String.Dest: 你得把自己治好，朋友。否则你会对黎明守卫构成威胁。

String.Source: That's actually only a fraction of its potential.
String.Dest: 实际上这只是它的一部分潜力。

String.Source: Get it wrong, and... well. You've seen what happened when I tried it.
String.Dest: 打错了的话，那么……好吧，你也看到我尝试的后果了。

String.Source: Yes, yes. Aren't you lovely looking like that. Do you mind?
String.Dest: 好好好，你这副模样够好看的了，还是收起来吧？

String.Source: That one's far nicer though... almost ceremonial.
String.Dest: 这把刀就要好的多了……几乎是仪式用的。

String.Source: I doubt there's any other place like it in Skyrim. It's beautiful.
String.Dest: 天际应该再没有这种地方了，很漂亮。

String.Source: You get yourself to Morthal at once. Speak with Falion. He'll help you. But go do it now.
String.Dest: 你现在就去莫萨尔，跟法利昂谈谈，他会帮你的，但必须马上去。

String.Source: No, this was different. He never trusted Florentius, always thought him to be trying to get attention.
String.Dest: 不，这不一样。他从来就不信任佛伦提乌斯，一直认为他就是想引起别人的注意。

String.Source: I'll give you a chance to redeem yourself. Go to Morthal and speak to Falion. He can help you. Otherwise you're dead to me.
String.Dest: 再给你个自我救赎的机会，去莫萨尔找法利昂。他能帮你，不然你死定了。

String.Source: All right. Here's the extract.
You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me.
String.Dest: 你完全照我预言，把你迷人的同伴带到我这儿来了。

String.Source: Soul what? What in the name of Vivec are you talking about?
String.Dest: 灵魂什么？维威克在上，你说什么？

String.Source: Where did you find it? Tell me!
String.Dest: 你在哪儿找到它的？快告诉我！

String.Source: Aggh...
Falmer, if I understand Arkay correctly.
String.Dest: 如果我没理解错阿尔凯的意思，有伐莫。

String.Source: Yes, but when I was here it wasn't so... crumbly. This used to be a city.
String.Dest: 来过，不过我过去来的时候，这里没这么……摇摇欲坠。这里曾经是座城市。

String.Source: I've been performing a little research on the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 我一直在对血石圣杯做些研究。

String.Source: Let's keep looking around.
Don't worry, we'll find the glade.
String.Dest: 别担心，我们会找到林地的。

String.Source: I hope we reach Ancestor Glade soon.
String.Dest: 希望我们能马上赶到先祖林地。

String.Source: Mother had something similar back home when she was tending the courtyard gardens to scrape moss and fungus off of the trees.
String.Dest: 我妈在家里打理庭院花园，刮掉树上的苔藓和真菌时，也有类似的东西。

String.Source: There's no hiding from me...
String.Dest: 没有人能在我眼皮底下藏起来……

String.Source: Stand aside.
Beware the dragon Durnehviir, destroyer of souls and harbinger of the fallen.
String.Dest: 小心恶龙杜耐维尔，它是灵魂毁灭者，堕落的先驱。

String.Source: When you get back to Tamriel, let them know I still exist.
String.Dest: 等你回到泰姆瑞尔，告诉他们我还活着。

String.Source: The screams... they pierce my mind. I can't stand it!
String.Dest: 那些尖啸声……它们穿透了我的大脑。受不了啦！

String.Source: Seems that I'm the only of my kind here. Suppose I shouldn't be surprised.
String.Dest: 看来，这里的族人就我一个了。我也不该太过惊讶。

String.Source: Talk to Serana, and decide which you want to be.
String.Dest: 跟瑟拉娜谈谈，然后决定你想成为哪个。

String.Source: The moment we gave ourselves to Molag Bal, things got really icy between them.
String.Dest: 自从我们把自己献给莫拉格·巴尔那时起，他俩的关系就跌入了冰点。

String.Source: What? You... you found the Forge? The Aetherium Forge?
String.Dest: 什么？你……你找到了锻炉？神光水晶锻炉？

String.Source: I doubt my mother would waste her time with those fools.
String.Dest: 我不认为我母亲会把时间浪费在那些傻瓜身上。

String.Source: No one is going to stand in my way!
There you are!
After everything we've been through, it had damn well better work.
String.Dest: 经历了这么多，它最好是成功了。

String.Source: Good...
Which shrine? Well, I... I'm going to them all. Yes. One at a time. Until I've visited all the shrines to all the gods in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 哪个神龛？呃……我准备都去一趟。嗯，一次走完。直到我走遍了全天际的神龛。

String.Source: Hyargh!
Glad you're finally listening. Come on, let's move.
String.Dest: 你终于听了，真不错。来吧，我们走。

String.Source: I won't let you defile this place, foul being!
String.Dest: 我不会让你玷污这个地方，脏东西！

String.Source: Now that I think on it, I did see your priest.
String.Dest: 现在我想起来了，我确实见过你的祭司。

String.Source: How does anyone expect me to write my opus with all of these rude interruptions?
String.Dest: 我如何在这些无礼的打扰下写完巨著呢？

String.Source: My Lord.
Otherwise, you're a threat to all of us.
String.Dest: 不然的话，你就是我们所有人的威胁了。

String.Source: It became quickly apparent that the best way I could help would be by wiping out the cliff racers.
String.Dest: 我很快就发现，最好的办法就是消灭峭壁行者。

String.Source: What is it?
This stranger may call herself vampire, but she knows nothing of our struggle. Why should I entrust you to her?
String.Dest: 这个陌生人是可以自称吸血鬼，但他对我们的努力一无所知。我为什么要把你托付给她？

String.Source: Good. I knew I was sending the right man for the job.
String.Dest: 很好。我知道我选对了干这活的人。

String.Source: Your wife is such a soul, and the stars appear cooperative. Now is your chance.
String.Dest: 你的妻子就是这样的灵魂，星星们也都很配合，机会已经给你了。

String.Source: So, this was my old stomping grounds. Not the most normal childhood.
String.Dest: 那么，这就是我以前的院子。虽然我的童年也不常见就是了。

String.Source: Praise Arkay!
How in the name of Zenithar was I to know the ingredients were phony? Do I look like someone that would double-cross a necromancer?
String.Dest: 泽尼萨尔在上，我怎么知道配方是假的？我看起来像是能欺骗死灵法师的人吗？

String.Source: After so many centuries, I feared the Elder Scroll and my daughter were lost to me.
String.Dest: 这么多世纪了，我都担心上古卷轴和我女儿已经离我而去了。

String.Source: The prey is here!
So, any luck? Was Tolan right about the vampires being interested in Dimhollow Crypt?
String.Dest: 那么，运气如何？托兰说的对吗？吸血鬼真的对幽空地穴感兴趣？

String.Source: And unless I'm seeing things, you're starting to... glimmer.
String.Dest: 我眼花了吗，你开始……闪闪发光。

String.Source: Precisely.
That's a fine looking animal you've got there. I had a dog once. Kept getting fur in my mead.
String.Dest: 你养的这只宠物真好看，我曾经养了条狗，之后蜜酒里一直有毛。

String.Source: Auriel's power is ours!
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔的力量属于我们！

String.Source: Exactly!
I will be. Just give me a little time.
Your obedience pleases me.
You arrived just in time. I think those vampires were getting hungry.
String.Dest: 来得正是时候。我觉得那些吸血鬼已经开始饿了。

String.Source: Oof!
Isn't it obvious? They're soft, the lot of them.
String.Dest: 这不显然的吗？他们太过软弱了，大部分都是。

String.Source: I'll be here.
You blood will not protect you from me.
String.Dest: 在我面前你的血保不了你。

String.Source: I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 我们黎明守卫堡垒再见。

String.Source: Thought you'd never ask.
Sometimes we venture out into the world in search of more scrolls for our library at the White-Gold Tower.
String.Dest: 有时候我们会外出探险，寻找更多的上古卷轴来填充白金塔的图书馆。

String.Source: Our power is a blessing from him. It is he who first bestowed the gift of the ancient blood upon me.
String.Dest: 我们的力量是他给予的祝福。是他第一次将古老的血脉赐予我。

String.Source: Weergh!
Dawnstar doesn't have much of a port, but the miners say its got rich ore veins.
String.Dest: 晨星港没什么特别，但矿工们说那儿的矿脉丰富。

String.Source: By having the Ancestor Moths close to the Moth Priest, they can utilize the conduit and share the moth's augury.
String.Dest: 让先祖蛾靠近蛾祭司，他们可以运用这种通道并分享蛾的预兆。

String.Source: Fortune smile upon you, milady!
String.Dest: 幸运之神向您微笑，夫人！

String.Source: The bow... you have Auriel's Bow!
String.Dest: 那把弓……你有奥瑞艾尔之弓！

String.Source: To judge us.
Very well then, you leave me no choice!
Good. That should slow them down.
String.Dest: 很好，这应该会让他们放慢行动。

String.Source: I knew it was only a matter of time before she'd return with hatred in her heart.
String.Dest: 我知道她带着仇恨回来只是时间问题。

String.Source: Isran, of all people. We're reduced to asking him for help.
String.Dest: 所有人里，我们能求助的只有伊士冉了。

String.Source: I think that's another wayshrine up there. Here we go.
String.Dest: 那就是下一个路龛。我们走吧。

String.Source: What else would you like to know?
I owe you a debt for the timely rescue.
I do not fear death.
I've no love for living out of a tent, but I'll take that over being ripped apart.
String.Dest: 我不喜欢住在帐篷里，但为了不被撕成碎片只能这样。

String.Source: If this ends up being a wasted trip, your friend Dexion and I are going to have some words when we get back.
String.Dest: 如果这趟旅行白费了，我回去后可要跟你的朋友戴希翁好好谈谈。

String.Source: I see. Interesting that you can set aside your morals when it suits you.
String.Dest: 我明白了，有趣的是你能在合适的时候把道德放一边儿去。

String.Source: "The Tale of the Great Moth Priest Hunt." Not something I'd want to read.
String.Dest: 《蛾祭司追逐记》。这名字听着就不想去读。

String.Source: I can't believe we found my mother alive... well, you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 难以置信我妈还活着……嗯，你懂我是什么意思吧。

String.Source: After my bite, you collapsed and fell into a slumber. Now your flesh has acclimated to the new blood that courses through your veins.
String.Dest: 在我咬了那口后，你就躺倒在地睡着了。现在你的肉体已经适应了流经血管的新鲜血液。

String.Source: But I guess I don't really factor in at this point.
String.Dest: 但我想到现在为止，我还没有真正考虑到这点。

String.Source: Where are you?
The lower floors are home to the Imperial Council, and the Order of Moth Priests occupies the middle floors.
String.Dest: 下层是帝国议会的所在地，而中层则是蛾祭司的。

String.Source: The power is growing within you, and now you must learn to wield it.
String.Dest: 你体内的力量正在增长，现在你必须学会操控它。

String.Source: I don't converse with my prey.
The moment you hand over the bow your usefulness ends. He'll kill you and then he'll take my blood for the damn prophecy.
String.Dest: 你交出弓的那一刻起，就对他没用了。他会杀了你，然后为了那个该死的预言取我的血。

String.Source: You have the bow...
Grrargh!
When will you fools learn? The night is ours!
String.Dest: 你们这些傻瓜就是学不会么？夜晚属于我们！

String.Source: Must have run off.
Please, take the bow... it's yours.
String.Dest: 请拿起弓吧……它属于你了。

String.Source: Ha ha ha. Here you are.
(Bark)
Don't keep our master waiting. Take him the bow immediately.
String.Dest: 不要让我们的主人久等了，快把弓给他拿去。

String.Source: The night belongs to us.
Very well.
Count yourself fortunate that I'm a forgiving man. Now, be still while I give you the ancient blood once more.
String.Dest: 你该庆幸我是个宽容的人。现在别动，我会再把远古之血赐你一回。

String.Source: I've heard it described in tales, but I could never have imagined its beauty.
String.Dest: 我听说过传说中对它的描述，但从未想到有这么美。

String.Source: Even if he won't help the Vigilants, he could at least offer us shelter for the moment.
String.Dest: 即使他不帮警戒者，至少该暂时为我们提供庇护。

String.Source: I don't even know who that is...
String.Dest: 我甚至都不知道他是谁……

String.Source: I knew it was only a matter of time before your ambition outgrew your loyalty.
String.Dest: 我知道你的野心超过你的忠诚只是时间问题。

String.Source: Do you need something?
The first vampire came from Molag Bal. She... was not a willing subject. But she was still the first.
String.Dest: 第一位吸血鬼源自莫拉格·巴尔。她……并非是自愿的，但仍是第一个。

String.Source: Odds and ends I've gathered over the years. Well, used to gather before all of this nonsense happened to me.
String.Dest: 我这些年来收集的零碎。嗯，在出这档子事前一般都放在一块儿。

String.Source: The true power of the ancient blood is found in the form of the Vampire Lord.
String.Dest: 远古之血的真正力量体现在吸血鬼领主形态上。

String.Source: Thanks again for saving my life.
Molag Bal is a powerful daedric lord, and his will is made reality.
String.Dest: 莫拉格·巴尔是个强大的迪德拉君王，他的意志能改变现实。

String.Source: The ceremony was... degrading.
Oh, the moths don't literally read the scrolls... but they maintain a connection to ancient magic that allows the Moth Priests to decipher them.
String.Dest: 哦，飞蛾并不会真的去读卷轴……但它们与上古魔法有关，可以使蛾祭司破译卷轴。

String.Source: All quiet now.
Revel in your new powers, but do not forget who gave them to you.
String.Dest: 陶醉于你的新力量，但别忘了是谁给你的。

String.Source: Oh please, milady. Please... forgive me!
String.Dest: 哦求您了，夫人。请您……宽恕我！

String.Source: I'm afraid there's not much more to tell. Even today, the Elder Scrolls remain a great enigma.
String.Dest: 恐怕没什么好说的了。时至今日，上古卷轴仍然是个谜。

String.Source: Of course I do. What do you want?
Here you go.
Well, considering no one else in Skyrim would buy something they couldn't possibly read, I'd say you don't have much of a choice.
String.Dest: 嗯，考虑到天际中没人会买他们读不了的东西，我觉得你没太多的选择。

String.Source: (Whine)
Threaten me all you like, it won't matter.
String.Dest: 随你怎么威胁我，无所谓。

String.Source: There will be time to honor the fallen later. For now, we've got to put a stop to these vampires.
String.Dest: 以后会有功夫来悼念死者的。眼下我们得组织这帮吸血鬼。

String.Source: Will you be a hunter, or will you be prey?
String.Dest: 你是会成为猎人，还是会成为猎物呢？

String.Source: Don't...
Oh, what is it?
Very well, master.
My trip to Skyrim has become quite the adventure!
String.Dest: 我的天际之旅已经变成了一场大冒险！

String.Source: Looks like you know your daedra.
String.Dest: 看来你很了解你的迪德拉主人。

String.Source: We have to keep my mother alive!
In an age long forgotten to history, I ruled as a mighty king. My domain was vast, my riches endless and my power infinite.
String.Dest: 在一个被历史遗忘的年代，我是一位强大的国王。疆域辽阔，财富无穷，权势无尽。

String.Source: I'm wondering what my mother got up to, here. She definitely wasn't trying to keep the place clean.
String.Dest: 我想知道我妈在干什么。她显然没有保持这里的清洁。

String.Source: A small price to pay for the betterment of our kind.
String.Dest: 这是为了族类进步而付出的小小代价。

String.Source: That is the very purpose that first brought me to Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我来天际的首要目的就是这个。

String.Source: Lord Harkon's a great man. Best show him the proper respect.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人很了不起，你最好拿出应有的尊重。

String.Source: That's right. I used to be a Vigilant, but we had a difference of opinion.
String.Dest: 没错。我曾经是警戒者，不过我们意见有分歧。

String.Source: Die!
At least Barknar and I are here together.
String.Dest: 至少巴克纳尔和我一起。

String.Source: Oh. All right. Goodbye, then.
Hmmm. Pull chains and traps. Be careful here. Whatever's on the other side of this, the Falmer wanted to keep there.
String.Dest: 嗯。拉链子就出了陷阱，小心这里。不管那边有什么，都有伐莫守着。

String.Source: Of course. Why did I suppose differently. Fine, tell me what you know.
String.Dest: 那当然了。我就不该抱有幻想。好啊，告诉我你知道了什么。

String.Source: Ssssss!
Unfortunately, yes.
Lord Harkon has searched for his daughter for so long. He must be very grateful.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人找了他女儿这么久，他肯定很感激。

String.Source: Let's just find my mother and get out of here.
String.Dest: 赶紧找到我妈然后出去吧。

String.Source: Serana, my darling. I see you still favor keeping a pet.
String.Dest: 我亲爱的瑟拉娜，看来你还是喜欢养宠物。

String.Source: Use the power of the ancient blood to transform into a Vampire Lord.
String.Dest: 使用远古血脉的力量转变为吸血鬼领主

String.Source: It can take months or even years to complete a single scroll and even then, months to recover.
String.Dest: 阅读一幅卷轴可能需要几个月甚至几年时间来完成，即使这样，还要几个月来恢复。

String.Source: Well, we got the knife... now all we need to do is track down one of those Canticle Trees.
String.Dest: 嗯，我们拿到刀了……现在得找到一棵颂歌之树。

String.Source: I was hoping to feed.
Sure. Here you go. Can't understand a word of it, maybe it will do you some good.
String.Dest: 好啊，拿去。一个字都看不懂，也许对你有好处。

String.Source: Ah, I see you've been speaking to Valerica and she's convinced you that eternal night will plunge us into war with daytime dwellers.
String.Dest: 啊，我知道你跟瓦蕾莉卡谈过了，她让你相信永夜会让我们跟白昼的子民们开战。

String.Source: I could feed again.
It's time we take the fight to their door.
Yes, milord? What can I help you with?
Auriel's Bow. Well done, indeed.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔之弓，干得漂亮。

String.Source: We earned this.
Because unlike her, I'm not afraid of you. Not anymore.
String.Dest: 就是因为我不像她，才不会怕你。再也不会。

String.Source: Death is nothing to me...
Give him a crossbow bolt between the eyes for me!
Go find Lord Harkon. Tell him of your success.
String.Dest: 去找哈孔大人，告诉他你成功了。

String.Source: Whenever you're ready.
Hmm?
And you...
Why can't they just let us in? We won't get in the way!
String.Dest: 为什么他们不让我们进去？我们不会碍事的！

String.Source: We were hoping Isran would be of help. That now seems unlikely.
String.Dest: 我们本希望伊士冉能帮忙，看来不大可能了。

String.Source: Only the most resilient of priests can do it this way... it takes years of practice to interpret the harmony.
String.Dest: 只有最有韧性的祭司才能这么做……领悟和谐需要多年的实践。

String.Source: We should strike them first before they can muster a larger force.
String.Dest: 我们应该在他们集结力量之前率先打击他们。

String.Source: It's the Dawnguard! Let none escape!
String.Dest: 是黎明守卫！谁都跑不了！

String.Source: As a king is to his subjects, so you are to other vampires.
String.Dest: 你之于其他吸血鬼，就好比国王之于他的臣民。

String.Source: No...
Good. You are weaker while on the ground, because you cannot access the blood magic.
String.Dest: 很好。你在地上的时候会更弱，因为无法使用血魔法。

String.Source: You are a guest in this castle at my pleasure. I'll permit you to stay for now, but you're of no use to me like this.
String.Dest: 你是我城堡欢迎的客人。我允许你暂时留下来，但你这样对我毫无用处。

String.Source: Hope the moths like that bark as much as Dexion said they would.
String.Dest: 希望这些飞蛾像戴希翁说的那样喜欢鸣叫。

String.Source: What kind of beast is that? No law against it, but if that thing starts attacking people, it's getting a sword in the gullet.
String.Dest: 那是个什么玩意儿？倒是没有明令禁止，但如果那东西咬人了，就等着它的喉咙被我一剑刺穿吧。

String.Source: Well, I've been so busy, I dunno. What are you, kidding me?
String.Dest: 嗯，我一直都很忙，我不知道。你在跟我开玩笑？

String.Source: Here we are. Ready to go in?
String.Dest: 我们到了，准备好进去了吗？

String.Source: What you might not know is that for the most devoted and impressive followers, Molag Bal will give the gift anew, in its pure form.
String.Dest: 但你可能不了解的是，莫拉格·巴尔会把吸血鬼的纯净形态，赐予那些最忠诚且中意的随从。

String.Source: And so we've delivered her right to them. I should've kept her here until we were certain...
String.Dest: 然后我们就正好给他们送回去了。我是该在查清前把她留在这儿的……

String.Source: It involves carefully removing the bark from a Canticle Tree which will in turn attract Ancestor Moths to you.
String.Dest: 需要从一棵颂歌之树上剥下树皮，把先祖蛾吸引到您身边。

String.Source: Do as I command, and you will reap the rewards. Defy me, and I can offer you only pain and suffering.
String.Dest: 照我的命令行事，你会得到奖赏，违抗我，只会给你带来痛苦与折磨。

String.Source: Killing their leaders should discourage them from an out and out war with us.
String.Dest: 杀死他们的首领，应该就能阻止他们与我们的全面战争。

String.Source: Fortune smile upon you, milord!
String.Dest: 幸运之神向您微笑，大人！

String.Source: Don't speak to me, meat.
Nnyyyaarrgghh!
I pledged myself to Molag Bal, and in his name I sacrificed a thousand innocents.
String.Dest: 我向莫拉格·巴尔发誓，以他的名义牺牲了一千名无辜之人。

String.Source: Ah, hello there!
Yes. Please, follow me.
(Bark)
Whether or not you've become one of us in order to survive the Soul Cairn, you're still a vampire hunter at heart.
String.Dest: 无论当初你是不是为了在灵魂石冢存活下来而成为我们中的一员，但内心深处还是个吸血鬼猎人。

String.Source: The night eternal awaits.
Assume the mantle of the Vampire Lord, and we will continue.
String.Dest: 转化为吸血鬼领主的形态，我们再继续。

String.Source: But I can't worry about that now. We need the scroll, and she's our only lead.
String.Dest: 不过我们现在不能担心这个。我们需要卷轴，而她是唯一的线索。

String.Source: Death to the vampires!
Oh, come now... spare me your notions of kinship.
String.Dest: 哦得了吧……别提什么亲缘关系。

String.Source: Originally owned by the Jarl of Riften back in the Second Era, it was a bit of a black mark on the Hold's history.
String.Dest: 第二纪元时这里原本属于裂谷领主，给领内留下了一笔黑历史。

String.Source: You dare defy me?
Is that your best, mortal?
I don't suppose you have some good news for me.
String.Dest: 我猜你没什么好消息给我吧。

String.Source: A small price to pay for the betterment of our kind.
String.Dest: 这是为了族类进步而付出的小小代价。

String.Source: Everyone! Gather 'round!
(Growl)
It appears I have you to thank for turning my daughter against me.
String.Dest: 看来我还要感谢你让我女儿背叛我呢。

String.Source: I'm sure your reward will be great for ensuring our Lord's success.
String.Dest: 你保障了我主的成功，相信你的奖赏很丰厚。

String.Source: If you want to waste your time, that's fine. But I've got my own destination in mind. Maybe you could help me get there when you're done?
String.Dest: 如果你想浪费你的时间，没有关系。不过我心里有我自己要去的地方。也许当你完事的时候，你能帮我到那里去？

String.Source: They say anyone who steps foot on that island will meet an early death... hope you know what you're doing.
String.Dest: 他们说任何踏上那座岛的人都会英年早逝……希望你清楚自己在做什么。

String.Source: The scent has gone cold.
Look at them... they've definitely taken a liking to you.
String.Dest: 看它们……肯定是很喜欢你。

String.Source: This is the time of the Dawnguard!
String.Dest: 这个时刻属于黎明守卫！

String.Source: But, we haven't gotten rid of them completely. A body can rattle around confused long after it's head's been severed.
String.Dest: 但是，我们还没完全摆脱他们。被砍头的尸体还能在周围乱摇乱晃好一会儿。

String.Source: That doesn't make much sense. Where is this woman? Who is she?
String.Dest: 那没多大意义。那女人在哪里？她是谁？

String.Source: Here you go.
I'll tell you what. I appreciate what you're trying to do, so I'll play along.
String.Dest: 跟你说吧，我欣赏你的尝试，所以愿意合作。

String.Source: You're not welcome here.
All right. I'll hear out Isran, see if there's anything I can do to help.
String.Dest: 好吧。我去见伊士冉一趟，看看能帮上什么忙。

String.Source: I have to admit, I'm impressed. I didn't think you had the spirit for it.
String.Dest: 不得不承认，我很佩服你。我本来是觉得你没有这种想法的。

String.Source: Can you feel the power of the ancient blood coursing through your veins?
String.Dest: 感觉到血管里流淌的远古血脉之力了吗？

String.Source: Send them to Oblivion!
Because of this, I strongly believe you were meant to hear the ancestral chorus. Only one way to find out.
String.Dest: 正因如此，我才坚信你会听到先祖蛾的合奏，只有一个办法去验证。

String.Source: They've holed up in an abandoned fort in the Reach.
String.Dest: 他们躲在裂痕领的一个废弃堡垒里。

String.Source: What now?
Ugh...
Rii...
Running is your only chance to live.
For me? I've done what I set out to do.
String.Dest: 我吗？我已经完成了我的目标。

String.Source: Have you been paying attention to everything that's happened? He'll betray us the second our backs are turned.
String.Dest: 你没注意过发生的这些事情吗？我们一转身他就会背叛我们。

String.Source: Let me show you how mortal you still are, vampire.
String.Dest: 让我来向你展示你还是个凡人，吸血鬼。

String.Source: I sense the power of the ancient blood in your veins. It has made you strong.
String.Dest: 我感受到了你血管中的远古之血的力量。它让你变得强大。

String.Source: No, you've got it all wrong. We're here to complete the prophecy our way, not his.
String.Dest: 不，你全都搞错了。我们来这里是用我们的方式完成预言，而不是他的。

String.Source: Cease your flight and we will move on to the next lesson.
String.Dest: 停止飞行，我们要上下一堂课了。

String.Source: Little patience for talk? Good. Let's end this!
String.Dest: 说几句的耐心都没了？好啊，来做个了断吧！

String.Source: Auriel's Bow is ours. Deliver it to Lord Harkon at once, so we can reap the benefits of this prophecy.
String.Dest: 奥瑞艾尔之弓属于我们了，立刻把它交给哈孔大人，这样我们才能从预言获益。

String.Source: And yet, as my mortal life neared an end, I faced a seemingly invincible enemy -- my own mortality.
String.Dest: 然而，在我的凡人生命接近尾声时，我面临着一个看似不可战胜的敌人——自身的死亡。

String.Source: I'll find you, don't worry.
The voice of the Ancestor Moth has always been an integral part of reading the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 先祖蛾的声音一直都是阅读上古卷轴不可或缺的一部分。

String.Source: Mother?
Hmm. Nothing.
You have earned my trust, so I will share what I can.
String.Dest: 你获得了我的信任，我会知无不言。

String.Source: Drinking it gives you strength, but it also gets you pretty messed up... That's why we thought of putting it in the skooma.
String.Dest: 喝了它会给你力量，但也会让你心乱如麻……这就是我们为什么想把它掺在斯库玛里。

String.Source: That... wasn't as unpleasant as I thought it would be.
String.Dest: 嗯……并没有我想的那么难受。

String.Source: Just a taste...
...blood... so hungry all the time now... need to hunt again soon...
String.Dest: ……血……一直都这么饿……要尽快再次狩猎……

String.Source: This is Fort Dawnguard.
Damn. Well what do you know?
For two weeks I've tracked that bear, and now find that you've killed it on your own.
String.Dest: 我追踪那头熊有两周了，结果现在是你一个人宰了它。

String.Source: ...first kill is always the best... the blood has never tasted as sweet since...
String.Dest: ……杀的第一个永远是最好的……那以后再也没尝过那么甜的血了……

String.Source: I wish I could say it was courage, or skill at arms that saved me. But that would be a lie.
String.Dest: 我希望我能说是勇气活着使用武器的技巧救了我。但这都是瞎话。

String.Source: Barknar insisted we come here, said we'd be safe. He also said we'd be inside the walls.
String.Dest: 巴克纳尔坚持要我们来这儿，说会很安全。他还说我们会在高墙里面。

String.Source: But we all took part in it. Not really wholesome family activity, but I guess it's something you do when you give yourselves to a daedric lord.
String.Dest: 但我们都参加了，虽然不是什么有益健康的家庭活动，但我想把自己献给迪德拉君王就是那样。

String.Source: I love it when dinner walks right into my arms.
String.Dest: 就喜欢晚饭自己送上门来。

String.Source: Look at this place. I can't imagine choosing to come here. My mother must have been terrified.
String.Dest: 看这地方，无法想象我居然会来这里。我妈一定是吓坏了。

String.Source: What we do know is that some are born with the special gift to read the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 但我们已知，有些人生来具备阅读上古卷轴的特殊天赋。

String.Source: But their time has come to an end. And you will be the one that ends it.
String.Dest: 但他们的时代要结束了，而你会是结束这一切的人。

String.Source: Look at the size of that fort. They must have room for a few more in there.
String.Dest: 看看那堡垒的规模，他们肯定还能容纳几个人。

String.Source: It'll be good to get outside and breathe again. I haven't missed the sunlight, but I do miss fresh air.
String.Dest: 能出来呼吸真好。我不留恋阳光，但非常想念新鲜空气。

String.Source: I know, I know, but just... anyway. Molag Bal is the original source of vampirism, and still grants it to his more worthy followers.
String.Dest: 我知道，我知道，但是……无论如何，莫拉格·巴尔是吸血鬼病之源，现在还依然将其赐予有价值的信徒。

String.Source: The Dawnguard will, no doubt, soon become even more of a nuisance now that Auriel's Bow has been recovered.
String.Dest: 毫无疑问，既然奥瑞艾尔之弓已经重现，黎明守卫很快就会变得更烦人。

String.Source: You dare to interfere with me?
If I'd known Skyrim was so dangerous, I'd have brought more guards.
String.Dest: 要是知道天际这么危险，我当初就多带点护卫了。

String.Source: However, the night powers are still yours to command, and your claws are still formidable weapons.
String.Dest: 然而，暗夜之力依然可以使用，爪子也还是你可怕的利器。

String.Source: Your blood will not protect you!
I will avenge you, brother.
If you listen closely when you find the glade, you should be able to hear their song... a soft, harmonious trilling.
String.Dest: 当你找到林地后，仔细听的话，应该会听到它们的歌声……那是一种柔和，和谐的颤音。

String.Source: I can't think of any reason I'd want to lose this gift. Especially after what I did to get it.
String.Dest: 我想不出丢掉这个礼物的任何理由，尤其是在我为了得到它所做的一切发生之后。

String.Source: Shouldn't we keep moving? I really want to get back home.
String.Dest: 我们不是要继续前进吗？我真的很想回家。

String.Source: Victory to the Dawnguard!
It's... it's not easy. But I don't think we have much of a choice.
String.Dest: 这……这么做并不简单。但我认为别无选择。

String.Source: How hard would it be to feed a few extra mouths? I'm sure they can manage, and not leave us sitting out here like cattle.
String.Dest: 多养活几口人能有多难？他们肯定能搞定，不至于把我们像牲口一样丢在这里。

String.Source: Whoever did this is mine.
String.Dest: 不管谁干的我都要宰了他。

String.Source: It generally doesn't occur until a Moth Priest is in his latter years, but in my case I simply wasn't preparing myself properly.
String.Dest: 不过蛾祭司一般到晚年才会发生这种情况，我这次只是因为没有做好充分准备。

String.Source: Amazing...
We own the night, fool.
This is it!
I know, and I'm sorry that happened. But now...
String.Dest: 我知道，很抱歉出了这种事。但现在……

String.Source: If only it were so. With the world in shadow, we would never tire, never weaken... more than a match for their pitiful armies.
String.Dest: 若真是如此就好了，世界笼罩于阴影，我们永无倦意……可比他们可怜的军队强多了。

String.Source: Let's just... move on from here, ok?
String.Dest: 我们还是……别提这个了，好吗？

String.Source: Kill the abominations!
If you say so.
That's always a possibility. She was almost as obsessed as my father by the time she shut me in.
String.Dest: 这很有可能。她把我关起来的时候，几乎跟我父亲一样执迷。

String.Source: ...I won't hide down here forever... gather a few of the brethren, we'll strike out on our own...
String.Dest: ……我不会永远躲在这里……找几个弟兄，我们就能自立门户……

String.Source: Hmph... not very impressive, is it?
String.Dest: 哼……没什么好看的，不是吗？

String.Source: Aren't the Dawnguard here to help, to make it safe for us? Can't see why they wouldn't let us in.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫不是来帮忙保护我们安全的吗？不明白他们为啥不让我们进去。

String.Source: The Empire will send someone to find me. You'll see!
String.Dest: 帝国会派人来找我。你走着瞧！

String.Source: If you're holding out for more gold, it's never going to happen.
String.Dest: 要是在等更高的价，那是不可能的。

String.Source: The barrier should be gone now. Let's head back.
String.Dest: 这下屏障应该没了，我们回去吧。

String.Source: For those willing to subjugate themselves, he will still bestow the gift, but they must be powerful in their own right before earning his trust.
String.Dest: 对于那些愿意臣服的人，他仍然会赐予礼物，但他们必须凭借自身力量才能获得他的信任。

String.Source: I miss the flowers.
We read these ancient scrolls of prophecy in order to divine the future, and we use that knowledge to aid the Emperor.
String.Dest: 我们阅读这些卷轴来一窥未来，用这些知识辅佐皇帝。

String.Source: The short version is that my parents and I... we were followers of Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 简单地说，我的父母和我……我们是莫拉格·巴尔的信徒。

String.Source: Have you been paying attention? It's obvious my father's well beyond reason.
String.Dest: 你没注意过吗？很明显我父亲是讲不通道理的。

String.Source: If you think I'll help you, you're mistaken.
String.Dest: 如果你觉得我能帮你，那你就大错特错了。

String.Source: Yes, he definitely sounds like he knows what to do.
String.Dest: 没错，他听上去肯定知道该怎么办。

String.Source: I will await your return.
Go away! We don't suffer trespassers!
A shrine to Molag Bal, the mighty Daedra Prince who is father to all our kind.
String.Dest: 莫拉格·巴尔的祭坛，强大的迪德拉君王，也是我们族类的父亲。

String.Source: It looks like this is as close as we're going to get being safe from the vampires.
String.Dest: 看来这是我们最远离吸血鬼的地方了。

String.Source: It was a cadre of dremora. The city was under attack.
String.Dest: 那是个级别不低的魔人，城市被袭击了。

String.Source: Divines keep you safe, my friend.
String.Dest: 我的朋友，愿圣灵保佑你的安全。

String.Source: Now let's finish this.
Go, then, and do not forget who is your master.
String.Dest: 去吧，还有别忘了谁是你的主人。

String.Source: Sadly, yes. It's the inevitable fate we agree to pursue when reading the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 很遗憾，确实如此。这是不可避免的命运。我们在阅读上古卷轴时就已经接受了。

String.Source: It's through this ancestral chorus that the moths tap into a form of primal augur and become a conduit for deciphering the scrolls.
String.Dest: 正是通过这种合奏，先祖蛾的拍音成了一种原始预言的形式，并成为破译卷轴的渠道。

String.Source: I've helped you all that I can. The rest is up to you.
String.Dest: 我已经尽力帮你了，剩下的看你自己了。

String.Source: Whether you believe it or not, the scrolls have a mind of their own. If they didn't want you to find them, they wouldn't allow it.
String.Dest: 无论你信不信，卷轴自身是有想法的。如果它们不想被你找到，你就根本找不到。

String.Source: You're here because we're abominations in your mind. Evil creatures that need to be destroyed.
String.Dest: 你来到这里是因为你对我们深恶痛绝。觉得我们只是应该被消灭的邪恶生物。

String.Source: Behold the power of Night!
Hmm. Cowards.
You know why we're here.
Something's not right.
Vaaz...Zol!
It was no mere chance that brought you to me. It was destiny.
String.Dest: 你来到我身边不是因为偶然，而是因为命运。

String.Source: I'm telling you, there's something strange with the moondial.
String.Dest: 我跟你说，这个月晷有些奇怪。

String.Source: Let's head back to Isran and let him see what we've got first. I'm betting he'll lend us a sword or two.
String.Dest: 我们先回去找伊士冉，给他看看我们得到了什么。他肯定会带人手帮忙的。

String.Source: Though they are a rebellious and determined lot. While you've severed the snake's head, the body will likely writhe a while longer.
String.Dest: 当然了，他们是一群叛逆而坚定的人，你把蛇头砍断后，蛇身还会扭动一段时间。

String.Source: I will share that knowledge with you gladly, master. What do you wish to know?
String.Dest: 主人，我很乐意跟你分享那些知识。你想知道些什么？

String.Source: I knew you would be victorious.
And go where? You can't just leave me alone whenever you feel like it. I'm coming with you, like it or not.
String.Dest: 去哪儿呢？无论你怎么想，都不能留我一个人在这里。我会跟着你的，随你的便吧。

String.Source: I'm glad you're here. I don't think I could be doing this alone.
String.Dest: 很高兴你来了，我一个人肯定办不到。

String.Source: You disappoint me, Serana. You've taken everything I provided for you and thrown it all away for this... pathetic being.
String.Dest: 你让我失望了，瑟拉娜。你拿走了我给予你的一切，又全都抛弃掉，只为了这个……可悲的生物。

String.Source: Every Moth Priest is taught this ritual, but few ever get the chance to perform it... you should consider yourself fortunate if it works for you.
String.Dest: 每个蛾祭司都学过这个仪式，但很少有人有机会施展……如果对您有用，您该感到幸运。

String.Source: Then my daughter is truly lost. She died the moment she accepted a mortal into her life.
String.Dest: 看来我的女儿真的没了，在她接受一个凡人干涉她的生活时就死了。

String.Source: With my guidance you will become a deadly instrument, striking terror in the hearts of mortals wherever you tread.
String.Dest: 在我的指导下，你会成为致命武器，无论走到哪里都会让凡人陷入恐惧。

String.Source: No husks, no sale. Guess you have some scavenging to do.
String.Dest: 没灵魂荚就做不成买卖，我想你该去捡了。

String.Source: I'll bet my parents didn't know the half of this part of the castle.
String.Dest: 我敢打赌我父母不知道城堡里还有这么个地方。

String.Source: I will avenge you, sister.
You will not touch him.
No, I am alive only because the vampires spared me.
String.Dest: 不，我没死只是因为吸血鬼把我放了。

String.Source: Where are you?
...the clans think they're better than us... putting on airs... pah, they'll be the first to burn when the mortals get organized...
String.Dest: ……那些氏族认为比我们过得好……装腔作势……呸，要是凡人们组织起来了，首先烧死的就是他们。

String.Source: You know, I've asked myself the same thing.
String.Dest: 你知道，我也问过自己同样的问题。

String.Source: You should have kept running.
And with that... it's done. No one could possibly deny what we've found now.
String.Dest: 然后就……完工了。没人能否认我们现在的发现。

String.Source: Good.
Someone will bleed for this.
That's... a long story.
String.Dest: 那是……一个很长的故事了。

String.Source: Mortal fool, you can't stop us.
String.Dest: 愚蠢的凡人，你阻止不了我们。

String.Source: Ah, Solitude. Best port in Skyrim. You should try the Spiced Mead while you're there.
String.Dest: 啊，独孤城。天际最好的港口。等到了后你该尝尝那儿的醇香蜜酒。

String.Source: ... what's that?
Ha ha ha! I knew I'd find you.
String.Dest: 哈哈哈！就知道找得到你。

String.Source: I'm not sure it's really your place to judge me.
String.Dest: 我觉得你没资格来评判我。

String.Source: There is one last thing you must know. Slaying mortal men with your life drain grants you new night powers and blood magic.
String.Dest: 还有一件事你必须了解，以生命吸取杀死凡人后，你会获得新的暗夜之力和血魔法。

String.Source: If Isran hadn't left the Order, this could've been our home.
String.Dest: 如果伊士冉没离开教团，这里可能就是我们的家了。

String.Source: Fortunately, you seem to have already killed the Keepers maintaining the barrier around these ruins.
String.Dest: 万幸，你已经杀死维持遗迹周围结界的看守者了。

String.Source: Why fight me? Your blood is already mine.
String.Dest: 还要打？你的血已经是我的了。

String.Source: Of course I do.
You have brought my daughter back safely, and for that I am grateful.
String.Dest: 你把我女儿安全地带回来了，对此我很感激。

String.Source: Hhyyaarargghhhh!
If you find any more Elder Scrolls lying about, be sure to let me know!
String.Dest: 如果你知道其他上古卷轴在什么地方，一定得告诉我！

String.Source: Gaan...
Aaaayyyaarrrrgghh!
Kind of soothing, actually. I feel a little warmer, now.
String.Dest: 实际上有些安抚的感觉，现在暖和些了。

String.Source: Well, you've met most of us. My father's not exactly the most stable, and eventually he drove my mother crazy with him.
String.Dest: 呃，你也都看到了，我爸精神不太稳定，我妈最后也被他逼疯了。

String.Source: I offer you my blood. Take it, and you will walk as a lion among sheep. Men will tremble at your approach, and you will never fear death again.
String.Dest: 我把我的血赐给你。有了它，你就是羊群中的狮子。人们会在你靠近他们时颤颤发抖，而你也再也不会惧怕死亡了。

String.Source: Is that another one of those wayshrines up there? I wonder where this one goes...
String.Dest: 那是另一个路龛吗？也不知道这个通往哪里……

String.Source: You should not have come here, vampire.
String.Dest: 你不该到这儿来的，吸血鬼。

String.Source: Look, I'm happy to help you run any errands you need to, but I've got my own destination. Could you help me get there whenever we're done?
String.Dest: 听着，我很乐意帮你跑腿，不过我有自己要去的地方。只要我们完事的话，也许你能帮我到那里去？

String.Source: If they're bold enough to attack us here, then this may be bigger than I thought. I have good men here, but...
String.Dest: 如果他们敢来这里攻击我们，那么情况可能比我想的严重。我这里人手不错，但……

String.Source: Something tells me the divines favor you, my friend.
String.Dest: 我的朋友，直觉告诉我圣灵眷顾你。

String.Source: ...too much hiding... the mortals are weak... he's a coward to fear them, we should feed when we like... can't stand this hunger gnawing at me...
String.Dest: ……很多人都躲起来了……凡人真脆弱……他是个懦夫，才会怕他们，我们进食应该随心所欲……忍不了这种饥饿的折磨了……

String.Source: Gather your things and rest well, my friend. We meet outside Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 收拾好你的东西，好好休息朋友。我们在沃基哈尔城堡外见。

String.Source: The moondial definitely wasn't like this the last time I saw it.
String.Dest: 我以前看到的月晷绝对不是现在这样的。

String.Source: I watch the gate. Ain't much else to tell.
String.Dest: 我是看门的，没什么好说的了。

String.Source: Never... not yet...
Nobody's ever asked me that before. I... I don't know.
String.Dest: 从来没人问我这个问题。我……我不知道。

String.Source: I can't imagine living here. Or... being dead here. Or... whatever they'd call it. Ugh.
String.Dest: 不敢相信住在这里。或者……死在这里。又或者……管他们怎么叫呢。呃。

String.Source: Lady Serana's back! Open the gate!
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜小姐回来了！开门！

String.Source: Pah, your blood is foul.
It's true for most of my brothers in the order as well. We don't really know where the scrolls came from or who wrote them.
String.Dest: 教团中大部分同修都是这样。我们真的不清楚卷轴是从哪里来的，或者是谁写的。

String.Source: Looks like these Falmer are here to stay.
String.Dest: 看来这些伐莫留在这儿了。

String.Source: Looks like we're on the right track.
String.Dest: 看起来我们走上了正轨。

String.Source: Remember, you are no mere vampire. You are something far greater.
String.Dest: 记住了，你不仅仅是个吸血鬼，你远不止于此。

String.Source: The quicker we find the Keepers, the quicker we can leave.
String.Dest: 我们越快找到看守者，就能越早离开。

String.Source: It seems they wanted to send a message to the other Vigilants still walking the roads of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 似乎他们想给那些仍然在天际活动的其他警戒者们传个信。

String.Source: Please, don't be angry with me.
Vampires are worse than Daedra. I wish we Vigilants had taken them more seriously while we we had the chance.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼比迪德拉更糟糕。我希望我们警戒者在还有机会的时候，能更重视重视他们。

String.Source: They must be who that priest was calling "the Betrayed."
String.Dest: 他们一定就是那个祭司说的“背叛者”了。

String.Source: What else do you want to know?
Your blood calls me...
I won't lie - if this were any other situation, I'd put her down just on the chance she might be a vampire.
String.Dest: 我不骗你————如果换个情况，我就因为她可能是吸血鬼就把她杀了。

String.Source: Come on, she's leading us to the scroll.
String.Dest: 走吧，她会带我们去拿卷轴。

String.Source: Now the whole world will fall at our feet.
String.Dest: 现在整个世界都要拜倒在我们脚下。

String.Source: No. He has to die. We have no choice.
String.Dest: 不，他必须死，我们没得选。

String.Source: Now, you might already know that Molag Bal is the original source of vampirism.
String.Dest: 现在，你应该知道了莫拉格·巴尔是吸血鬼病之源。

String.Source: This is all more excitement than I'm used to.
String.Dest: 这比我以往的经历刺激多了。

String.Source: You've destroyed our family. You've killed other vampires. All over some prophecy that we barely understand.
String.Dest: 你毁了我们的家庭，杀死了其他的吸血鬼。只为了那些我们根本看不懂的预言。

String.Source: Qoth...Zaam!
The time has come to finally put an end to Harkon and his unholy prophecy!
String.Dest: 总算是时候终结哈孔和他邪恶的预言了！

String.Source: If the Moth Priest has guards, show them no mercy.
String.Dest: 如果蛾祭司有守卫的话，别手下留情。

String.Source: It is our sacred duty to study the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 研究上古卷轴是我们的神圣职责。

String.Source: You have forsaken my gift. The ancient blood no longer flows through your veins. Don't deny it!
String.Dest: 你抛弃了我的礼物，血管里流的不再是远古之血了。休想狡辩！

String.Source: Yeagh!
You can't get rid of me that easily.
String.Dest: 要甩掉我可没这么简单。

String.Source: Where have you been?
One thing about living in Skyrim I could never stomach... all the damn vampires!
String.Dest: 在天际过日子有一个我忍不了的东西……所有该死的吸血鬼！

String.Source: Running will warm your blood nicely.
String.Dest: 逃跑会让你的血液热到好处。

String.Source: Sure, got plenty. What am I gonna' do with it?
String.Dest: 当然，有很多。我拿它们来干嘛呢？

String.Source: So, I see this dragon has fangs.
String.Dest: 看来，小龙也开始长牙了。

String.Source: Perhaps you still need convincing? Behold the power!
String.Dest: 也许你还需要点说服力？看看这力量！

String.Source: These people were... why would anyone want to set up camp here?
String.Dest: 这些人……为什么会想到在这里扎营呢？

String.Source: Begone! You're not welcome here!
Yyyaaaarrgghh!
In reward, he gave everlasting life to myself, my wife and my daughter. And so I have defeated mortality itself.
String.Dest: 作为回报，他赐予了我和妻儿永生，所以我战胜了死亡本身。

String.Source: Who'll need thralls when the very sun is at our mercy?
String.Dest: 太阳都任我们摆布了，谁还需要奴隶呢？

String.Source: We will march on their lair and destroy those wretched abominations so they can no longer corrupt our world!
String.Dest: 我们要进军它们的巢穴，摧毁那些可恶的怪物，让他们再也无法腐化我们的世界！

String.Source: Good. Do not offend me by losing it again.
String.Dest: 很好，别再舍弃它来冒犯我了。

String.Source: No more. I'm done with you.
And what happens when you've slain me? Is Valerica next? Is Serana?
String.Dest: 你杀了我后又怎么样呢？下一个是瓦蕾莉卡？还是瑟拉娜？

String.Source: Beautiful. That shield... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 太美了，那盾牌……这就是我所期待的全部了。

String.Source: For too long we've allowed these vampires to poison the night and kill our people! Now, we finally have the means to strike back!
String.Dest: 长久以来，我们放任这些吸血鬼在夜里毒害并杀害我们的人民！现在，我们终于有办法反击了！

String.Source: You can also call upon the powers of night to turn into a swarm of bats and reappear some distance away.
String.Dest: 你也可以召唤暗夜之力变成一群蝙蝠，在一段距离之外重新现身。

String.Source: Is that... the Forge?
Now it's my turn.
I might be just a soul now, but I'm still not going to give my stuff away. Bring me at least twenty-five husks and then we'll talk.
String.Dest: 现在可能我只是个灵魂，但我仍然不会把东西送人。给我至少25个灵魂荚再来谈交易。

String.Source: This isn't really a good time.
Sorry, I'm not that easy to get rid of. If you want to run ahead, I won't stop you, but I'll be following.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我没那么容易甩掉。你要是想在前面跑我不会拦你，但会跟在后面。

String.Source: Finally, a trace of honesty in our little conversation.
We knew Isran was working on something, but we had no idea he'd found this place.
String.Dest: 我们知道伊士冉在忙什么，但不知道他找到了这个地方。

String.Source: What do you want now?
If we open that one, we'll be able to move around this valley a lot faster.
String.Dest: 如果打开那个，我们就能更快地绕过山谷。

String.Source: What if the vampires come here, after the Dawnguard? We'll be stuck right in the middle.
String.Dest: 要是吸血鬼尾随黎明守卫来这里呢？我们会正好被困在中间。

String.Source: I keep thinking that there's got to be another way, but he'll turn on us both the moment he gets the chance.
String.Dest: 我一直在想有没有别的办法，但一有机会他就会杀了我们。

String.Source: Nothing like a goose chase around the whole damned province.
String.Dest: 还有什么比全省乱找更没意义的么。

String.Source: ...maybe the clans have it right... hunting's so chancy... why not keep a few thralls... blood whenever you want it...
String.Dest: ……也许那些氏族是对的……打猎太冒险了……为什么不养些奴隶……想吸就吸……

String.Source: You're mine!
Very well.
Go now, and prove that my faith in you was not misplaced.
String.Dest: 现在去证明我没有错付人。

String.Source: You had your chance to escape, vampire.
String.Dest: 本来你还有机会逃跑，吸血鬼。

String.Source: It's probably best for you if we're not seen together right now.
String.Dest: 我们这会儿最好别被人看到在一起。

String.Source: Stop struggling. I'll give you a swift and beautiful death.
String.Dest: 别挣扎了，你会死得痛快而优雅的。

String.Source: Farewell.
Of course I do.
There you are.
I knew I smelled mortal blood!
String.Dest: 我就说闻到了凡人的血！

String.Source: My offer is still a thousand. Did you want to sell?
String.Dest: 我还是出一千金币，你要卖吗？

String.Source: Send the troll after them!
The Ideal Masters have charged him with overseeing the Keepers, and will undoubtedly investigate the fact that the barrier has fallen.
String.Dest: 理想之主派他监督看守者，他肯定会已经察觉到结界消失了。

String.Source: Not many people understand the appeal. You keep surprising me.
String.Dest: 没多少人能理解这种吸引力的。你总是给我惊喜。

String.Source: Never expected so blatant an attack by vampires, of all creatures.
String.Dest: 从没想过吸血鬼会这么公然袭击。

String.Source: (Bark)
(Bark)
With your left hand, you can wield the power of blood magic to raise the dead.
String.Dest: 左手则可以用血魔法之力唤醒亡灵。

String.Source: You've come this far, and you've found several Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 你已经走到如此地步，发现了好几本上古卷轴。

String.Source: The Dawnguard will want the Bow, and they will fight us, hard, to get it.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫会为了得到这把弓，来跟我们玩命战斗。

String.Source: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn.
String.Dest: 提醒一句，石冢里游荡着一条叫杜耐维尔的龙。

String.Source: It's gone now.
Wait... that almost makes sense!
String.Dest: 等等……这差不多就说得通了。

String.Source: If was a foolish mistake, and I intend to make sure they learn that the hard way.
String.Dest: 这是个愚蠢的错误，而我会让他们惨痛地吸取教训的。

String.Source: I hope one day to see it restored to its former glory.
String.Dest: 希望有一天它能恢复旧日辉煌。

String.Source: ...I'll find you...
No. This has to end here and now.
String.Dest: 不，此时此刻就结束这一切。

String.Source: Well, as I'm sure you've figured out by now, it's no mere coincidence that we're named "Moth Priests."
String.Dest: 嗯，现在你应该明白，我们被叫做“蛾祭司”并非巧合。

String.Source: It is the great spire at the heart of the Imperial City, among the tallest towers in all of Tamriel.
String.Dest: 它位于帝都中心的一座巨大尖塔中，那是整个泰姆瑞尔最高的建筑之一。

String.Source: These chosen few can divine events of the past and future within the scrolls, though in time, it drives us to blindness.
String.Dest: 这些被选中的少数人可以一窥卷轴中过去与未来的事件，不过随着时间的推移，我们的双目就会失明。

String.Source: I promise you, it didn't always look like this.
String.Dest: 我向你保证，以前不是这样的。

String.Source: I was hoping it wouldn't smell this bad.
Excellent. That should prevent the problem from escalating.
String.Dest: 太好了，这应该可以避免问题扩大化。

String.Source: With them, and the materials in this room, we should have everything we need.
String.Dest: 有了它们，再加上这个房间里的材料，我们就有了需要的一切。

String.Source: I worry it'll never be safe to go home.
String.Dest: 我担心家里永远都不安全。

String.Source: You've simply used Serana in an attempt to take away what should rightfully be mine.
String.Dest: 你只是利用瑟拉娜来夺走本应属于我的东西。

String.Source: Someday, we'll rebuild the Hall of the Vigilant. Mark my words, I'll see it done before they put me in the ground.
String.Dest: 终有一天，我会重建警戒者之厅。记住我的话，在他们把我送终之前我一定要看着它竣工。

String.Source: I've spent years cleaning the place up and making repairs. You can be damn sure the vampires won't be burning this place down.
String.Dest: 我花了好些年清理和修缮这个地方。你可以万分肯定吸血鬼烧不了这里。

String.Source: Now, listen to my words and do as I instruct.
String.Dest: 现在，听我的话，照我的吩咐去做。

String.Source: You've done well. I won't forget that.
String.Dest: 干得不错。我不会忘记的。

String.Source: The only thing I see around here in abundance are soul husks. You know, those ugly fungus-looking things growing out of the ground.
String.Dest: 我看这里唯一丰富只有灵魂荚了。知道吧，那种地里长出来的丑陋真菌一样的东西。

String.Source: The prophecy is no more!
Yes, milady? What can I help you with?
I'll give you a single chance to turn over the bow to me. There will not be a second.
String.Dest: 给你一次机会，把弓交出来。我不会再说第二次。

String.Source: And you didn't stop them? You didn't secure the scroll?
String.Dest: 那你没阻止他们吗？你没拿到卷轴？

String.Source: I assure you, no harm was done. In truth, your strength surprises me. Not all mortals can withstand my embrace.
String.Dest: 放心吧，百利无害。说实话，你的力量让我吃惊，不是所有凡人都经得起我的拥抱。

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: 你根本不在乎瑟拉娜跟我们的处境。

String.Source: Just leave me alone for a bit.
String.Dest: 让我一个人静静就行了。

String.Source: Yearrgh!
I wonder what happened to them.
Three's a crowd. Get rid of your other friend, and I'm yours.
String.Dest: 三个人太多了，把你另一个朋友送走，我再跟你去。

String.Source: I'm surprised you think you can manage without me, but it's your choice.
String.Dest: 居然觉得没有我也行，但你说了算。

String.Source: Bleed and die!
You will not touch her.
I'm not afraid of you!
Your voice drips with the venom of your mother's influence. How alike you've become.
String.Dest: 你的声音里带着你母亲培育出的恶毒，变得可真像她啊。

String.Source: In keeping with tradition, you must use a specific tool in the Ancestor Glade, an implement known as a Draw Knife.
String.Dest: 为了保持传统，您必须在先祖林地里使用一种特殊的刮刀。

String.Source: Find that Moth Priest! I will suffer no delays!
String.Dest: 去找那个蛾祭司！我可忍不了耽搁。

String.Source: This is our fight and this is our fate!
String.Dest: 这场战斗和宿命属于我们！

String.Source: Let's kill those... Keeper things and get back to the prison.
String.Dest: 我们去杀了那些……什么看守者然后回监狱去。

String.Source: Agh!
Yes, quite. I'm growing weary of speaking to you and my traitorous daughter.
String.Dest: 是的，够了。跟你还有那个不孝女没什么可说的了。

String.Source: But after everything with her... I don't think we can trust him.
String.Dest: 但经历了那些事情后……我觉得没法相信他。

String.Source: Beautiful. That staff... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 太美了，那法杖……这就是我所期待的全部了。

String.Source: And might I add, this is a remarkable fortress. I have colleagues back home that would love to study this place in detail.
String.Dest: 我想补充一句，这座堡垒可真的非同寻常。我家乡的同事们应该很乐意详细研究研究它。

String.Source: Stendarr watch over you.
Kill their leaders. That should put a stop to a full out war.
String.Dest: 杀死他们的首领，应该就能结束一场全面战争。

String.Source: If the Dawnguard can't stop these vampires, who can?
String.Dest: 要是黎明守卫都阻止不了这些吸血鬼，还有谁呢？

String.Source: Where do you expect me to go?
And it all ended with me being locked underground for who knows how long.
String.Dest: 最后我被关在地下不知道有多久。

String.Source: Your kind are a blight upon Tamriel, monster!
String.Dest: 你们就是泰姆瑞尔的祸害，怪物！

String.Source: Bring me say... twenty-five of them, and you can rummage through what was left on my cart.
String.Dest: 给我带……二十五个来，我马车上的东西随你挑。

String.Source: Once enough of the moths are following, they'll provide you with the second sight needed to decipher the scrolls.
String.Dest: 只要飞蛾达到一定数量，它们就可以为您提供解读卷轴需要的第二视角。

String.Source: Oh thank you, milady. Thank you!
"Too extreme", they called me. Well, that doesn't seem to have worked out in their favor, now has it?
String.Dest: 说我“太极端了”。好啊，看来他们那作风也没什么好的，不是吗？

String.Source: The sooner we get out of this place, the better.
String.Dest: 我们越早从这里出去越好。

String.Source: You still got it, Morven... a salesman even beyond the end.
String.Dest: 你还是很了不起的，莫尔文……一个超越了死亡的销售员。

String.Source: Good luck. I hope you find the answers you seek.
String.Dest: 祝你好运，希望你能找到想要的答案。

String.Source: Provided for me? Are you insane?
Soon... soon your blood will be mine...
String.Dest: 快了……你的血就快归我了……

String.Source: Hyargh!
Diil...
It's not too far, now. At least, I don't think it is. I thought you knew the way?
String.Dest: 现在已经不远了，至少我觉得不远。你应该认识路吧？

String.Source: The tower suffered damage in the recent war with the Aldmeri Dominion, and is not what it once was.
String.Dest: 这座塔最近在跟先祖神洲的战争中遭到了破坏，不复往日了。

String.Source: Rrrraaaaarrggghhhh!
Hunh...
Aggghh!
Very well, then.
Argh!
No... my blood is strong...
Come on, let's go home.
Gah...
Please, don't be angry with me.
Not as much as I would like. Even after spending decades of my life in study of the Elder Scrolls, they remain a great mystery to me.
String.Dest: 没有我期望的那么多。即便花费了几十年的时间研究上古卷轴，它们对我来说仍然是个巨大的谜。

String.Source: Agh...
There's no blood here for you.
Does the air feel... heavy down here? I'm a little woozy, but it might just be from waking up.
String.Dest: 觉得这儿的空气有些……沉重吗？我有点头晕，但可能只是因为刚醒。

String.Source: Yes. I've kept it safely secured here ever since I was imprisoned.
String.Dest: 没错。自从我被关在这里，我就一直把它妥善保管好了。

String.Source: I'm trying to put it to good use.
Now, make your choice!
You are welcome here... for now.
String.Dest: 在这里你可以保证安全……至少目前如此。

String.Source: Lah...Haas!
You're damn right I'm interested. Question is, are you selling?
String.Dest: 你说得对，我很感兴趣。问题是你卖不卖？

String.Source: Tell you what, you bring me books like this, and I'll pay a thousand gold each. I'll even throw in a translated edition I have for free. Interested?
String.Dest: 这样吧，你把这样的书带给我，每本一千金币，我还免费赠送一本译本。有兴趣吗？

String.Source: We may feed again today.
All of the ingredients for our potions came from there. She used to say that my father couldn't stand the place. Too... peaceful.
String.Dest: 我们所有药剂的材料都出自那里。她常说我父亲受不了那个地方，太……平静了。

String.Source: (Growl)
And so you learn the power of the night.
String.Dest: 现在领教暗夜之力了吧。

String.Source: You don't think you can escape me, do you?
String.Dest: 你也没指望真能跑得掉，是吧？

String.Source: ...just fed but still hungry... blood... all I can think about these days... last kill was so good... just the right amount of struggle...
String.Dest: ……刚吃过但还是饿……血……这几天脑子里都是……上次宰的太爽了……那种恰到好处的挣扎……

String.Source: Ambushed by vampires... I certainly wasn't expecting that.
String.Dest: 被吸血鬼伏击……我可真的没料到。

String.Source: Windhelm eh? City of kings, they say. Hope you packed warm though.
String.Dest: 风舵是吧？他们说是众王之城。希望你穿暖和点儿。

String.Source: I'm glad we found the scroll, but I... I wish she could come with us.
String.Dest: 很高兴我们拿到了卷轴，但……我希望她能和我们一起走。

String.Source: Is your... pet keeping you entertained?
I keep a stable of thralls in the castle should you need to feed like the baser vampires to stave off the sun.
String.Dest: 我在城堡里养了一群奴隶，可以让你像低等吸血鬼那样进食来规避太阳。

String.Source: Let's move faster. The sun is... it's not great for my skin, if you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 我们走快点吧，这阳光……对我的皮肤不好，懂我意思的吧。

String.Source: Deciphering one of the Elder Scrolls is nothing like reading a simple book. There's quite a bit of ritual and concentration required.
String.Dest: 解读上古卷轴不像阅读一本寻常书籍，需要相当多的仪式和专注力。

String.Source: Well, looks like some other guests have taken over since my mother left.
String.Dest: 看来我妈走后又有别的客人接管了这里。

String.Source: This isn't that watered down child's power that you simply contract from another vampire. We're pureblood creations of original vampires.
String.Dest: 这不同于从其他吸血鬼那里得到的弱化子嗣的力量，我们是纯血创造的原始吸血鬼。

String.Source: Nuh...
So... this is the place.
Awake at last, good.
Indeed. The day hasn't been won while Harkon still walks Tamriel.
String.Dest: 确实，只要哈孔还在泰姆瑞尔，就还没到赢的那天。

String.Source: I'm not sure whether that makes you brave or foolish. What brings you here?
String.Dest: 都不知道你是勇敢还是愚蠢了，来这儿干嘛？

String.Source: Do so now and we will continue.
String.Dest: 你先降下来，我们再继续。

String.Source: Without the Hall, the Vigilants need a new rallying point.
String.Dest: 失去大厅后，警戒者们需要一个新的集结点。

String.Source: If you have a better lead than this, I'm all ears.
String.Dest: 如果你有比我更好的线索，我洗耳恭听。

String.Source: There's nowhere to run. And I'm certainly not moving in with my mother, if that's what your implying.
String.Dest: 没有地方可逃，我当然不会搬去和我妈一起住，如果你是这么想的话。

String.Source: I thought... I hoped that if he saw me, he might feel something again.
String.Dest: 我以为……我原本希望，如果他见到我，可能会再次有所感触。

String.Source: In this form, you can drain the life from your foes with your right hand.
String.Dest: 在这个形态，你可以用右手吸取敌人的生命，

String.Source: Ever since he decided to make that prophecy his calling, we kind of drifted apart.
String.Dest: 自从他决定把完成预言当做自己的天命后，我们就有点疏远了。

String.Source: ...Dawnguard getting to be more than a nuisance... gather some of the hunters... teach them a lesson...
String.Dest: ……黎明守卫变得越来越麻烦了……得找些猎人……给他们上一课……

String.Source: Do not forget the price of your new power. I expect your complete obedience.
String.Dest: 别忘了你新力量的代价，我期望着你的完全服从。

String.Source: My family has its problems, but they're our problems.
String.Dest: 我家里是有问题，但那是我们的问题。

String.Source: Should you run out of magicka, you can descend to the ground and fight as the beasts do.
String.Dest: 就算魔力用尽，你也可以降落在地上像野兽一般战斗。

String.Source: I think... mostly I hate what it's done to my family.
String.Dest: 我猜……我最恨的是它对我家庭的影响。

String.Source: I was always taught to avoid these types of ruins. I think I see why, now.
String.Dest: 我总是被告诫远离这些废墟，现在大概知道原因了。

String.Source: What you probably don't know is that he still grants it to his more impressive followers.
String.Dest: 但可能不知道他还会把它赐予中意的信徒。

String.Source: ...still always hungry... there's no prey down in this hole... need to hunt more... all this hiding and skulking around, pah...
String.Dest: ……还是很饿……这个洞里没有猎物……得再去打些……全都藏起来了，呸……

String.Source: Present the bow to Lord Harkon at once!
String.Dest: 立刻把弓带给哈孔大人！

String.Source: Yes?
We now have Auriel's Bow. The gods themselves have favored us and we must answer with action!
String.Dest: 现在我们有了奥瑞艾尔之弓，诸神都眷顾我们，必须以行动回应！

String.Source: ...she said I'd forget, and usually I do, but sometimes... still remember their faces, their pleading...
String.Dest: ……她说我会忘掉的，一般是忘了，但有时候……还记得他们的脸，恳求……

String.Source: Fool. You should have run.
I will find you.
We need to strike a crippling blow against them before they muster more men against us.
String.Dest: 我们得在他们召集更多人对付我们之前，给他们致命一击。

String.Source: My blood is potent. At first, the body is overwhelmed by it.
String.Dest: 我的血液太过强大。一开始，你的身体会被它浸没。

String.Source: Is that all of them?
That ends it.
I have nothing more to say to you.
Aha... and now you die.
Make it count. This may be the only chance we ever get to use the Forge.
String.Dest: 别浪费了，这可能是我们使用锻炉的唯一机会了。

String.Source: There's something out there.
But you... take that out into the world. And if anyone asks, tell them what we discovered. Together.
String.Dest: 至于你……把它带到外面的世界去吧。如果有人问起，就告诉他们，这是我们的发现，一起的发现。

String.Source: There's no use hiding from me.
Now your blood is mine!
Your kind are finished.
The Tyranny of the Sun has been broken!
String.Dest: 太阳暴政已经被打破了！

String.Source: Kill that beast!
Go on, get out of here!
This is my hunting ground.
And now for the feast.
It's not safe out there. Horrible creatures attacking towns in the night... If they won't let me in, at least I can stay here.
String.Dest: 外面不安全，夜间有恐怖的生物袭击城镇……如果他们不让进去，至少我可以留在这里。

String.Source: To know the complete prophecy, we must have the other two scrolls.
String.Dest: 要知道完整的预言，必须找到另外两个卷轴。

String.Source: Suit yourself. I'm not going anywhere.
They threw me out, Tolan!
String.Dest: 他们把我赶出门了，托兰！

String.Source: Burn them all!
I guess... we kind of have to go way back. To the very beginning. Do you know where vampirism came from?
String.Dest: 我看……我们得稍微往回倒倒，从头开始。你知道吸血鬼病是从何而来的吗？

String.Source: Nargh!
Yes, yes. Always the noble vampire hunter.
String.Dest: 是啊是啊，永远高贵的吸血鬼猎人。

String.Source: After all these years, Lady Serana's back. Now that's something.
String.Dest: 过了这么些年，瑟拉娜小姐居然回来了，意义重大啊。

String.Source: It's the price we pay for openly recruiting. We'll have to step up our defenses.
String.Dest: 这就是公开招募的代价。我们必须加强防御。

String.Source: I won't beg for protection, but I'm not even sure that would work with this Isran.
String.Dest: 我不会乞求保护，甚至不确定这个伊士冉吃不吃这套。

String.Source: Rrarggh!
Let's not revisit that.
Good luck out there. Hopefully I'll see you again soon.
String.Dest: 祝你好运，希望很快能再见。

String.Source: They didn't think Skyrim has a vampire problem, and I did.
String.Dest: 他们觉得天际没有吸血鬼的问题，不过我觉得有。

String.Source: Kind of fitting that the Vigilants would be wiped out by vampires.
String.Dest: 警戒者被吸血鬼消灭再合理不过了。

String.Source: You've been given a great gift. Do not squander it.
String.Dest: 我已经把礼物赐给了你。可别浪费了。

String.Source: I'm sure Lord Harkon will be most pleased with your efforts. Find him at once.
String.Dest: 我相信哈孔大人会对你的努力非常满意，马上去找他。

String.Source: You're no match for me, fledgling.
I hope Alvide doesn't think less of me, but I can't protect her on my own. We're safer here.
String.Dest: 我希望亚薇德不要看不起我，但我一个人保护不了她，待在这更安全。

String.Source: What can I do for you?
These things are everywhere, aren't they?
String.Dest: 到处都是这些东西，不是吗？

String.Source: You disappoint me, Serana. You've taken everything I provided for you and thrown it all away for this... pathetic half-breed vampire.
String.Dest: 你让我失望了，瑟拉娜。你拿走了我给予你的一切，又全都抛弃掉，只为了这个……可悲的混种吸血鬼。

String.Source: Totally unprepared for any real threat. And yet I was the one ridiculed for trying to be ready for anything.
String.Dest: 对任何真正的威胁都毫无防备。然后还来嘲笑我这个为一切做好准备的人。

String.Source: I hope we can go home soon. I don't like it here.
String.Dest: 希望我们能尽快回家，我讨厌这里。

String.Source: I don't think he even sees me as his daughter anymore. I'm just... a means to an end.
String.Dest: 我觉得他甚至不再把我当女儿了。我只是……达成目的的工具。

String.Source: Thought I'd come here to be safe. Now they won't so much as let us in.
String.Dest: 我还以为来这里能安全，可现在他们连门都不让我们进去。

String.Source: Very funny.
I have kept my end of the bargain, now I expect you to keep yours.
String.Dest: 我遵守了我的诺言，希望你也能遵守你的。

String.Source: I'll drink you dry, mortal!
You've seen your last dawn. I bring the night.
String.Dest: 你已经见过最后的黎明了，而我带来了暗夜。

String.Source: Good.
Well, well. I haven't seen one of these beauties in a long time. A rare find in the original falmer language.
String.Dest: 好啊好啊，我很久没见过这些别致玩意儿了。这是原始伐莫语写的珍稀发现。

String.Source: So far this hasn't been too bad. Gets lonely exploring by myself, though.
String.Dest: 到目前为止，情况还不算太糟。但要我自己去探索就太孤独了。

String.Source: Maybe he knows what's going on.
String.Dest: 也许他知道发生了什么。

String.Source: But what of Serana? Can she be trusted to lift a blade against her own kind? Her own family?
String.Dest: 但瑟拉娜呢？你相信她会向同族，向她的家人挥剑吗？

String.Source: If you think I'm going to let you have all the fun, you're crazy. I'll let you lead ahead, but I'll be keeping an eye on you.
String.Dest: 你要是以为我会让你独自去享乐，应该是疯了。你来带路吧，但我会盯着你的。

String.Source: How does it feel to hold the fate of the vampire in your grasp. Exhilarating, isn't it?
String.Dest: 把吸血鬼的命运掌握在手里是什么感觉，兴奋，是吗？

String.Source: Aren't we there yet?
Ah, of course. The prophecy. You've come here to stop me from taking Auriel's Bow and shrouding the world in darkness.
String.Dest: 啊，当然了。预言，你是为了阻止我拿走奥瑞艾尔之弓，让世界被黑暗笼罩。

String.Source: If we head back to the castle and kick the front door in, we're going to be knee-deep in his friends.
String.Dest: 如果我们回到城堡踹开正门，马上就会被他的同党包围。

String.Source: I disagree.
Land on the ground, and I will have more to teach you.
String.Dest: 落地，我还有些东西要教你。

String.Source: Tell me what you're looking for and maybe we can make a deal... if you have the husks.
String.Dest: 告诉我你在找什么，也许我们能做笔交易……如果你有灵魂荚的话。

String.Source: So, you've returned.
Transform into the Vampire Lord, and I will teach you more.
String.Dest: 转变成吸血鬼领主，我会教给你更多的东西。

String.Source: It's definitely been a bad thing, on the whole.
I'm afraid I won't be able to help you with the scrolls any longer, milady.
String.Dest: 恐怕我在卷轴的事上帮不上忙了，夫人。

String.Source: Come on then, we haven't got all day!
The vampire is eternal, and with immortality comes the revelation that these bonds never endure... it's fleeting, momentary at best.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼永生，随着永生而来的启示，是这些纽带永远无法持久……短暂，充其量只是片刻。

String.Source: Thank you. Somehow I knew you'd understand.
String.Dest: 谢谢你，我知道你会理解的。

String.Source: A cure? Why even think of it that way?
Are you out of your mind?
By the Eight...
Ah, if only your traitor mother were here, I would let her watch this reunion before putting her head on a spike.
String.Dest: 啊，如果你那叛徒母亲在这里就好了，我要让她瞧瞧这场重逢，然后再把她脑袋钉起来。

String.Source: The sun cannot protect you any more!
String.Dest: 太阳再也保护不了你们了！

String.Source: They've holed up in an abandoned fort in the Reach.
String.Dest: 他们躲在裂痕领的一个废弃堡垒里。

String.Source: I'm a little nervous about all of this.
Find Lord Harkon. Let him know the time of the prophecy is at hand.
String.Dest: 去找哈孔大人。告诉他预言实现就在眼前。

String.Source: Our Lord will be most pleased, I'm sure. I knew you could do it.
String.Dest: 我确定大人会非常高兴，我就知道你能做到。

String.Source: All of Skyrim will tremble before us.
String.Dest: 全天际都要在我们面前颤抖！

String.Source: You're mine, mortal!
Gah... let's clear out this steam so we can take a look.
String.Dest: 啊……把这些蒸汽清除掉，我们就能看看了。

String.Source: What's that? I can feel some kind of power from it...
String.Dest: 那是什么，我能感受到其中的某种力量。

String.Source: That took longer than usual. How deep are we?
String.Dest: 比平时花的时间更多，我们这是到了多深的地方了？

String.Source: I've been thinking about this for a long time.
String.Dest: 我已经考虑过这个很久了。

String.Source: You'll have shown yourself to be strong, which means you can't be allowed to just stick around.
String.Dest: 你已经向他展示了自己的强大，这意味着你不能继续待在那了。

String.Source: Not until we have the bow. But... you're right.
String.Dest: 等我们拿到弓以后吧。但……你说得对。

String.Source: May Auri-El light your path.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔照亮你的道路。

String.Source: "The Winking Skeever." Charming name.
The world is alive, and so am I, for once.
String.Dest: 世界活过来了，我也是，可算这样了。

String.Source: You wouldn't like it.
Suit yourself.
Good. You deserve that much.
How are your friends?
That's it. That's the last scroll.
String.Dest: 找到了，这就是最后一本卷轴。

String.Source: Welcome, Initiate. This is the Wayshrine of Sight.
String.Dest: 欢迎你，新人。这里是眼界之路龛。

String.Source: I figured it would be more of an issue for you.
String.Dest: 我认为这对你来说更是一个问题。

String.Source: What trickery is this?
I should have killed you and your mother long ago!
String.Dest: 早该把你跟你妈都杀了！

String.Source: Another one of those things. Let's keep our distance.
String.Dest: 又是那些东西。我们离它远点吧。

String.Source: I'm getting there. Making my peace with it.
String.Dest: 我在努力让我自己能接受这么做。

String.Source: That makes sense.
That many fewer vampires to worry about. Good work.
String.Dest: 要担心的吸血鬼一下少了那么多，干得漂亮。

String.Source: Really?
We'd be honored to have you join us.
String.Dest: 如果有你加入，我们会十分荣幸。

String.Source: Do you get lonely?
They won't respond to you in any way other than believing that you're an Initiate and you're undertaking the journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 他们不会以任何方式回应你，除了认为你是一个新人，正在进行通往内殿的旅程。

String.Source: Through the grace of Auri-El, they were restored to their spectral form to enable them to continue their duties.
String.Dest: 多亏奥瑞艾尔的恩典，他们恢复成了幽灵形态，得以继续履行职责。

String.Source: Of course. You're here for Auriel's Bow. Why else would you be here?
String.Dest: 当然，你们是在找奥瑞艾尔之弓，不然还能是为什么呢？

String.Source: Of course he will.
You're a good daughter.
I've... never heard of him. Is he well supported?
String.Dest: 我……从来没听说过他。很多人支持他吗？

String.Source: First you die, then Serana suffers!
String.Dest: 首先宰了你，然后是瑟拉娜！

String.Source: It's not like anything else in Skyrim, I can tell you that much. From now or... before.
String.Dest: 我只能说，这里在天际是独一无二的。无论是现在还是……以前。

String.Source: I'd also like to not have to smell troll all the time.
String.Dest: 我也不希望一直闻到巨魔味儿。

String.Source: You'll pay for your insolence!
String.Dest: 为自己的傲慢付出代价吧！

String.Source: It is.
The story they'd like you to believe is that they were such a noble bunch, doing the honorable thing and saving lives.
String.Dest: 他们想让你相信的故事是，他们十分高尚，肩负着拯救圣灵的光荣事业。

String.Source: They increase the abilities of your vampiric powers.
String.Dest: 它们能增长你的吸血鬼能力。

String.Source: So, the beast is destroyed.
String.Dest: 这样一来，怪物被消灭了。

String.Source: Farewell, and good journey milord.
Cyrodiil is the seat of an empire?
String.Dest: 希罗帝尔是一个帝国的中心？

String.Source: Once there was a group dedicated to a similar cause. They called themselves the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 曾有一个组织致力于类似的事业，他们自称黎明守卫。

String.Source: Why the trolls, of course! You seem to have quite a way with them.
String.Dest: 巨魔啊，还用说！你对他们很有一套嘛。

String.Source: Find their leader and kill him!
String.Dest: 找出他们的首领，宰了他！

String.Source: I know you do, but this is something I need to do alone.
String.Dest: 我知道你想，但这是我必须一个人去做的。

String.Source: Vampires need to be dealt with. Hunted, rooted out, destroyed.
String.Dest: 总得有人去猎杀，根除，摧毁吸血鬼。

String.Source: Yeah.
Want to head out there and collect some more?
I'll probably stay here, for as long as they'll let me.
String.Dest: 我可能会待在这里，只要他们还允许。

String.Source: No, they didn't. But that's why I like being out here with you.
String.Dest: 他们是没有，但这就是为什么我喜欢和你一起的原因。

String.Source: You can't stop the prophecy!
I understand what you did for Serana and for me, but the prophecy never sat well for me, and I don't want to be a part of it. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 我知道你为我和瑟拉娜所做的一切，但这个预言从来都不适合我，我不想成为其中一份子，对不起。

String.Source: Run, coward! Run back to the filthy Dawnguard!
String.Dest: 滚吧，懦夫！滚回那肮脏的黎明守卫！

String.Source: Wound up turning into a vampire. The Jarl, unable to kill his own son, spent a fortune building this keep and hiring men to guard it.
String.Dest: 最后他变成了吸血鬼，领主没法杀死自己的儿子，就花了一大笔钱建造这座堡垒，并派人来守着。

String.Source: The first lay at the end of Darkfall Passage, a cavern that represents the absence of enlightenment.
String.Dest: 第一个在暗瀑通道的尽头，一个代表未经启蒙的洞穴。

String.Source: I'm no so easily coerced. I've got my eye on you. Try anything, and you will be the one who regrets it.
String.Dest: 这还吓不到我，我盯着你呢。想搞事我就让你后悔。

String.Source: I'm doing my best to not think of him as my father anymore.
String.Dest: 我尽力不把他再看做我的父亲。

String.Source: Anything good?
This won't be easy. But we can handle it.
String.Dest: 这肯定不容易，但我们做得到。

String.Source: Just... try to make it quick.
Ready for more? I certainly am.
String.Dest: 准备继续找了吗？我当然是了。

String.Source: Go to Morthal and find Falion. He's the only one I know of in Skyrim that can cure vampirism.
String.Dest: 去莫萨尔找法利昂，他是天际里我所知道唯一一个能治吸血鬼病的人。

String.Source: When I find you, I'm going to gut you like a deer and feast upon you blood!
String.Dest: 等找到你，我要把你像宰鹿一样开膛破肚，喝干血液！

String.Source: A little bit. That's... one of the reasons I wanted to come with you.
String.Dest: 有一点吧。这就是……我想跟你去的原因之一。

String.Source: He won't need either of us anymore.
The more you fight me, the more you will suffer, mortal.
String.Dest: 凡人，越是跟我斗，就越痛苦。

String.Source: I've never seen leaves this color.
String.Dest: 我还从没见过这种颜色的叶子。

String.Source: (Bark)
Ugh. The smell here... let's try to handle this quickly.
String.Dest: 呃。这儿的味道……我们赶紧把事情办了吧。

String.Source: That's too bad. Do you know how they're doing now?
String.Dest: 太糟糕了，你知道他们现在过得怎么样吗？

String.Source: What a curious city. It's so... open.
String.Dest: 非常独特的城市，好……开放。

String.Source: Good thing we stopped that prophecy, huh?
String.Dest: 还好我们阻止了那个预言，对吧？

String.Source: Hold it! He's the one Tolan mentioned.
String.Dest: 等等！他就是托兰提过的那个人。

String.Source: Are there... people in your life?
String.Dest: 你有……相伴一生的人了吗？

String.Source: They belong among our kind, not gathering mold in some vagabond's treasure pile.
String.Dest: 它们属于我族，而非在某个流浪汉的财宝堆里面发霉。

String.Source: I've located more dwemer plans.
String.Dest: 我发现新的锻莫图纸了。

String.Source: Arkay says we're going to win this. Well, probably.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯说我们会赢。好吧，也许会赢。

String.Source: Right behind you.
It'll be good to get out of the sun for a while.
String.Dest: 避开阳光一会儿比较好。

String.Source: You've served us all well, friend.
String.Dest: 你为我们立了大功，朋友。

String.Source: I've been trying to make my peace with it.
String.Dest: 我一直在尝试接受这么做。

String.Source: Last I knew he was out scouring Skyrim for more beasts to tame.
String.Dest: 上次听说他在天际寻找更多的野兽来驯服。

String.Source: Not going to happen.
Die, traitor!
If you can manage that, the Dawnguard still may have use for you.
String.Dest: 你要是办得到，黎明守卫可能还用得着你。

String.Source: I serve my master's will.
Be careful with those crystals. They feel... hungry.
String.Dest: 当心这些水晶。它们感觉……很饥渴。

String.Source: What is it?
If you think it'll help.
I had expected Ysgramor's city to be... bigger.
String.Dest: 我还以为伊斯格拉默的城市会……大一点。

String.Source: So, the deed has been done. My brother is dead.
String.Dest: 看来，契约已经完成了，我兄弟已经死了。

String.Source: Just... leave me alone for now. I'll be fine.
String.Dest: 就……让我一个人待一会儿，没事的。

String.Source: I think you'll need to find some arrows, first. Only elven ones will work for this, remember?
String.Dest: 我看你得先找到一些箭，只有精灵箭才行，还记得么？

String.Source: They're trolls. They smell like trolls. I can't help that either.
String.Dest: 它们是巨魔，闻起来当然就像巨魔，我也没办法。

String.Source: I'd like to be able to make a potion without tasting iron flakes, you know?
String.Dest: 希望我做的药水喝起来没有铁片的味道，知道吗？

String.Source: Here's the location of the next set of Dwemer diagrams. Thanks!
String.Dest: 下一组锻莫设计图的位置在这里，多谢了！

String.Source: Since you could've attacked me before now, I'm going to assume this was a little accident on your part.
String.Dest: 既然你之前本可以袭击我，我就假设这是你的小小意外。

String.Source: But not me! I knew it all along!
String.Dest: 但我没有！我一直都相信你！

String.Source: The only way to get to my brother is by following in the Initiates' footsteps and traveling from wayshrine to wayshrine just as they did.
String.Dest: 找到我兄弟的唯一办法就是跟随新人的足迹，从一个路龛到另一个路龛，就像他们一样。

String.Source: You deserve to be happy.
Oh. I didn't even know. What kind of woman is she?
String.Dest: 哦，我还不知道呢。她是什么样的女人？

String.Source: Arvak!
Don't tell me you're that naive.
A basic one? Of course. That is, assuming you know anything about steel smithing. It's pretty simple.
String.Dest: 一把简单的弩？当然了。对了，前提是你对锻铁有所了解。很简单。

String.Source: You brought that up before... I think I was a little short with you.
String.Dest: 你以前提过了……我想可能有些唐突了。

String.Source: Let's make some more stories.
String.Dest: 我们再来谱写更多的故事吧。

String.Source: (Panting)
Back in the Second Era, the Jarl of Riften had a son. Adventurous type, too much for his own good it seems.
String.Dest: 第二纪元，裂谷城领主有个儿子。他喜欢冒险，但似乎太超出他能力范围了。

String.Source: Come on, the bow has to be in this valley somewhere.
String.Dest: 走吧，弓肯定就在这个山谷某处。

String.Source: I'm afraid in their current form, they still believe the Chantry to be an active center of worship.
String.Dest: 恐怕以目前的情况，他们还以为神殿依然是活跃的信仰中心。

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: 准备好接受奥瑞-艾尔的教导，用他的启示填满容器了吗？

String.Source: Auriel's Bow will be mine!
Is that what passes for security with your lot? I can't say that I'm feeling any more confident.
String.Dest: 这就是你们那群人所谓的安全保障吗？我可不能说我对此更有信心了。

String.Source: Oh. All right, then.
I know how that feels. I mean... I know it isn't the same thing. But I was a pretty lonely child, myself.
String.Dest: 我知道这种感觉。我是说……虽然不是一回事，但我自己也有个相当孤独的童年。

String.Source: This better not be all the things you just can't be bothered with.
String.Dest: 最好别把你不要的都丢给我。

String.Source: All right, then. Hold still.
I need you to kill Arch-Curate Vyrthur... my brother.
String.Dest: 我需要你去杀了教士长维苏尔……我的兄弟。

String.Source: May Auri-El watch over you.
Well, I guess now you have one more.
String.Dest: 那么，我猜你现在又多了一个。

String.Source: Are you sure that's something you want? This isn't like picking out a new outfit. You'll be a creature of the night, like me.
String.Dest: 你确定想这么做吗？这不像挑件新衣服，你会成为夜行者，就跟我一样。

String.Source: Wait, stop! I yield!
Heard they'd go on midnight raids, pillaging and looting, and then stash the spoils somewhere, guarded by their sigil.
String.Dest: 听说他们会在午夜突袭，劫掠一空，然后把战利品用印记封好，藏在某个地方。

String.Source: Oh... damn it...
I've discovered the whereabouts of one of the ancient Rings of Blood Magic.
String.Dest: 我发现了一枚上古血魔法戒指的下落。

String.Source: I've been sworn to protect this vale and everything it represents until I die.
String.Dest: 我发过誓要守护这个山谷，和它代表的一切，直至死亡。

String.Source: Lead on.
Well, I think it's time I got back to my work as an alchemist.
String.Dest: 嗯，我觉得是时候重返炼金师岗位了。

String.Source: Stay on your guard.
Ugh. I thought this place was supposed to be secret?
String.Dest: 啊。我还以为这地方够隐秘。

String.Source: I don't know how you do it, getting them into that pen and putting armor on them. A very special relationship, clearly.
String.Dest: 不知道你怎么做到的，把它们带到围栏里，穿上盔甲。很明显，这关系相当特殊啊。

String.Source: Anyway, my mother and I didn't feel like inviting a war with all of Tamriel, so we tried to stop him. That's why I was sealed away with the Scroll.
String.Dest: 不论如何，我们母女不想和整个泰姆瑞尔为敌，所以试着阻止他。这就是我跟卷轴一起被封印的原因了。

String.Source: How can I help?
I'll see you soon.
Die, mortal!
I've always been fascinated with Dwemer artifacts. I take them apart, poke around in their guts, and try to figure things out - with mixed results.
String.Dest: 我一直对锻莫文物很感兴趣。把它们拆开来，在核心部位戳来戳去，试图搞清楚原理——喜忧参半吧。

String.Source: Shall we continue the fight?
String.Dest: 我们是不是该继续战斗了？

String.Source: How do we do that?
I'll be waiting.
Arvak! Arvak, where are you? Arvak, please come back! Come back!
String.Dest: 阿瓦克！阿瓦克你去哪儿了？阿瓦克，快回来！回来！

String.Source: The bow has to be in here.
I'm no fan of the sun, but it would be better than this.
String.Dest: 我是不喜欢晒太阳，但总比这里要好。

String.Source: I can tell this is important to you. Would you... do you want me to be just a normal human?
String.Dest: 看得出来这对你很重要。你会……你希望我成为一个普通人吗？

String.Source: My congratulations on defeating Harkon. Clearly, you are the superior vampire.
String.Dest: 恭喜您击败了哈孔。显然，您是更为高贵的吸血鬼。

String.Source: They should be among our kind, not laying about unguarded for mortals to find.
String.Dest: 它们应与我等同在，而不是无防备地任由凡人们去寻找。

String.Source: I'm proud of what we've managed to accomplish.
String.Dest: 我为我们取得的成就而骄傲。

String.Source: I can help you get it, but first I must have your assistance.
String.Dest: 我能帮你找到它，但首先你们得帮我。

String.Source: Deep inside, it brings me joy that the Betrayed weren't to blame for what happened here.
String.Dest: 在我心里，我很高兴这里发生的一切不是背叛者们造成的。

String.Source: Yeah. Is it just you, or do you have... people in your life?
String.Dest: 对。你是一个人，还是有了……相伴一生的人？
