String.Source: At that point, you'll have given him everything he's ever wanted.
String.Dest: 到那时候，你就给了他想要的一切。

String.Source: I don't like the look of this...
(Growl)
Even with these vampires gone, the fight isn't completely over. Once we're settled back in at the fort, there will be more work to do.
String.Dest: 即使没了这些吸血鬼，战斗也还没完全结束。我们回到堡垒后就有更多工作要做了。

String.Source: You are the new Master; we bow to your power. A power which, I note, includes Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 您是新主人了，我们都臣服于您的力量。我注意到这力量中还包括了奥瑞艾尔之弓。

String.Source: Oh. I didn't even know. What kind of man is he?
String.Dest: 哦，我还不知道呢。她是什么样的男人？

String.Source: I feel nothing but sympathy for the Betrayed, despite my actions against them.
String.Dest: 无论他们做了什么，我对他们都只有同情。

String.Source: So, if you'd be a dear and collect those plans for me?
String.Dest: 所以，能麻烦你帮我收集这些图纸吗？

String.Source: I'll rip the Dawnguard apart!
String.Dest: 我要把黎明守卫连根拔起！

String.Source: The twisted forms you've seen didn't occur overnight. It isn't a plague or a disease that ravaged our species.
String.Dest: 你所见的扭曲形态并非一夜之间形成的，它不是一种肆虐我族的瘟疫或疾病。

String.Source: I'll drain the life from you!
It should be among our kind, not laying about unguarded for mortals to find.
String.Dest: 它应与我等同在，而不是无防备地任由凡人们去寻找。

String.Source: I can't say it surprises me. I kind of figured we were heading for this some day.
String.Dest: 可能我不算太经验，毕竟早晚有这一天。

String.Source: I'm not sure what they did to this Moth Priest, but he doesn't look right.
String.Dest: 我不知道他们对蛾祭司做了什么，不过他看起来不太对劲。

String.Source: So be it!
If a line of communication could be established with them, maybe they can find peace.
String.Dest: 如果能与他们建立沟通渠道，也许能找到和平相处的办法。

String.Source: Perhaps they'll never return to their former appearance, but over the centuries, I've noticed a rise in their intellect.
String.Dest: 也许他们再也回不到原来的样子了，但几个世纪以来，我注意到他们的智力在提高。

String.Source: All right, let's see what you have.
Why don't you keep your things, and I'll keep mine.
String.Dest: 还是你背你的，我背我的吧。

String.Source: I think we can rebuild here. Make my family's legacy something more respectable.
String.Dest: 我想我们可以重建这里，让我家的遗产更受尊敬。

String.Source: I don't think that's something you want. You're a little... I just don't think you're the type.
String.Dest: 我觉得这不是你想要的，你有些……我就是觉得你不是那种人。

String.Source: May Auri-El's light guide you in your darkest hours.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光指引你最黑暗的时光。

String.Source: They're ghosts of the snow elf priests that tended the wayshrines before being slaughtered by the Betrayed.
String.Dest: 他们是雪精灵祭司的鬼魂，在被背叛者屠杀前，他们照看着路龛。

String.Source: They're respectable fighters, and I think they see the benefits of having a vampire on their side, now.
String.Dest: 他们是受人尊敬的战士，我想他们看到了有个吸血鬼站在他们一边的好处。

String.Source: They swept into the Chantry without warning and began killing everyone without pause.
String.Dest: 他们毫无征兆地冲进神殿，开始不停地屠杀每一个人。

String.Source: Very supportive.
Let's get back to work.
While I doubt we'll ever be truly rid of vampires in Skyrim, you've certainly made it a much safer place for now.
String.Dest: 虽然我怀疑天际永远也根除不了吸血鬼，但你确实让它变得更安全了。

String.Source: Need something?
We'll make sure there's nothing left of them.
String.Dest: 我们会把他们杀个精光。

String.Source: We have Auriel's Bow. We can't lose... right?
String.Dest: 我们有奥瑞艾尔之弓，输不了……的吧？

String.Source: I'm as ready as I can be.
The trolls will serve us well, I think.
String.Dest: 我想巨魔们会帮我们大忙的。

String.Source: I'll see you again. Soon.
It's time to end this.
I could see through my eyes, but I could not control my actions.
String.Dest: 我能透过我的眼睛看，但我不能控制自己的行为。

String.Source: How dare you disobey me!
I can see that. This has been my life for a long time, though. Do you understand that much?
String.Dest: 我看的出来，这是我很长一段时间的人生了。你明白吗？

String.Source: Destroy every last one of them!
Must... resist...
We're done with this when none of them are left standing. Let's go.
String.Dest: 杀得他们一个不剩就结束了。走吧。

String.Source: Kill their leader before it has a chance to escape!
String.Dest: 在他们有机会逃走前宰了首领！

String.Source: We'll secure the castle. You just get to their master!
String.Dest: 我们会守住城堡，你去找他们老大就行了！

String.Source: Arkay and I will take care of the little ones! You find the leader!
String.Dest: 阿尔凯和我会对付小喽啰！你去找头目！

String.Source: It's fine, it can just be kind of a sore subject.
String.Dest: 没关系，这可能有些难言之隐。

String.Source: Me too.
For the Dawnguard! For Skyrim!
String.Dest: 为了黎明守卫！为了天际！

String.Source: Let me address the Dawnguard, and then we'll be off. The men deserve to know that we've finally gained the upper hand.
String.Dest: 让我跟黎明守卫们说几句，然后就出发。他们得知道我们终于占了上风。

String.Source: (Bark)
I suppose that's as much as I can hope for.
String.Dest: 我猜也只能这么希望了。

String.Source: Let's move.
From the castle, you used to just be able to see Solitude over the mountains. It's exactly what I imagined.
String.Dest: 当初从城堡上，可以看到群山后的独孤城。这里和我想象的简直一模一样。

String.Source: Oh, I'm sorry. Didn't mean to bring up a bad memory.
String.Dest: 哦对不起，我不是想勾起不好的回忆。

String.Source: Good luck out there.
Who are the contenders?
Keep your guard up.
It's like the world is alive again. Just like me.
String.Dest: 就好像世界又活过来了。就像我一样。

String.Source: I knew you'd miss me.
I used to help my mother tend a garden in the courtyard here.
String.Dest: 我过去常常在那里帮我母亲打理花园。

String.Source: I think I'll hang on to my things, thank you.
String.Dest: 我觉得还是自己背自己的吧，谢了。

String.Source: Rocks and valley, crevices and hiding places. This is the kind of place where hermits and fanatics dwell.
String.Dest: 既有岩石山谷，又有裂缝秘地。简直是隐士和狂人的理想家园。

String.Source: This place makes me a little uneasy.
I'm okay with the dark, but I've spent more than my share of time in caves already.
String.Dest: 我可以忍受黑暗，但我在山洞里待的时间已经够长了。

String.Source: This land feels... twisted. I'm surprised my father didn't want to live out here.
String.Dest: 这片土地感觉有些……怪异。我父亲居然没想过住在这里。

String.Source: I am but your humble servant, milady.
String.Dest: 我只是您卑微的仆人，夫人。

String.Source: Yes, how may I serve you, milady?
String.Dest: 是，我要怎么服侍您，夫人？

String.Source: They used to call Windhelm, "the City of Kings." In my books, anyway.
String.Dest: 他们以前把风舵叫做“众王之城”，至少我书上是这么写的。

String.Source: It's been a long time since I felt that way and it's been long overdue. My thanks, to both of you.
String.Dest: 我很久没有过这样的感觉了，早该如此。多谢你们二位。

String.Source: Glad to see you've taken care of your little problem, and kept it from becoming my problem.
String.Dest: 很高兴看到你解决了你的小问题，没有让它变成我的问题。

String.Source: This must be that beautiful Skyrim weather I've always heard about.
String.Dest: 传闻中天际的宜人气候莫过于此了吧。

String.Source: What?
Keep strong, and eyes open. We're on a different path now.
String.Dest: 保存力量，睁开眼睛。我们已经走上了一条不同的路。

String.Source: Please, let's hurry. I need to get home so I can figure out what's happened.
String.Dest: 拜托，快点。我得回家，这样我才能弄明白到底发生了什么。

String.Source: It's so bright out here. I don't know how you stand it.
String.Dest: 这外面也太亮了，我都不知道你怎么受得了。

String.Source: Yes, let me show you.
It looks like some kind of temple.
If you can prove you're reliable, maybe you can join the Dawnguard. We have ways of dealing with vampires.
String.Dest: 你要是能证明自己可靠，也许就能加入黎明守卫。我们有对付吸血鬼的办法。

String.Source: You're lucky Isran hasn't killed you outright. Get cured while you can.
String.Dest: 庆幸伊士冉没直接杀了你吧。趁还来得及去治好。

String.Source: I always wondered what the dwarves actually looked like. I hear they're like elves, but with beards.
String.Dest: 我一直想知道矮人们到底长什么样。听说他们像精灵，但有胡子。

String.Source: And I thought the Soul Cairn was creepy.
String.Dest: 当初我还觉得灵魂石冢就够恐怖的了。

String.Source: There's not a whole lot to tell.
So this is the grand tour of Skyrim's caves that you're showing me?
String.Dest: 这就是你给我的天际洞穴之旅吗？

String.Source: Good, let's get inside there. The sun is starting to get to me.
String.Dest: 很好，我们进去吧。阳光开始伤到我了。

String.Source: (Bark)
Gunmar, there's an area large enough for you to pen up some trolls, get them armored up and ready for use.
String.Dest: 甘马尔，这里也有足够大的地方来让你养巨魔。给他们穿上盔甲，准备派上用场。

String.Source: It... almost doesn't even look real. You know?
String.Dest: 这……简直不像真的。你觉得呢？

String.Source: Never saw anything like this back on the island.
String.Dest: 在岛上从来都看不到这种景象。

String.Source: Alright! One more set of dwemer plans to go.
String.Dest: 好了！又有一套锻莫图纸要找了。

String.Source: How much longer can you keep this up, Moth Priest?
String.Dest: 你还能坚持多久，蛾祭司？

String.Source: This is the kind of thing I've been wanting to see.
String.Dest: 这就是我一直想看到的。

String.Source: I never knew it would be this beautiful.
It's like from the stories I used to hear... the two adventurers seeing the world.
String.Dest: 就像我听过的那些故事……两位探寻世界的冒险家。

String.Source: I'll remember this.
I'm glad you're here with me.
Oh wow. This is gorgeous.
I'm not talking about this with you any more.
String.Dest: 我不想再和你谈这个了。

String.Source: Did you hear something?
I don't know, maybe. Won't know until we get him out of there.
String.Dest: 没准，我不知道。我们把他救出去之后就知道了。

String.Source: Here comes another one!
If there's assistance I can provide, just ask. It's the least I can do.
String.Dest: 如果有什么需要帮忙的，尽管开口。这是我最起码能做的。

String.Source: No... Serana... your own father....
String.Dest: 不……瑟拉娜……你的亲生父亲……

String.Source: I'll see you when I'm done. For now, I need to just do this.
String.Dest: 当结束后我会跟你见面的。至于现在，我只要把这事办了。

String.Source: Oh. I didn't even know. Is it a happy home?
String.Dest: 哦，我还不知道呢。是个幸福的家庭吗？

String.Source: Then behold Auri-El's gift, my child. May it speed your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 那就来见证奥瑞-艾尔的恩赐吧，孩子。愿它加快你前往内殿的旅途。

String.Source: Of course, I wouldn't be telling you where to find it if I desired it for myself.
String.Dest: 当然，我要是想要的话也不会告诉你它在哪儿了。

String.Source: Die, you traitorous dog!
By the blood...
Sorine, you'll find room to start your tinkering on that crossbow design you've been working on.
String.Dest: 索琳，有房间能动工打造你正在设计的弩。

String.Source: I'll have some for sale soon.
Here. Let me show you how this works...
String.Dest: 来，让你看看是怎么造的……

String.Source: No, you've proven your strength to him.
String.Dest: 不，你是向他证明了你的实力。

String.Source: It belongs among our kind, not gathering mold in some vagabond's treasure pile.
String.Dest: 它属于我族，而非在某个流浪汉的财宝堆里面发霉。

String.Source: So you take a major decision for me, and make it all about you?
String.Dest: 所以你是替我做了个重大决定，而且只考虑你自己？

String.Source: I've discovered the whereabouts of a set of ancient Rings of Blood Magic.
String.Dest: 我发现了一套上古血魔法戒指的下落。

String.Source: I've located the last known resting place of a set of ancient Amulets of Night Power.
String.Dest: 我发现了一套有着暗夜之力的古护符的最后沉睡之地。

String.Source: Serana isn't yours, she's mine!
String.Dest: 瑟拉娜可不归你，她是我的！

String.Source: Well it was... Thank the Vigilants for ruining that.
String.Dest: 嗯那就要……感谢警戒者们把它毁了。

String.Source: I've located one of the lost ancient Amulets of Night Power.
String.Dest: 我已经确定了一个遗失的暗夜之力古护符的位置。

String.Source: What about you? What were your parents like?
String.Dest: 你呢？你的父母是什么样？

String.Source: The amulets increase the effectiveness of your vampiric powers.
String.Dest: 这些护符能增长你吸血鬼力量的效果。

String.Source: You know where to find me if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 改变主意的话，你也知道到哪儿来找我。

String.Source: Arvak. My horse. We came to this horrible place together. We were attacked by monsters, so I told him to run.
String.Dest: 阿瓦克，我的马。我们一起来到这恐怖的地方，被怪物袭击了，所以我叫他快跑。

String.Source: Of course. I wouldn't be telling you where to find it if I desired it for myself.
String.Dest: 当然可以，我想要的话就不会告诉你去哪找它了。

String.Source: Come on. We can talk about this another time.
String.Dest: 继续走吧，下次再聊这个话题。

String.Source: There you are. I'm... I'm back.
String.Dest: 你在这里啊。我……我回来了。

String.Source: You are prey, like all mortals. I banish you!
String.Dest: 你跟所有凡人一样，是猎物了。你被放逐了！

String.Source: There's a courtyard in the castle. I used to help her tend a garden there.
String.Dest: 城堡里有一个庭院。我过去常常在那里帮她打理花园。

String.Source: They request Auriel's Bow, and I request their assistance. It's been repeated so many times, I can't imagine it any other way.
String.Dest: 他们需要奥瑞艾尔之弓，我需要他们的帮助。这么多次的重复让我难以想象还有别的可能。

String.Source: Hands to yourself.
So I am. I guess we could use my blood. Do you have any arrows? Elven arrows. I'm not going to just bleed on any old thing.
String.Dest: 没错。我的血大概可以吧。你手里有箭吗？精灵箭。我可不想把血涂在什么老古董上。

String.Source: The castle, of course, is yours. We shall follow you, and help spread your influence across Skyrim.
String.Dest: 城堡当然属于您了。我们将追随、帮助您在天际传播影响力。

String.Source: Once saw Harkon rip a man in half. He's powerful like you wouldn't believe.
String.Dest: 曾见过哈孔大人把人撕成两半，他强大到了难以相信的地步。

String.Source: Run, coward! You're a traitor to your race!
String.Dest: 滚吧，懦夫！你就是你们族类的叛徒！

String.Source: So, the deed has been done.
Be a dear and fetch me another set of Dwemer diagrams?
String.Dest: 能再帮个忙给我带一套锻莫设计图吗？

String.Source: In the meantime, if there are any potions you might need, feel free to help yourself.
String.Dest: 另外，有什么能派上用场的话，随便拿就是。

String.Source: Anyway, this is all very touching, but don't we have some more important things to worry about right now?
String.Dest: 不管怎样，这确实很感人，但我们现在不是有更重要的事情要担心吗？

String.Source: Be a dear and collect these diagrams for me?
String.Dest: 能劳烦你帮我去收集这些设计图吗？

String.Source: Think I'll be sad when we're done collecting these. Who knows though, maybe more plans will turn up in the future.
String.Dest: 等我们收集完这些后，我可能会难过吧。谁知道呢，也许以后还有更多图纸出现呢。

String.Source: Makes everything else worth it.
I'm starting to think you like this as much as I do!
String.Dest: 我开始觉得你和我一样喜欢这个了！

String.Source: What? What are you talking about?
I think both of our parents have failed us. Just you and me against the world, now.
String.Dest: 我认为父母都辜负了我们，现在只有你我在对抗全世界了。

String.Source: But as luck would have it, I've tracked down the location of some actual Dwemer diagram drawings!
String.Dest: 但幸运的是，我找到了一些锻莫正牌设计图的位置！

String.Source: I think even Gunmar's been impressed with what we've managed to do with the Dwemer drawings. Let's see what we can do with these ones!
String.Dest: 我猜就连甘马尔也会对我们在锻莫图纸上取得的成就感到佩服。来看看这些能让我们做什么！

String.Source: We've been so terribly fortunate. I can't wait to see what's in these drawings.
String.Dest: 我们真是太幸运了，等不及要看看这些图纸里有什么了。

String.Source: I just didn't know when.
String.Dest: 只是不知道会是哪天罢了。

String.Source: Like that they were supposed to guard some vampire here, but wound up all becoming vampires themselves when they saw how powerful he was.
String.Dest: 好像他们本来是要看管这里的某个吸血鬼，但当发现了他的强大后，自己也全部变成了吸血鬼。

String.Source: These people seem nervous, which makes me nervous.
String.Dest: 这些人看上去很紧张，让我也紧张起来了。

String.Source: I'd read stories about the Solitude windmill, but I didn't expect it to be that big!
String.Dest: 我读过独孤城风车的故事，但没想到它能有这么大！

String.Source: I don't know that name. You say she's Jarl of Solitude? Who supports her?
String.Dest: 没听说过这人。你说她是独孤城的领主？谁支持她呢？

String.Source: Don't say I didn't warn you.
It's your choice whether to attempt to deal with them or force your way through.
String.Dest: 是与他们打交道还是强行通过就看你的了。

String.Source: Keep in mind that Redwater Den has fallen into... well, let's just say less reputable members of society now dwell there.
String.Dest: 记住了，红水窝点已经陷入了……嗯，这么说吧，现在那里盘踞着一些社会上声誉不良的群体。

String.Source: Welcome back.
I must have been gone longer than I thought. Definitely longer than we planned.
String.Dest: 我睡的时间肯定比我以为的要久。肯定比我们计划的要久

String.Source: I'll see you soon.
That was a long time ago, but the idea was, and is, a good one. That's why I'm bringing it back.
String.Dest: 那是很久以前了，但这个主意过去是，现在也是好主意。这就是为什么我要使其复生。

String.Source: And so I'm going to give you a chance to get yourself cured.
String.Dest: 所以我就给你一个治愈自己的机会。

String.Source: You think they turned him?
String.Dest: 你觉得他们把他给转化了？

String.Source: Well, growing up the way I did, you get used to it.
String.Dest: 嗯，要是像我一样长大，你也会习惯的。

String.Source: Good luck.
All clean. I feel like I can breathe again for the first time since I was turned.
String.Dest: 结束了。这感觉好像自从我转化后我终于能再次呼吸了一样。

String.Source: We'll talk more when we're there.
Here I am. Human as ever.
String.Dest: 我回来了。像过去一样是个人类。

String.Source: It is time for action.
I guess it doesn't matter now. At least Isran is trying to do something noble with the name.
String.Dest: 我想现在已经无所谓了，至少伊士冉是想用这个名号做些高尚的事情。

String.Source: Arkay be with you, my friend.
Well met, friend.
Is something wrong?
By now, my daughter will have told you what we are.
String.Dest: 现在，我女儿已经告诉你我们的身份了。

String.Source: I'm not sure.
My Lady.
Leaving the wayshrines unguarded would be violating my sacred duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auriel.
String.Dest: 让路龛无人看守会违背我作为奥瑞-艾尔圣骑士的神圣职责。

String.Source: Let someone else rule. I just want to kill and feed.
String.Dest: 统治问别人去，我只想杀戮和进食。

String.Source: It is an honor to serve Harkon, is it not?
String.Dest: 为哈孔效力是种荣幸，不是吗？

String.Source: The Dawnguard will now be dedicated to safeguarding it, making sure that prophecy will never come to pass.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫现在将全力守卫这把弓，确保预言永无实现之日。

String.Source: I wonder what these souls do all day. They look... bored.
String.Dest: 我想知道这些灵魂成天都干些什么。他们似乎很……无聊。

String.Source: Wait, is he talking about me?
May Auri-El keep you free from harm.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔保你免受伤害。

String.Source: These Falmer are... they're frozen in the ice.
String.Dest: 这些伐莫……它们被冻结在冰里了。

String.Source: I wonder how long they've been like this.
String.Dest: 想知道他们这样有多久了。

String.Source: I don't think you can ever be ready to kill your parent.
String.Dest: 我不认为谁能准备好去杀了父母。

String.Source: There's probably groves like this all over Tamriel. Most people just don't even know what to look for.
String.Dest: 这种树林可能散布于泰姆瑞尔各地，但大多数人可能都不知道。

String.Source: The prophecy said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun. For someone who fancied himself as vampire royalty, that's pretty seductive.
String.Dest: 预言说吸血鬼不用再害怕太阳了。对于一个自诩为吸血鬼王室成员的人来说，这相当诱人。

String.Source: Another victory for the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫的又一场胜利。

String.Source: We've got enough to worry about right now. You stay focused, and I'll worry about me.
String.Dest: 要担心的已经够多了，你专心点，担心让我自己来。

String.Source: Only what I've heard.
Now, acknowledge me as your master!
String.Dest: 现在，承认我是你的主人！

String.Source: Thank you for breaking that foul vampire's hold over me.
String.Dest: 谢谢你解除了那个恶心的吸血鬼对我的控制。

String.Source: (Whine)
Find all of them! Don't let any of them get away!
String.Dest: 全找出来！别让他们跑了！

String.Source: Are you alright? Come on, we can do this. I know we can.
String.Dest: 你还好吗？起来，我们能办到的。一定行的。

String.Source: Figured.
That makes sense.
Best of luck to you.
Yes, they smell like trolls. But do you have to? Consider washing up a bit more often.
String.Dest: 对，它们气味像巨魔，但你也得是吗？注意多洗澡吧。

String.Source: I despise your presence, mortal!
Well, I'll be out of your hair soon enough.
String.Dest: 那么，我很快就不会烦你了。

String.Source: (Bark)
Talk to Gunmar if you need materials.
String.Dest: 需要材料就去找甘马尔。

String.Source: Sorine and Gunmar are settling in.
String.Dest: 索琳和甘马尔正在安顿下来。

String.Source: No... why?
But my master is dead, and his enemies will pay!
String.Dest: 主人已死，他的敌人必须付出代价！

String.Source: Stop apologizing for everything.
Leave no vampire in one piece!
If you need some help, I'm ready.
String.Dest: 如果需要帮助，我已经准备好了。

String.Source: I'll probably stay with the Dawnguard, for as long as they'll let me.
String.Dest: 我可能会和黎明守卫一起，只要他们还允许我跟着。

String.Source: We didn't all get to have parents like yours. Sometimes this is just... how it is.
String.Dest: 不是人人都有你这样的父母，有时候情况就是……本该如此。

String.Source: Of course it matters to you, but you don't get to make this decision for me.
String.Dest: 当然对你很重要，但你不能替我做这个决定。

String.Source: But I'm afraid that they're well beyond a cure at this point.
Oh. I... I see.
Let's just get this over with. Do you have any elven arrows?
String.Dest: 赶紧搞定吧，你有精灵箭吗？

String.Source: Forget it.
I'm going to go away for a while. I'll meet you back home when I'm done.
String.Dest: 我要离开一段时间了，完事后回家找你。

String.Source: I'll speak to Falion. I've heard he knows about these things.
String.Dest: 我会去找法利昂。听说他知道这些事情。

String.Source: Does it bother you that I'm here?
String.Dest: 我在这里会让你觉得困扰吗？

String.Source: I understand.
(Growl)
Enough games, let's finish this!
Which friends would those be?
If Isran is really asking for me, it must be serious. I'll help. Where do you need me to go?
String.Dest: 伊士冉要是真的找我了，说明情况很严重。我会帮忙，要我去哪里？

String.Source: You've already seen my father's obsession. My mother's not a whole lot better, but you'll see that soon enough.
String.Dest: 你已经见过我父亲的执念了，我母亲也好不到哪里去，马上你就会看到的。

String.Source: You've met both of my parents. They're both crazy in their own way.
String.Dest: 你见过我父母了，他们都有各自发疯的地方。

String.Source: We both know what's going to have to happen once we find the bow.
String.Dest: 我们都明白找到弓以后会发生什么。

String.Source: It's not that simple. I guess it never is with families, is it?
String.Dest: 没这么简单，我猜家里的事情从来都不简单，对吧？

String.Source: That letter's the last I've heard of her and mentions where she is. Now please, leave me alone.
String.Dest: 那封信是我最后听到有关她的消息，还提到了她的下落。现在别来烦我，求你了。

String.Source: You're a good son.
Congratulations, friend. You've won a well-deserved victory here.
String.Dest: 祝贺你，朋友。你赢得了这当之无愧的胜利。

String.Source: Your blood will be mine!
Let's... uh... let's just keep going.
No, it's probably not.
Empire? What... what empire?
Only I hear that's not quite how it happened. Secret organization, you see. No one to blame when homes are broken into, things stolen.
String.Dest: 可我听到的并非如此。他们是一个秘密组织，知道吗。破门入户，盗窃财物，溜之大吉的那种。

String.Source: Arvak, please! You can stop running now!
String.Dest: 阿瓦克，求你了！你没必要逃跑了！

String.Source: It would be nice not to always be so thirsty.
String.Dest: 要是不一直这么饥渴倒也好。

String.Source: It sounds like... that's the last bit of the prophecy. The blood of a Daughter of Coldharbour can corrupt the bow.
String.Dest: 听起来……是预言的最后一部分。冷港之女的血可以腐蚀弓。

String.Source: Hold it! She's the one Tolan mentioned.
String.Dest: 等等！她就是托兰提过的那个人。

String.Source: It ends here!
It's the only way they'll discover that they weren't always malignant... they were once a proud and prosperous race.
String.Dest: 只有这样，他们才会发现自身并非总是充满恶意……他们曾经是一个自豪而繁荣的种族。

String.Source: Well, maybe it really is time to resurrect the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 嗯，也许是时候重建黎明守卫了。

String.Source: You must help me find my Arvak. He doesn't deserve to be in a place like this!
String.Dest: 你得帮我找到阿瓦克，他不该来这种地方！

String.Source: I mean, what do you think my father will do when we bring him the bow?
String.Dest: 我的意思是，你认为我们把弓给我父亲后，他会怎样？

String.Source: But at that point, he'll have everything he's ever wanted.
String.Dest: 但到那时候，他就拥有了想要的一切。

String.Source: And I thought my father was the delusional one.
String.Dest: 但我认为我父亲有妄想症。

String.Source: He just became absorbed... obsessed. It was kind of sick, actually.
String.Dest: 他变得专注……痴迷。实际上，已经有些病态了。

String.Source: Oh, gods...
Come on, let's take it to Dexion.
And I'll be unnecessary once he has it.
String.Dest: 他得到弓之后我也不是必要的了。

String.Source: Let's just get this over with.
My father... no, not really. I did spend a lot of time with my mother, but she saw me more like a protege than a daughter.
String.Dest: 我父亲……不，一点也不。我跟我母亲呆在一起的时间很长，不过比起一个女儿，我更像是她的学生。

String.Source: I think you know.
I will darken the skies!
I see. That would explain much.
If? I've been assuming that's where all this is going.
String.Dest: 如果？我一直都认为这是必然的。

String.Source: Arkay tells me the Sun Fire spell can break open those caches, but I've never found one. I think he might be lying to me.
String.Dest: 阿尔凯告诉我阳炎法术可以打开这些箱子，但我从来没找到过，八成是被他骗了。

String.Source: This latest attack proves it's the right time.
String.Dest: 最近的这次袭击证明时机合适了。

String.Source: I don't like him any more than you do. But he is my father.
String.Dest: 我也不比你喜欢他，但他毕竟是我父亲。

String.Source: Yes, I can feel your defenses crumbling. You want it to end. You want to give in to me.
String.Dest: 是啊，我能感觉到你的防线崩溃了。你想让这一切结束。你想向我屈服。

String.Source: I want to add some punch to our crossbow capabilities, I've done all I can on my own. I need a little inspiration.
String.Dest: 我一直尽全力想给我们的弩增加动能。还需要些灵感。

String.Source: I hope so.
I know you didn't know your parents. But if they were anything like mine, you're better off.
String.Dest: 我知道你不了解你的父母，但要是他们和我的父母一样，你会更享受的。

String.Source: That's too bad.
Please, he's such a loyal creature, and he's been running for so long. You have to save him! A place like this will change you...
String.Dest: 求求你了，他这么忠诚，也载我跑了这么久了。你得救救他！这种地方会改变你们……

String.Source: Your mind was strong, but you're exhausted from the struggle.
String.Dest: 你的思想很顽强，不过你已经累了。

String.Source: I'm working on it, now give me some silence so I can think.
String.Dest: 我正想辙呢，现在给我闭嘴，让我想想。

String.Source: But I can't wait to see these drawings. Go on, get out of here!
String.Dest: 但我现在等不及要看看这些图纸了，赶紧的，出去找吧！

String.Source: Vyrthur and myself are the only two snow elves that remain.
String.Dest: 维苏尔和我是仅存的两个雪精灵了。

String.Source: Yes… master…
The people of Skyrim owe you a great deal, whether they know it or not.
String.Dest: 无论天际的人们知不知道，他们都欠你一份情。

String.Source: What can I do for you?
Oh, wonderful. A war of succession. Good to know the world didn't get boring while I was gone.
String.Dest: 啊，真棒。继承权之战。不错不错，看来在我睡着的时候，世界没有变得无聊。

String.Source: Not as much.
Sorine needs help with her project to improve our crossbows. And if that doesn't interest you...
String.Dest: 索琳改进弩的项目需要帮助，但如果你不感兴趣的话……

String.Source: (Whine)
The Soul Cairn will offer a unique opportunity to continue my studies, and I intend to complete my research.
String.Dest: 灵魂石冢是个独一无二的机会，我可以借此继续完成研究。

String.Source: Of course, if you've got any more adventures planned...
String.Dest: 当然了，如果你还有更多冒险计划的话……

String.Source: Fought vampires wherever they found them. I aim to continue that mission.
String.Dest: 无论何地只要发现了吸血鬼，都与之战斗。我的目标是继续这项使命。

String.Source: They were eventually forced to put him down. The Jarl banished them from the hold, but they stuck to their cause.
String.Dest: 最后被迫杀死了他，领主把他们驱逐出境，但他们仍坚守自己的事业。

String.Source: And take this as well. Seeing as Saint Jiub has ascended to pure spiritual form, I won't need it any longer.
String.Dest: 把这个也带上吧，既然圣鸠步已经升华为纯粹的精魂形态，我就再也不需要它了。

String.Source: That... that wasn't me you were fighting.
Oh, wow. All right, well, what do you think my father's going to do once we bring the bow to him?
String.Dest: 哦，哇哦。好吧，你认为等我们把弓带给我父亲后他会怎样？

String.Source: If you were anybody else, I'd probably be taking some blood from you for asking that.
String.Dest: 如果换成其他人，我可能要从他们自己身上取血了。

String.Source: Hiding won't help you!
You... always say what you think, don't you?
String.Dest: 你……说话一直都这么直接的吗？

String.Source: You'd better get out of here and get yourself cured.
String.Dest: 你最好离开这里，然后去把自己治好。

String.Source: Arvak?
It was the Betrayed... they did something to him, I just don't know why Auri-El would allow this to happen.
String.Dest: 是背叛者们造成的……他们对他做了些什么，我只是不明白为什么奥瑞-艾尔会允许这种事情发生。

String.Source: Their job was to keep the Jarl's son contained within. They took it seriously, and served honorably.
String.Dest: 工作是把领主的儿子关在里面，他们也认真对待，光荣服役。

String.Source: So, let's get this straight.
Once we're inside, just keep quiet for a bit. Let me take the lead.
String.Dest: 一旦我们走进去，就别说话。让我带路。

String.Source: I don't want to either, but you're going to have to jump. I'll be... right behind you. Above you. Just go.
String.Dest: 我也不想，但是你得跳下去。我……跟在你后面。跟在你上面。走吧。

String.Source: I'll rend the flesh from your bones!
I did. But something about you makes me think I can trust you. I hope I'm not wrong.
String.Dest: 确实。但你身上的某种特质让我觉得可以相信你。但愿我没看走眼。

String.Source: Keep your eyes open, here.
Because that means there's still hope that they might one day shed their hatred and learn to believe in Auri-El once again.
String.Dest: 因为这意味着他们还有希望，某一天能放下仇恨，重新信奉奥瑞艾尔。

String.Source: A vampire?
Which just makes you a more dangerous rival.
String.Dest: 只会让你成为一个更危险的对手。

String.Source: Look at this. I should've known it was only a matter of time before they found us.
String.Dest: 看吧，我早该知道他们找到我们只是时间问题。

String.Source: And an assault on the Betrayed guarding the Inner Sanctum would only end with my death.
String.Dest: 而袭击把守内殿的背叛者只会以我的死亡而告终。

String.Source: You've served Skyrim well.
You dare defy your father?!
You've turned her against me!
The dwarves may have stolen their sight, but it took many generations for them to become what they are today.
String.Dest: 矮人们可能确实偷走了他们的视力，但他们也繁衍了很多代才变成如今的模样。

String.Source: But I can see this having its uses. Do you have any elven arrows on you?
String.Dest: 但我知道这会有用的，你身上有精灵箭吗？

String.Source: I will resist you, monster. I must!
String.Dest: 我不会向你屈服，怪物。绝不！

String.Source: Well met, brother.
Not only that, but Auriel's Bow is in safe hands.
String.Dest: 不止如此，奥瑞艾尔之弓也得到了妥善保管。

String.Source: I just hope we weren't too late.
String.Dest: 我只是希望我们没来得太迟。

String.Source: And now... I think I can rest. Farewell, my friend, wherever your travels take you.
String.Dest: 而现在……我想可以休息了。无论你的旅途向何方，永别了，我的朋友。

String.Source: But... what about you?
That's what I wanted to hear.
Very funny.
I've only heard stories. Not sure if any of them are true.
String.Dest: 我只听说过一些，不确定真假。

String.Source: And then preyed on the Rift until finally someone put them down.
String.Dest: 后来他们就在裂谷捕食，直到最后有人干掉了他们。

String.Source: Oh, I've read a few things. Heard a few more things. Arkay's told me a bit as well.
String.Dest: 哦，我读到过一些，也听说过一些，阿尔凯还跟我说了一些。

String.Source: Farewell, and good journey milady.
And it seems we have a problem.
I'll make you pay for this, daughter!
I'm sorry, I don't feel comfortable giving them to you.
String.Dest: 抱歉，我觉得这么做不太好。

String.Source: Those vampires put up a hell of a fight.
String.Dest: 那些吸血鬼大干了一仗。

String.Source: I really do enjoy killing vampires.
I knew you had it in you! Arkay wasn't so sure. Between you and me, I think he didn't expect you to make it.
String.Dest: 我就知道你有这本事！阿尔凯还不确定呢。偷偷告诉你，我猜他没指望你办得到这事。

String.Source: Let's get indoors. Or in a cave. Anywhere, just out of this.
String.Dest: 我们回室内吧，或者找个洞穴。能离开这儿哪里都行。

String.Source: You're all talk.
That I am. So I'm guessing you want to just use my blood, then?
String.Dest: 没错。所以你是想用我的血，对吧？

String.Source: Sure... do you have any arrows, though? They would have to be of elven quality, I'd guess.
String.Dest: 好吧……你有箭吗？我觉得必须是精灵箭。

String.Source: Isran will never admit it, but I'm sure he's proud of you.
String.Dest: 虽然伊士冉不会明说，但他肯定为你感到骄傲。

String.Source: (Whine)
I wonder if the horse's remains are around here... someplace.
String.Dest: 我想知道马的尸体是不是就在这……附近。

String.Source: Is that... oh no. Are we going down there?
String.Dest: 那是……啊，不。我们要下去吗？

String.Source: This is an intriguing change.
It's amazing what I'm able to learn from studying these Dwemer plans.
String.Dest: 我从这些锻莫设计中学到的东西可太神奇了。

String.Source: Even before that, we weren't the most normal family. We did worship a daedra, remember?
String.Dest: 即使在那以前，我们都不算是普通家庭了。还记得我们信仰迪德拉吗？

String.Source: Probably not.
We need to do all that nonsense to get into the temple, so we can kill your brother and claim Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: 我们得做那么多毫无意义的事情才能进神殿，然后杀了你兄弟拿到奥瑞艾尔之弓？

String.Source: I can't help that space is cramped in here, Florentius.
String.Dest: 我没办法，这里很挤，佛伦提乌斯。

String.Source: It would make you a bit weaker when we travel through the Soul Cairn, but we might be able to fix that once we're inside. Maybe.
String.Dest: 当我们穿越灵魂石冢的时候，你可能会觉得有一点点虚弱，不过一旦进去以后，我们没准就有可能恢复了。

String.Source: Vaaz!
If you're here to join up, you need to see Isran. He's up at the fort talking to some Vigilant.
String.Dest: 如果你是来入伙的，你得去见见伊士冉。他正在堡垒里跟一些警戒者谈话呢。

String.Source: Until the "Betrayed" corrupted you. Yes, yes. We've heard this sad story.
String.Dest: 直到“背叛者”腐化了你。好了好了，我们听过这悲伤的故事了。

String.Source: And now that you've stirred up the vampires against you, you come begging for my protection?
String.Dest: 然后你们惹毛了吸血鬼，现在又来乞求我的庇护了？

String.Source: New recruits? Hmm.
Glad you decided to give it a try. I hope Isran likes you.
String.Dest: 我为你决定试一试而感到高兴。我希望伊士冉会喜欢你。

String.Source: The blood of a vampire... Auriel's Bow...
String.Dest: 吸血鬼的血……奥瑞艾尔之弓……

String.Source: The Vigilants mostly hunt down daedra worshippers, which is why they got torn to pieces when they went up against vampires.
String.Dest: 警戒者主要是抓捕迪德拉信徒，这也是在对抗吸血鬼过程中他们被摧毁的原因。

String.Source: You want to take revenge... on a god?
Yes. By destroying it, the vampires hoped to cripple our order's activities in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 是啊。吸血鬼希望通过摧毁它来破坏我们组织在天际的活动。

String.Source: Well? Ready to join the fight against the damn vampires?
String.Dest: 嗯？准备好去跟该死的吸血鬼干架了吗？

String.Source: I'm going to Dimhollow Crypt. Perhaps I can be of some small assistance to you.
String.Dest: 我会去幽空地穴的。也许我对你能有点用。

String.Source: Here to join the Dawnguard? Good.
String.Dest: 来加入黎明守卫的吗？不错。

String.Source: Why do I even post guards? This is the headquarters of the Dawnguard. Well, it used to be, a long time ago.
String.Dest: 为什么我还要派守卫？这里是黎明守卫的总部。嗯，在很久以前，它曾经是。

String.Source: If you change your mind and decide to join the fight before it's too late, talk to Isran at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften.
String.Dest: 如果你改了主意，决定在一切太晚之前参战的话，去跟黎明守卫堡垒的伊士冉谈谈，就在裂谷城的东南边。

String.Source: Uh, crossbow? I've never...
Where is everybody? This place looks almost deserted.
String.Dest: 其他人在哪里？这地方看起来差不多荒废了。

String.Source: No... it's not working!
There's an offering altar not terribly far from here. I'm willing to bet that the gem you're looking for is there.
String.Dest: 离这里不远处有个祭坛，我敢肯定你要找的宝石就在那里。

String.Source: Ha. Those two deserved what they got. Their arrogance had become insufferable.
String.Dest: 哈。那俩罪有应得。我受够了他俩的傲慢无礼。

String.Source: Are you sure? I'm willing to do it, but you need to think it through.
String.Dest: 你确定？我是不介意，不过你得考虑考虑。

String.Source: We didn't listen to him any more than we did Isran. He was at the Hall when it was attacked...
String.Dest: 我们没听他的，就像没听伊士冉的一样。大厅被袭击的时候他也在……

String.Source: But Auriel should have protected you...
String.Dest: 但奥瑞艾尔应该会保护你……

String.Source: You're not paying attention then. Like most everyone else around here.
String.Dest: 那你就是没走心。就跟这里大部分人一样。

String.Source: Yeah? You change your mind? The Dawnguard could use somebody like you.
String.Dest: 嗯？改变主意了？黎明守卫会用得上你这种人的。

String.Source: That's why our leader Isran is reestablishing the Dawnguard. Real, serious vampire hunters.
String.Dest: 这就是我们的领袖伊士冉重建黎明守卫的原因。真真正正的吸血鬼猎人。

String.Source: Feel free to poke around the fort and take what you need. There isn't much yet, but you're welcome to anything you can use.
String.Dest: 随便在堡垒里转转，拿上你需要的东西。这里东西并不多，不过只要你用得上的话，就尽管拿。

String.Source: If there's anything I can do before you depart, you must let me know.
String.Dest: 在你离开前，如果我能为你做些什么的话，跟我说。

String.Source: I know this is difficult for you. I hope you trust me.
String.Dest: 我知道这对你来说很难抉择，希望你能相信我。

String.Source: Isran's inside the fort. He's the one you need to talk to.
String.Dest: 伊士冉在堡垒里。他是你要去谈谈的人。

String.Source: Talk to Isran. He'll decide if he wants you for the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 跟伊士冉谈谈。他会决定黎明守卫是不是要你。

String.Source: Look, I'll be honest with you. I have no idea. But I'm sure we can find something worth your time.
String.Dest: 听着，说实话，我也不知道。但我们肯定能找到值得你花费时间的东西。

String.Source: Stay here. I'll go check it out if you open the door back up.
String.Dest: 在这等着，你把门打开后我去看看。

String.Source: You there, boy. Stop skulking in the shadows and step up here. What's your name?
String.Dest: 小子，就是你。别偷偷摸摸藏着了，往前走。你叫什么名字？

String.Source: You know why I'm here. The Vigilants are under attack everywhere. The vampires are much more dangerous than we believed.
String.Dest: 你心里清楚。警戒者到处遭受攻击。吸血鬼比我们想的还要危险。

String.Source: Go on inside. Isran'll want to talk to you.
String.Dest: 进里面去。伊士冉想跟你谈谈。

String.Source: I suspect now it was Brother Adalvald's journals they were after. He was obsessed with ancient vampire artifacts and burial sites.
String.Dest: 我现在怀疑他们在找阿达瓦尔德修士的日记。他痴迷于古代吸血鬼的遗物和墓地。

String.Source: I remember Keeper Carcette telling me repeatedly that Fort Dawnguard is a crumbling ruin, not worth the expense and manpower to repair.
String.Dest: 我还记得守护者凯西提一再告诉我，黎明守卫堡垒是个摇摇欲坠的废墟，不值得花费钱和人力来修复。

String.Source: Potions my friend, potions! Possibly some spells. Maybe some other things I've forgotten about. Actually I'm not sure. Let's see, shall we?
String.Dest: 药水啊朋友，药水！可能有些法术。也许还有其他我忘了的东西，来看看吧？

String.Source: Let's not waste any more time then.
String.Dest: 那我们就别再浪费时间了。

String.Source: Don't worry, I think I can help you.
String.Dest: 别担心，我觉得我能帮你。

String.Source: Didn't I tell you to step forward? Hmm... Farm boy, eh? What's your weapon?
String.Dest: 我不是跟你说往前走吗？嗯……农场小子，嗯？你的武器是什么？

String.Source: So my daughter applied some of the lessons I taught her about necromancy, did she?
String.Dest: 所以我女儿把我教她的死灵法术课程付诸实践了，对不对？

String.Source: Gelebor and his kind are easily manipulated fools.
String.Dest: 盖勒布和他的同类都是些易于操纵的傻子。

String.Source: Is there anything else? Could be your last chance.
String.Dest: 还有别的吗？这可能是你最后的机会了。

String.Source: Which is where you come in. If killing vampires sounds good to you, go talk to Isran up in the fort. He decides who's Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: 你要入伙是吧。如果你真觉得猎杀吸血鬼不错的话，去跟堡垒里的伊士冉谈谈。他决定谁是当黎明守卫的料。

String.Source: Report to Isran at Fort Dawnguard. And get moving if you're serious about it. The vampires aren't going to wait around to make their next move.
String.Dest: 跟黎明守卫堡垒的伊士冉打报告。如果你对这件事真上心的话，动作利落点。吸血鬼不会傻等着采取下一步行动。

String.Source: The bow! Use the bow!
You simply need to retrieve the gem. The moment you touch it, your soul essence will be restored.
String.Dest: 你只需要找回宝石。一碰到它，你的灵魂精华就恢复了。

String.Source: You wouldn't dare. Now shut up and keep on watch.
String.Dest: 你没那个胆子。现在乖乖闭嘴继续放哨。

String.Source: Which is where you come in. If killing vampires sounds good to you, come talk to Isran at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften.
String.Dest: 你们要入伙是吧。如果你真觉得猎杀吸血鬼不错的话，来跟黎明守卫堡垒的伊士冉谈谈吧，就在裂谷城的东南边。

String.Source: To come in here alone... a fool like all the rest of them.
String.Dest: 一个人来这里……跟他们其他人一样蠢。

String.Source: Tolan, I don't think that's a good idea.
String.Dest: 托兰，我不认为这是个好主意。

String.Source: Isran was right all along. We should have listened to his warnings. It's too late for the Vigilants now.
String.Dest: 伊士冉一直都是对的。我们应该听他的警告的。对于警戒者而言，这一切都太晚了。

String.Source: If you change your mind and decide to join the fight before it's too late, go talk to Isran up in the fort.
String.Dest: 如果你改了主意，决定在一切太晚之前参战的话，去跟堡垒里的伊士冉谈谈。

String.Source: All this talk is making me thirsty. Perhaps another Vigilant will wander in soon.
String.Dest: 说了这些，我都觉得渴了。也许很快会有别的警戒者逛荡进来。

String.Source: I wish Lokil would hurry it up. I have half a mind to return to the castle and tell Harkon what a fool he's entrusted this mission to.
String.Dest: 我希望洛基尔能快点。我特别想回城堡，跟哈孔说他把这项任务派个了这么个蠢蛋。

String.Source: Yes, a crossbow. Best thing for killing vampires. Just take a few shots at those crates over there.
String.Dest: 没错，弩。猎杀吸血鬼最好的武器了。对着那边的箱子射几箭吧。

String.Source: And I have half a mind to tell Lokil of your disloyalty.
String.Dest: 我也特想跟洛基尔说你对他不忠诚。

String.Source: Your soul essence was trapped inside a gem. When you and Serana entered the Soul Cairn, it was "given" to the Ideal Masters as payment.
String.Dest: 你的灵魂精华被困在一块宝石里。当你和瑟拉娜进入灵魂石冢时，它被“献给”理想之主作为报酬。

String.Source: You heard right. I'm glad word's finally starting to get around. But that means it won't be long before the vampires start to take notice as well.
String.Dest: 你听的没错。消息终于能传播开来了，我感到很高兴。不过这也意味着吸血鬼很快也会注意到它的。

String.Source: You Vigilants were never trained for...
String.Dest: 你们警戒者从来没训练过……

String.Source: Why are you here, Tolan? The Vigilants and I were finished with each other a long time ago.
String.Dest: 你来这儿做什么，托兰？我早就跟警戒者没关系了。

String.Source: The Hall of the Vigilants is in ruins, my brothers and sisters dead or scattered.
String.Dest: 警戒者之厅成了废墟，我的兄弟姐妹们被杀得七零八落。

String.Source: Uh, my weapon? I mostly just use my pa's axe, when wolves are attacking the goats or something.
String.Dest: 呃，我的武器吗？我几乎只用我爸的斧子，当狼群攻击山羊或者什么的时候。

String.Source: Dimhollow Crypt. Brother Adalvald thought it contained some long-lost vampire artifact. It seems he was right.
String.Dest: 幽空地穴，阿达瓦尔德修士认为里面有失传已久的吸血鬼神器，看来他是对的。

String.Source: My mother taught me a trick or two. I could partially soul trap you, and offer that gem to the Ideal Masters. It might be enough to satisfy them.
String.Dest: 我母亲教了我一两招。我能够对你施展不完全的摄魂陷阱，然后把那颗灵魂石献给理想之主。这应该足以满足它们了。

String.Source: Fools.
I understand. Take your time.
Thank you.
You were waiting... all this time for someone with my blood to come along.
String.Dest: 你等了……这么久就是为了我这种血统的人出现。

String.Source: I guess I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 我想我会来黎明守卫堡垒见你。

String.Source: Oh. Good.
Well, too bad for you... I intend on keeping it. Let's see if your blood has any power to it!
String.Dest: 那么，很遗憾……我要自己留着。先来看看你的血有没有什么力量！

String.Source: As you wish.
How dare you. I was the Arch-Curate of Auri-El, girl. I had the ears of a god!
String.Dest: 放肆！我是奥瑞-艾尔的教士长。神也要为我侧耳！

String.Source: I promise to make this as painless as possible. Hold still.
Now that you've retrieved the Elder Scroll, you should be on your way.
String.Dest: 你现在已经找回上古卷轴了，你该上路了。

String.Source: Break his shield! Hurry!
We're vampire hunters. We search out and destroy those bloodsucking scum wherever we find them.
String.Dest: 我们是吸血鬼猎人。无论我们在哪里找到这帮吸人血的渣滓，我们都会把他们揪出来消灭掉。

String.Source: Yes, well... I never wanted any of this to happen. I tried to warn all of you... I am sorry, you know.
String.Dest: 好吧，嗯……我也不希望看到这一切。我警告过你们所有人……结果，你知道的。

String.Source: Stendarr grant that you do not have to face the same test and be found wanting.
String.Dest: 愿斯丹达尔保佑你不用面对同样的遭遇，也不用证明你自己也不够格。

String.Source: I'd never do anything that could hurt you.
String.Dest: 我是绝对不会伤害你的。

String.Source: While you're thinking about it, the vampires will be gathering strength in the shadows, waiting to strike.
String.Dest: 当你考虑的时候，吸血鬼会在暗中积聚力量，等待发动袭击。

String.Source: Ha. Isran's going to like you. He's up the hill in the fort. He'll decide if you're Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: 哈。伊士冉会喜欢你的。他就在山上的堡垒里。让他看看你是不是当黎明守卫的料。

String.Source: Look into my eyes, Serana. You tell me what I am.
String.Dest: 看着我的眼睛，瑟拉娜。告诉我，我到底是什么。

String.Source: Quick, the bow!
Isran will decide if you've got what it takes. Go on, he's right inside.
String.Dest: 伊士冉会评定你是否有能力。走吧，他就在里面。

String.Source: Oh, hey there! You here to join the Dawnguard, too?
String.Dest: 哦，嘿！你也是来这里参加黎明守卫的？

String.Source: Yeargh!
Oh, well... some... things, I suppose. Remedies, cures, a poison or two.
String.Dest: 哦，好吧……有些……东西，我想。药水，疗法，一两瓶毒药。

String.Source: Tolan, tell him about, what was it, Dimhollow?
String.Dest: 托兰，告诉他吧，哪里来着？幽空地穴？

String.Source: Enough, Vyrthur. Give us the bow!
String.Dest: 够了，维苏尔。把弓给我们！

String.Source: You've probably killed lots of vampires, huh? I'm sure Isran will sign you right up. Not sure he'll take me. I hope so.
String.Dest: 你可能已经杀死了很多吸血鬼了吧，嗯？伊士冉一定会同意你马上入伙的。不知道他会不会捎带上我。希望他能同意吧。

String.Source: And now you want to come running to safety with the Dawnguard, is that it?
String.Dest: 然后你就跑来寻求黎明守卫的庇护了，是这样吗？

String.Source: Isran, Carcette is dead. The Hall of the Vigilants... everyone... they're all dead. You were right, we were wrong. Isn't that enough for you?
String.Dest: 伊士冉，凯西提死了。警戒者之厅……所有人……他们全死了。你是对的，我们错了。这还不够吗？

String.Source: But look around - there's really not much to join yet. I've only just started rebuilding the order.
String.Dest: 不过看看周围吧——确实还没几个人加入呢。我也是刚刚开始重建这个教团。

String.Source: I swore I'd have my revenge, no matter what the cost.
String.Dest: 我发誓要复仇，无论付出什么代价。

String.Source: A prophecy that lacked a single, final ingredient... the blood of a pure vampire. The blood of a Daughter of Coldharbour.
String.Dest: 但还缺少最后一种成分……纯种吸血鬼的血，冷港之女的血。

String.Source: It... it was you? You created that prophecy?
String.Dest: 是……是你？你创造了那个预言？

String.Source: So who are you? What do you want?
As you can see, we have some work to do to restore it to its former glory. But maybe you want to help me with that?
String.Dest: 如你所见，为恢复它的旧日荣光，我们还有些工作要做。不过也许你会给我帮帮忙？

String.Source: I'm, uh... my name is Agmaer, sir.
String.Dest: 我，呃……我叫阿格迈尔，长官。

String.Source: That must be it. Fort Dawnguard... Wow. Bigger than I expected.
String.Dest: 这肯定就是了。黎明守卫堡垒……哇哦。比我想象中的大哎。

String.Source: Yes, that's it. Dimhollow Crypt. Brother Adalvald was sure it held some long-lost vampire artifact of some kind.
String.Dest: 是的，幽空地穴。阿达瓦尔德修士确信里面藏着某种遗失已久的吸血鬼神器。

String.Source: Hey, uh, don't tell Isran I was afraid to meet him by myself. Not the best first impression for a new vampire hunter, I guess.
String.Dest: 嘿，呃，别跟伊士冉说我害怕独自一人去见他。我想，对于一个吸血鬼猎人新手来说，这个第一印象可不怎么样。

String.Source: Tolan, tell her about, what was it, Dimhollow?
String.Dest: 托兰，告诉她吧，哪里来着？幽空地穴？

String.Source: Ha. Isran's going to like you. Go talk to him at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften. He'll decide if you're Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: 哈。伊士冉会喜欢你的。去黎明守卫堡垒跟他谈谈，就在裂谷城东南边。让他看看你是不是当黎明守卫的料。

String.Source: You're... you're a vampire?
Haven't you heard that the Hall of the Vigilants was destroyed by vampires? They never took the threat seriously, and now they've paid the price.
String.Dest: 你有没有听说警戒者之厅被吸血鬼给毁了？他们从不把那威胁放在心上，现在付出代价了。

String.Source: Do I look like a "sir" to you, boy? I'm not a soldier, and you're not joining the army.
String.Dest: 我看起来像你的“长官”吗，小子？我不是士兵，你也不是来参军的。

String.Source: I know what you think of us. You think we're soft, that we're cowards. You think our deaths proved our weakness.
String.Dest: 我知道你对我们的看法。你觉得我们软弱，你觉得我们是懦夫。你觉得我们的死证明了我们懦弱无能。

String.Source: That's good enough for me. Go see what the vampires were looking for in this Dimhollow Crypt. With any luck, they'll still be there.
String.Dest: 这对我来说就够了。去这个幽空地穴，去看看吸血鬼都在找些什么东西。运气好的话，他们还会在那里的。

String.Source: You there. The Dawnguard is looking for anyone willing to fight against the growing vampire menace. What do you say?
String.Dest: 那边的，黎明守卫正在找想参与对付日益增长的吸血鬼威胁的人，你觉得怎么样？

String.Source: You'll remain mortal, but you'll find yourself weakened within the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 你还会是凡人的状态，不过一旦你进入灵魂石冢你会发现自己被削弱了。

String.Source: Got a fire in your belly to kill vampires, eh? Good for you.
String.Dest: 你胸中涌动着猎杀吸血鬼的热情，嗯？不错。

String.Source: (Whine)
I'll meet you in Dimhollow Crypt. I owe these vampires a debt of vengeance.
String.Dest: 我会跟你在幽空地穴碰面的。我要向这帮吸血鬼报仇雪恨。

String.Source: "My pa's axe", Stendarr preserve us.
String.Dest: “我爸的斧子”，斯丹达尔保佑我们。

String.Source: The vampires are much more dangerous than we ever dreamed. The Dawnguard is the only hope now.
String.Dest: 我们做梦也没想到吸血鬼会这么危险。现在黎明守卫是唯一的希望了。

String.Source: Auri-El himself may have been beyond my reach, but his influence on our world wasn't.
String.Dest: 或许我无法触及奥瑞-艾尔本身，但他对我们世界的影响可不是。

String.Source: The moment I was infected by one of my own Initiates, Auri-El turned his back on me.
String.Dest: 自从我被麾下的新人感染，奥瑞-艾尔就抛弃了我。

String.Source: Truth is, I'm a little nervous. I've never done anything like this before. I hope you don't mind if I walk up with you.
String.Dest: 说实话，我有点紧张。我以前可从来没干过这种事。如果我跟你一起的话，我希望你不介意。

String.Source: He fought well though. Jeron and Bresoth were no match for him.
String.Dest: 不过他身手不错。杰朗和布雷索不是他的对手。

String.Source: All I needed was the blood of a vampire and his own weapon, Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 我只需要吸血鬼的血和他的武器，奥瑞艾尔之弓。

String.Source: I'll meet you at Dimhollow. It's the least I can do to avenge my fallen comrades.
String.Dest: 我会在幽空地穴跟你碰面。至少我能替我那些倒下的同伴报仇。

String.Source: Don't worry, I think we can make a Dawnguard out of you. Here, take this crossbow and let's see how you shoot.
String.Dest: 别担心，我想可以把你培养成黎明守卫。拿着，试试这把弩，我们来看看你是怎么射击的。

String.Source: Yes, si... Isran.
You are testing my patience.
Leave me in peace.
When you first transform into a Vampire Lord, you will hover in the air. While you do, you will command the powers of Blood and Night.
String.Dest: 当你刚变成吸血鬼领主时，你会盘旋于空中。在此期间，你将掌握血与夜之力。

String.Source: You should find no difficulty using the portal any longer.
String.Dest: 你应该不会再觉得使用传送门有什么难的了。

String.Source: Now that the Dawnguard are back, the vampires' reign of terror is about to end.
String.Dest: 黎明守卫回归，吸血鬼的恐怖统治就要结束了。

String.Source: I have everything I need right here.
String.Dest: 所有我需要的都在这儿了。

String.Source: Are you sure that was wise, Lokil? He still might have told us something.
String.Dest: 洛基尔，你觉得这么做明智吗？他可能还会告诉我们些东西的。

String.Source: It's over. He's dead, and the prophecy dies with him.
String.Dest: 结束了。他死了，预言也随之消亡了。

String.Source: He was out of control, Garan. It had to be done.
String.Dest: 他失控了，加兰。只能如此。

String.Source: Way I hear it, Lady Serana's been gone a real long time.
String.Dest: 据我所知，瑟拉娜小姐已经离开了相当之久。

String.Source: There's plenty for all.
May Auri-El's glow shield you from your enemy.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光保护你不受敌人伤害。

String.Source: You think I can't tell my own kind? I smelled you almost before my eyes were open.
String.Dest: 你觉得我认不出自己的同类？我还没睁开眼睛就闻出你是谁了。

String.Source: I'll be here. Don't take too long, now!
String.Dest: 我就在这里等着。别花太长时间，赶紧的。

String.Source: Not fond of vampires, are they?
String.Dest: 他们不喜欢吸血鬼，是吧？

String.Source: First thing is to get this fort back into shape. Right now, a vampire could practically walk right in the front door.
String.Dest: 第一件事就是让堡垒恢复原状。现在，吸血鬼几乎能从前门直接进来。

String.Source: Now I'm trying to reestablish the Dawnguard. Take the fight to the vampires for a change. I hope it isn't too late.
String.Dest: 现在我要重建黎明守卫。去换换口味，和吸血鬼战斗吧。希望现在还不晚。

String.Source: I knew I heard something!
String.Dest: 我就知道我听到了什么！

String.Source: Well I don't know what that means. But we need to find out. She must either have something the vampires want, or be someone important to them.
String.Dest: 我不想知道这意味着什么。不过我们得弄明白。她一定拿着那些吸血鬼要找的某样东西，要不然就是对他们而言很重要的某个人物。

String.Source: We hunt down and kill vampires. Haven't you been paying attention?
String.Dest: 我们负责猎杀吸血鬼，你没注意听吗？

String.Source: I don't like the feel of this place. I'll wait for you back by the entrance.
String.Dest: 我不喜欢这地方的感觉。我会在入口等你回来。

String.Source: Present yourself to Lord Harkon at once.
I'm glad we're finally taking the fight to those monsters.
String.Dest: 很高兴我们终于和那些怪物开战了。

String.Source: We haven't gotten anywhere ourselves with...
String.Dest: 我们自己也没得到什么进展……

String.Source: Disgusting creatures.
I'd... well, I'd come with you, but I don't know if I can trust your friend.
String.Dest: 我会……好吧，我会跟你一起去，不过我不知道能不能相信你的朋友。

String.Source: Who said something, Sorine or Gunmar? I thought they'd have learned their lesson by now.
String.Dest: 谁跟你说的，索琳还是甘马尔？我以为他们已经吸取教训了。

String.Source: There you are, father!
Yes, of course Lokil. Do not forget who brought you news of the Vigilants' discovery.
String.Dest: 正是，洛基尔。别忘了是谁把警戒者的发现告诉你的。

String.Source: Look out! Gargoyles!
I suppose she's right. I shouldn't let my personal feelings get in the way.
String.Dest: 我想她是对的，我不该被个人感情左右。

String.Source: Well I don't know what that means. But we need to find out. She must either have something the vampires want, or be someone important to them.
String.Dest: 我不想知道这意味着什么。不过我们得弄明白。她一定拿着那些吸血鬼要找的某样东西，要不然就是对他们而言很重要的某个人物。

String.Source: It's time for you to suffer!
Isran knows how to fight those monsters. He's been preparing for this day for a long time.
String.Dest: 伊士冉知道怎么和那些怪物作战。他为这一天准备了很久。

String.Source: Tough day for you!
He's a... powerful man. Or at least used to be.
String.Dest: 他很……有名望。或者至少曾经如此。

String.Source: So they have everything they wanted, and we're left with nothing.
String.Dest: 所以他们得到了想要的一切，而我们一无所获。

String.Source: Harkon will reward us richly for this.
String.Dest: 哈孔会因此好好奖励我们的。

String.Source: I won't fall for your tricks!
Lord Harkon, defeated. I never imagined I'd see the day.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人，战败了。从没想过我会见到这天。

String.Source: Yes, it is, and it's mine.
Did you at least find out what the vampires were looking for in there?
String.Dest: 至少你找到吸血鬼要找的东西了吧？

String.Source: Another adventure.
As you've been traveling in the Soul Cairn, your body has become attuned to it.
String.Dest: 当你穿越灵魂石冢时，你的身体已经适应了它。

String.Source: I just don't feel comfortable sharing that moment with a total stranger, I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 我就是觉得跟一个完全陌生的人分享那个时刻不太舒服，对不起。

String.Source: But this is something different. I'd say do what she wants. Take her home, and see who else is in this castle.
String.Dest: 不过这次情况不一样。我会照她说的做。带她回家，看看这座城堡里还有其他什么人。

String.Source: My family used to live on an island to the west of Solitude. I would guess they still do.
String.Dest: 我的家人过去曾住在独孤城西边的一座岛上。我猜他们还住在那里。

String.Source: You fight worse than you smell!
Go now, and carry out this task. This is my command!
String.Dest: 现在就去完成这个任务，这是我的命令！

String.Source: That's it? All right.
Back to dust!
Arvak...You saved him! His soul is free, I can feel it!
String.Dest: 阿瓦克……你救了他！他的灵魂自由了，我感受得到！

String.Source: This won't end well for you!
If he can maintain some appearance of normalcy, I'll allow him to stay.
String.Dest: 如果他能正常一点，我就允许他留下来。

String.Source: What now?
A final warning... be wary, for you can only hold your Vampire Lord form for a brief time.
String.Dest: 最后警告……小心，因为你的吸血鬼领主形态只能保持很短的时间。

String.Source: Is he... like me?
That's what everybody says, right up until they find their throat being ripped out by a pack of hungry vampires.
String.Dest: 大家都这么说，直到他们发现一群饥渴的吸血鬼撕破他们的喉咙。

String.Source: What do you need?
May Auri-El's light guide you in your darkest hours.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光指引你最黑暗的时光。

String.Source: I just need to be alone. For a while. There's a lot of feelings wrapped up in this old place, and I don't think you're quite ready for them.
String.Dest: 我只是想静一静。有好多情感聚集在这个老地方，而且我觉得你还没准备好见他们。

String.Source: So go and meet your beloved Stendarr.
String.Dest: 去见你亲爱的斯丹达尔吧。

String.Source: That's... complicated. And I'm not totally sure if I can trust you.
String.Dest: 这很……复杂。我也不是完全确定我是不是能信任你。

String.Source: I don't want to step on anyone's toes. Come back to me when you're alone.
String.Dest: 我不想踩到别人脚了，等你一个人了再来找我。

String.Source: I suppose you're lucky you're not dead. Or worse, one of them.
String.Dest: 我猜没死算你走运了。或者更糟，成为他们的一员。

String.Source: Don't let me stand in your way, then.
I think it is, actually.
String.Dest: 事实上，我觉得关我的事。

String.Source: That is all I have to teach you. If you wish to be reminded of these lessons, you need only ask.
String.Dest: 这就是我要教给你的所有东西了。如果你还想回忆这些内容，开口问就行。

String.Source: Vampire, yes.
Not until you get rid of whoever your other friend is.
String.Dest: 除非你把另一位朋友送走。

String.Source: Come on, stoneskin!
Good. I assume you took care of that little infestation. Did you figure out what they were looking for in there?
String.Dest: 很好。看来你已经解决那个小麻烦了。你知道他们在那里要找什么了吗？

String.Source: I have a task that will test your new powers, but first, do you have any questions?
String.Dest: 我有个检验你的力量的任务，不过首先，你有什么问题吗？

String.Source: Where did you get to?
Never seen a crossbow before, eh? Not surprised. Kind of a Dawnguard specialty. Nothing better for putting down vampires.
String.Dest: 以前从没见过弩，嗯？不奇怪。这算是黎明守卫专属。用它杀吸血鬼再好不过了。

String.Source: Got it.
Oh no you don't!
I'm not going to waste my time making sure your friend doesn't get killed. When it's just you and me, we can go.
String.Dest: 我不会浪费时间在保护你的朋友免于被杀。等只有你和我了再出发。

String.Source: Goodbye, hero! Take good care of Arvak for me! Such a good horse...
String.Dest: 再见了，英雄！替我照顾好阿瓦克！真是匹好马啊……

String.Source: I need someone out in the field, taking the fight to the damn vampires, while we're getting the fort back into shape...
String.Dest: 我需要有人在外面跟那些可恶的吸血鬼战斗，而与此同时我们要把堡垒恢复原状。

String.Source: Descend to the ground, and you can attack with your claws and feed upon your prey to regain your strength.
String.Dest: 降落到地面上，你能用爪子攻击，以及吃猎物来恢复力量。

String.Source: Done and done.
Perhaps you should. I count some of the oldest and most powerful vampires in Skyrim among the members of my court.
String.Dest: 也许你应该在乎。我的宫廷成员里可有一些天际最强大、最古老的吸血鬼。

String.Source: I don't think the vampires would be stupid enough to attack us here, but you never know.
String.Dest: 我觉得吸血鬼不会蠢到来这里袭击我们，但谁知道呢。

String.Source: Could you tell your companion to head home?
I will find you. Then you will beg me to let you die.
String.Dest: 我会找到你的。然后你会求着赐你一死。

String.Source: I hope the vampires try to attack us here. A lot easier than hunting them down in their holes.
String.Dest: 希望吸血鬼们来这里袭击我们，比在洞里追杀他们简单多了。

String.Source: A woman? Trapped in there? That doesn't make any sense. Who is she? More importantly, where is she?
String.Dest: 女人？困在那儿？这根本说不通。她是谁？更重要的是，她在哪儿？

String.Source: Die Dawnguard!
May Auri-El's radiance fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光以欢愉充实你的内心。

String.Source: I don't think so.
That's not a name I know. And it doesn't sound like a name a group of vampires would choose.
String.Dest: 我不认识这个名字。听起来一群吸血鬼也不会选它作为名号。

String.Source: And frankly, I need to get home to figure out what's happening.
String.Dest: 说实话，我得回趟家弄明白到底发生了什么。

String.Source: We're going to a place I've never been... and we're goind to see my mother. After all these years.
String.Dest: 我们要去一个我从来没去过的地方……而且我们还得去见我母亲。都这么多年没见她了。

String.Source: I'm not going to die like this!
You're not getting the best of me!
He'll help you get around this wretched place, but I'm sure he'd be much happier someplace sunnier.
String.Dest: 他能带你在这鬼地方到处转悠，但我相信他更乐意去那些阳光明媚的地方。

String.Source: Feed upon those who are sleeping, and your vulnerability to sunlight will diminish along with your powers.
String.Dest: 找那些睡眠中的人的进食，你的光照脆弱性将随着力量一起减少。

String.Source: It's only for Serana's sake that I have let you live.
String.Dest: 我全是看在瑟拉娜的份上才没杀了你。

String.Source: But I have something for you to do, since you're asking.
String.Dest: 不过既然你问了，我确实有些事情让你去办。

String.Source: I... don't know who that is.
Over time, your powers will grow in strength and you will find new ways to use your gifts.
String.Dest: 随着时间的推移，你的力量会不断增强，你会找到使用你天赋的新方法。

String.Source: You would dare address me?
I guess this is it. Wish me luck.
String.Dest: 我想就是这个了。祝我好运。

String.Source: Not just vampires. We are among the oldest and most powerful vampires in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 不仅仅是吸血鬼。我们是天际最古老、最强大的吸血鬼。

String.Source: Got to keep alert. We don't want to get caught napping like the Vigilants did.
String.Dest: 保持警惕，我们可不想像警戒者那样被抓到在打盹。

String.Source: Fine, then.
Can't you tell your own kind? I smelled you almost before my eyes were open.
String.Dest: 你觉得我认不出自己的同类？我还没睁开眼睛就闻出你是谁了。

String.Source: I'll wait for you at the dock.
Is he working for my father?
May Auri-El's warmth imbue your body with strength.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔以力量温暖你的身体。

String.Source: Jeron was furious to be left guarding the door.
String.Dest: 杰朗被留在门口，可生气了。

String.Source: The feast never ends here in Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 沃基哈尔城堡的盛宴永不散席。

String.Source: With experience, your powers will grow and you will discover new ways to use them.
String.Dest: 随着经验积累，你的力量会增长，并发现运用它们的新方法。

String.Source: Too slow!
Are you taking me to him?
This is what your obsession brings you!
String.Dest: 这就是你的执念的报应！

String.Source: Only thing that stood out for me was Auriel's Bow. That's a powerful weapon, and I sure as Oblivion don't want the vampires to get hold of it.
String.Dest: 唯一让我印象深刻的是奥瑞艾尔之弓。那是件强大的武器，坚决不能让吸血鬼得到它。

String.Source: I was expecting someone from my family. I don't recognize you. Are you one of my father's little acolytes?
String.Dest: 我以为是我家里的人。我不认识你。你是我父亲的一个小跟班吗？

String.Source: I'll be at the dock whenever you're ready.
String.Dest: 你准备好了，我就在码头等你。

String.Source: Nothing else?
Stay back!
Sit down and enjoy yourself.
I wish I could say that I did, but without the other two Scrolls, the picture will remain incomplete.
String.Dest: 我倒是希望能给肯定的答复，但没有其他两幅卷轴，愿景就不完整了。

String.Source: I was going to say the same thing to you.
I... I suppose this is difficult for you.
I'll never tell you anything, vampire. My oath to Stendarr is stronger than any suffering you can inflict on me.
String.Dest: 我不会告诉你任何东西的，吸血鬼。我对斯丹达尔的誓言比所有你能施加在我身上的痛苦都强大。

String.Source: Well, well. You made it. Good. Isran's in the fort. He'll get you sorted out.
String.Dest: 很好，很好。你来了。不错。伊士冉在堡垒里。他会给你安排妥当的。

String.Source: Home? Where's that?
Good. Go and speak to Garan Marethi. Tell him it is time. He will understand.
String.Dest: 很好。去跟加兰·玛瑞锡聊聊。告诉他是时候了。他会明白的。

String.Source: I need to speak to you, stranger. Now.
String.Dest: 陌生人，我得跟你谈谈。立刻马上。

String.Source: This day was always coming!
I never forget who my friends are. Or my enemies.
String.Dest: 我绝不会忘记谁是朋友，谁是敌人。

String.Source: Right. So they have this woman, and an Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: 是的。那么他们得到了这个女人，还有一幅上古卷轴。

String.Source: I did what needed to be done. Nothing more.
String.Dest: 我做了必要之事，仅此而已。

String.Source: My lady, you have my deepest sympathies. I am sure this was not easy for you.
String.Dest: 小姐，我对您深表同情。承受这些是很不容易的。

String.Source: Tolan was telling me about some cave that the Vigilants were poking around in. Seemed to think it was related to these recent vampire attacks.
String.Dest: 托兰跟我说警戒者在打探某个洞穴，他好像认为这和最近的吸血鬼袭击有关联。

String.Source: And so you delivered her to them.
String.Dest: 所以你把她交给了他们。

String.Source: For centuries we lived here, far from the cares of the world. All that ended when my wife betrayed me and stole away that which I valued most.
String.Dest: 几个世纪以来我们居住在这里，远离尘世。直到我妻子背叛了我，偷走了我最为珍视的东西。

String.Source: Come on. It's just around the side.
I'm not going to do that for you.
Then people stopped taking the threat seriously, the Dawnguard was disbanded, and the vampires came creeping back.
String.Dest: 后来人们就不看重这个威胁了，黎明守卫解散，吸血鬼又悄悄回来了。

String.Source: You have done me a great service, and now you must be rewarded.
String.Dest: 你帮了我很大的忙，现在该奖赏你了。

String.Source: I'm over here!
Your powers are nothing!
How many of you are there?!
In the old days, the Dawnguard kept all of Skyrim safe from those bloodsucking scum.
String.Dest: 以前，黎明守卫保护着全天际不受那些吸血杂种伤害。

String.Source: Very well. I am Harkon, lord of this court. By now, my daughter will have told you what we are.
String.Dest: 很好。我叫哈孔，这座宫廷的君主。现在，我女儿已经跟你说了我们的身份了。

String.Source: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you.
String.Dest: 如果你想让我一起去，就必须只有你我俩人。

String.Source: I don't trust that man, and I don't want him here.
String.Dest: 我不相信那家伙，也不想让他来这里。

String.Source: I was expecting someone... like me, at least.
String.Dest: 我以为是一些……至少像我一样的人。

String.Source: Find your own thrall. This one's mine.
String.Dest: 找你自己的血奴去，这头是我的。

String.Source: Finished?
Well? I'm waiting.
Damn fool. I told him not to go. The Vigilants always had more bravery than sense.
String.Dest: 那个蠢货。我跟他说了别去。警戒者老是勇猛有余但缜密不足。

String.Source: You can't hide, father!
I'm gonna have to kill you... again!
He's such a loyal beast. Here, I'll teach you how to call him to you.
String.Dest: 他可是头听话的好马。拿着，我会教你怎么召唤他。

String.Source: No, we are vampires, among the oldest and most powerful in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 不，我们是天际最为古老、最为强大的吸血鬼。

String.Source: He knew nothing. He served his purpose by leading us to this place. Now it is up to us to bring Harkon the prize.
String.Dest: 他什么都不知道。把我们带到这里算是物尽其用了。现在该我们把珍宝带给哈孔了。

String.Source: Ha. Nothing can destroy an Elder Scroll. Worry more about protecting your hide, and let me worry about my things.
String.Dest: 哈。没什么东西能动得了上古卷轴。你就担心担心你的人身安全吧，我来操心我自己的事。

String.Source: Suit yourself.
So let me take the lead in there.
Were you looking for me?
Peace at last...
Get rid of this interloper and you and I can be on our way.
String.Dest: 摆脱掉这个外人，你跟我就能进去了。

String.Source: I thought Lokil knew what he was doing. This is taking too long.
String.Dest: 还以为洛基尔知道他到底在干什么，这花的时间太久了。

String.Source: Let me know if you want me along.
String.Dest: 如果你想让我一起去，请跟我说。

String.Source: Teamwork, right there.
I'm a loyal servant of the lord of the castle, nothing more.
String.Dest: 我是城堡之主的忠实仆人，仅此而已。

String.Source: I'm on it.
May Auri-El's brilliance illuminate your path.
String.Dest: 愿奥瑞-艾尔之光照亮你的道路。

String.Source: The Moth Priest can stay here for now. As for the vampire, I still don't trust it, so keep it on a leash.
String.Dest: 蛾祭司可以暂时留在这里。至于吸血鬼，我还不能相信，所以继续拴住它。

String.Source: The two of them just never got along. That's why Isran didn't have you go looking for him when he sent you after us.
String.Dest: 他们俩一直处不来。这就是为什么伊士冉让你来找我们的时候，没有让你去找他。

String.Source: Did you see where it went?
I still remember how to fight!
String.Dest: 怎么战斗我还是记得的！

String.Source: I've waited a long time for my chance to move up in the court.
String.Dest: 我等了这么久才等到在宫廷里晋升的机会。

String.Source: That would fit with the rest of it... I don't like it, but you did right to play along. We need to find out what this is all about.
String.Dest: 这就说得通了……我不喜欢你这么干，不过你是对的。我们得弄清楚这到底是怎么一回事。

String.Source: I can't do everything for you.
String.Dest: 我不能什么事都帮你做。

String.Source: Not quite, though I can see how an outsider might arrive at that conclusion.
String.Dest: 并不尽然，不过我知道一个外人是怎么得出这么个结论的。

String.Source: Trust me. I lived in that castle for a very long time and I know every nook and cranny.
String.Dest: 相信我。我在这里可住了很长一段时间，我对这里了如指掌。

String.Source: I'm not known for my patience.
Don't think that'll keep them from turning on you eventually. They'll figure out what you are.
String.Dest: 别以为这样他们就不会背叛你，他们会发现你是什么。

String.Source: There is much to learn, but if you master the powers of the Vampire Lord, few enemies will be able to stand against you.
String.Dest: 你还有的可学呢，只要你驾驭了吸血鬼领主的力量，就无人能与你抗衡。

String.Source: Someone is here. Find them!
And we will not return without it. Vingalmo and Orthjolf will make way for me after this.
String.Dest: 不带上它我们是不会走的。以后文嘉莫和欧兹约夫都得给我让路。

String.Source: Look, this whole blood ritual is a bit personal. I'd rather not have a bigger audience than I need to.
String.Dest: 听着，这个血液仪式有些私密，我希望不要有太多外人在场。

String.Source: Well, I don't take just anyone into the secret parts of the place I grew up.
String.Dest: 嗯，我是不会把随便谁就往我在里面长大的秘密基地里带呢。

String.Source: Suit yourself.
Of course! Let's go.
Why would someone who isn't... like me... come all the way down here?
String.Dest: 为什么一个不……像我一样的人……会一路下到这里？

String.Source: Here, take this one and give it a try. You'll want to get to know how to use it if you really plan to join the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 给，拿着这东西试试。如果你真的要加入黎明守卫的话，你会想知道怎么用这东西的。

String.Source: I believe you, Vigilant. And I don't think you even know what you've found here.
String.Dest: 警戒者，我相信你。我觉得你根本不知道你在这里究竟发现了什么。

String.Source: I leave politics to others. I serve the lord of the castle.
String.Dest: 政治与我无关，我只效忠于城堡之主。

String.Source: Of course, my dear. All will be well now.
String.Dest: 当然了，亲爱的。一切都会好起来的。

String.Source: Well, look. Kill me, you've killed one vampire. But if people are after me, there's something bigger going on.
String.Dest: 好吧，听着。杀了我，你是杀死了一个吸血鬼。然而如果有人在找我，就说明有大事要发生了。

String.Source: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you.
String.Dest: 如果你想让我一起去，就必须只有你我俩人。

String.Source: Now it's a race to claim the remaining Scrolls and discover what part Auriel's Bow has to play in this prophecy.
String.Dest: 现在是一场争夺剩余卷轴的比赛，并找出奥瑞艾尔之弓在这个预言中扮演了什么角色。

String.Source: It's... complicated. I can't really talk about it. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 这……很复杂。我不能说。抱歉。

String.Source: Look out! Gargoyles!
Here we go, let's get the blood flowing again.
String.Dest: 我们走吧，让我们的血液再次奔腾起来。

String.Source: What have you got?
Let's just say a tiny part of you rubbed off on it, and in its place, a bit of the Soul Cairn filled the void.
String.Dest: 简单说就是你的一小部分被搓掉了，而灵魂石冢的一小部分把空缺给填上了。

String.Source: Unh... who are you?
I'm waiting to hear what any of this means.
String.Dest: 我在等着听这都意味着什么。

String.Source: I heard a lot of vague nonsense. You could interpret that a hundred different ways.
String.Dest: 我听到的是许多模糊不清的废话，能用上百种不同的方式去解读。

String.Source: With each passing day that you do not feed, that weakness will become more deadly, but your powers will also become stronger.
String.Dest: 随着不进食的天数推移，你的弱点会越发致命，但力量也越发强大。

String.Source: Changed your mind, huh? The Dawnguard could use somebody like you.
String.Dest: 改变主意了，呃？黎明守卫会用得上你这种人的。

String.Source: He's a very powerful man. Or he was at one point. I'm surprised another vampire hasn't heard of him.
String.Dest: 他很有名望。至少曾经如此。竟然有吸血鬼没有听说过他。

String.Source: Are you one of my father's little acolytes?
String.Dest: 你是我父亲的一个小跟班吗？

String.Source: You're not going to keep me in here!
I was about to suggest that very thing. Yes, you most certainly deserve a reward.
String.Dest: 我正打算说这件事呢。没错，你当然应该得到奖赏了。

String.Source: No, just...
I can help you find out what that is.
String.Dest: 我能帮你查出来要发生的大事是什么。

String.Source: Last I'd heard of him, he was aiding the Vigilants of Stendarr at Ruunvald. He may still be there.
String.Dest: 最后听到他的消息，他去鲁恩瓦德帮斯丹达尔的警戒者了。可能还在那里。

String.Source: Sorry it had to be this way!
Here, you should take a crossbow. Good for taking out those fiends before they get close.
String.Dest: 给，你得拿把弩。最好在那些怪物靠近你之前，就把他们拿下。

String.Source: A... can't you tell just from looking at me? A vampire.
String.Dest: 呃……你就看不出来吗？我是个吸血鬼。

String.Source: As a vampire, you will gain new powers, but also a weakness to sunlight.
String.Dest: 作为吸血鬼，你将获得新的力量，但也有畏惧阳光的弱点。

String.Source: I think perhaps... I think you did more than that. You have my thanks.
String.Dest: 可能……你做的不止这些。多谢了。

String.Source: I'm ready if you are.
String.Dest: 你准备好了，我就准备好了。

String.Source: Did you see where he went?
I admit, I feel a bit frustrated that I can't be more helpful. Still, our enemy is likely just as much in the dark as we are, and that's something.
String.Dest: 我得说，对帮不上忙感到有点沮丧。尽管如此，敌人很可能跟我们一样一无所知，这就够了。

String.Source: You go ahead. I'll talk to Isran in a minute.
String.Dest: 你先去吧，我先跟伊士冉谈一谈。

String.Source: By the Divines, this couldn't get much worse. This is more than you and I can handle.
String.Dest: 圣灵在上，这事糟透了。这不是你跟我应付得来的。

String.Source: What is it?
Did you see where she went?
But if you want to know the whole story, help me get back to my family's home.
String.Dest: 不过如果你想知道全部的故事，就帮我回家。

String.Source: Isran found something for you to do, eh? I thought he'd like you. Good luck!
String.Dest: 伊士冉让你去干什么活儿对吧？我就知道他会欣赏你的，一路顺风！

String.Source: Unnnhhhh...
I did, in fact. Quite perceptive of you.
String.Dest: 实际上我确实有，您很有洞见。

String.Source: Now be silent, and hear what I have to say.
All right. I'll meet you back at the castle.
My apologies. I shall not trouble you with it again.
String.Dest: 向您致歉，我不会再用这件事麻烦您了。

String.Source: I'm not happy about this. He... he was still my father. But I suppose my father really died a long time ago.
String.Dest: 我不觉得高兴。他……他依然是我父亲，但我想父亲确实多年前就已经不在了。

String.Source: Then I think I shall see to the repairs. Thank you for your time.
String.Dest: 那我就着手修复了，多谢您抽出时间。

String.Source: Don't you already have someone at home waiting for you?
String.Dest: 你不是已经有人在家等你了吗？

String.Source: I'll stick around this place if you need me.
String.Dest: 你要找我就来这个地方。

String.Source: This has certainly been quite the adventure, hasn't it?
String.Dest: 真是一场货真价实的冒险，不是吗？

String.Source: You'll get the hang of it.
I admit, I do not entirely understand your sense of humor.
String.Dest: 我得承认，我不是很能理解你的幽默感。

String.Source: You're infected? Get away from me. Get yourself cured, or don't come near Fort Dawnguard again.
String.Dest: 你被感染了？离我远点儿。要么去治病，要么就再也别靠近黎明守卫堡垒。

String.Source: I'll be at Castle Volkihar if you need me.
String.Dest: 你要找我就来沃基哈尔城堡。

String.Source: It's around the side of the castle. Let's move.
String.Dest: 它就在城堡的侧面。我们走。

String.Source: I'll not aid a vampire. Not even you. Get yourself cured, or you're dead to me.
String.Dest: 我不会帮一个吸血鬼的忙，即使是你。去治病，不然就宰了你。

String.Source: Hm. Most interesting.
Get it on the ground!
From what I saw in the vision, the Elder Scroll which foreshadows the defiance of the gods with the blood of mortals is the key to the prophecy.
String.Dest: 我从幻象中看见，预示着以凡人之血对抗诸神的那本上古卷轴是预言的关键。

String.Source: Lord Harkon will finally have his wish... to see the prophecy fulfilled. Then we will all benefit.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人会如愿以偿……见证预言的实现。而我们都将受益。

String.Source: You'd better know what you're doing.
String.Dest: 你最好清楚你到底在干什么。

String.Source: Is it really you? I can't believe it!
Ah, yes. Hmm. I'm afraid they don't quite work that way.
String.Dest: 啊是。呃，恐怕它们在那方面没用。

String.Source: They are determined and well-armed, but foolish if they think they can defy us. We will deal with them in time.
String.Dest: 他们意志坚定、装备精良，不过如果他们觉得能对抗我们的话，那他们可就太蠢了。我们会及时再收拾他们。

String.Source: All right. I'll meet you at the glade.
By the way... my name is Serana. Good to meet you.
String.Dest: 顺便……我叫瑟拉娜。很高兴见到你。

String.Source: You've managed to turn into one of them. Wonderful. I won't kill you, but you'd better get yourself cured.
String.Dest: 你已经变成它们之一了，真有你的。我不会杀你，但你最好把自己治好了。

String.Source: Now that the Castle is yours, I was wondering.
String.Dest: 既然城堡是你的了，我想到了一些事。

String.Source: I'm not going to blamed for whatever happens.
String.Dest: 不管发生什么，都不能怪我。

String.Source: Who knows, maybe it has a death wish. Maybe it's just insane. I don't really care.
String.Dest: 谁知道，没准它就是寻死来了，要不就是疯了，我才不在乎。

String.Source: Can we really trust the words of this Moth Priest? What if he's just lying to save his worthless skin?
String.Dest: 我们真能相信这个蛾祭司的话？万一他是为了保全他没用的人皮来说谎呢？

String.Source: Might I offer an alternative?
I think we've talked about that enough. Come on, now.
String.Dest: 我觉得我们谈这个已经够多了。哎，行了。

String.Source: I wish I could have been there to hear the sounds of their screams.
String.Dest: 我希望我当时就在那听听他们的尖叫。

String.Source: We need to do something about these vampire attacks.
String.Dest: 我们得为这种吸血鬼袭击做些什么。

String.Source: Where're these vampires coming from? We need to wipe them out before things get worse.
String.Dest: 这些吸血鬼从哪来的？我们得在事态恶化前消灭他们。

String.Source: Oh, no. No way. I'm not helping a vampire. Get out of here, get yourself cured.
String.Dest: 哦，不行，绝无可能。我不会帮一个吸血鬼。滚出去，把自己治好。

String.Source: Good. Strong instincts and a cunning mind will serve you as well as blade, spell or claw.
String.Dest: 很好。强大的直觉和狡猾的头脑跟刀剑、咒语和利爪一样有用。

String.Source: A Moth Priest?
Kill the beast!
I'd very much like to have those scrolls. Someday I may be able to return them to their rightful place in the Imperial City.
String.Dest: 我非常想要那些卷轴，也许某天我能把它们送回帝都。

String.Source: Yes, certainly. Are you willing to let me have them?
String.Dest: 对的，当然。您愿意让我保管它们吗？

String.Source: Can you imagine it? A world without a sun... we would all have been doomed, vampires and men alike.
String.Dest: 想象一下，一个没有太阳的世界……无论吸血鬼还是人类，我们最终都必将灭亡。

String.Source: That's it.
I thought you said you were happy together.
String.Dest: 我记得你说过你们很幸福。

String.Source: Harkon's short-sightedness was his undoing. In his lust for power, he failed to consider the full consequences of his plans.
String.Dest: 哈孔的失败在于他的短视。沉溺于权力欲中的他，没考虑到自己计划的所有后果。

String.Source: Mind yourself.
Of course they did. I never doubted for a moment.
String.Dest: 当然了，我从不怀疑这点。

String.Source: Mind yourself. There's a vicious bear on the loose.
String.Dest: 自己小心，有头凶猛的熊在这里游荡。

String.Source: I knew it was a matter of time before the vampires would come for us.
String.Dest: 我就知道吸血鬼迟早会找上门来。

String.Source: Just one gyro. One, and I can get back to work. Where are they?
String.Dest: 只要一个陀螺仪。就一个，我就能返工了。它们在哪儿？

String.Source: But... that's just not something I'm going to be able to do. Ever.
String.Dest: 但是……这不是我能办到的，永远都是。

String.Source: These vampires are becoming a real menace.
String.Dest: 这些吸血鬼正在成为真正的威胁。

String.Source: No matter. Serana will sacrifice her blood for the sake of the prophecy, and I will feast upon yours in Molag Bal's honor!
String.Dest: 不妨事，瑟拉娜会为了预言而牺牲自己的血，而我会为了莫拉格·巴尔的荣耀畅饮你的血！

String.Source: Oh. All right then. You know where to find me.
String.Dest: 哦，那好吧。你知道上哪儿找我。

String.Source: You're sweet. And... I'm not stupid. I can see what you're getting at.
String.Dest: 你很招人喜欢。然后……我也不笨，明白你的意思。

String.Source: All right. I'll meet you at Darkfall Cave.
I'll be around here if you need me.
Get it now while we can!
I'll bring you down!
They say if a vampire so much as scratches you, you'll turn into one. That better not be true.
String.Dest: 他们说被吸血鬼抓伤了，就会变成吸血鬼。这最好不是真的。

String.Source: What would you have of me, master?
No? Well, I've given it a bit of thought.
String.Dest: 没想过？嗯，我已经考虑过了。

String.Source: It will be done, my lord!
Oh, I get it. Is that why you're wearing an Amulet of Mara?
String.Dest: 哦，我懂了。这就是你戴着玛拉护符的原因吗？

String.Source: Seems you're the court favorite. At least, for the moment.
String.Dest: 看来你成了宫廷红人，至少现在如此。

String.Source: It's just... it's not for me.
But... with everything in my past, I don't think I could bring myself to go into a temple and ask for that kind of blessing.
String.Dest: 但是……出了那些事情后，我不认为我还能踏进神殿，去祈求那种祝福。

String.Source: Ah, yes. I see. Well, if you do change your mind, please let me know.
String.Dest: 啊好吧。我明白了。嗯，如果您改变了主意，请告诉我。

String.Source: Oh my, that's... Well, that's not exactly what I had in mind.
String.Dest: 天哪，这太……好吧，这和我想的真不一样。

String.Source: Especially not me. I mean... with my history, I still kind of get a chill just walking by a temple. Can't imagine going in one.
String.Dest: 尤其是我。我是说……考虑到我以前的事，走过神殿还是会有些不寒而栗。实在不敢想象会走进去。

String.Source: Look, you're great. Really. But I just don't think that's for us.
String.Dest: 听着，你人很好，但我就是觉得那不适合我们。

String.Source: Gods, you're one of them! Get yourself cured before you think about asking me to help you again.
String.Dest: 天哪，你成了它们的一员了！想再让我帮忙就先把自己治好。

String.Source: Pitiful. Simply pitiful. I expected more from the defiant fool that beguiled my daughter.
String.Dest: 可怜呐，太可怜了。我还对欺骗我女儿的狂妄傻瓜抱有更大的期望呢。

String.Source: Well, now that's done.
All right. If you say so.
Dragons breathing fire in the sky. Vampires brazenly attacking people on the street. It's the end of the world I tell you.
String.Dest: 天上有龙喷火，街上有吸血鬼横行杀人。我告诉你这是世界末日。

String.Source: If I may ask, what will you do with them now?
String.Dest: 容我问一句，您准备怎么处理他们？

String.Source: Take a deep breath and let it out as you fire.
String.Dest: 深吸一口气，在你射击的时候呼出来。

String.Source: Let's just pretend you didn't, all right?
You're sweet to say that, but you need to sort things out on your own. It's not something I'm going to get involved with.
String.Dest: 你能这么说我很开心，但要你自己去解决现在的问题。这不是要把我牵扯进去的事情。

String.Source: If you're not happy with things... that's not my business.
String.Dest: 如果你对现状不满……那不关我的事。

String.Source: I'm not going to be the one to destroy a marriage. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 我可不想破坏了一段婚姻，抱歉。

String.Source: Set my hatred aside? Not a chance. It's what keeps me strong.
String.Dest: 把仇恨放在一边？没门。仇恨让我坚强。

String.Source: I think my father really died a long time ago. This was just... the end of something else.
String.Dest: 我觉得我父亲其实早就死了。这不过是……别的什么被消灭罢了。

String.Source: Bother someone else.
This was just the end of something else.
String.Dest: 这不过是别的什么被消灭罢了。

String.Source: Do not presume to tell me who I can and cannot trust. I possess the wisdom of a dozen lifetimes, and I will make my own judgements.
String.Dest: 别想着告诉我能不能相信谁。我拥有十几辈子的智慧，我会自己判断。

String.Source: We both know that a band of fools with crossbows is no match for a scion of the ancient blood.
String.Dest: 我们俩都知道一群拿着弩的蠢蛋可比不上古老血脉的后裔。

String.Source: Watch the recoil. Takes some getting used to.
String.Dest: 注意后坐力。得需要点时间适应适应。

String.Source: Once again, the Elder Scrolls have proven their value.
String.Dest: 上古卷轴再次证明了它们的价值。

String.Source: I'm sure Lord Harkon is grateful you've returned his daughter.
String.Dest: 哈孔大人一定很感激你带回了他的女儿。

String.Source: Would you be interested in having the passage to the Courtyard restored? Harkon clearly never cared much for it.
String.Dest: 您有兴趣修复通往院子的通道吗？哈孔显然是不在乎的。

String.Source: All this talk of Elder Scrolls and Auriel's Bow... Lord Harkon's ambition truly is great.
String.Dest: 这番关于上古卷轴和奥瑞艾尔之弓的言论……哈孔大人的抱负确实不小。

String.Source: It would be my pleasure.
Oh dear. No, I'm afraid that's not going to work at all.
String.Dest: 天哪，不，恐怕那根本不管用。

String.Source: What would mudcrabs want with my satchel, anyway?
String.Dest: 话说泥沼蟹要我的包干嘛？

String.Source: You need to concentrate, boy. Try it again.
String.Dest: 小子，你得集中注意力。再试一次。

String.Source: Thank you! You're too kind.
Still, if it means their safe-keeping, I suppose it is worth it.
String.Dest: 尽管如此，如果它们能得到妥善保管，那就是值得的。

String.Source: How would you feel about turning them over to me?
String.Dest: 您觉得把它们给我怎么样？

String.Source: Given how I've lived... what I've done... I can't ask the gods for a blessing like that.
String.Dest: 考虑到我的生活……我所做的……没法向诸神祈求那样的祝福。

String.Source: Look, I care about you. A lot. And I'll come with you wherever you want to go.
String.Dest: 你看，我关心你，非常关心。无论去哪儿我都陪你。

String.Source: I have an alternative for you, if you'd be interested.
String.Dest: 您要是感兴趣，我这有个备选方案。

String.Source: First Serana, now you find a Moth Priest. I'm sure Lord Harkon is very pleased with you... for now.
